authors_text: Ruizhen Hu,Xiangyu Su,Xiangkai Chen,Oliver Van Kaick,Hui Huang
title: Photo-to-Shape Material Transfer for Diverse Structures
title_zh: 适用于多种结构的光塑材料转移
abstract: We introduce a method for assigning photorealistic relightable materials to 3D shapes in an automatic manner. Our method takes as input a photo exemplar of a real object and a 3D object with segmentation, and uses the exemplar to guide the assignment of materials to the parts of the shape, so that the appearance of the resulting shape is as similar as possible to the exemplar. To accomplish this goal, our method combines an image translation neural network with a material assignment neural network. The image translation network translates the color from the exemplar to a projection of the 3D shape and the part segmentation from the projection to the exemplar. Then, the material prediction network assigns materials from a collection of realistic materials to the projected parts, based on the translated images and perceptual similarity of the materials. One key idea of our method is to use the translation network to establish a correspondence between the exemplar and shape projection, which allows us to transfer materials between objects with diverse structures. Another key idea of our method is to use the two pairs of (color, segmentation) images provided by the image translation to guide the material assignment, which enables us to ensure the consistency in the assignment. We demonstrate that our method allows us to assign materials to shapes so that their appearances better resemble the input exemplars, improving the quality of the results over the state-of-the-art method, and allowing us to automatically create thousands of shapes with high-quality photorealistic materials. Code and data for this paper are available at https://github.com/XiangyuSu611/TMT.
summary: We introduce a method for assigning photorealistic relightable materials to 3D shapes in an automatic manner. Our method takes as input a photo exemplar of a real object and a 3D object with segmentation, and uses the exemplar to guide the assignment of materials to the parts of the shape, so that the appearance of the resulting shape is as similar as possible to the exemplar. To accomplish this goal, our method combines an image translation neural network with a material assignment neural network. The image translation network translates the color from the exemplar to a projection of the 3D shape and the part segmentation from the projection to the exemplar. Then, the material prediction network assigns materials from a collection of realistic materials to the projected parts, based on the translated images and perceptual similarity of the materials. One key idea of our method is to use the translation network to establish a correspondence between the exemplar and shape projection, which allows us to transfer materials between objects with diverse structures. Another key idea of our method is to use the two pairs of (color, segmentation) images provided by the image translation to guide the material assignment, which enables us to ensure the consistency in the assignment. We demonstrate that our method allows us to assign materials to shapes so that their appearances better resemble the input exemplars, improving the quality of the results over the state-of-the-art method, and allowing us to automatically create thousands of shapes with high-quality photorealistic materials. Code and data for this paper are available at https://github.com/XiangyuSu611/TMT.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种以自动方式将逼真的可重复照明材质分配给 3D 形状的方法。我们的方法将真实物体的照片样本和经过分割的 3D 物体作为输入，并使用样本来指导将材质分配给形状的各个部分，以便生成的形状的外观尽可能与样本相似。为了实现这一目标，我们的方法将图像翻译神经网络与材料分配神经网络相结合。图像转换网络将颜色从样本转换为 3D 形状的投影，并将部分分割从投影转换为样本。然后，材料预测网络根据翻译的图像和材料的感知相似性，将现实材料集合中的材料分配给投影部分。我们方法的一个关键思想是使用翻译网络在样本和形状投影之间建立对应关系，这使我们能够在具有不同结构的对象之间传输材料。我们方法的另一个关键思想是使用图像翻译提供的两对（颜色、分割）图像来指导材料分配，这使我们能够确保分配的一致性。我们证明，我们的方法允许我们将材质分配给形状，以便它们的外观更好地类似于输入示例，从而比最先进的方法提高结果的质量，并允许我们使用高质量的真实感材质自动创建数千个形状。本文的代码和数据可在https://github.com/XiangyuSu611/TMT获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将真实物体照片中的逼真材质自动分配到3D形状上的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的方法在将材质分配到不同结构的3D形状上时存在局限性，无法实现高质量的视觉相似性。
AI.method: 该方法结合了图像翻译神经网络和材质分配神经网络，通过输入的照片样例和3D物体的分割信息，将颜色和分割信息从照片转换到3D形状投影，并据此分配材质。
AI.result: 该方法能够生成与输入样例高度相似的3D形状，提升了结果质量，并能自动创建数千个高质量的逼真材质形状。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建立样例与形状投影之间的对应关系，实现了跨多样结构的材质迁移，为自动创建高质量3D形状提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yanting Wu,Yuan Sun,S. Shyam Sundar
title: What Do You Get from Turning on Your Video? Effects of Videoconferencing Affordances on Remote Class Experience During COVID-19
title_zh: 打开视频你会得到什么？ COVID-19 期间视频会议功能可供性对远程课堂体验的影响
comment: The paper has been published in Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction (https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3555773)
comments: The paper has been published in Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction (https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3555773)
abstract: The outbreak of COVID-19 forced schools to swiftly transition from in-person classes to online or remote offerings, making educators and learners alike rely on online videoconferencing platforms. Platforms like Zoom offer audio-visual channels of communication and include features that are designed to approximate the classroom experience. However, it is not clear how students' learning experiences are affected by affordances of the videoconferencing platforms or what underlying factors explain the differential effects of these affordances on class experiences of engagement, interaction, and satisfaction. In order to find out, we conducted two online survey studies: Study 1 (N = 176) investigated the effects of three types of videoconferencing affordances (i.e., modality, interactivity, and agency affordances) on class experience during the first two months after the transition to online learning. Results showed that usage of the three kinds of affordances was positively correlated with students' class engagement, interaction, and satisfaction. Perceived anonymity, nonverbal cues, and comfort level were found to be the key mediators. In addition, students' usage of video cameras in class was influenced by their classmates. Study 2 (N = 256) tested the proposed relationships at a later stage of the pandemic and found similar results, thus serving as a constructive replication. This paper focuses on reporting the results of Study 1 since it captures the timely reactions from students when they first went online, and the second study plays a supplementary role in verifying Study 1 and thereby extending its external validity. Together, the two studies provide insights for instructors on how to leverage different videoconferencing affordances to enhance the virtual learning experience. Design implications for digital tools in online education are also discussed.

abstract_zh: COVID-19 的爆发迫使学校迅速从面对面授课转向在线或远程授课，使教育工作者和学习者都依赖在线视频会议平台。 Zoom 等平台提供视听交流渠道，并包含旨在模拟课堂体验的功能。然而，目前尚不清楚视频会议平台的可供性如何影响学生的学习体验，也不清楚哪些潜在因素解释了这些可供性对参与、互动和满意度等课堂体验的不同影响。为了找到答案，我们进行了两项在线调查研究：研究 1 (N = 176) 调查了三种类型的视频会议可供性（即模式、交互性和机构可供性）对在线学习过渡后前两个月课堂体验的影响。结果表明，三种可供性的使用与学生的课堂参与度、互动性和满意度呈正相关。研究发现，感知到的匿名性、非语言暗示和舒适度是关键的中介因素。此外，学生在课堂上使用摄像机的情况也受到同学的影响。研究 2（N = 256）在大流行的后期测试了所提出的关系，并发现了类似的结果，因此可以作为建设性的复制。本文重点报道研究一的结果，因为它捕捉到了学生第一次上网时的及时反应，而研究二则起到了补充作用，验证了研究一，从而扩展了其外部效度。这两项研究共同为教师提供了关于如何利用不同视频会议功能来增强虚拟学习体验的见解。还讨论了在线教育中数字工具的设计含义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视频会议功能对疫情期间远程课堂体验的影响，通过两项在线调查分析了平台特性如何影响学生的参与度、互动性和满意度。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情迫使学校转向在线教学，但视频会议平台的功能如何具体影响学习体验尚不明确，需探索关键中介因素及教学设计优化方向。
AI.method: 通过两项在线问卷调查（Study 1: N=176；Study 2: N=256），分析视频会议的模态、互动性和自主性功能对课堂体验的影响，并检验匿名性、非语言线索和舒适度等中介变量。
AI.result: 三项功能的使用与学生课堂参与度、互动性和满意度呈正相关，其中感知匿名性、非语言线索和舒适度是关键中介因素，且学生使用摄像头受同学行为影响。
AI.conclusion: 教师应合理利用视频会议功能提升虚拟教学效果，研究结果为在线教育工具的设计提供了理论依据和实践建议。

Together, the two studies provide insights for instructors on how to leverage different videoconferencing affordances to enhance the virtual learning experience. Design implications for digital tools in online education are also discussed. COVID-19 的爆发迫使学校迅速从面对面授课转向在线或远程授课，使教育工作者和学习者都依赖在线视频会议平台。 Zoom 等平台提供视听交流渠道，并包含旨在模拟课堂体验的功能。然而，目前尚不清楚视频会议平台的可供性如何影响学生的学习体验，也不清楚哪些潜在因素解释了这些可供性对参与、互动和满意度等课堂体验的不同影响。为了找到答案，我们进行了两项在线调查研究：研究 1 (N = 176) 调查了三种类型的视频会议可供性（即模式、交互性和机构可供性）对在线学习过渡后前两个月课堂体验的影响。结果表明，三种可供性的使用与学生的课堂参与度、互动性和满意度呈正相关。研究发现，感知到的匿名性、非语言暗示和舒适度是关键的中介因素。此外，学生在课堂上使用摄像机的情况也受到同学的影响。研究 2（N = 256）在大流行的后期测试了所提出的关系，并发现了类似的结果，因此可以作为建设性的复制。本文重点报道研究一的结果，因为它捕捉到了学生第一次上网时的及时反应，而研究二则起到了补充作用，验证了研究一，从而扩展了其外部效度。这两项研究共同为教师提供了关于如何利用不同视频会议功能来增强虚拟学习体验的见解。还讨论了在线教育中数字工具的设计含义。 本文研究了视频会议功能对疫情期间远程课堂体验的影响，通过两项在线调查分析了平台特性如何影响学生的参与度、互动性和满意度。 Yanting Wu,Yuan Sun,S. Shyam Sundar cs.HC

authors_text: Eda Okur,Saurav Sahay,Lama Nachman
title: Data Augmentation with Paraphrase Generation and Entity Extraction for Multimodal Dialogue System
title_zh: 多模态对话系统的释义生成和实体提取的数据增强
comment: Proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2022)
abstract: Contextually aware intelligent agents are often required to understand the users and their surroundings in real-time. Our goal is to build Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems that can assist children in their learning process. Within such complex frameworks, Spoken Dialogue Systems (SDS) are crucial building blocks to handle efficient task-oriented communication with children in game-based learning settings. We are working towards a multimodal dialogue system for younger kids learning basic math concepts. Our focus is on improving the Natural Language Understanding (NLU) module of the task-oriented SDS pipeline with limited datasets. This work explores the potential benefits of data augmentation with paraphrase generation for the NLU models trained on small task-specific datasets. We also investigate the effects of extracting entities for conceivably further data expansion. We have shown that paraphrasing with model-in-the-loop (MITL) strategies using small seed data is a promising approach yielding improved performance results for the Intent Recognition task.
summary: Contextually aware intelligent agents are often required to understand the users and their surroundings in real-time. Our goal is to build Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems that can assist children in their learning process. Within such complex frameworks, Spoken Dialogue Systems (SDS) are crucial building blocks to handle efficient task-oriented communication with children in game-based learning settings. We are working towards a multimodal dialogue system for younger kids learning basic math concepts. Our focus is on improving the Natural Language Understanding (NLU) module of the task-oriented SDS pipeline with limited datasets. This work explores the potential benefits of data augmentation with paraphrase generation for the NLU models trained on small task-specific datasets. We also investigate the effects of extracting entities for conceivably further data expansion. We have shown that paraphrasing with model-in-the-loop (MITL) strategies using small seed data is a promising approach yielding improved performance results for the Intent Recognition task.
abstract_zh: 通常需要具有上下文感知能力的智能代理来实时了解用户及其周围环境。我们的目标是建立可以帮助儿童学习过程的人工智能（AI）系统。在如此复杂的框架内，口语对话系统（SDS）是在基于游戏的学习环境中与儿童进行高效的面向任务的沟通的关键构建模块。我们正在努力开发一个多模式对话系统，供年幼的孩子学习基本数学概念。我们的重点是利用有限的数据集改进面向任务的 SDS 管道的自然语言理解 (NLU) 模块。这项工作探讨了通过释义生成对在小型任务特定数据集上训练的 NLU 模型进行数据增强的潜在好处。我们还研究了提取实体以进一步扩展数据的影响。我们已经证明，使用小种子数据的模型在环 (MITL) 策略进行释义是一种很有前途的方法，可以提高意图识别任务的性能结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过释义生成与实体提取的数据增强方法，提升面向儿童数学学习的多模态对话系统中自然语言理解模块的性能。
AI.motivation: 儿童教育场景下任务导向对话系统面临数据集规模有限的挑战，需探索有效的小数据集模型优化方案以提升意图识别准确率。
AI.method: 采用模型-在环（MITL）策略进行迭代式释义生成，结合实体提取技术实现数据扩展，并在小规模种子数据上训练优化NLU模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该数据增强方法显著提升了意图识别任务的性能指标，验证了MITL策略在小数据场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于释义生成与实体提取的数据增强技术能有效缓解小数据问题，为儿童教育类对话系统的NLU优化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Mingrui Yu,Kangchen Lv,Hanzhong Zhong,Shiji Song,Xiang Li
title: Global Model Learning for Large Deformation Control of Elastic Deformable Linear Objects: An Efficient and Adaptive Approach
title_zh: 弹性可变形线性物体大变形控制的全局模型学习：一种高效、自适应的方法
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Project website: https://mingrui-yu.github.io/shape_control_DLO_2 . Journal version of arXiv:2109.11091
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Project website: https://mingrui-yu.github.io/shape_control_DLO_2 . Journal version of arXiv:2109.11091
abstract: Robotic manipulation of deformable linear objects (DLOs) has broad application prospects in many fields. However, a key issue is to obtain the exact deformation models (i.e., how robot motion affects DLO deformation), which are hard to theoretically calculate and vary among different DLOs. Thus, shape control of DLOs is challenging, especially for large deformation control which requires global and more accurate models. In this paper, we propose a coupled offline and online data-driven method for efficiently learning a global deformation model, allowing for both accurate modeling through offline learning and further updating for new DLOs via online adaptation. Specifically, the model approximated by a neural network is first trained offline on random data, then seamlessly migrated to the online phase, and further updated online during actual manipulation. Several strategies are introduced to improve the model's efficiency and generalization ability. We propose a convex-optimization-based controller, and analyze the system's stability using the Lyapunov method. Detailed simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our method can efficiently and precisely estimate the deformation model, and achieve large deformation control of untrained DLOs in 2D and 3D dual-arm manipulation tasks better than the existing methods. It accomplishes all 24 tasks with different desired shapes on different DLOs in the real world, using only simulation data for the offline learning.
summary: Robotic manipulation of deformable linear objects (DLOs) has broad application prospects in many fields. However, a key issue is to obtain the exact deformation models (i.e., how robot motion affects DLO deformation), which are hard to theoretically calculate and vary among different DLOs. Thus, shape control of DLOs is challenging, especially for large deformation control which requires global and more accurate models. In this paper, we propose a coupled offline and online data-driven method for efficiently learning a global deformation model, allowing for both accurate modeling through offline learning and further updating for new DLOs via online adaptation. Specifically, the model approximated by a neural network is first trained offline on random data, then seamlessly migrated to the online phase, and further updated online during actual manipulation. Several strategies are introduced to improve the model's efficiency and generalization ability. We propose a convex-optimization-based controller, and analyze the system's stability using the Lyapunov method. Detailed simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our method can efficiently and precisely estimate the deformation model, and achieve large deformation control of untrained DLOs in 2D and 3D dual-arm manipulation tasks better than the existing methods. It accomplishes all 24 tasks with different desired shapes on different DLOs in the real world, using only simulation data for the offline learning.
abstract_zh: 可变形线性物体（DLO）的机器人操纵在许多领域具有广阔的应用前景。然而，一个关键问题是获得精确的变形模型（即机器人运动如何影响 DLO 变形），这很难从理论上计算，并且在不同的 DLO 之间存在差异。因此，DLO 的形状控制具有挑战性，特别是对于需要全局且更准确的模型的大变形控制。在本文中，我们提出了一种耦合离线和在线数据驱动的方法，用于有效学习全局变形模型，允许通过离线学习进行精确建模，并通过在线适应进一步更新新的 DLO。具体来说，神经网络逼近的模型首先在随机数据上进行离线训练，然后无缝迁移到在线阶段，并在实际操作过程中进一步在线更新。引入了几种策略来提高模型的效率和泛化能力。我们提出了一种基于凸优化的控制器，并使用 Lyapunov 方法分析系统的稳定性。详细的模拟和真实实验表明，我们的方法可以有效、精确地估计变形模型，并且比现有方法更好地在 2D 和 3D 双臂操纵任务中实现未经训练的 DLO 的大变形控制。它在现实世界中的不同 DLO 上完成了所有 24 个具有不同所需形状的任务，仅使用模拟数据进行离线学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合离线和在线学习的耦合方法，用于高效学习弹性可变形线性物体（DLO）的全局变形模型，以实现精确的大变形控制。
AI.motivation: DLO的变形模型难以理论计算且因物体而异，现有方法在大变形控制中存在全局性和精度不足的问题，亟需一种高效适应不同DLO的建模方法。
AI.method: 采用神经网络离线训练全局模型并迁移至在线阶段，通过在线更新适应新DLO；结合凸优化控制器与李雅普诺夫稳定性分析，提升模型效率与泛化能力。
AI.result: 仿真与实物实验表明，该方法能高效估计变形模型，在2D和3D双臂任务中优于现有方法，仅用仿真数据即可完成24种不同DLO的变形控制任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的离线-在线耦合方法实现了对未训练DLO的精确大变形控制，验证了模型的高效性与通用性，为柔性物体操控提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuanhao Li,Yu Liu,Zhiqiang Ma,Panfeng Huang
title: A Novel Generative Convolutional Neural Network for Robot Grasp Detection on Gaussian Guidance
title_zh: 一种用于高斯制导下机器人抓取检测的新型生成卷积神经网络
abstract: The vision-based grasp detection method is an important research direction in the field of robotics. However, due to the rectangle metric of the grasp detection rectangle's limitation, a false-positive grasp occurs, resulting in the failure of the real-world robot grasp task. In this paper, we propose a novel generative convolutional neural network model to improve the accuracy and robustness of robot grasp detection in real-world scenes. First, a Gaussian-based guided training method is used to encode the quality of the grasp point and grasp angle in the grasp pose, highlighting the highest-quality grasp point position and grasp angle and reducing the generation of false-positive grasps. Simultaneously, deformable convolution is used to obtain the shape features of the object in order to guide the subsequent network to the position. Furthermore, a global-local feature fusion method is introduced in order to efficiently obtain finer features during the feature reconstruction stage, allowing the network to focus on the features of the grasped objects. On the Cornell Grasping Datasets and Jacquard Datasets, our method achieves excellent performance of 99.0$\%$ and 95.9$\%$, respectively. Finally, the proposed method is put to the test in a real-world robot grasping scenario.
summary: The vision-based grasp detection method is an important research direction in the field of robotics. However, due to the rectangle metric of the grasp detection rectangle's limitation, a false-positive grasp occurs, resulting in the failure of the real-world robot grasp task. In this paper, we propose a novel generative convolutional neural network model to improve the accuracy and robustness of robot grasp detection in real-world scenes. First, a Gaussian-based guided training method is used to encode the quality of the grasp point and grasp angle in the grasp pose, highlighting the highest-quality grasp point position and grasp angle and reducing the generation of false-positive grasps. Simultaneously, deformable convolution is used to obtain the shape features of the object in order to guide the subsequent network to the position. Furthermore, a global-local feature fusion method is introduced in order to efficiently obtain finer features during the feature reconstruction stage, allowing the network to focus on the features of the grasped objects. On the Cornell Grasping Datasets and Jacquard Datasets, our method achieves excellent performance of 99.0$\%$ and 95.9$\%$, respectively. Finally, the proposed method is put to the test in a real-world robot grasping scenario.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的抓取检测方法是机器人领域的一个重要研究方向。然而，由于抓取检测矩形的矩形度量的限制，会出现误报抓取，导致现实世界的机器人抓取任务失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的生成卷积神经网络模型，以提高现实场景中机器人抓取检测的准确性和鲁棒性。首先，采用基于高斯的引导训练方法对抓取姿势中抓取点和抓取角度的质量进行编码，突出最高质量的抓取点位置和抓取角度，减少误报抓取的产生。同时，利用可变形卷积来获取物体的形状特征，以指导后续网络进行定位。此外，引入了全局-局部特征融合方法，以便在特征重建阶段有效地获得更精细的特征，使网络能够专注于所抓取物体的特征。在 Cornell Grasping 数据集和 Jacquard 数据集上，我们的方法分别取得了 99.0$\%$ 和 95.9$\%$ 的优异性能。最后，所提出的方法在现实世界的机器人抓取场景中进行了测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯引导的生成卷积神经网络模型，用于提升机器人抓取检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉抓取检测方法因抓取框矩形度量限制导致误检，影响实际机器人抓取任务效果，需改进检测精度与稳定性。
AI.method: 采用高斯引导训练编码抓取点质量与角度，结合可变形卷积提取物体形状特征，并引入全局-局部特征融合方法优化特征重建。
AI.result: 在Cornell和Jacquard数据集上分别达到99.0%和95.9%的优异性能，并成功应用于实际机器人抓取场景测试。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过高斯引导与特征融合有效减少误检，显著提升复杂场景下机器人抓取检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Chen Wu,Yin Song,Verdi March,Eden Duthie
title: Learning from Drivers to Tackle the Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge
title_zh: 向司机学习以应对亚马逊最后一英里路线研究挑战
abstract: The goal of the Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge is to integrate the real-life experience of Amazon drivers into the solution of optimal route planning and optimization. This paper presents our method that tackles this challenge by hierarchically combining machine learning and conventional Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) solvers. Our method reaps the benefits from both worlds. On the one hand, our method encodes driver know-how by learning a sequential probability model from historical routes at the zone level, where each zone contains a few parcel stops. It then uses a single step policy iteration method, known as the Rollout algorithm, to generate plausible zone sequences sampled from the learned probability model. On the other hand, our method utilizes proven methods developed in the rich TSP literature to sequence stops within each zone efficiently. The outcome of such a combination appeared to be promising. Our method obtained an evaluation score of $0.0374$, which is comparable to what the top three teams have achieved on the official Challenge leaderboard. Moreover, our learning-based method is applicable to driving routes that may exhibit distinct sequential patterns beyond the scope of this Challenge. The source code of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/aws-samples/amazon-sagemaker-amazon-routing-challenge-sol
summary: The goal of the Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge is to integrate the real-life experience of Amazon drivers into the solution of optimal route planning and optimization. This paper presents our method that tackles this challenge by hierarchically combining machine learning and conventional Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) solvers. Our method reaps the benefits from both worlds. On the one hand, our method encodes driver know-how by learning a sequential probability model from historical routes at the zone level, where each zone contains a few parcel stops. It then uses a single step policy iteration method, known as the Rollout algorithm, to generate plausible zone sequences sampled from the learned probability model. On the other hand, our method utilizes proven methods developed in the rich TSP literature to sequence stops within each zone efficiently. The outcome of such a combination appeared to be promising. Our method obtained an evaluation score of $0.0374$, which is comparable to what the top three teams have achieved on the official Challenge leaderboard. Moreover, our learning-based method is applicable to driving routes that may exhibit distinct sequential patterns beyond the scope of this Challenge. The source code of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/aws-samples/amazon-sagemaker-amazon-routing-challenge-sol
abstract_zh: 亚马逊最后一英里路线研究挑战赛的目标是将亚马逊司机的现实生活体验融入到最佳路线规划和优化的解决方案中。本文介绍了我们通过分层组合机器学习和传统旅行商问题（TSP）求解器来应对这一挑战的方法。我们的方法从两个方面获益。一方面，我们的方法通过从区域级别的历史路线（每个区域包含几个包裹站点）学习顺序概率模型来编码驾驶员的知识。然后，它使用单步策略迭代方法（称为 Rollout 算法）来生成从学习的概率模型中采样的合理区域序列。另一方面，我们的方法利用丰富的 TSP 文献中开发的成熟方法来有效地对每个区域内的停靠点进行排序。这种组合的结果似乎是有希望的。我们的方法获得了 0.0374 美元的评估分数，这与官方挑战赛排行榜上前三名的团队所取得的成绩相当。此外，我们基于学习的方法适用于可能表现出超出本次挑战赛范围的不同顺序模式的驾驶路线。我们方法的源代码可在 https://github.com/aws-samples/amazon-sagemaker-amazon-routing-challenge-sol 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器学习与传统旅行商问题（TSP）求解器的分层方法，以解决亚马逊最后一公里路线规划挑战，整合司机经验优化路线。
AI.motivation: 亚马逊最后一公里路线规划需融合司机实际经验与算法优化，传统方法难以捕捉复杂路线模式，需探索新方法提升效率。
AI.method: 通过分层结合机器学习与TSP求解器：1) 在区域层级学习历史路线的序列概率模型，利用Rollout算法生成区域序列；2) 在区域内使用TSP方法优化停靠点顺序。
AI.result: 方法在挑战赛中取得0.0374的评价分数，与前三名相当，且代码开源，适用于更广泛的路线场景。
AI.conclusion: 融合司机经验与算法优化的混合方法有效，为复杂路线规划提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Hong-Yi Wang,Tian-Sheuan Chang
title: Row-wise Accelerator for Vision Transformer
title_zh: Vision Transformer 的行式加速器
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures, published in IEEE AICAS 2022
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures, published in IEEE AICAS 2022
abstract: Following the success of the natural language processing, the transformer for vision applications has attracted significant attention in recent years due to its excellent performance. However, existing deep learning hardware accelerators for vision cannot execute this structure efficiently due to significant model architecture differences. As a result, this paper proposes the hardware accelerator for vision transformers with row-wise scheduling, which decomposes major operations in vision transformers as a single dot product primitive for a unified and efficient execution. Furthermore, by sharing weights in columns, we can reuse the data and reduce the usage of memory. The implementation with TSMC 40nm CMOS technology only requires 262K gate count and 149KB SRAM buffer for 403.2 GOPS throughput at 600MHz clock frequency.
summary: Following the success of the natural language processing, the transformer for vision applications has attracted significant attention in recent years due to its excellent performance. However, existing deep learning hardware accelerators for vision cannot execute this structure efficiently due to significant model architecture differences. As a result, this paper proposes the hardware accelerator for vision transformers with row-wise scheduling, which decomposes major operations in vision transformers as a single dot product primitive for a unified and efficient execution. Furthermore, by sharing weights in columns, we can reuse the data and reduce the usage of memory. The implementation with TSMC 40nm CMOS technology only requires 262K gate count and 149KB SRAM buffer for 403.2 GOPS throughput at 600MHz clock frequency.
abstract_zh: 随着自然语言处理的成功，用于视觉应用的变压器由于其优异的性能近年来引起了广泛的关注。然而，由于显着的模型架构差异，现有的视觉深度学习硬件加速器无法有效地执行此结构。因此，本文提出了具有行式调度的视觉变换器硬件加速器，它将视觉变换器中的主要操作分解为单个点积原语，以实现统一高效的执行。此外，通过共享列中的权重，我们可以重用数据并减少内存的使用。采用 TSMC 40nm CMOS 技术实现仅需要 262K 门数和 149KB SRAM 缓冲区，即可在 600MHz 时钟频率下实现 403.2 GOPS 吞吐量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对视觉Transformer的行调度硬件加速器，通过统一执行结构和内存优化提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉处理硬件因架构差异无法高效执行Transformer模型，导致计算资源浪费和性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 将视觉Transformer核心操作分解为单一点积原语，结合列权重共享机制实现数据重用和内存压缩。
AI.result: 基于40nm工艺实现262K门电路和149KB SRAM的加速器，在600MHz频率下达到403.2 GOPS吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过架构级优化显著提升视觉Transformer的硬件执行效率，为专用加速器开发提供新思路。

authors_text: An-Jung Huang,Kai-Chieh Hsu,Tian-Sheuan Chang
title: A Real Time Super Resolution Accelerator with Tilted Layer Fusion
title_zh: 具有倾斜层融合的实时超分辨率加速器
abstract: Deep learning based superresolution achieves high-quality results, but its heavy computational workload, large buffer, and high external memory bandwidth inhibit its usage in mobile devices. To solve the above issues, this paper proposes a real-time hardware accelerator with the tilted layer fusion method that reduces the external DRAM bandwidth by 92\% and just needs 102KB on-chip memory. The design implemented with a 40nm CMOS process achieves 1920x1080@60fps throughput with 544.3K gate count when running at 600MHz; it has higher throughput and lower area cost than previous designs.
summary: Deep learning based superresolution achieves high-quality results, but its heavy computational workload, large buffer, and high external memory bandwidth inhibit its usage in mobile devices. To solve the above issues, this paper proposes a real-time hardware accelerator with the tilted layer fusion method that reduces the external DRAM bandwidth by 92\% and just needs 102KB on-chip memory. The design implemented with a 40nm CMOS process achieves 1920x1080@60fps throughput with 544.3K gate count when running at 600MHz; it has higher throughput and lower area cost than previous designs.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的超分辨率取得了高质量的结果，但其繁重的计算工作量、大的缓冲区和高的外部存储器带宽限制了其在移动设备中的使用。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种采用倾斜层融合方法的实时硬件加速器，将外部DRAM带宽减少了92%，并且只需要102KB片上存储器。采用40nm CMOS工艺实现的设计在600MHz运行时可实现1920x1080@60fps吞吐量和544.3K门数；与以前的设计相比，它具有更高的吞吐量和更低的面积成本。

AI.tldr: 设计一种基于倾斜层融合的实时超分辨率硬件加速器，以解决移动设备上的计算与内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习超分辨率算法计算量大、内存带宽需求高，难以在移动设备上高效运行。
AI.method: 提出倾斜层融合方法，通过硬件加速器设计减少外部DRAM带宽需求，并优化片上内存使用。
AI.result: 实现1920x1080@60fps吞吐量，外部DRAM带宽降低92%，仅需102KB片上内存，面积成本优于现有方案。
AI.conclusion: 该加速器在保持高性能的同时显著降低硬件资源需求，适用于移动设备实时超分辨率场景。

authors_text: Yu-Hsiang Chiang,Cheng En Ni,Yun Sung,Tuo-Hung Hou,Tian-Sheuan Chang,Shyh Jye Jou
title: Hardware-Robust In-RRAM-Computing for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于物体检测的硬件鲁棒性 RRAM 内计算
abstract: In-memory computing is becoming a popular architecture for deep-learning hardware accelerators recently due to its highly parallel computing, low power, and low area cost. However, in-RRAM computing (IRC) suffered from large device variation and numerous nonideal effects in hardware. Although previous approaches including these effects in model training successfully improved variation tolerance, they only considered part of the nonideal effects and relatively simple classification tasks. This paper proposes a joint hardware and software optimization strategy to design a hardware-robust IRC macro for object detection. We lower the cell current by using a low word-line voltage to enable a complete convolution calculation in one operation that minimizes the impact of nonlinear addition. We also implement ternary weight mapping and remove batch normalization for better tolerance against device variation, sense amplifier variation, and IR drop problem. An extra bias is included to overcome the limitation of the current sensing range. The proposed approach has been successfully applied to a complex object detection task with only 3.85\% mAP drop, whereas a naive design suffers catastrophic failure under these nonideal effects.
summary: In-memory computing is becoming a popular architecture for deep-learning hardware accelerators recently due to its highly parallel computing, low power, and low area cost. However, in-RRAM computing (IRC) suffered from large device variation and numerous nonideal effects in hardware. Although previous approaches including these effects in model training successfully improved variation tolerance, they only considered part of the nonideal effects and relatively simple classification tasks. This paper proposes a joint hardware and software optimization strategy to design a hardware-robust IRC macro for object detection. We lower the cell current by using a low word-line voltage to enable a complete convolution calculation in one operation that minimizes the impact of nonlinear addition. We also implement ternary weight mapping and remove batch normalization for better tolerance against device variation, sense amplifier variation, and IR drop problem. An extra bias is included to overcome the limitation of the current sensing range. The proposed approach has been successfully applied to a complex object detection task with only 3.85\% mAP drop, whereas a naive design suffers catastrophic failure under these nonideal effects.
abstract_zh: 内存计算由于其高度并行计算、低功耗和低面积成本，最近正在成为深度学习硬件加速器的流行架构。然而，RRAM 内计算 (IRC) 遭受了较大的设备变化和硬件中的许多非理想影响。尽管以前的方法在模型训练中包含这些效应，成功地提高了变异容忍度，但它们只考虑了部分非理想效应和相对简单的分类任务。本文提出了一种联合硬件和软件优化策略来设计用于目标检测的硬件鲁棒性 IRC 宏。我们通过使用低字线电压来降低单元电流，从而在一次操作中实现完整的卷积计算，从而最大限度地减少非线性加法的影响。我们还实现了三元权重映射并删除了批量归一化，以更好地容忍器件变化、感测放大器变化和 IR 压降问题。包含额外的偏置以克服电流检测范围的限制。所提出的方法已成功应用于复杂的目标检测任务，mAP 仅下降 3.85%，而简单的设计在这些非理想效果下会遭受灾难性的失败。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合软硬件优化策略，设计鲁棒的忆阻器内计算宏，用于复杂目标检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有忆阻器内计算（IRC）方法仅考虑部分非理想效应且针对简单分类任务，难以应对复杂目标检测中的硬件变异和非线性问题。
AI.method: 采用低字线电压降低单元电流以抑制非线性叠加，引入三值权重映射与去除批归一化层，配合额外偏置补偿感知放大器变异和IR压降问题。
AI.result: 在复杂目标检测任务中实现仅3.85%的mAP精度损失，而传统设计在相同非理想条件下出现灾难性失效。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过系统性硬件适配与算法优化，显著提升了忆阻器内计算在复杂视觉任务中的鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种联合软硬件优化策略，设计鲁棒的忆阻器内计算宏，用于复杂目标检测任务。

authors_text: Dmitrij Sitenko,Bastian Boll,Christoph Schnörr
title: A Nonlocal Graph-PDE and Higher-Order Geometric Integration for Image Labeling
title_zh: 用于图像标记的非局部图偏微分方程和高阶几何积分
abstract: This paper introduces a novel nonlocal partial difference equation (G-PDE) for labeling metric data on graphs. The G-PDE is derived as nonlocal reparametrization of the assignment flow approach that was introduced in \textit{J.~Math.~Imaging \& Vision} 58(2), 2017. Due to this parameterization, solving the G-PDE numerically is shown to be equivalent to computing the Riemannian gradient flow with respect to a nonconvex potential. We devise an entropy-regularized difference-of-convex-functions (DC) decomposition of this potential and show that the basic geometric Euler scheme for integrating the assignment flow is equivalent to solving the G-PDE by an established DC programming scheme. Moreover, the viewpoint of geometric integration reveals a basic way to exploit higher-order information of the vector field that drives the assignment flow, in order to devise a novel accelerated DC programming scheme. A detailed convergence analysis of both numerical schemes is provided and illustrated by numerical experiments.
summary: This paper introduces a novel nonlocal partial difference equation (G-PDE) for labeling metric data on graphs. The G-PDE is derived as nonlocal reparametrization of the assignment flow approach that was introduced in \textit{J.~Math.~Imaging \& Vision} 58(2), 2017. Due to this parameterization, solving the G-PDE numerically is shown to be equivalent to computing the Riemannian gradient flow with respect to a nonconvex potential. We devise an entropy-regularized difference-of-convex-functions (DC) decomposition of this potential and show that the basic geometric Euler scheme for integrating the assignment flow is equivalent to solving the G-PDE by an established DC programming scheme. Moreover, the viewpoint of geometric integration reveals a basic way to exploit higher-order information of the vector field that drives the assignment flow, in order to devise a novel accelerated DC programming scheme. A detailed convergence analysis of both numerical schemes is provided and illustrated by numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的非局部偏微分方程（G-PDE），用于在图上标记度量数据。 G-PDE 是由 \textit{J.~Math.~Imaging \& Vision} 58(2), 2017 中介绍的分配流方法的非局部重参数化导出的。由于这种参数化，数值求解 G-PDE 相当于计算关于非凸势的黎曼梯度流。我们设计了该势的熵正则化凸函数差 (DC) 分解，并表明用于积分分配流的基本几何欧拉方案等效于通过已建立的 DC 编程方案求解 G-PDE。此外，几何积分的观点揭示了利用驱动分配流的矢量场的高阶信息的基本方法，以设计一种新颖的加速DC编程方案。提供了两种数值方案的详细收敛性分析，并通过数值实验进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非局部图偏微分方程（G-PDE）用于图像标注，通过几何积分方法改进现有算法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像标注方法在处理复杂数据时存在效率不足及非凸优化困难的问题，需更高效的数值计算方案。
AI.method: 基于非局部重参数化构建G-PDE，采用熵正则化DC分解处理非凸势能，并通过几何积分开发加速DC编程方案。
AI.result: 理论分析证明算法收敛性，数值实验验证了方法在图像标注任务中的有效性与加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的G-PDE框架为图像标注提供了新的数学工具，结合几何积分显著提升了优化效率。

authors_text: Ankur Bapna,Isaac Caswell,Julia Kreutzer,Orhan Firat,Daan van Esch,Aditya Siddhant,Mengmeng Niu,Pallavi Baljekar,Xavier Garcia,Wolfgang Macherey,Theresa Breiner,Vera Axelrod,Jason Riesa,Yuan Cao,Mia Xu Chen,Klaus Macherey,Maxim Krikun,Pidong Wang,Alexander Gutkin,Apurva Shah,Yanping Huang,Zhifeng Chen,Yonghui Wu,Macduff Hughes
title: Building Machine Translation Systems for the Next Thousand Languages
title_zh: 为未来一千种语言构建机器翻译系统
comment: V2: updated with some details from 24-language Google Translate launch in May 2022 V3: spelling corrections, additional acknowledgements
comments: V2: updated with some details from 24-language Google Translate launch in May 2022 V3: spelling corrections, additional acknowledgements
abstract: In this paper we share findings from our effort to build practical machine translation (MT) systems capable of translating across over one thousand languages. We describe results in three research domains: (i) Building clean, web-mined datasets for 1500+ languages by leveraging semi-supervised pre-training for language identification and developing data-driven filtering techniques; (ii) Developing practical MT models for under-served languages by leveraging massively multilingual models trained with supervised parallel data for over 100 high-resource languages and monolingual datasets for an additional 1000+ languages; and (iii) Studying the limitations of evaluation metrics for these languages and conducting qualitative analysis of the outputs from our MT models, highlighting several frequent error modes of these types of models. We hope that our work provides useful insights to practitioners working towards building MT systems for currently understudied languages, and highlights research directions that can complement the weaknesses of massively multilingual models in data-sparse settings.
summary: In this paper we share findings from our effort to build practical machine translation (MT) systems capable of translating across over one thousand languages. We describe results in three research domains: (i) Building clean, web-mined datasets for 1500+ languages by leveraging semi-supervised pre-training for language identification and developing data-driven filtering techniques; (ii) Developing practical MT models for under-served languages by leveraging massively multilingual models trained with supervised parallel data for over 100 high-resource languages and monolingual datasets for an additional 1000+ languages; and (iii) Studying the limitations of evaluation metrics for these languages and conducting qualitative analysis of the outputs from our MT models, highlighting several frequent error modes of these types of models. We hope that our work provides useful insights to practitioners working towards building MT systems for currently understudied languages, and highlights research directions that can complement the weaknesses of massively multilingual models in data-sparse settings.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们分享了我们在构建能够翻译一千多种语言的实用机器翻译 (MT) 系统方面的成果。我们描述了三个研究领域的成果：(i) 通过利用半监督预训练进行语言识别并开发数据驱动的过滤技术，为 1500 多种语言构建干净的、网络挖掘的数据集； (ii) 利用经过 100 多种高资源语言的监督并行数据训练的大规模多语言模型以及针对另外 1000 多种语言的单语言数据集，为服务不足的语言开发实用的 MT 模型； (iii) 研究这些语言评估指标的局限性，并对我们的机器翻译模型的输出进行定性分析，强调这些类型模型的几种常见错误模式。我们希望我们的工作为致力于为当前研究的语言构建机器翻译系统的从业者提供有用的见解，并突出可以补充数据稀疏环境中大规模多语言模型的弱点的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 构建支持上千种语言的实用机器翻译系统
AI.motivation: 解决当前机器翻译系统对低资源语言支持不足的问题，推动多语言翻译技术的普及与研究
AI.method: 通过半监督预训练与数据过滤构建多语言数据集，结合高资源语言平行数据和低资源语言单语数据训练多语言模型，并分析评估指标局限性与模型错误模式
AI.result: 成功构建1500+语言数据集及实用MT系统，发现评估指标在低资源场景的不足，识别出模型常见错误类型
AI.conclusion: 为低资源语言MT系统开发提供实践参考，指出需结合数据增强与评估优化以弥补多语言模型在数据稀疏场景的缺陷

authors_text: Aiswarya Sankar,Ankit Chadha
title: ACM -- Attribute Conditioning for Abstractive Multi Document Summarization
title_zh: ACM——抽象多文档摘要的属性条件
abstract: Abstractive multi document summarization has evolved as a task through the basic sequence to sequence approaches to transformer and graph based techniques. Each of these approaches has primarily focused on the issues of multi document information synthesis and attention based approaches to extract salient information. A challenge that arises with multi document summarization which is not prevalent in single document summarization is the need to effectively summarize multiple documents that might have conflicting polarity, sentiment or subjective information about a given topic. In this paper we propose ACM, attribute conditioned multi document summarization,a model that incorporates attribute conditioning modules in order to decouple conflicting information by conditioning for a certain attribute in the output summary. This approach shows strong gains in ROUGE score over baseline multi document summarization approaches and shows gains in fluency, informativeness and reduction in repetitiveness as shown through a human annotation analysis study.
summary: Abstractive multi document summarization has evolved as a task through the basic sequence to sequence approaches to transformer and graph based techniques. Each of these approaches has primarily focused on the issues of multi document information synthesis and attention based approaches to extract salient information. A challenge that arises with multi document summarization which is not prevalent in single document summarization is the need to effectively summarize multiple documents that might have conflicting polarity, sentiment or subjective information about a given topic. In this paper we propose ACM, attribute conditioned multi document summarization,a model that incorporates attribute conditioning modules in order to decouple conflicting information by conditioning for a certain attribute in the output summary. This approach shows strong gains in ROUGE score over baseline multi document summarization approaches and shows gains in fluency, informativeness and reduction in repetitiveness as shown through a human annotation analysis study.
abstract_zh: 抽象多文档摘要已经发展成为一项任务，通过基本的序列到序列方法、变压器和基于图形的技术。这些方法中的每一种都主要关注多文档信息合成的问题和基于注意力的方法来提取显着信息。多文档摘要带来的挑战（在单文档摘要中并不普遍）是需要有效地总结多个文档，这些文档可能具有关于给定主题的冲突的极性、情绪或主观信息。在本文中，我们提出了 ACM（属性条件多文档摘要），这是一种包含属性条件模块的模型，以便通过对输出摘要中的某个属性进行条件来解耦冲突信息。与基线多文档摘要方法相比，该方法在 ROUGE 分数上显示出巨大的进步，并且通过人工注释分析研究显示出在流畅性、信息性和重复性减少方面的进步。

AI.tldr: 提出ACM模型，通过属性条件模块解决多文档摘要中的冲突信息问题
AI.motivation: 多文档摘要面临不同文档存在冲突极性/情感/主观信息的挑战，现有方法难以有效处理此类冲突
AI.method: 引入属性条件模块，在生成摘要时根据特定属性解耦冲突信息
AI.result: ROUGE分数显著提升，人工分析显示流畅性/信息量提升且重复性降低
AI.conclusion: ACM模型有效解决多文档摘要中的冲突信息问题，为该领域提供新思路

A challenge that arises with multi document summarization which is not prevalent in single document summarization is the need to effectively summarize multiple documents that might have conflicting polarity, sentiment or subjective information about a given topic. In this paper we propose ACM, attribute conditioned multi document summarization,a model that incorporates attribute conditioning modules in order to decouple conflicting information by conditioning for a certain attribute in the output summary. This approach shows strong gains in ROUGE score over baseline multi document summarization approaches and shows gains in fluency, informativeness and reduction in repetitiveness as shown through a human annotation analysis study. 抽象多文档摘要已经发展成为一项任务，通过基本的序列到序列方法、变压器和基于图形的技术。这些方法中的每一种都主要关注多文档信息合成的问题和基于注意力的方法来提取显着信息。多文档摘要带来的挑战（在单文档摘要中并不普遍）是需要有效地总结多个文档，这些文档可能具有关于给定主题的冲突的极性、情绪或主观信息。在本文中，我们提出了 ACM（属性条件多文档摘要），这是一种包含属性条件模块的模型，以便通过对输出摘要中的某个属性进行条件来解耦冲突信息。与基线多文档摘要方法相比，该方法在 ROUGE 分数上显示出巨大的进步，并且通过人工注释分析研究显示出在流畅性、信息性和重复性减少方面的进步。 提出ACM模型，通过属性条件模块解决多文档摘要中的冲突信息问题 Aiswarya Sankar,Ankit Chadha cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Fei Wang,Zhewei Xu,Pedro Szekely,Muhao Chen
title: Robust (Controlled) Table-to-Text Generation with Structure-Aware Equivariance Learning
title_zh: 具有结构感知等方差学习的鲁棒（受控）表到文本生成
abstract: Controlled table-to-text generation seeks to generate natural language descriptions for highlighted subparts of a table. Previous SOTA systems still employ a sequence-to-sequence generation method, which merely captures the table as a linear structure and is brittle when table layouts change. We seek to go beyond this paradigm by (1) effectively expressing the relations of content pieces in the table, and (2) making our model robust to content-invariant structural transformations. Accordingly, we propose an equivariance learning framework, which encodes tables with a structure-aware self-attention mechanism. This prunes the full self-attention structure into an order-invariant graph attention that captures the connected graph structure of cells belonging to the same row or column, and it differentiates between relevant cells and irrelevant cells from the structural perspective. Our framework also modifies the positional encoding mechanism to preserve the relative position of tokens in the same cell but enforce position invariance among different cells. Our technology is free to be plugged into existing table-to-text generation models, and has improved T5-based models to offer better performance on ToTTo and HiTab. Moreover, on a harder version of ToTTo, we preserve promising performance, while previous SOTA systems, even with transformation-based data augmentation, have seen significant performance drops. Our code is available at https://github.com/luka-group/Lattice.
summary: Controlled table-to-text generation seeks to generate natural language descriptions for highlighted subparts of a table. Previous SOTA systems still employ a sequence-to-sequence generation method, which merely captures the table as a linear structure and is brittle when table layouts change. We seek to go beyond this paradigm by (1) effectively expressing the relations of content pieces in the table, and (2) making our model robust to content-invariant structural transformations. Accordingly, we propose an equivariance learning framework, which encodes tables with a structure-aware self-attention mechanism. This prunes the full self-attention structure into an order-invariant graph attention that captures the connected graph structure of cells belonging to the same row or column, and it differentiates between relevant cells and irrelevant cells from the structural perspective. Our framework also modifies the positional encoding mechanism to preserve the relative position of tokens in the same cell but enforce position invariance among different cells. Our technology is free to be plugged into existing table-to-text generation models, and has improved T5-based models to offer better performance on ToTTo and HiTab. Moreover, on a harder version of ToTTo, we preserve promising performance, while previous SOTA systems, even with transformation-based data augmentation, have seen significant performance drops. Our code is available at https://github.com/luka-group/Lattice.
abstract_zh: 受控的表格到文本生成旨在为表格的突出显示子部分生成自然语言描述。以前的SOTA系统仍然采用序列到序列的生成方法，该方法仅将表捕获为线性结构，并且当表布局发生变化时很脆弱。我们试图通过以下方式超越这种范式：（1）有效地表达表中内容片段的关系，以及（2）使我们的模型对内容不变的结构转换具有鲁棒性。因此，我们提出了一个等方差学习框架，它使用结构感知的自注意力机制对表进行编码。这将完整的自注意力结构修剪为顺序不变的图注意力，捕获属于同一行或列的单元格的连通图结构，并从结构角度区分相关单元格和不相关单元格。我们的框架还修改了位置编码机制，以保留同一单元中令牌的相对位置，但强制不同单元之间的位置不变性。我们的技术可以免费插入现有的表格到文本生成模型，并改进了基于 T5 的模型，以在 ToTTo 和 HiTab 上提供更好的性能。此外，在更难的 ToTTo 版本上，我们保持了良好的性能，而以前的 SOTA 系统，即使采用基于转换的数据增强，性能也出现了显着下降。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/luka-group/Lattice 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结构感知的等变学习框架，用于生成对表格结构变化鲁棒的可控表格到文本描述。
AI.motivation: 现有表格到文本生成方法将表格视为线性结构，难以应对表格布局变化导致的性能下降，需提升模型对结构不变性变换的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计结构感知自注意力机制，将表格编码为行/列连接的图结构，并改进位置编码以保持单元格内相对位置同时实现跨单元格位置不变性。
AI.result: 在ToTTo和HiTab数据集上提升T5基线性能，尤其在更难的ToTTo版本中保持稳定表现，而传统方法性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结构感知等变学习有效提升表格到文本生成的鲁棒性，且可无缝集成到现有模型中。

authors_text: Yan Long,Chen Yan,Shilin Xiao,Shivan Prasad,Wenyuan Xu,Kevin Fu
title: Private Eye: On the Limits of Textual Screen Peeking via Eyeglass Reflections in Video Conferencing
title_zh: 私家侦探：视频会议中通过眼镜反射窥视文本屏幕的局限性
comment: ef:2023 IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
comments: ef:2023 IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
abstract: Using mathematical modeling and human subjects experiments, this research explores the extent to which emerging webcams might leak recognizable textual and graphical information gleaming from eyeglass reflections captured by webcams. The primary goal of our work is to measure, compute, and predict the factors, limits, and thresholds of recognizability as webcam technology evolves in the future. Our work explores and characterizes the viable threat models based on optical attacks using multi-frame super resolution techniques on sequences of video frames. Our models and experimental results in a controlled lab setting show it is possible to reconstruct and recognize with over 75% accuracy on-screen texts that have heights as small as 10 mm with a 720p webcam. We further apply this threat model to web textual contents with varying attacker capabilities to find thresholds at which text becomes recognizable. Our user study with 20 participants suggests present-day 720p webcams are sufficient for adversaries to reconstruct textual content on big-font websites. Our models further show that the evolution towards 4K cameras will tip the threshold of text leakage to reconstruction of most header texts on popular websites. Besides textual targets, a case study on recognizing a closed-world dataset of Alexa top 100 websites with 720p webcams shows a maximum recognition accuracy of 94% with 10 participants even without using machine-learning models. Our research proposes near-term mitigations including a software prototype that users can use to blur the eyeglass areas of their video streams. For possible long-term defenses, we advocate an individual reflection testing procedure to assess threats under various settings, and justify the importance of following the principle of least privilege for privacy-sensitive scenarios.

Our work explores and characterizes the viable threat models based on optical attacks using multi-frame super resolution techniques on sequences of video frames. We further apply this threat model to web textual contents with varying attacker capabilities to find thresholds at which text becomes recognizable. Our user study with 20 participants suggests present-day 720p webcams are sufficient for adversaries to reconstruct textual content on big-font websites. Our models further show that the evolution towards 4K cameras will tip the threshold of text leakage to reconstruction of most header texts on popular websites. For possible long-term defenses, we advocate an individual reflection testing procedure to assess threats under various settings, and justify the importance of following the principle of least privilege for privacy-sensitive scenarios.
abstract_zh: 这项研究利用数学建模和人体实验，探讨了新兴网络摄像头可能会在多大程度上泄漏网络摄像头捕获的眼镜反射中闪烁的可识别文本和图形信息。我们工作的主要目标是随着网络摄像头技术未来的发展，测量、计算和预测可识别性的因素、限制和阈值。我们的工作探索并描述了基于光学攻击的可行威胁模型，在视频帧序列上使用多帧超分辨率技术。我们在受控实验室环境中的模型和实验结果表明，使用 720p 网络摄像头可以以超过 75% 的准确度重建和识别高度小至 10 毫米的屏幕文本。我们进一步将此威胁模型应用于具有不同攻击者能力的网络文本内容，以找到文本可识别的阈值。我们对 20 名参与者进行的用户研究表明，目前的 720p 网络摄像头足以让对手在大字体网站上重建文本内容。我们的模型进一步表明，向 4K 摄像机的发展将提高文本泄漏的门槛，以重建流行网站上的大多数标题文本。除了文本目标之外，一项关于使用 720p 网络摄像头识别 Alexa 前 100 个网站的封闭世界数据集的案例研究表明，即使不使用机器学习模型，10 名参与者的最大识别准确率也达到 94%。我们的研究提出了近期的缓解措施，包括用户可以用来模糊视频流的眼镜区域的软件原型。对于可能的长期防御，我们提倡采用单独的反射测试程序来评估各种设置下的威胁，并证明在隐私敏感场景中遵循最小特权原则的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过数学建模和人类受试者实验，研究网络摄像头通过眼镜反射泄露屏幕文本信息的可行性及技术限制。
AI.motivation: 随着视频会议中网络摄像头技术的进步，眼镜反射可能成为泄露敏感屏幕内容的新攻击途径，需评估其隐私风险并提出应对措施。
AI.method: 结合多帧超分辨率技术与受控实验室实验，分析不同分辨率摄像头（720p/4K）下文本可识别性阈值，并通过用户研究验证实际攻击效果。
AI.result: 720p摄像头可重构10mm高度文本（准确率75%），用户实验显示当前设备可识别大字体网站内容；4K摄像头将使主流网站头部文本泄露阈值显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 提出短期软件模糊方案及长期反射检测机制，强调隐私场景中应遵循最小权限原则，以应对摄像头技术演进带来的新型隐私威胁。

For possible long-term defenses, we advocate an individual reflection testing procedure to assess threats under various settings, and justify the importance of following the principle of least privilege for privacy-sensitive scenarios. 这项研究利用数学建模和人体实验，探讨了新兴网络摄像头可能会在多大程度上泄漏网络摄像头捕获的眼镜反射中闪烁的可识别文本和图形信息。我们工作的主要目标是随着网络摄像头技术未来的发展，测量、计算和预测可识别性的因素、限制和阈值。我们的工作探索并描述了基于光学攻击的可行威胁模型，在视频帧序列上使用多帧超分辨率技术。我们在受控实验室环境中的模型和实验结果表明，使用 720p 网络摄像头可以以超过 75% 的准确度重建和识别高度小至 10 毫米的屏幕文本。我们进一步将此威胁模型应用于具有不同攻击者能力的网络文本内容，以找到文本可识别的阈值。我们对 20 名参与者进行的用户研究表明，目前的 720p 网络摄像头足以让对手在大字体网站上重建文本内容。我们的模型进一步表明，向 4K 摄像机的发展将提高文本泄漏的门槛，以重建流行网站上的大多数标题文本。除了文本目标之外，一项关于使用 720p 网络摄像头识别 Alexa 前 100 个网站的封闭世界数据集的案例研究表明，即使不使用机器学习模型，10 名参与者的最大识别准确率也达到 94%。我们的研究提出了近期的缓解措施，包括用户可以用来模糊视频流的眼镜区域的软件原型。对于可能的长期防御，我们提倡采用单独的反射测试程序来评估各种设置下的威胁，并证明在隐私敏感场景中遵循最小特权原则的重要性。 本文通过数学建模和人类受试者实验，研究网络摄像头通过眼镜反射泄露屏幕文本信息的可行性及技术限制。 Yan Long,Chen Yan,Shilin Xiao,Shivan Prasad,Wenyuan Xu,Kevin Fu cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Walterio W. Mayol-Cuevas
title: Rebellion and Disobedience as Useful Tools in Human-Robot Interaction Research -- The Handheld Robotics Case
title_zh: 叛逆和不服从是人机交互研究中的有用工具——手持机器人案例
comment: ef:Proc. Rebellion and Disobedience in AI Workshop AAMAS 2022
comments: ef:Proc. Rebellion and Disobedience in AI Workshop AAMAS 2022
abstract: This position paper argues on the utility of rebellion and disobedience (RaD) in human-robot interaction (HRI). In general, we see two main opportunities in the use of controlled and well designed rebellion and disobedience: i) illuminate insight into the effectiveness of the collaboration (or lack of) and ii) prevent mistakes and correct user actions when in the user's own interest. Through the use of a close interaction modality, that of handheld robots, we discuss use cases for utility of rebellion and disobedience that can be applicable to other instances of HRI.
summary: This position paper argues on the utility of rebellion and disobedience (RaD) in human-robot interaction (HRI). In general, we see two main opportunities in the use of controlled and well designed rebellion and disobedience: i) illuminate insight into the effectiveness of the collaboration (or lack of) and ii) prevent mistakes and correct user actions when in the user's own interest. Through the use of a close interaction modality, that of handheld robots, we discuss use cases for utility of rebellion and disobedience that can be applicable to other instances of HRI.
abstract_zh: 这篇立场文件讨论了叛逆和不服从（RaD）在人机交互（HRI）中的效用。一般来说，我们在使用受控和精心设计的叛逆和不服从方面看到了两个主要机会：i）深入了解协作（或缺乏）的有效性，ii）在符合用户自身利益的情况下防止错误并纠正用户行为。通过使用近距离交互方式（手持式机器人），我们讨论了叛逆和不服从的用例，这些用例可适用于 HRI 的其他实例。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在人机交互研究中，通过受控的反叛与不服从（RaD）机制提升协作效果与安全性的潜力，并以手持机器人作为案例进行分析。
AI.motivation: 通过引入RaD机制，可揭示人机协作中的问题并纠正用户错误行为，从而增强交互安全性与有效性。
AI.method: 以手持机器人作为紧密交互的载体，通过具体应用场景分析RaD在HRI中的设计与实施方式。
AI.result: 验证了RaD在特定交互场景中能够有效促进用户反思与纠正错误，但需依赖精确的控制设计。
AI.conclusion: RaD作为研究工具为HRI提供了新视角，未来需进一步探索其在不同交互模式中的适用性与设计规范。

authors_text: Zijie J. Wang,David Munechika,Seongmin Lee,Duen Horng Chau
title: NOVA: A Practical Method for Creating Notebook-Ready Visual Analytics
title_zh: NOVA：创建笔记本就绪可视化分析的实用方法
comment: Accepted to IEEE VIS 2022 (poster). 2 pages, 1 figure. For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/nova. For method application examples, see https://github.com/poloclub/nova
comments: Accepted to IEEE VIS 2022 (poster). 2 pages, 1 figure. For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/nova. For method application examples, see https://github.com/poloclub/nova
abstract: How can we develop visual analytics (VA) tools that can be easily adopted? Visualization researchers have developed a large number of web-based VA tools to help data scientists in a wide range of tasks. However, adopting these standalone systems can be challenging, as they require data scientists to create new workflows to streamline the VA processes. Recent surveys suggest computational notebooks have been dominating data scientists' analytical workflows, as these notebooks seamlessly combine text, code, and visualization, allowing users to rapidly iterate code experiments. To help visualization researchers develop VA tools that can be easily integrated into existing data science workflows, we present NOVA, a simple and flexible method to adapt web-based VA systems for notebooks. We provide detailed examples of using this method with diverse web development technologies and different types of computational notebooks. Deployed application examples highlight that NOVA is easy to adopt, and data scientists appreciate in-notebook VA. NOVA is available at https://github.com/poloclub/nova.
summary: How can we develop visual analytics (VA) tools that can be easily adopted? Visualization researchers have developed a large number of web-based VA tools to help data scientists in a wide range of tasks. However, adopting these standalone systems can be challenging, as they require data scientists to create new workflows to streamline the VA processes. Recent surveys suggest computational notebooks have been dominating data scientists' analytical workflows, as these notebooks seamlessly combine text, code, and visualization, allowing users to rapidly iterate code experiments. To help visualization researchers develop VA tools that can be easily integrated into existing data science workflows, we present NOVA, a simple and flexible method to adapt web-based VA systems for notebooks. We provide detailed examples of using this method with diverse web development technologies and different types of computational notebooks. Deployed application examples highlight that NOVA is easy to adopt, and data scientists appreciate in-notebook VA. NOVA is available at https://github.com/poloclub/nova.
abstract_zh: 我们如何开发易于采用的可视化分析（VA）工具？可视化研究人员开发了大量基于网络的 VA 工具来帮助数据科学家完成各种任务。然而，采用这些独立系统可能具有挑战性，因为它们需要数据科学家创建新的工作流程来简化 VA 流程。最近的调查表明，计算笔记本一直主导着数据科学家的分析工作流程，因为这些笔记本无缝地结合了文本、代码和可视化，允许用户快速迭代代码实验。为了帮助可视化研究人员开发可以轻松集成到现有数据科学工作流程中的 VA 工具，我们推出了 NOVA，这是一种简单而灵活的方法，可以将基于 Web 的 VA 系统应用于笔记本电脑。我们提供了将此方法与不同的 Web 开发技术和不同类型的计算笔记本结合使用的详细示例。已部署的应用程序示例凸显了 NOVA 易于采用，并且数据科学家喜欢笔记本电脑中的 VA。 NOVA 可在 https://github.com/poloclub/nova 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NOVA方法，将基于网络的可视化分析工具无缝集成到计算笔记本中，以简化数据科学家的工作流程。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化分析工具需独立工作流，而计算笔记本因其整合代码、文本和可视化的特性已成为主流工具，需解决两者整合难题。
AI.method: 通过设计灵活的NOVA框架，适配多种网页开发技术和计算笔记本类型，实现可视化工具与笔记本的嵌入式集成。
AI.result: 部署案例表明NOVA易于采用，数据科学家认可其在笔记本内进行可视化分析的效率与便捷性。
AI.conclusion: NOVA有效弥合了可视化工具与计算笔记本的鸿沟，为数据科学工作流提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Haiwen Feng,Timo Bolkart,Joachim Tesch,Michael J. Black,Victoria Abrevaya
title: Towards Racially Unbiased Skin Tone Estimation via Scene Disambiguation
title_zh: 通过场景消歧实现种族公正的肤色估计
abstract: Virtual facial avatars will play an increasingly important role in immersive communication, games and the metaverse, and it is therefore critical that they be inclusive. This requires accurate recovery of the appearance, represented by albedo, regardless of age, sex, or ethnicity. While significant progress has been made on estimating 3D facial geometry, albedo estimation has received less attention. The task is fundamentally ambiguous because the observed color is a function of albedo and lighting, both of which are unknown. We find that current methods are biased towards light skin tones due to (1) strongly biased priors that prefer lighter pigmentation and (2) algorithmic solutions that disregard the light/albedo ambiguity. To address this, we propose a new evaluation dataset (FAIR) and an algorithm (TRUST) to improve albedo estimation and, hence, fairness. Specifically, we create the first facial albedo evaluation benchmark where subjects are balanced in terms of skin color, and measure accuracy using the Individual Typology Angle (ITA) metric. We then address the light/albedo ambiguity by building on a key observation: the image of the full scene -- as opposed to a cropped image of the face -- contains important information about lighting that can be used for disambiguation. TRUST regresses facial albedo by conditioning both on the face region and a global illumination signal obtained from the scene image. Our experimental results show significant improvement compared to state-of-the-art methods on albedo estimation, both in terms of accuracy and fairness. The evaluation benchmark and code will be made available for research purposes at https://trust.is.tue.mpg.de.
summary: Virtual facial avatars will play an increasingly important role in immersive communication, games and the metaverse, and it is therefore critical that they be inclusive. This requires accurate recovery of the appearance, represented by albedo, regardless of age, sex, or ethnicity. While significant progress has been made on estimating 3D facial geometry, albedo estimation has received less attention. The task is fundamentally ambiguous because the observed color is a function of albedo and lighting, both of which are unknown. We find that current methods are biased towards light skin tones due to (1) strongly biased priors that prefer lighter pigmentation and (2) algorithmic solutions that disregard the light/albedo ambiguity. To address this, we propose a new evaluation dataset (FAIR) and an algorithm (TRUST) to improve albedo estimation and, hence, fairness. Specifically, we create the first facial albedo evaluation benchmark where subjects are balanced in terms of skin color, and measure accuracy using the Individual Typology Angle (ITA) metric. We then address the light/albedo ambiguity by building on a key observation: the image of the full scene -- as opposed to a cropped image of the face -- contains important information about lighting that can be used for disambiguation. TRUST regresses facial albedo by conditioning both on the face region and a global illumination signal obtained from the scene image. Our experimental results show significant improvement compared to state-of-the-art methods on albedo estimation, both in terms of accuracy and fairness. The evaluation benchmark and code will be made available for research purposes at https://trust.is.tue.mpg.de.
abstract_zh: 虚拟面部头像将在沉浸式交流、游戏和虚拟世界中发挥越来越重要的作用，因此它们的包容性至关重要。这需要精确恢复以反照率为代表的外观，无论年龄、性别或种族。虽然在估计 3D 面部几何形状方面取得了重大进展，但反照率估计受到的关注较少。这项任务从根本上来说是不明确的，因为观察到的颜色是反照率和光照的函数，而这两者都是未知的。我们发现，当前的方法偏向浅肤色，因为（1）偏向于较浅色素沉着的先验，以及（2）忽略光/反照率模糊性的算法解决方案。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的评估数据集（FAIR）和一种算法（TRUST）来改进反照率估计，从而提高公平性。具体来说，我们创建了第一个面部反照率评估基准，其中受试者在肤色方面保持平衡，并使用个体类型学角度（ITA）指标来测量准确性。然后，我们通过建立关键观察来解决光/反照率模糊性：整个场景的图像（而不是面部的裁剪图像）包含有关可用于消除歧义的照明的重要信息。 TRUST 通过调节面部区域和从场景图像获得的全局照明信号来回归面部反照率。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的反照率估计方法相比，无论是在准确性还是公平性方面都有显着改进。评估基准和代码将在 https://trust.is.tue.mpg.de 上提供用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过场景去混淆技术，开发一种减少种族偏见的皮肤色调估计方法，以提升虚拟人脸avatar的包容性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法因光照与反照率的歧义性及对浅肤色的先验偏好，导致皮肤色调估计存在种族偏见，影响虚拟角色的多样性与公平性。
AI.method: 提出FAIR数据集和TRUST算法，通过利用完整场景图像中的全局光照信息，联合面部区域与场景光照信号进行反照率回归，解决光照-反照率歧义问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，TRUST在反照率估计的准确性与公平性上均优于现有方法，且FAIR基准数据集可推动相关研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过场景信息辅助的反照率估计方法能有效减少种族偏见，为构建包容性虚拟角色提供技术支撑。

search_text: Towards Racially Unbiased Skin Tone Estimation via Scene Disambiguation 通过场景消歧实现种族公正的肤色估计 Virtual facial avatars will play an increasingly important role in immersive communication, games and the metaverse, and it is therefore critical that they be inclusive. This requires accurate recovery of the appearance, represented by albedo, regardless of age, sex, or ethnicity. While significant progress has been made on estimating 3D facial geometry, albedo estimation has received less attention. The task is fundamentally ambiguous because the observed color is a function of albedo and lighting, both of which are unknown. We find that current methods are biased towards light skin tones due to (1) strongly biased priors that prefer lighter pigmentation and (2) algorithmic solutions that disregard the light/albedo ambiguity. To address this, we propose a new evaluation dataset (FAIR) and an algorithm (TRUST) to improve albedo estimation and, hence, fairness. Specifically, we create the first facial albedo evaluation benchmark where subjects are balanced in terms of skin color, and measure accuracy using the Individual Typology Angle (ITA) metric. We then address the light/albedo ambiguity by building on a key observation: the image of the full scene -- as opposed to a cropped image of the face -- contains important information about lighting that can be used for disambiguation. TRUST regresses facial albedo by conditioning both on the face region and a global illumination signal obtained from the scene image. Our experimental results show significant improvement compared to state-of-the-art methods on albedo estimation, both in terms of accuracy and fairness. The evaluation benchmark and code will be made available for research purposes at https://trust.is.tue.mpg.de. 虚拟面部头像将在沉浸式交流、游戏和虚拟世界中发挥越来越重要的作用，因此它们的包容性至关重要。这需要精确恢复以反照率为代表的外观，无论年龄、性别或种族。虽然在估计 3D 面部几何形状方面取得了重大进展，但反照率估计受到的关注较少。这项任务从根本上来说是不明确的，因为观察到的颜色是反照率和光照的函数，而这两者都是未知的。我们发现，当前的方法偏向浅肤色，因为（1）偏向于较浅色素沉着的先验，以及（2）忽略光/反照率模糊性的算法解决方案。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的评估数据集（FAIR）和一种算法（TRUST）来改进反照率估计，从而提高公平性。具体来说，我们创建了第一个面部反照率评估基准，其中受试者在肤色方面保持平衡，并使用个体类型学角度（ITA）指标来测量准确性。然后，我们通过建立关键观察来解决光/反照率模糊性：整个场景的图像（而不是面部的裁剪图像）包含有关可用于消除歧义的照明的重要信息。 TRUST 通过调节面部区域和从场景图像获得的全局照明信号来回归面部反照率。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的反照率估计方法相比，无论是在准确性还是公平性方面都有显着改进。评估基准和代码将在 https://trust.is.tue.mpg.de 上提供用于研究目的。 本文旨在通过场景去混淆技术，开发一种减少种族偏见的皮肤色调估计方法，以提升虚拟人脸avatar的包容性。 Haiwen Feng,Timo Bolkart,Joachim Tesch,Michael J. authors_text: Enyu Cai,Zhankun Luo,Sriram Baireddy,Jiaqi Guo,Changye Yang,Edward J. Delp
title: High-Resolution UAV Image Generation for Sorghum Panicle Detection
title_zh: 用于高粱穗检测的高分辨率无人机图像生成
abstract: The number of panicles (or heads) of Sorghum plants is an important phenotypic trait for plant development and grain yield estimation. The use of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) enables the capability of collecting and analyzing Sorghum images on a large scale. Deep learning can provide methods for estimating phenotypic traits from UAV images but requires a large amount of labeled data. The lack of training data due to the labor-intensive ground truthing of UAV images causes a major bottleneck in developing methods for Sorghum panicle detection and counting. In this paper, we present an approach that uses synthetic training images from generative adversarial networks (GANs) for data augmentation to enhance the performance of Sorghum panicle detection and counting. Our method can generate synthetic high-resolution UAV RGB images with panicle labels by using image-to-image translation GANs with a limited ground truth dataset of real UAV RGB images. The results show the improvements in panicle detection and counting using our data augmentation approach.
summary: The number of panicles (or heads) of Sorghum plants is an important phenotypic trait for plant development and grain yield estimation. The use of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) enables the capability of collecting and analyzing Sorghum images on a large scale. Deep learning can provide methods for estimating phenotypic traits from UAV images but requires a large amount of labeled data. The lack of training data due to the labor-intensive ground truthing of UAV images causes a major bottleneck in developing methods for Sorghum panicle detection and counting. In this paper, we present an approach that uses synthetic training images from generative adversarial networks (GANs) for data augmentation to enhance the performance of Sorghum panicle detection and counting. Our method can generate synthetic high-resolution UAV RGB images with panicle labels by using image-to-image translation GANs with a limited ground truth dataset of real UAV RGB images. The results show the improvements in panicle detection and counting using our data augmentation approach.
abstract_zh: 高粱植物的圆锥花序（或头）数量是植物发育和谷物产量估算的重要表型性状。无人机（UAV）的使用使得能够大规模收集和分析高粱图像。深度学习可以提供从无人机图像估计表型性状的方法，但需要大量的标记数据。由于无人机图像的地面实况需要大量劳动，导致训练数据的缺乏，导致高粱穗​​检测和计数方法开发的主要瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用生成对抗网络（GAN）的合成训练图像进行数据增强的方法，以增强高粱穗检测和计数的性能。我们的方法可以通过使用图像到图像转换 GAN 和真实无人机 RGB 图像的有限地面实况数据集来生成带有穗标签的合成高分辨率无人机 RGB 图像。结果表明，使用我们的数据增强方法，穗检测和计数得到了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GANs）生成高分辨率无人机图像以增强高粱穗检测与计数的性能。
AI.motivation: 高粱穗检测依赖大量标注无人机图像，但实际获取标注数据成本高且耗时，导致方法开发受限。
AI.method: 采用图像到图像翻译的GANs，基于少量真实无人机图像生成带穗标注的合成高分辨率RGB图像进行数据增强。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该数据增强方法显著提升了高粱穗检测与计数的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 合成图像生成有效缓解了标注数据不足问题，为高粱表型分析提供了可行的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 合成图像生成有效缓解了标注数据不足问题，为高粱表型分析提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Daniele Reda,Hung Yu Ling,Michiel van de Panne
title: Learning to Brachiate via Simplified Model Imitation
title_zh: 通过简化模型模仿学习臂展
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at SIGGRAPH 2022. For videos, supplementary material and code, visit the following URL https://brachiation-rl.github.io/brachiation
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at SIGGRAPH 2022. For videos, supplementary material and code, visit the following URL https://brachiation-rl.github.io/brachiation
abstract: Brachiation is the primary form of locomotion for gibbons and siamangs, in which these primates swing from tree limb to tree limb using only their arms. It is challenging to control because of the limited control authority, the required advance planning, and the precision of the required grasps. We present a novel approach to this problem using reinforcement learning, and as demonstrated on a finger-less 14-link planar model that learns to brachiate across challenging handhold sequences. Key to our method is the use of a simplified model, a point mass with a virtual arm, for which we first learn a policy that can brachiate across handhold sequences with a prescribed order. This facilitates the learning of the policy for the full model, for which it provides guidance by providing an overall center-of-mass trajectory to imitate, as well as for the timing of the holds. Lastly, the simplified model can also readily be used for planning suitable sequences of handholds in a given environment. Our results demonstrate brachiation motions with a variety of durations for the flight and hold phases, as well as emergent extra back-and-forth swings when this proves useful. The system is evaluated with a variety of ablations. The method enables future work towards more general 3D brachiation, as well as using simplified model imitation in other settings.
summary: Brachiation is the primary form of locomotion for gibbons and siamangs, in which these primates swing from tree limb to tree limb using only their arms. It is challenging to control because of the limited control authority, the required advance planning, and the precision of the required grasps. We present a novel approach to this problem using reinforcement learning, and as demonstrated on a finger-less 14-link planar model that learns to brachiate across challenging handhold sequences. Key to our method is the use of a simplified model, a point mass with a virtual arm, for which we first learn a policy that can brachiate across handhold sequences with a prescribed order. This facilitates the learning of the policy for the full model, for which it provides guidance by providing an overall center-of-mass trajectory to imitate, as well as for the timing of the holds. Lastly, the simplified model can also readily be used for planning suitable sequences of handholds in a given environment. Our results demonstrate brachiation motions with a variety of durations for the flight and hold phases, as well as emergent extra back-and-forth swings when this proves useful. The system is evaluated with a variety of ablations. The method enables future work towards more general 3D brachiation, as well as using simplified model imitation in other settings.
abstract_zh: 臂肢运动是长臂猿和合趾猴运动的主要形式，这些灵长类动物仅使用手臂从一个树枝摆动到另一个树枝。由于控制权限有限、需要提前计划以及需要把握的精度，因此控制具有挑战性。我们使用强化学习提出了一种解决此问题的新颖方法，并在无指 14 连杆平面模型上进行了演示，该模型学习跨具有挑战性的手持序列进行臂展。我们方法的关键是使用简化模型，即带有虚拟手臂的点质量，为此我们首先学习一种策略，可以按照规定的顺序跨越手持序列。这有助于学习整个模型的策略，并通过提供要模仿的整体质心轨迹以及保持的时间来提供指导。最后，简化的模型还可以很容易地用于规划给定环境中合适的手柄序列。我们的结果表明，在飞行和保持阶段有不同持续时间的上臂运动，以及当这被证明有用时出现的额外的来回摆动。该系统通过各种消融进行评估。该方法使未来的工作能够实现更通用的 3D 分支，以及在其他设置中使用简化的模型模仿。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过简化模型模仿学习实现悬空摆动（Brachiation）控制的新方法，利用强化学习训练简化模型的策略，并将其应用于完整模型。
AI.motivation: 悬空摆动控制因操作权限有限、需提前规划及精确抓握而极具挑战性，传统方法难以有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 采用强化学习训练简化模型（质点加虚拟手臂），学习有序手柄序列的摆动策略，并将该策略的质心轨迹和抓握时机作为完整14连杆模型的指导。
AI.result: 实现多种飞行和抓握阶段时长的摆动动作，出现有益的额外前后摆动；通过消融实验验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为三维悬空摆动及其它场景的简化模型模仿学习提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过简化模型模仿学习实现悬空摆动（Brachiation）控制的新方法，利用强化学习训练简化模型的策略，并将其应用于完整模型。
ai_content.motivation: 悬空摆动控制因操作权限有限、需提前规划及精确抓握而极具挑战性，传统方法难以有效解决该问题。
ai_content.method: 采用强化学习训练简化模型（质点加虚拟手臂），学习有序手柄序列的摆动策略，并将该策略的质心轨迹和抓握时机作为完整14连杆模型的指导。
ai_content.result: 实现多种飞行和抓握阶段时长的摆动动作，出现有益的额外前后摆动；通过消融实验验证方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为三维悬空摆动及其它场景的简化模型模仿学习提供了可行方案。

search_text: Learning to Brachiate via Simplified Model Imitation 通过简化模型模仿学习臂展 Brachiation is the primary form of locomotion for gibbons and siamangs, in which these primates swing from tree limb to tree limb using only their arms. It is challenging to control because of the limited control authority, the required advance planning, and the precision of the required grasps. We present a novel approach to this problem using reinforcement learning, and as demonstrated on a finger-less 14-link planar model that learns to brachiate across challenging handhold sequences. Key to our method is the use of a simplified model, a point mass with a virtual arm, for which we first learn a policy that can brachiate across handhold sequences with a prescribed order. This facilitates the learning of the policy for the full model, for which it provides guidance by providing an overall center-of-mass trajectory to imitate, as well as for the timing of the holds. Lastly, the simplified model can also readily be used for planning suitable sequences of handholds in a given environment. Our results demonstrate brachiation motions with a variety of durations for the flight and hold phases, as well as emergent extra back-and-forth swings when this proves useful. The system is evaluated with a variety of ablations. The method enables future work towards more general 3D brachiation, as well as using simplified model imitation in other settings. 臂肢运动是长臂猿和合趾猴运动的主要形式，这些灵长类动物仅使用手臂从一个树枝摆动到另一个树枝。由于控制权限有限、需要提前计划以及需要把握的精度，因此控制具有挑战性。我们使用强化学习提出了一种解决此问题的新颖方法，并在无指 14 连杆平面模型上进行了演示，该模型学习跨具有挑战性的手持序列进行臂展。我们方法的关键是使用简化模型，即带有虚拟手臂的点质量，为此我们首先学习一种策略，可以按照规定的顺序跨越手持序列。这有助于学习整个模型的策略，并通过提供要模仿的整体质心轨迹以及保持的时间来提供指导。最后，简化的模型还可以很容易地用于规划给定环境中合适的手柄序列。我们的结果表明，在飞行和保持阶段有不同持续时间的上臂运动，以及当这被证明有用时出现的额外的来回摆动。该系统通过各种消融进行评估。该方法使未来的工作能够实现更通用的 3D 分支，以及在其他设置中使用简化的模型模仿。 本文提出一种通过简化模型模仿学习实现悬空摆动（Brachiation）控制的新方法，利用强化学习训练简化模型的策略，并将其应用于完整模型。 Daniele Reda,Hung Yu Ling,Michiel van de Panne cs.LG,cs.GR,cs.RO

authors_text: Hammaad Adam,Ming Ying Yang,Kenrick Cato,Ioana Baldini,Charles Senteio,Leo Anthony Celi,Jiaming Zeng,Moninder Singh,Marzyeh Ghassemi
title: Write It Like You See It: Detectable Differences in Clinical Notes By Race Lead To Differential Model Recommendations
title_zh: 写得像你看到的那样：不同种族的临床记录中可检测到的差异导致了不同的模型建议
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES 2022)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES 2022)
abstract: Clinical notes are becoming an increasingly important data source for machine learning (ML) applications in healthcare. Prior research has shown that deploying ML models can perpetuate existing biases against racial minorities, as bias can be implicitly embedded in data. In this study, we investigate the level of implicit race information available to ML models and human experts and the implications of model-detectable differences in clinical notes. Our work makes three key contributions. First, we find that models can identify patient self-reported race from clinical notes even when the notes are stripped of explicit indicators of race. Second, we determine that human experts are not able to accurately predict patient race from the same redacted clinical notes. Finally, we demonstrate the potential harm of this implicit information in a simulation study, and show that models trained on these race-redacted clinical notes can still perpetuate existing biases in clinical treatment decisions.
summary: Clinical notes are becoming an increasingly important data source for machine learning (ML) applications in healthcare. Prior research has shown that deploying ML models can perpetuate existing biases against racial minorities, as bias can be implicitly embedded in data. In this study, we investigate the level of implicit race information available to ML models and human experts and the implications of model-detectable differences in clinical notes. Our work makes three key contributions. First, we find that models can identify patient self-reported race from clinical notes even when the notes are stripped of explicit indicators of race. Second, we determine that human experts are not able to accurately predict patient race from the same redacted clinical notes. Finally, we demonstrate the potential harm of this implicit information in a simulation study, and show that models trained on these race-redacted clinical notes can still perpetuate existing biases in clinical treatment decisions.
abstract_zh: 临床记录正成为医疗保健领域机器学习 (ML) 应用日益重要的数据源。先前的研究表明，部署机器学习模型可能会延续针对少数族裔的现有偏见，因为偏见可能会隐式嵌入数据中。在这项研究中，我们调查了 ML 模型和人类专家可获得的隐式种族信息的水平，以及临床记录中模型可检测差异的影响。我们的工作做出了三个关键贡献。首先，我们发现模型可以从临床记录中识别患者自我报告的种族，即使记录中没有明确的种族指标。其次，我们确定人类专家无法根据相同的经过编辑的临床记录准确预测患者种族。最后，我们在模拟研究中证明了这种隐含信息的潜在危害，并表明根据这些种族编辑的临床记录训练的模型仍然可以延续临床治疗决策中现有的偏见。

AI.tldr: 研究临床笔记中隐含的种族信息对机器学习模型推荐的影响
AI.motivation: 探讨机器学习模型是否能从去除了显式种族信息的临床笔记中隐含识别患者种族，并分析其对临床决策的影响
AI.method: 通过实验分析模型和人类专家在处理去除了显式种族信息的临床笔记时的表现差异，并进行模拟研究验证潜在危害
AI.result: 模型能从去除了显式种族信息的临床笔记中识别患者种族，而人类专家无法准确预测，且模型可能延续偏见
AI.conclusion: 隐含在临床笔记中的种族信息可能导致机器学习模型产生差异化的推荐，需关注数据中的隐含偏见问题

authors_text: Yaowei Long,Thatchaphol Saranurak
title: Near-Optimal Deterministic Vertex-Failure Connectivity Oracles
title_zh: 近乎最优的确定性顶点故障连接预言机
abstract: We revisit the vertex-failure connectivity oracle problem. This is one of the most basic graph data structure problems under vertex updates, yet its complexity is still not well-understood. We essentially settle the complexity of this problem by showing a new data structure whose space, preprocessing time, update time, and query time are simultaneously optimal up to sub-polynomial factors assuming popular conjectures. Moreover, the data structure is deterministic. More precisely, for any integer $d_{\star}$, the data structure preprocesses a graph $G$ with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges in $\hat{O}(md_{\star})$ time and uses $\tilde{O}(\min\{m,nd_{\star}\})$ space. Then, given the vertex set $D$ to be deleted where $|D|=d\le d_{\star}$, it takes $\hat{O}(d^{2})$ updates time. Finally, given any vertex pair $(u,v)$, it checks if $u$ and $v$ are connected in $G\setminus D$ in $O(d)$ time. This improves the previously best deterministic algorithm by Duan and Pettie (SODA 2017) in both space and update time by a factor of $d$. It also significantly speeds up the $Ω(\min\{mn,n^ω\})$ preprocessing time of all known (even randomized) algorithms with update time at most $\tilde{O}(d^{5})$.
summary: We revisit the vertex-failure connectivity oracle problem. This is one of the most basic graph data structure problems under vertex updates, yet its complexity is still not well-understood. We essentially settle the complexity of this problem by showing a new data structure whose space, preprocessing time, update time, and query time are simultaneously optimal up to sub-polynomial factors assuming popular conjectures. Moreover, the data structure is deterministic. More precisely, for any integer $d_{\star}$, the data structure preprocesses a graph $G$ with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges in $\hat{O}(md_{\star})$ time and uses $\tilde{O}(\min\{m,nd_{\star}\})$ space. Then, given the vertex set $D$ to be deleted where $|D|=d\le d_{\star}$, it takes $\hat{O}(d^{2})$ updates time. Finally, given any vertex pair $(u,v)$, it checks if $u$ and $v$ are connected in $G\setminus D$ in $O(d)$ time. This improves the previously best deterministic algorithm by Duan and Pettie (SODA 2017) in both space and update time by a factor of $d$. It also significantly speeds up the $Ω(\min\{mn,n^ω\})$ preprocessing time of all known (even randomized) algorithms with update time at most $\tilde{O}(d^{5})$.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视顶点失败连接预言问题。这是顶点更新下最基本的图数据结构问题之一，但其复杂性仍然没有得到很好的理解。我们通过展示一种新的数据结构来解决这个问题的复杂性，该数据结构的空间、预处理时间、更新时间和查询时间在假设流行猜想的次多项式因子上同时是最优的。此外，数据结构是确定性的。更准确地说，对于任何整数 $d_{\star}$，数据结构会在 $\hat{O}(md_{\star})$ 时间内预处理具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边的图 $G$，并使用 $\tilde{O}(\min\{m,nd_{\star}\})$ 空间。然后，给定要删除的顶点集$D$，其中$|D|=d\le d_{\star}$，需要$\hat{O}(d^{2})$更新时间。最后，给定任何顶点对 $(u,v)$，它会在 $O(d)$ 时间内检查 $u$ 和 $v$ 是否在 $G\setminus D$ 中连接。这将 Duan 和 Pettie (SODA 2017) 之前最好的确定性算法在空间和更新时间上提高了 $d$。它还显着加快了所有已知（甚至随机）算法的 $Ω(\min\{mn,n^ω\})$ 预处理时间，更新时间最多为 $\tilde{O}(d^{5})$。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种近似最优的确定性顶点故障连通性预言机数据结构，用于在顶点删除后高效处理图的连通性查询。
AI.motivation: 顶点故障连通性预言机是图数据结构中的基础问题，但其复杂度尚未完全明确。现有算法在空间和更新时间上存在不足，需更优解法。
AI.method: 设计了一种参数化数据结构，通过预处理时间、空间、更新时间和查询时间的优化，结合子多项式因子假设，实现近似最优性能。
AI.result: 相比之前的最佳确定性算法，空间和更新时间减少了d倍，并显著提升了预处理时间，达到Ω(min{mn,n^ω})的改进。
AI.conclusion: 在流行猜想下，该算法解决了顶点故障连通性预言机的复杂度问题，提供了同时最优的确定性方案。
