Moreover, the data structure is deterministic. More precisely, for any integer $d_{\star}$, the data structure preprocesses a graph $G$ with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges in $\hat{O}(md_{\star})$ time and uses $\tilde{O}(\min\{m,nd_{\star}\})$ space. Then, given the vertex set $D$ to be deleted where $|D|=d\le d_{\star}$, it takes $\hat{O}(d^{2})$ updates time. Finally, given any vertex pair $(u,v)$, it checks if $u$ and $v$ are connected in $G\setminus D$ in $O(d)$ time. This improves the previously best deterministic algorithm by Duan and Pettie (SODA 2017) in both space and update time by a factor of $d$. It also significantly speeds up the $Ω(\min\{mn,n^ω\})$ preprocessing time of all known (even randomized) algorithms with update time at most $\tilde{O}(d^{5})$. 我们重新审视顶点失败连接预言问题。这是顶点更新下最基本的图数据结构问题之一，但其复杂性仍然没有得到很好的理解。我们通过展示一种新的数据结构来解决这个问题的复杂性，该数据结构的空间、预处理时间、更新时间和查询时间在假设流行猜想的次多项式因子上同时是最优的。此外，数据结构是确定性的。更准确地说，对于任何整数 $d_{\star}$，数据结构会在 $\hat{O}(md_{\star})$ 时间内预处理具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边的图 $G$，并使用 $\tilde{O}(\min\{m,nd_{\star}\})$ 空间。然后，给定要删除的顶点集$D$，其中$|D|=d\le d_{\star}$，需要$\hat{O}(d^{2})$更新时间。最后，给定任何顶点对 $(u,v)$，它会在 $O(d)$ 时间内检查 $u$ 和 $v$ 是否在 $G\setminus D$ 中连接。这将 Duan 和 Pettie (SODA 2017) 之前最好的确定性算法在空间和更新时间上提高了 $d$。它还显着加快了所有已知（甚至随机）算法的 $Ω(\min\{mn,n^ω\})$ 预处理时间，更新时间最多为 $\tilde{O}(d^{5})$。 该论文提出了一种近似最优的确定性顶点故障连通性预言机数据结构，用于在顶点删除后高效处理图的连通性查询。 Yaowei Long,Thatchaphol Saranurak cs.DS

authors_text: Víctor Mayoral-Vilches,Sabrina M. Neuman,Brian Plancher,Vijay Janapa Reddi
title: RobotCore: An Open Architecture for Hardware Acceleration in ROS 2
title_zh: RobotCore：ROS 2 中硬件加速的开放架构
abstract: Hardware acceleration can revolutionize robotics, enabling new applications by speeding up robot response times while remaining power-efficient. However, the diversity of acceleration options makes it difficult for roboticists to easily deploy accelerated systems without expertise in each specific hardware platform. In this work, we address this challenge with RobotCore, an architecture to integrate hardware acceleration in the widely-used ROS 2 robotics software framework. This architecture is target-agnostic (supports edge, workstation, data center, or cloud targets) and accelerator-agnostic (supports both FPGAs and GPUs). It builds on top of the common ROS 2 build system and tools and is easily portable across different research and commercial solutions through a new firmware layer. We also leverage the Linux Tracing Toolkit next generation (LTTng) for low-overhead real-time tracing and benchmarking. To demonstrate the acceleration enabled by this architecture, we use it to deploy a ROS 2 perception computational graph on a CPU and FPGA. We employ our integrated tracing and benchmarking to analyze bottlenecks, uncovering insights that guide us to improve FPGA communication efficiency. In particular, we design an intra-FPGA ROS 2 node communication queue to enable faster data flows, and use it in conjunction with FPGA-accelerated nodes to achieve a 24.42% speedup over a CPU.
summary: Hardware acceleration can revolutionize robotics, enabling new applications by speeding up robot response times while remaining power-efficient. However, the diversity of acceleration options makes it difficult for roboticists to easily deploy accelerated systems without expertise in each specific hardware platform. In this work, we address this challenge with RobotCore, an architecture to integrate hardware acceleration in the widely-used ROS 2 robotics software framework. This architecture is target-agnostic (supports edge, workstation, data center, or cloud targets) and accelerator-agnostic (supports both FPGAs and GPUs). It builds on top of the common ROS 2 build system and tools and is easily portable across different research and commercial solutions through a new firmware layer. We also leverage the Linux Tracing Toolkit next generation (LTTng) for low-overhead real-time tracing and benchmarking. To demonstrate the acceleration enabled by this architecture, we use it to deploy a ROS 2 perception computational graph on a CPU and FPGA. We employ our integrated tracing and benchmarking to analyze bottlenecks, uncovering insights that guide us to improve FPGA communication efficiency. In particular, we design an intra-FPGA ROS 2 node communication queue to enable faster data flows, and use it in conjunction with FPGA-accelerated nodes to achieve a 24.42% speedup over a CPU.
abstract_zh: 硬件加速可以彻底改变机器人技术，通过加快机器人响应时间同时保持节能来实现新的应用。然而，加速选项的多样性使得机器人专家在没有每个特定硬件平台专业知识的情况下很难轻松部署加速系统。在这项工作中，我们利用 RobotCore 解决了这一挑战，这是一种将硬件加速集成到广泛使用的 ROS 2 机器人软件框架中的架构。该架构与目标无关（支持边缘、工作站、数据中心或云目标）和加速器无关（支持 FPGA 和 GPU）。它构建在通用 ROS 2 构建系统和工具之上，并且可以通过新的固件层轻松移植到不同的研究和商业解决方案中。我们还利用下一代 Linux 跟踪工具包 (LTTng) 进行低开销的实时跟踪和基准测试。为了演示该架构所实现的加速，我们使用它在 CPU 和 FPGA 上部署 ROS 2 感知计算图。我们利用集成跟踪和基准测试来分析瓶颈，揭示指导我们提高 FPGA 通信效率的见解。特别是，我们设计了一个 FPGA 内 ROS 2 节点通信队列，以实现更快的数据流，并将其与 FPGA 加速节点结合使用，比 CPU 实现 24.42% 的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobotCore架构，旨在为ROS 2提供一种开放的硬件加速集成方案，支持多种计算目标和加速器类型。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件加速方案因平台多样性导致部署门槛高，缺乏统一的跨平台解决方案，限制了加速技术的广泛应用。
AI.method: 基于ROS 2构建系统设计目标无关的架构，结合LTTng进行低开销追踪，通过固件层实现跨平台移植，并优化FPGA内部通信队列以提升数据流效率。
AI.result: 在FPGA加速节点与CPU对比测试中，通过改进后的通信队列实现24.42%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: RobotCore验证了统一架构在ROS 2中集成硬件加速的可行性，为不同加速场景提供了灵活高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Cameron Smith,Hong-Xing Yu,Sergey Zakharov,Fredo Durand,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Jiajun Wu,Vincent Sitzmann
title: Unsupervised Discovery and Composition of Object Light Fields
title_zh: 物体光场的无监督发现和合成
abstract: Neural scene representations, both continuous and discrete, have recently emerged as a powerful new paradigm for 3D scene understanding. Recent efforts have tackled unsupervised discovery of object-centric neural scene representations. However, the high cost of ray-marching, exacerbated by the fact that each object representation has to be ray-marched separately, leads to insufficiently sampled radiance fields and thus, noisy renderings, poor framerates, and high memory and time complexity during training and rendering. Here, we propose to represent objects in an object-centric, compositional scene representation as light fields. We propose a novel light field compositor module that enables reconstructing the global light field from a set of object-centric light fields. Dubbed Compositional Object Light Fields (COLF), our method enables unsupervised learning of object-centric neural scene representations, state-of-the-art reconstruction and novel view synthesis performance on standard datasets, and rendering and training speeds at orders of magnitude faster than existing 3D approaches.
summary: Neural scene representations, both continuous and discrete, have recently emerged as a powerful new paradigm for 3D scene understanding. Recent efforts have tackled unsupervised discovery of object-centric neural scene representations. However, the high cost of ray-marching, exacerbated by the fact that each object representation has to be ray-marched separately, leads to insufficiently sampled radiance fields and thus, noisy renderings, poor framerates, and high memory and time complexity during training and rendering. Here, we propose to represent objects in an object-centric, compositional scene representation as light fields. We propose a novel light field compositor module that enables reconstructing the global light field from a set of object-centric light fields. Dubbed Compositional Object Light Fields (COLF), our method enables unsupervised learning of object-centric neural scene representations, state-of-the-art reconstruction and novel view synthesis performance on standard datasets, and rendering and training speeds at orders of magnitude faster than existing 3D approaches.
abstract_zh: 连续和离散的神经场景表示最近已成为 3D 场景理解的强大新范式。最近的工作已经解决了以对象为中心的神经场景表示的无监督发现问题。然而，光线行进的成本很高，而且每个对象表示都必须单独进行光线行进，这会导致辐射场采样不足，从而导致渲染噪声、帧速率差以及训练和渲染期间的内存和时间复杂度较高。在这里，我们建议将以对象为中心的组合场景表示中的对象表示为光场。我们提出了一种新颖的光场合成器模块，可以从一组以对象为中心的光场重建全局光场。我们的方法被称为组合对象光场 (COLF)，能够实现以对象为中心的神经场景表示的无监督学习、标准数据集上最先进的重建和新颖的视图合成性能，以及比现有 3D 方法快几个数量级的渲染和训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督学习方法，用于发现和组合物体光场，以解决神经场景表示中的高成本和低效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场景表示方法因光线追踪成本高、采样不足导致渲染质量差和训练效率低，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Compositional Object Light Fields (COLF)方法，通过新型光场组合模块将物体中心光场重构为全局光场，实现无监督学习。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上达到最先进重建和新视角合成效果，渲染及训练速度较现有3D方法提升数量级。
AI.conclusion: COLF方法有效解决了物体中心神经场景表示的效率问题，为高质量渲染和训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Keerti Anand,Rong Ge,Amit Kumar,Debmalya Panigrahi
title: Online Algorithms with Multiple Predictions
title_zh: 具有多重预测的在线算法
abstract: This paper studies online algorithms augmented with multiple machine-learned predictions. While online algorithms augmented with a single prediction have been extensively studied in recent years, the literature for the multiple predictions setting is sparse. In this paper, we give a generic algorithmic framework for online covering problems with multiple predictions that obtains an online solution that is competitive against the performance of the best predictor. Our algorithm incorporates the use of predictions in the classic potential-based analysis of online algorithms. We apply our algorithmic framework to solve classical problems such as online set cover, (weighted) caching, and online facility location in the multiple predictions setting. Our algorithm can also be robustified, i.e., the algorithm can be simultaneously made competitive against the best prediction and the performance of the best online algorithm (without prediction).
summary: This paper studies online algorithms augmented with multiple machine-learned predictions. While online algorithms augmented with a single prediction have been extensively studied in recent years, the literature for the multiple predictions setting is sparse. In this paper, we give a generic algorithmic framework for online covering problems with multiple predictions that obtains an online solution that is competitive against the performance of the best predictor. Our algorithm incorporates the use of predictions in the classic potential-based analysis of online algorithms. We apply our algorithmic framework to solve classical problems such as online set cover, (weighted) caching, and online facility location in the multiple predictions setting. Our algorithm can also be robustified, i.e., the algorithm can be simultaneously made competitive against the best prediction and the performance of the best online algorithm (without prediction).
abstract_zh: 本文研究了通过多种机器学习预测增强的在线算法。虽然近年来对单一预测增强的在线算法进行了广泛的研究，但关于多重预测设置的文献却很少。在本文中，我们给出了一个通用的算法框架，用于在线覆盖具有多个预测的问题，该框架获得了与最佳预测器的性能相竞争的在线解决方案。我们的算法结合了在线算法的经典基于势的分析中的预测的使用。我们应用我们的算法框架来解决多个预测设置中的在线集合覆盖、（加权）缓存和在线设施位置等经典问题。我们的算法还可以被鲁棒化，即该算法可以同时与最佳预测和最佳在线算法（无预测）的性能竞争。

AI.tldr: 研究结合多个机器学习预测的在线算法，提出通用框架以处理在线覆盖问题，并在多个经典问题中应用。
AI.motivation: 现有在线算法研究多基于单一预测，但多预测场景的文献稀缺，需填补该领域研究空白。
AI.method: 设计通用算法框架，将多预测融入传统势能分析，应用于在线集合覆盖、缓存及设施定位等经典问题。
AI.result: 算法在多个问题中表现与最佳预测者竞争，且具备鲁棒性，可同时对抗最佳预测与无预测的最优在线算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出首个处理多预测的通用框架，扩展了在线算法应用边界，并验证了算法有效性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Online Algorithms with Multiple Predictions 具有多重预测的在线算法 This paper studies online algorithms augmented with multiple machine-learned predictions. While online algorithms augmented with a single prediction have been extensively studied in recent years, the literature for the multiple predictions setting is sparse. In this paper, we give a generic algorithmic framework for online covering problems with multiple predictions that obtains an online solution that is competitive against the performance of the best predictor. Our algorithm incorporates the use of predictions in the classic potential-based analysis of online algorithms. We apply our algorithmic framework to solve classical problems such as online set cover, (weighted) caching, and online facility location in the multiple predictions setting. Our algorithm can also be robustified, i.e., the algorithm can be simultaneously made competitive against the best prediction and the performance of the best online algorithm (without prediction). 本文研究了通过多种机器学习预测增强的在线算法。虽然近年来对单一预测增强的在线算法进行了广泛的研究，但关于多重预测设置的文献却很少。在本文中，我们给出了一个通用的算法框架，用于在线覆盖具有多个预测的问题，该框架获得了与最佳预测器的性能相竞争的在线解决方案。我们的算法结合了在线算法的经典基于势的分析中的预测的使用。我们应用我们的算法框架来解决多个预测设置中的在线集合覆盖、（加权）缓存和在线设施位置等经典问题。我们的算法还可以被鲁棒化，即该算法可以同时与最佳预测和最佳在线算法（无预测）的性能竞争。 研究结合多个机器学习预测的在线算法，提出通用框架以处理在线覆盖问题，并在多个经典问题中应用。 Keerti Anand,Rong Ge,Amit Kumar,Debmalya Panigrahi cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Xueyuan Duan,Yu Fu,Kun Wang
title: Network Traffic Anomaly Detection Method Based on Multi scale Residual Feature
title_zh: 基于多尺度残差特征的网络流量异常检测方法
abstract: To address the problem that traditional network traffic anomaly detection algorithms do not suffi-ciently mine potential features in long time domain, an anomaly detection method based on mul-ti-scale residual features of network traffic is proposed. The original traffic is divided into subse-quences of different time spans using sliding windows, and each subsequence is decomposed and reconstructed into data sequences of different levels using wavelet transform technique; the stacked autoencoder (SAE) constructs similar feature space using normal network traffic, and gen-erates reconstructed error vector using the difference between reconstructed samples and input samples in the similar feature space; the multi-path residual group is used to learn reconstructed error The traffic classification is completed by a lightweight classifier. The experimental results show that the detection performance of the proposed method for anomalous network traffic is sig-nificantly improved compared with traditional methods; it confirms that the longer time span and more S transformation scales have positive effects on discovering potential diversity information in the original network traffic.
summary: To address the problem that traditional network traffic anomaly detection algorithms do not suffi-ciently mine potential features in long time domain, an anomaly detection method based on mul-ti-scale residual features of network traffic is proposed. The original traffic is divided into subse-quences of different time spans using sliding windows, and each subsequence is decomposed and reconstructed into data sequences of different levels using wavelet transform technique; the stacked autoencoder (SAE) constructs similar feature space using normal network traffic, and gen-erates reconstructed error vector using the difference between reconstructed samples and input samples in the similar feature space; the multi-path residual group is used to learn reconstructed error The traffic classification is completed by a lightweight classifier. The experimental results show that the detection performance of the proposed method for anomalous network traffic is sig-nificantly improved compared with traditional methods; it confirms that the longer time span and more S transformation scales have positive effects on discovering potential diversity information in the original network traffic.
abstract_zh: 针对传统网络流量异常检测算法不能充分挖掘长时域潜在特征的问题，提出一种基于网络流量多尺度残差特征的异常检测方法。利用滑动窗口将原始流量划分为不同时间跨度的子序列，利用小波变换技术将每个子序列分解重构为不同级别的数据序列；堆叠自动编码器（SAE）使用正常网络流量构建相似特征空间，并使用相似特征空间中重构样本与输入样本之间的差异生成重构误差向量；多路径残差组用于学习重构误差。流量分类由轻量级分类器完成。实验结果表明，该方法对网络异常流量的检测性能较传统方法有显着提高；它证实了更长的时间跨度和更多的S变换尺度对于发现原始网络流量中潜在的多样性信息具有积极的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度残差特征的网络流量异常检测方法，旨在提升传统算法在长时域特征挖掘中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统网络流量异常检测算法未能充分挖掘长时域中的潜在特征，导致检测效果有限。
AI.method: 采用滑动窗口分割流量子序列，结合小波变换分解重构数据；利用堆叠自编码器（SAE）构建正常流量特征空间，生成重构误差向量；通过多路径残差组与轻量级分类器完成流量分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在异常流量检测性能上显著优于传统方法，且更长的时域跨度和更多S变换尺度有助于挖掘原始流量的潜在多样性信息。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度残差特征方法能有效提升网络流量异常检测能力，长时域分析与多尺度变换对特征挖掘具有积极影响。

authors_text: Yida Wang,David Joseph Tan,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: SoftPool++: An Encoder-Decoder Network for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: SoftPool++：用于点云补全的编码器-解码器网络
comment: Accepted in International Journal of Computer Vision
comments: Accepted in International Journal of Computer Vision
abstract: We propose a novel convolutional operator for the task of point cloud completion. One striking characteristic of our approach is that, conversely to related work it does not require any max-pooling or voxelization operation. Instead, the proposed operator used to learn the point cloud embedding in the encoder extracts permutation-invariant features from the point cloud via a soft-pooling of feature activations, which are able to preserve fine-grained geometric details. These features are then passed on to a decoder architecture. Due to the compression in the encoder, a typical limitation of this type of architectures is that they tend to lose parts of the input shape structure. We propose to overcome this limitation by using skip connections specifically devised for point clouds, where links between corresponding layers in the encoder and the decoder are established. As part of these connections, we introduce a transformation matrix that projects the features from the encoder to the decoder and vice-versa. The quantitative and qualitative results on the task of object completion from partial scans on the ShapeNet dataset show that incorporating our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in shape completion both at low and high resolutions.
summary: We propose a novel convolutional operator for the task of point cloud completion. One striking characteristic of our approach is that, conversely to related work it does not require any max-pooling or voxelization operation. Instead, the proposed operator used to learn the point cloud embedding in the encoder extracts permutation-invariant features from the point cloud via a soft-pooling of feature activations, which are able to preserve fine-grained geometric details. These features are then passed on to a decoder architecture. Due to the compression in the encoder, a typical limitation of this type of architectures is that they tend to lose parts of the input shape structure. We propose to overcome this limitation by using skip connections specifically devised for point clouds, where links between corresponding layers in the encoder and the decoder are established. As part of these connections, we introduce a transformation matrix that projects the features from the encoder to the decoder and vice-versa. The quantitative and qualitative results on the task of object completion from partial scans on the ShapeNet dataset show that incorporating our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in shape completion both at low and high resolutions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的卷积算子来完成点云完成的任务。我们的方法的一个显着特征是，与相关工作相反，它不需要任何最大池或体素化操作。相反，所提出的用于学习编码器中嵌入点云的算子通过特征激活的软池化从点云中提取排列不变特征，这能够保留细粒度的几何细节。然后这些特征被传递到解码器架构。由于编码器中的压缩，此类架构的典型限制是它们往往会丢失部分输入形状结构。我们建议通过使用专门为点云设计的跳跃连接来克服这一限制，其中在编码器和解码器中的相应层之间建立链接。作为这些连接的一部分，我们引入了一个转换矩阵，它将特征从编码器投影到解码器，反之亦然。 ShapeNet 数据集上的部分扫描的对象完成任务的定量和定性结果表明，结合我们的方法可以在低分辨率和高分辨率下实现最先进的形状完成性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需max-pooling或体素化的点云补全编码器-解码器网络SoftPool++，通过软池化提取几何细节并利用跳跃连接保持结构完整性。
AI.motivation: 传统点云补全方法依赖max-pooling或体素化操作，易丢失几何细节且结构压缩导致信息丢失，需设计新方法保留细节并保持结构。
AI.method: 设计SoftPool算子通过软池化提取置换不变特征，结合跳跃连接与特征转换矩阵实现编码器-解码器间特征传递，保留几何细节。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集上，该方法在低/高分辨率下均达到点云补全任务的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: SoftPool++通过软池化与跳跃连接有效保留几何细节并保持结构，为点云补全提供高效解决方案。

search_text: SoftPool++: An Encoder-Decoder Network for Point Cloud Completion SoftPool++：用于点云补全的编码器-解码器网络 We propose a novel convolutional operator for the task of point cloud completion. One striking characteristic of our approach is that, conversely to related work it does not require any max-pooling or voxelization operation. Instead, the proposed operator used to learn the point cloud embedding in the encoder extracts permutation-invariant features from the point cloud via a soft-pooling of feature activations, which are able to preserve fine-grained geometric details. These features are then passed on to a decoder architecture. Due to the compression in the encoder, a typical limitation of this type of architectures is that they tend to lose parts of the input shape structure. We propose to overcome this limitation by using skip connections specifically devised for point clouds, where links between corresponding layers in the encoder and the decoder are established. As part of these connections, we introduce a transformation matrix that projects the features from the encoder to the decoder and vice-versa. The quantitative and qualitative results on the task of object completion from partial scans on the ShapeNet dataset show that incorporating our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in shape completion both at low and high resolutions. 我们提出了一种新颖的卷积算子来完成点云完成的任务。我们的方法的一个显着特征是，与相关工作相反，它不需要任何最大池或体素化操作。相反，所提出的用于学习编码器中嵌入点云的算子通过特征激活的软池化从点云中提取排列不变特征，这能够保留细粒度的几何细节。然后这些特征被传递到解码器架构。由于编码器中的压缩，此类架构的典型限制是它们往往会丢失部分输入形状结构。我们建议通过使用专门为点云设计的跳跃连接来克服这一限制，其中在编码器和解码器中的相应层之间建立链接。作为这些连接的一部分，我们引入了一个转换矩阵，它将特征从编码器投影到解码器，反之亦然。 ShapeNet 数据集上的部分扫描的对象完成任务的定量和定性结果表明，结合我们的方法可以在低分辨率和高分辨率下实现最先进的形状完成性能。 本文提出一种无需max-pooling或体素化的点云补全编码器-解码器网络SoftPool++，通过软池化提取几何细节并利用跳跃连接保持结构完整性。 Yida Wang,David Joseph Tan,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Declan McIntosh,Tunai Porto Marques,Alexandra Branzan Albu
title: Preservation of High Frequency Content for Deep Learning-Based Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 基于深度学习的医学图像分类的高频内容的保留
comment: Published in 2021 18th Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV). 8 pages with referances
comments: Published in 2021 18th Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV). 8 pages with referances
abstract: Chest radiographs are used for the diagnosis of multiple critical illnesses (e.g., Pneumonia, heart failure, lung cancer), for this reason, systems for the automatic or semi-automatic analysis of these data are of particular interest. An efficient analysis of large amounts of chest radiographs can aid physicians and radiologists, ultimately allowing for better medical care of lung-, heart- and chest-related conditions. We propose a novel Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT)-based method for the efficient identification and encoding of visual information that is typically lost in the down-sampling of high-resolution radiographs, a common step in computer-aided diagnostic pipelines. Our proposed approach requires only slight modifications to the input of existing state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), making it easily applicable to existing image classification frameworks. We show that the extra high-frequency components offered by our method increased the classification performance of several CNNs in benchmarks employing the NIH Chest-8 and ImageNet-2017 datasets. Based on our results we hypothesize that providing frequency-specific coefficients allows the CNNs to specialize in the identification of structures that are particular to a frequency band, ultimately increasing classification performance, without an increase in computational load. The implementation of our work is available at github.com/DeclanMcIntosh/LeGallCuda.
summary: Chest radiographs are used for the diagnosis of multiple critical illnesses (e.g., Pneumonia, heart failure, lung cancer), for this reason, systems for the automatic or semi-automatic analysis of these data are of particular interest. An efficient analysis of large amounts of chest radiographs can aid physicians and radiologists, ultimately allowing for better medical care of lung-, heart- and chest-related conditions. We propose a novel Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT)-based method for the efficient identification and encoding of visual information that is typically lost in the down-sampling of high-resolution radiographs, a common step in computer-aided diagnostic pipelines. Our proposed approach requires only slight modifications to the input of existing state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), making it easily applicable to existing image classification frameworks. We show that the extra high-frequency components offered by our method increased the classification performance of several CNNs in benchmarks employing the NIH Chest-8 and ImageNet-2017 datasets. Based on our results we hypothesize that providing frequency-specific coefficients allows the CNNs to specialize in the identification of structures that are particular to a frequency band, ultimately increasing classification performance, without an increase in computational load. The implementation of our work is available at github.com/DeclanMcIntosh/LeGallCuda.
abstract_zh: 胸部X光片用于诊断多种危重疾病（例如肺炎、心力衰竭、肺癌），因此，自动或半自动分析这些数据的系统特别令人感兴趣。对大量胸部 X 光片的有效分析可以帮助医生和放射科医生，最终为肺部、心脏和胸部相关疾病提供更好的医疗护理。我们提出了一种基于离散小波变换（DWT）的新颖方法，用于有效识别和编码视觉信息，这些信息通常在高分辨率射线照片的下采样中丢失，这是计算机辅助诊断流程中的常见步骤。我们提出的方法只需要对现有最先进的卷积神经网络（CNN）的输入进行少量修改，使其可以轻松应用于现有的图像分类框架。我们表明，我们的方法提供的额外高频组件提高了使用 NIH Chest-8 和 ImageNet-2017 数据集的基准测试中多个 CNN 的分类性能。根据我们的结果，我们假设提供特定于频率的系数使 CNN 能够专门识别特定于频段的结构，最终提高分类性能，而不增加计算负载。我们工作的实现可以在 github.com/DeclanMcIntosh/LeGallCuda 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散小波变换（DWT）的方法，用于在深度学习医学图像分类中保留高分辨率放射影像的高频内容。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光片的下采样过程会导致高频信息丢失，影响卷积神经网络（CNN）的分类性能，需通过有效方法保留关键视觉信息。
AI.method: 设计DWT方法提取并编码高分辨率影像中的高频成分，仅需对现有CNN输入进行轻微修改，无需增加计算负担。
AI.result: 在NIH Chest-8和ImageNet-2017数据集上，该方法提升了多个CNN模型的分类准确率，验证了频率特异性系数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 保留高频信息使CNN能更精准识别特定频率带的结构特征，为医学影像分析提供了高效且兼容的改进方案。

authors_text: Youcheng Sun,Muhammad Usman,Divya Gopinath,Corina S. Păsăreanu
title: VPN: Verification of Poisoning in Neural Networks
title_zh: VPN：神经网络中毒验证
abstract: Neural networks are successfully used in a variety of applications, many of them having safety and security concerns. As a result researchers have proposed formal verification techniques for verifying neural network properties. While previous efforts have mainly focused on checking local robustness in neural networks, we instead study another neural network security issue, namely data poisoning. In this case an attacker inserts a trigger into a subset of the training data, in such a way that at test time, this trigger in an input causes the trained model to misclassify to some target class. We show how to formulate the check for data poisoning as a property that can be checked with off-the-shelf verification tools, such as Marabou and nneum, where counterexamples of failed checks constitute the triggers. We further show that the discovered triggers are `transferable' from a small model to a larger, better-trained model, allowing us to analyze state-of-the art performant models trained for image classification tasks.
summary: Neural networks are successfully used in a variety of applications, many of them having safety and security concerns. As a result researchers have proposed formal verification techniques for verifying neural network properties. While previous efforts have mainly focused on checking local robustness in neural networks, we instead study another neural network security issue, namely data poisoning. In this case an attacker inserts a trigger into a subset of the training data, in such a way that at test time, this trigger in an input causes the trained model to misclassify to some target class. We show how to formulate the check for data poisoning as a property that can be checked with off-the-shelf verification tools, such as Marabou and nneum, where counterexamples of failed checks constitute the triggers. We further show that the discovered triggers are `transferable' from a small model to a larger, better-trained model, allowing us to analyze state-of-the art performant models trained for image classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络已成功用于各种应用，其中许多应用都存在安全问题。因此，研究人员提出了用于验证神经网络属性的形式验证技术。虽然之前的工作主要集中在检查神经网络的局部鲁棒性，但我们转而研究另一个神经网络安全问题，即数据中毒。在这种情况下，攻击者将触发器插入到训练数据的子集中，这样在测试时，输入中的触发器会导致训练模型错误分类到某个目标类别。我们展示了如何将数据中毒检查制定为可以使用现成验证工具（例如 Marabou 和 nneum）进行检查的属性，其中失败检查的反例构成触发器。我们进一步表明，所发现的触发器可以从小型模型“转移”到更大、训练更好的模型，从而使我们能够分析针对图像分类任务训练的最先进的高性能模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，通过现有验证工具检测神经网络中的数据中毒攻击，并验证触发器在不同模型间的可转移性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在安全关键领域应用广泛，但现有研究多关注局部鲁棒性，而数据中毒攻击（通过污染训练数据实现模型操控）尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 将数据中毒检测转化为形式化验证问题，利用Marabou等工具寻找反例作为触发器，并验证触发器在小型模型到大型模型间的可转移性。
AI.result: 成功检测到中毒触发器，并证明其可转移性，从而可分析先进图像分类模型的中毒风险。
AI.conclusion: 本文为神经网络中毒检测提供了新思路，展示了现有验证工具的潜力，并揭示了攻击跨模型迁移的威胁。

authors_text: Peng Gao,Teli Ma,Hongsheng Li,Ziyi Lin,Jifeng Dai,Yu Qiao
title: ConvMAE: Masked Convolution Meets Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: ConvMAE：掩模卷积与掩模自动编码器的结合
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViT) become widely-adopted architectures for various vision tasks. Masked auto-encoding for feature pretraining and multi-scale hybrid convolution-transformer architectures can further unleash the potentials of ViT, leading to state-of-the-art performances on image classification, detection and semantic segmentation. In this paper, our ConvMAE framework demonstrates that multi-scale hybrid convolution-transformer can learn more discriminative representations via the mask auto-encoding scheme. However, directly using the original masking strategy leads to the heavy computational cost and pretraining-finetuning discrepancy. To tackle the issue, we adopt the masked convolution to prevent information leakage in the convolution blocks. A simple block-wise masking strategy is proposed to ensure computational efficiency. We also propose to more directly supervise the multi-scale features of the encoder to boost multi-scale features. Based on our pretrained ConvMAE models, ConvMAE-Base improves ImageNet-1K finetuning accuracy by 1.4% compared with MAE-Base. On object detection, ConvMAE-Base finetuned for only 25 epochs surpasses MAE-Base fined-tuned for 100 epochs by 2.9% box AP and 2.2% mask AP respectively. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/Alpha-VL/ConvMAE.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) become widely-adopted architectures for various vision tasks. Masked auto-encoding for feature pretraining and multi-scale hybrid convolution-transformer architectures can further unleash the potentials of ViT, leading to state-of-the-art performances on image classification, detection and semantic segmentation. In this paper, our ConvMAE framework demonstrates that multi-scale hybrid convolution-transformer can learn more discriminative representations via the mask auto-encoding scheme. However, directly using the original masking strategy leads to the heavy computational cost and pretraining-finetuning discrepancy. To tackle the issue, we adopt the masked convolution to prevent information leakage in the convolution blocks. A simple block-wise masking strategy is proposed to ensure computational efficiency. We also propose to more directly supervise the multi-scale features of the encoder to boost multi-scale features. Based on our pretrained ConvMAE models, ConvMAE-Base improves ImageNet-1K finetuning accuracy by 1.4% compared with MAE-Base. On object detection, ConvMAE-Base finetuned for only 25 epochs surpasses MAE-Base fined-tuned for 100 epochs by 2.9% box AP and 2.2% mask AP respectively. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/Alpha-VL/ConvMAE.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 成为各种视觉任务广泛采用的架构。用于特征预训练的屏蔽自动编码和多尺度混合卷积变换器架构可以进一步释放 ViT 的潜力，从而在图像分类、检测和语义分割方面实现最先进的性能。在本文中，我们的 ConvMAE 框架证明了多尺度混合卷积变换器可以通过掩码自动编码方案学习更多判别性表示。然而，直接使用原始掩蔽策略会导致大量的计算成本和预训练-微调差异。为了解决这个问题，我们采用掩模卷积来防止卷积块中的信息泄漏。提出了一种简单的分块掩码策略以确保计算效率。我们还建议更直接地监督编码器的多尺度特征以增强多尺度特征。基于我们预训练的 ConvMAE 模型，ConvMAE-Base 与 MAE-Base 相比，将 ImageNet-1K 微调精度提高了 1.4%。在目标检测方面，仅微调 25 个 epoch 的 ConvMAE-Base 比微调 100 个 epoch 的 MAE-Base 分别高出 2.9% 的 box AP 和 2.2% 的 mask AP。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/Alpha-VL/ConvMAE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConvMAE框架，结合掩码卷积与掩码自编码器，优化多尺度混合卷积-Transformer架构的预训练与微调过程。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在使用掩码自编码器预训练Vision Transformer时存在计算成本高和预训练-微调差异问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用掩码卷积防止信息泄露，提出块级掩码策略提升计算效率，并直接监督编码器多尺度特征以增强表征能力。
AI.result: ConvMAE-Base在ImageNet-1K上微调精度提升1.4%，目标检测任务中仅用25轮训练即超越MAE-Base 100轮结果，分别提升2.9%和2.2%。
AI.conclusion: ConvMAE通过优化掩码机制与多尺度特征学习，在图像分类和检测任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能。

search_text: ConvMAE: Masked Convolution Meets Masked Autoencoders ConvMAE：掩模卷积与掩模自动编码器的结合 Vision Transformers (ViT) become widely-adopted architectures for various vision tasks. Masked auto-encoding for feature pretraining and multi-scale hybrid convolution-transformer architectures can further unleash the potentials of ViT, leading to state-of-the-art performances on image classification, detection and semantic segmentation. In this paper, our ConvMAE framework demonstrates that multi-scale hybrid convolution-transformer can learn more discriminative representations via the mask auto-encoding scheme. However, directly using the original masking strategy leads to the heavy computational cost and pretraining-finetuning discrepancy. To tackle the issue, we adopt the masked convolution to prevent information leakage in the convolution blocks. A simple block-wise masking strategy is proposed to ensure computational efficiency. We also propose to more directly supervise the multi-scale features of the encoder to boost multi-scale features. Based on our pretrained ConvMAE models, ConvMAE-Base improves ImageNet-1K finetuning accuracy by 1.4% compared with MAE-Base. On object detection, ConvMAE-Base finetuned for only 25 epochs surpasses MAE-Base fined-tuned for 100 epochs by 2.9% box AP and 2.2% mask AP respectively. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/Alpha-VL/ConvMAE. 视觉变压器 (ViT) 成为各种视觉任务广泛采用的架构。用于特征预训练的屏蔽自动编码和多尺度混合卷积变换器架构可以进一步释放 ViT 的潜力，从而在图像分类、检测和语义分割方面实现最先进的性能。在本文中，我们的 ConvMAE 框架证明了多尺度混合卷积变换器可以通过掩码自动编码方案学习更多判别性表示。然而，直接使用原始掩蔽策略会导致大量的计算成本和预训练-微调差异。为了解决这个问题，我们采用掩模卷积来防止卷积块中的信息泄漏。提出了一种简单的分块掩码策略以确保计算效率。我们还建议更直接地监督编码器的多尺度特征以增强多尺度特征。基于我们预训练的 ConvMAE 模型，ConvMAE-Base 与 MAE-Base 相比，将 ImageNet-1K 微调精度提高了 1.4%。在目标检测方面，仅微调 25 个 epoch 的 ConvMAE-Base 比微调 100 个 epoch 的 MAE-Base 分别高出 2.9% 的 box AP 和 2.2% 的 mask AP。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/Alpha-VL/ConvMAE 获取。 本文提出ConvMAE框架，结合掩码卷积与掩码自编码器，优化多尺度混合卷积-Transformer架构的预训练与微调过程。 Peng Gao,Teli Ma,Hongsheng Li,Ziyi Lin,Jifeng Dai,Yu Qiao cs.CV

authors_text: Bin Zhu,Chong-Wah Ngo,Jingjing Chen,Wing-Kwong Chan
title: Cross-lingual Adaptation for Recipe Retrieval with Mixup
title_zh: 通过 Mixup 进行菜谱检索的跨语言适应
abstract: Cross-modal recipe retrieval has attracted research attention in recent years, thanks to the availability of large-scale paired data for training. Nevertheless, obtaining adequate recipe-image pairs covering the majority of cuisines for supervised learning is difficult if not impossible. By transferring knowledge learnt from a data-rich cuisine to a data-scarce cuisine, domain adaptation sheds light on this practical problem. Nevertheless, existing works assume recipes in source and target domains are mostly originated from the same cuisine and written in the same language. This paper studies unsupervised domain adaptation for image-to-recipe retrieval, where recipes in source and target domains are in different languages. Moreover, only recipes are available for training in the target domain. A novel recipe mixup method is proposed to learn transferable embedding features between the two domains. Specifically, recipe mixup produces mixed recipes to form an intermediate domain by discretely exchanging the section(s) between source and target recipes. To bridge the domain gap, recipe mixup loss is proposed to enforce the intermediate domain to locate in the shortest geodesic path between source and target domains in the recipe embedding space. By using Recipe 1M dataset as source domain (English) and Vireo-FoodTransfer dataset as target domain (Chinese), empirical experiments verify the effectiveness of recipe mixup for cross-lingual adaptation in the context of image-to-recipe retrieval.
summary: Cross-modal recipe retrieval has attracted research attention in recent years, thanks to the availability of large-scale paired data for training. Nevertheless, obtaining adequate recipe-image pairs covering the majority of cuisines for supervised learning is difficult if not impossible. By transferring knowledge learnt from a data-rich cuisine to a data-scarce cuisine, domain adaptation sheds light on this practical problem. Nevertheless, existing works assume recipes in source and target domains are mostly originated from the same cuisine and written in the same language. This paper studies unsupervised domain adaptation for image-to-recipe retrieval, where recipes in source and target domains are in different languages. Moreover, only recipes are available for training in the target domain. A novel recipe mixup method is proposed to learn transferable embedding features between the two domains. Specifically, recipe mixup produces mixed recipes to form an intermediate domain by discretely exchanging the section(s) between source and target recipes. To bridge the domain gap, recipe mixup loss is proposed to enforce the intermediate domain to locate in the shortest geodesic path between source and target domains in the recipe embedding space. By using Recipe 1M dataset as source domain (English) and Vireo-FoodTransfer dataset as target domain (Chinese), empirical experiments verify the effectiveness of recipe mixup for cross-lingual adaptation in the context of image-to-recipe retrieval.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于可用于训练的大规模配对数据的可用性，跨模式食谱检索引起了研究关注。然而，获得足够的涵盖大多数菜系的菜谱图像对进行监督学习即使不是不可能，也是很困难的。通过将从数据丰富的菜肴中学到的知识转移到数据稀缺的菜肴中，领域适应揭示了这个实际问题。然而，现有的工作假设源域和目标域中的食谱大多源自相同的菜系并用相同的语言编写。本文研究了图像到菜谱检索的无监督域适应，其中源域和目标域中的菜谱采用不同的语言。此外，只有食谱可用于目标领域的培训。提出了一种新颖的配方混合方法来学习两个域之间的可转移嵌入特征。具体来说，配方混合通过离散地交换源配方和目标配方之间的部分来产生混合配方以形成中间域。为了弥合域差距，提出了配方混合损失，以强制中间域位于配方嵌入空间中源域和目标域之间的最短测地路径。通过使用Recipe 1M数据集作为源域（英语）和Vireo-FoodTransfer数据集作为目标域（中文），实证实验验证了在图像到菜谱检索的背景下菜谱混合跨语言适应的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于跨语言食谱检索的无监督领域自适应方法，通过混合不同语言的食谱来学习可迁移的嵌入特征。
AI.motivation: 现有的跨模态食谱检索方法通常假设源域和目标域的食谱来自相同语言和菜系，但在实际应用中，不同语言的食谱数据获取困难，导致领域适应研究不足。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Recipe Mixup的方法，通过离散交换源域（英语）和目标域（中文）食谱的段落来生成中间域，并引入Recipe Mixup损失函数以确保中间域位于源域和目标域之间的最短测地路径上。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用Recipe 1M数据集作为源域，Vireo-FoodTransfer数据集作为目标域，所提出的方法在跨语言食谱检索任务中有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法通过混合不同语言的食谱，成功实现了跨语言的领域自适应，为解决跨语言食谱检索问题提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Hanju Yoo,Taehun Jung,Linglong Dai,Songkuk Kim,Chan-Byoung Chae
title: Demo: Real-Time Semantic Communications with a Vision Transformer
title_zh: 演示：使用 Vision Transformer 进行实时语义通信
abstract: Semantic communications are expected to enable the more effective delivery of meaning rather than a precise transfer of symbols. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network-based architecture for image transmission and demonstrate its feasibility in a real-time wireless channel by implementing a prototype based on a field-programmable gate array (FPGA). We demonstrate that this system outperforms the traditional 256-quadrature amplitude modulation system in the low signal-to-noise ratio regime with the popular CIFAR-10 dataset. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that implements and investigates real-time semantic communications with a vision transformer.
summary: Semantic communications are expected to enable the more effective delivery of meaning rather than a precise transfer of symbols. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network-based architecture for image transmission and demonstrate its feasibility in a real-time wireless channel by implementing a prototype based on a field-programmable gate array (FPGA). We demonstrate that this system outperforms the traditional 256-quadrature amplitude modulation system in the low signal-to-noise ratio regime with the popular CIFAR-10 dataset. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that implements and investigates real-time semantic communications with a vision transformer.
abstract_zh: 语义通信有望实现更有效的意义传递，而不是精确的符号传递。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于端到端深度神经网络的图像传输架构，并通过实现基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的原型来证明其在实时无线通道中的可行性。我们利用流行的 CIFAR-10 数据集证明，该系统在低信噪比范围内的性能优于传统的 256 正交幅度调制系统。据我们所知，这是第一个利用视觉转换器实现和研究实时语义通信的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer的端到端深度神经网络架构，用于实现实时语义通信，并通过FPGA原型验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统通信方法在低信噪比环境下传输效率低下，而语义通信能更高效地传递信息意义，因此需要探索新型架构提升性能。
AI.method: 设计基于视觉Transformer的端到端神经网络，结合FPGA实现原型系统，在实时无线信道中传输图像数据。
AI.result: 在低信噪比场景下，该系统性能优于传统256-QAM系统，且在CIFAR-10数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现基于视觉Transformer的实时语义通信，证明了该方法在图像传输中的优越性与可行性。

search_text: Demo: Real-Time Semantic Communications with a Vision Transformer 演示：使用 Vision Transformer 进行实时语义通信 Semantic communications are expected to enable the more effective delivery of meaning rather than a precise transfer of symbols. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep neural network-based architecture for image transmission and demonstrate its feasibility in a real-time wireless channel by implementing a prototype based on a field-programmable gate array (FPGA). We demonstrate that this system outperforms the traditional 256-quadrature amplitude modulation system in the low signal-to-noise ratio regime with the popular CIFAR-10 dataset. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that implements and investigates real-time semantic communications with a vision transformer. 语义通信有望实现更有效的意义传递，而不是精确的符号传递。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于端到端深度神经网络的图像传输架构，并通过实现基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的原型来证明其在实时无线通道中的可行性。我们利用流行的 CIFAR-10 数据集证明，该系统在低信噪比范围内的性能优于传统的 256 正交幅度调制系统。据我们所知，这是第一个利用视觉转换器实现和研究实时语义通信的工作。 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer的端到端深度神经网络架构，用于实现实时语义通信，并通过FPGA原型验证其可行性。 Hanju Yoo,Taehun Jung,Linglong Dai,Songkuk Kim,Chan-Byoung Chae eess.SP,cs.AI

authors_text: Zongjiang Tu,Die Liu,Xiaoqing Wang,Chen Jiang,Pengwen Zhu,Minghui Zhang,Shanshan Wang,Dong Liang,Qiegen Liu
title: WKGM: Weight-K-space Generative Model for Parallel Imaging Reconstruction
title_zh: WKGM：用于并行成像重建的权重-K 空间生成模型
abstract: Deep learning based parallel imaging (PI) has made great progresses in recent years to accelerate magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Nevertheless, it still has some limitations, such as the robustness and flexibility of existing methods have great deficiency. In this work, we propose a method to explore the k-space domain learning via robust generative modeling for flexible calibration-less PI reconstruction, coined weight-k-space generative model (WKGM). Specifically, WKGM is a generalized k-space domain model, where the k-space weighting technology and high-dimensional space augmentation design are efficiently incorporated for score-based generative model training, resulting in good and robust reconstructions. In addition, WKGM is flexible and thus can be synergistically combined with various traditional k-space PI models, which can make full use of the correlation between multi-coil data and realizecalibration-less PI. Even though our model was trained on only 500 images, experimental results with varying sampling patterns and acceleration factors demonstrate that WKGM can attain state-of-the-art reconstruction results with the well-learned k-space generative prior.
summary: Deep learning based parallel imaging (PI) has made great progresses in recent years to accelerate magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Nevertheless, it still has some limitations, such as the robustness and flexibility of existing methods have great deficiency. In this work, we propose a method to explore the k-space domain learning via robust generative modeling for flexible calibration-less PI reconstruction, coined weight-k-space generative model (WKGM). Specifically, WKGM is a generalized k-space domain model, where the k-space weighting technology and high-dimensional space augmentation design are efficiently incorporated for score-based generative model training, resulting in good and robust reconstructions. In addition, WKGM is flexible and thus can be synergistically combined with various traditional k-space PI models, which can make full use of the correlation between multi-coil data and realizecalibration-less PI. Even though our model was trained on only 500 images, experimental results with varying sampling patterns and acceleration factors demonstrate that WKGM can attain state-of-the-art reconstruction results with the well-learned k-space generative prior.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的并行成像（PI）在加速磁共振成像（MRI）方面取得了巨大进展。尽管如此，它仍然存在一些局限性，例如现有方法的鲁棒性和灵活性都存在很大的不足。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过稳健的生成模型来探索 k 空间域学习的方法，以实现灵活的无校准 PI 重建，创造了权重 k 空间生成模型 (WKGM)。具体来说，WKGM 是一种广义的 k 空间域模型，其中 k 空间加权技术和高维空间增强设计被有效地结合用于基于分数的生成模型训练，从而产生良好且鲁棒的重建。此外，WKGM非常灵活，可以与各种传统的k空间PI模型协同结合，可以充分利用多线圈数据之间的相关性，实现免校准PI。尽管我们的模型仅使用 500 张图像进行训练，但不同采样模式和加速因子的实验结果表明，WKGM 可以通过充分学习的 k 空间生成先验获得最先进的重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加权k空间生成模型（WKGM）的并行成像重建方法，旨在提高磁共振成像的鲁棒性和灵活性，无需校准即可实现快速重建。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习并行成像方法在鲁棒性和灵活性方面存在不足，难以适应不同的采样模式和加速因子，且通常需要校准数据。
AI.method: WKGM通过结合k空间加权技术和高维空间增强设计，构建了一种通用的k空间生成模型，利用基于分数的生成模型训练，可与传统k空间模型协同工作，实现无需校准的多线圈数据相关性利用。
AI.result: 在仅使用500张训练图像的情况下，WKGM在多种采样模式和加速因子下均达到最先进的重建效果，验证了其良好的鲁棒性和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: WKGM通过学习k空间生成先验，为无校准并行成像提供了高效、鲁棒的解决方案，显著提升了重建性能和适用性。

authors_text: Aviad Aberdam,Roy Ganz,Shai Mazor,Ron Litman
title: Multimodal Semi-Supervised Learning for Text Recognition
title_zh: 用于文本识别的多模态半监督学习
comment: Code will be published upon publication
comments: Code will be published upon publication
abstract: Until recently, the number of public real-world text images was insufficient for training scene text recognizers. Therefore, most modern training methods rely on synthetic data and operate in a fully supervised manner. Nevertheless, the amount of public real-world text images has increased significantly lately, including a great deal of unlabeled data. Leveraging these resources requires semi-supervised approaches; however, the few existing methods do not account for vision-language multimodality structure and therefore suboptimal for state-of-the-art multimodal architectures. To bridge this gap, we present semi-supervised learning for multimodal text recognizers (SemiMTR) that leverages unlabeled data at each modality training phase. Notably, our method refrains from extra training stages and maintains the current three-stage multimodal training procedure. Our algorithm starts by pretraining the vision model through a single-stage training that unifies self-supervised learning with supervised training. More specifically, we extend an existing visual representation learning algorithm and propose the first contrastive-based method for scene text recognition. After pretraining the language model on a text corpus, we fine-tune the entire network via a sequential, character-level, consistency regularization between weakly and strongly augmented views of text images. In a novel setup, consistency is enforced on each modality separately. Extensive experiments validate that our method outperforms the current training schemes and achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple scene text recognition benchmarks.
summary: Until recently, the number of public real-world text images was insufficient for training scene text recognizers. Therefore, most modern training methods rely on synthetic data and operate in a fully supervised manner. Nevertheless, the amount of public real-world text images has increased significantly lately, including a great deal of unlabeled data. Leveraging these resources requires semi-supervised approaches; however, the few existing methods do not account for vision-language multimodality structure and therefore suboptimal for state-of-the-art multimodal architectures. To bridge this gap, we present semi-supervised learning for multimodal text recognizers (SemiMTR) that leverages unlabeled data at each modality training phase. Notably, our method refrains from extra training stages and maintains the current three-stage multimodal training procedure. Our algorithm starts by pretraining the vision model through a single-stage training that unifies self-supervised learning with supervised training. More specifically, we extend an existing visual representation learning algorithm and propose the first contrastive-based method for scene text recognition. After pretraining the language model on a text corpus, we fine-tune the entire network via a sequential, character-level, consistency regularization between weakly and strongly augmented views of text images. In a novel setup, consistency is enforced on each modality separately. Extensive experiments validate that our method outperforms the current training schemes and achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple scene text recognition benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 直到最近，公共现实世界文本图像的数量还不足以训练场景文本识别器。因此，大多数现代训练方法都依赖于合成数据并以完全监督的方式运行。然而，最近公开的现实世界文本图像的数量显着增加，其中包括大量未标记的数据。利用这些资源需要半监督方法；然而，现有的少数方法并没有考虑视觉语言多模态结构，因此对于最先进的多模态架构来说并不是最理想的。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了多模态文本识别器的半监督学习（SemiMTR），它在每个模态训练阶段利用未标记的数据。值得注意的是，我们的方法避免了额外的训练阶段，并保持了当前的三阶段多模式训练程序。我们的算法首先通过将自我监督学习与监督训练相结合的单阶段训练来预训练视觉模型。更具体地说，我们扩展了现有的视觉表示学习算法，并提出了第一个基于对比的场景文本识别方法。在文本语料库上预训练语言模型后，我们通过文本图像的弱增强和强增强视图之间的顺序、字符级、一致性正则化来微调整个网络。在新颖的设置中，分别对每种模式强制执行一致性。大量的实验验证了我们的方法优于当前的训练方案，并在多个场景文本识别基准上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态半监督学习方法（SemiMTR），用于提升场景文本识别性能，通过有效利用未标记的真实世界文本图像数据。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法未能充分利用视觉-语言多模态结构，导致在复杂场景文本识别任务中表现次优。
AI.method: 设计三阶段训练框架：1）视觉模型预训练结合对比学习；2）语言模型预训练；3）字符级一致性正则化微调，分别在视觉和语言模态上强制一致性约束。
AI.result: 在多个场景文本识别基准测试中达到最优性能，显著优于现有全监督和半监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模多模态一致性约束，半监督学习能有效提升文本识别模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Nevertheless, the amount of public real-world text images has increased significantly lately, including a great deal of unlabeled data. Leveraging these resources requires semi-supervised approaches; however, the few existing methods do not account for vision-language multimodality structure and therefore suboptimal for state-of-the-art multimodal architectures. To bridge this gap, we present semi-supervised learning for multimodal text recognizers (SemiMTR) that leverages unlabeled data at each modality training phase. Notably, our method refrains from extra training stages and maintains the current three-stage multimodal training procedure. Our algorithm starts by pretraining the vision model through a single-stage training that unifies self-supervised learning with supervised training. More specifically, we extend an existing visual representation learning algorithm and propose the first contrastive-based method for scene text recognition. After pretraining the language model on a text corpus, we fine-tune the entire network via a sequential, character-level, consistency regularization between weakly and strongly augmented views of text images. In a novel setup, consistency is enforced on each modality separately. Extensive experiments validate that our method outperforms the current training schemes and achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple scene text recognition benchmarks. 直到最近，公共现实世界文本图像的数量还不足以训练场景文本识别器。因此，大多数现代训练方法都依赖于合成数据并以完全监督的方式运行。然而，最近公开的现实世界文本图像的数量显着增加，其中包括大量未标记的数据。利用这些资源需要半监督方法；然而，现有的少数方法并没有考虑视觉语言多模态结构，因此对于最先进的多模态架构来说并不是最理想的。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了多模态文本识别器的半监督学习（SemiMTR），它在每个模态训练阶段利用未标记的数据。值得注意的是，我们的方法避免了额外的训练阶段，并保持了当前的三阶段多模式训练程序。我们的算法首先通过将自我监督学习与监督训练相结合的单阶段训练来预训练视觉模型。更具体地说，我们扩展了现有的视觉表示学习算法，并提出了第一个基于对比的场景文本识别方法。在文本语料库上预训练语言模型后，我们通过文本图像的弱增强和强增强视图之间的顺序、字符级、一致性正则化来微调整个网络。在新颖的设置中，分别对每种模式强制执行一致性。大量的实验验证了我们的方法优于当前的训练方案，并在多个场景文本识别基准上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种多模态半监督学习方法（SemiMTR），用于提升场景文本识别性能，通过有效利用未标记的真实世界文本图像数据。 Aviad Aberdam,Roy Ganz,Shai Mazor,Ron Litman cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Wenxuan Fang,Kai Zhang,Yoli Shavit,Wensen Feng
title: Adversarial Learning of Hard Positives for Place Recognition
title_zh: 地点识别的硬肯定的对抗性学习
abstract: Image retrieval methods for place recognition learn global image descriptors that are used for fetching geo-tagged images at inference time. Recent works have suggested employing weak and self-supervision for mining hard positives and hard negatives in order to improve localization accuracy and robustness to visibility changes (e.g. in illumination or view point). However, generating hard positives, which is essential for obtaining robustness, is still limited to hard-coded or global augmentations. In this work we propose an adversarial method to guide the creation of hard positives for training image retrieval networks. Our method learns local and global augmentation policies which will increase the training loss, while the image retrieval network is forced to learn more powerful features for discriminating increasingly difficult examples. This approach allows the image retrieval network to generalize beyond the hard examples presented in the data and learn features that are robust to a wide range of variations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art recalls on the Pitts250 and Tokyo 24/7 benchmarks and outperforms recent image retrieval methods on the rOxford and rParis datasets by a noticeable margin.
summary: Image retrieval methods for place recognition learn global image descriptors that are used for fetching geo-tagged images at inference time. Recent works have suggested employing weak and self-supervision for mining hard positives and hard negatives in order to improve localization accuracy and robustness to visibility changes (e.g. in illumination or view point). However, generating hard positives, which is essential for obtaining robustness, is still limited to hard-coded or global augmentations. In this work we propose an adversarial method to guide the creation of hard positives for training image retrieval networks. Our method learns local and global augmentation policies which will increase the training loss, while the image retrieval network is forced to learn more powerful features for discriminating increasingly difficult examples. This approach allows the image retrieval network to generalize beyond the hard examples presented in the data and learn features that are robust to a wide range of variations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art recalls on the Pitts250 and Tokyo 24/7 benchmarks and outperforms recent image retrieval methods on the rOxford and rParis datasets by a noticeable margin.
abstract_zh: 用于地点识别的图像检索方法学习全局图像描述符，用于在推理时获取地理标记图像。最近的工作建议采用弱监督和自监督来挖掘硬阳性和硬阴性，以提高定位精度和对可见性变化（例如照明或视点）的鲁棒性。然而，生成对于获得鲁棒性至关重要的硬阳性仍然仅限于硬编码或全局增强。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对抗方法来指导训练图像检索网络的硬阳性的创建。我们的方法学习局部和全局增强策略，这会增加训练损失，而图像检索网络被迫学习更强大的特征来区分越来越困难的示例。这种方法允许图像检索网络超越数据中呈现的困难示例进行泛化，并学习对各种变化都具有鲁棒性的特征。我们的方法在 Pitts250 和 Tokyo 24/7 基准上实现了最先进的召回，并且在 rOxford 和 rParis 数据集上明显优于最新的图像检索方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗学习方法，通过生成困难正样本提升地点识别的图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成困难正样本依赖硬编码或全局增强，难以有效提升模型对光照、视角变化等场景的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计对抗机制学习局部和全局增强策略，通过增加训练损失迫使模型学习更强大的判别特征。
AI.result: 在Pitts250和Tokyo 24/7基准达到最先进召回率，在rOxford和rParis数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习困难正样本可增强特征鲁棒性与泛化能力，有效提升地点识别准确率。

authors_text: Chunyu Xie,Heng Cai,Jincheng Li,Fanjing Kong,Xiaoyu Wu,Jianfei Song,Henrique Morimitsu,Lin Yao,Dexin Wang,Xiangzheng Zhang,Dawei Leng,Baochang Zhang,Xiangyang Ji,Yafeng Deng
title: CCMB: A Large-scale Chinese Cross-modal Benchmark
title_zh: CCMB：中国大型跨模式基准
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 31st ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM), 2023, Pages 4219-4227
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 31st ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM), 2023, Pages 4219-4227
abstract: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) on large-scale datasets has shown premier performance on various downstream tasks. In contrast to plenty of available benchmarks with English corpus, large-scale pre-training datasets and downstream datasets with Chinese corpus remain largely unexplored. In this work, we build a large-scale high-quality Chinese Cross-Modal Benchmark named CCMB for the research community, which contains the currently largest public pre-training dataset Zero and five human-annotated fine-tuning datasets for downstream tasks. Zero contains 250 million images paired with 750 million text descriptions, plus two of the five fine-tuning datasets are also currently the largest ones for Chinese cross-modal downstream tasks. Along with the CCMB, we also develop a VLP framework named R2D2, applying a pre-Ranking + Ranking strategy to learn powerful vision-language representations and a two-way distillation method (i.e., target-guided Distillation and feature-guided Distillation) to further enhance the learning capability. With the Zero and the R2D2 VLP framework, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on twelve downstream datasets from five broad categories of tasks including image-text retrieval, image-text matching, image caption, text-to-image generation, and zero-shot image classification. The datasets, models, and codes are available at https://github.com/yuxie11/R2D2
summary: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) on large-scale datasets has shown premier performance on various downstream tasks. In contrast to plenty of available benchmarks with English corpus, large-scale pre-training datasets and downstream datasets with Chinese corpus remain largely unexplored. In this work, we build a large-scale high-quality Chinese Cross-Modal Benchmark named CCMB for the research community, which contains the currently largest public pre-training dataset Zero and five human-annotated fine-tuning datasets for downstream tasks. Zero contains 250 million images paired with 750 million text descriptions, plus two of the five fine-tuning datasets are also currently the largest ones for Chinese cross-modal downstream tasks. Along with the CCMB, we also develop a VLP framework named R2D2, applying a pre-Ranking + Ranking strategy to learn powerful vision-language representations and a two-way distillation method (i.e., target-guided Distillation and feature-guided Distillation) to further enhance the learning capability. With the Zero and the R2D2 VLP framework, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on twelve downstream datasets from five broad categories of tasks including image-text retrieval, image-text matching, image caption, text-to-image generation, and zero-shot image classification. The datasets, models, and codes are available at https://github.com/yuxie11/R2D2
abstract_zh: 大规模数据集上的视觉语言预训练 (VLP) 在各种下游任务上表现出了卓越的性能。与大量可用的英语语料库基准相比，大规模预训练数据集和中文语料库的下游数据集在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这项工作中，我们为研究社区构建了一个名为 CCMB 的大规模高质量中文跨模态基准，其中包含目前最大的公共预训练数据集零和五个用于下游任务的人工注释微调数据集。 Zero包含2.5亿张图像和7.5亿条文本描述，加上五个微调数据集中的两个也是目前中国跨模态下游任务最大的数据集。与 CCMB 一起，我们还开发了一个名为 R2D2 的 VLP 框架，应用 pre-Ranking + Ranking 策略来学习强大的视觉语言表示，并采用双向蒸馏方法（即目标引导蒸馏和特征引导蒸馏）来进一步增强学习能力。借助 Zero 和 R2D2 VLP 框架，我们在图像文本检索、图像文本匹配、图像标题、文本到图像生成和零样本图像分类等五大类任务的 12 个下游数据集上实现了最先进的性能。数据集、模型和代码可在 https://github.com/yuxie11/R2D2 获取

AI.tldr: 构建大规模中文跨模态基准CCMB并提出R2D2预训练框架，推动中文视觉-语言模型研究。
AI.motivation: 现有英文视觉-语言预训练资源丰富，但中文跨模态数据集和预训练框架研究不足，限制了相关技术发展。
AI.method: 创建包含2.5亿图像-7.5亿文本的Zero预训练数据集及5个细调数据集；设计R2D2框架，采用预排序+排序策略与双向蒸馏方法（目标引导蒸馏和特征引导蒸馏）。
AI.result: 在12个中文跨模态下游任务（如图文检索、图像生成等）中达到最先进性能，数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CCMB基准和R2D2框架为中文跨模态研究提供高质量资源和有效方法，促进该领域技术进步。

authors_text: Vedant Singh,Surgan Jandial,Ayush Chopra,Siddharth Ramesh,Balaji Krishnamurthy,Vineeth N. Balasubramanian
title: On Conditioning the Input Noise for Controlled Image Generation with Diffusion Models
title_zh: 利用扩散模型调节输入噪声以实现受控图像生成
comment: Accepted at the workshop on AI for Content Creation at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted at the workshop on AI for Content Creation at CVPR 2022
abstract: Conditional image generation has paved the way for several breakthroughs in image editing, generating stock photos and 3-D object generation. This continues to be a significant area of interest with the rise of new state-of-the-art methods that are based on diffusion models. However, diffusion models provide very little control over the generated image, which led to subsequent works exploring techniques like classifier guidance, that provides a way to trade off diversity with fidelity. In this work, we explore techniques to condition diffusion models with carefully crafted input noise artifacts. This allows generation of images conditioned on semantic attributes. This is different from existing approaches that input Gaussian noise and further introduce conditioning at the diffusion model's inference step. Our experiments over several examples and conditional settings show the potential of our approach.
summary: Conditional image generation has paved the way for several breakthroughs in image editing, generating stock photos and 3-D object generation. This continues to be a significant area of interest with the rise of new state-of-the-art methods that are based on diffusion models. However, diffusion models provide very little control over the generated image, which led to subsequent works exploring techniques like classifier guidance, that provides a way to trade off diversity with fidelity. In this work, we explore techniques to condition diffusion models with carefully crafted input noise artifacts. This allows generation of images conditioned on semantic attributes. This is different from existing approaches that input Gaussian noise and further introduce conditioning at the diffusion model's inference step. Our experiments over several examples and conditional settings show the potential of our approach.
abstract_zh: 条件图像生成为图像编辑、生成库存照片和 3D 对象生成方面的多项突破铺平了道路。随着基于扩散模型的新的最先进方法的兴起，这仍然是一个重要的领域。然而，扩散模型对生成的图像提供的控制非常少，这导致后续的工作探索分类器引导等技术，提供了一种在多样性与保真度之间进行权衡的方法。在这项工作中，我们探索了利用精心设计的输入噪声伪影来调节扩散模型的技术。这允许生成以语义属性为条件的图像。这与输入高斯噪声并在扩散模型的推理步骤进一步引入条件的现有方法不同。我们对几个示例和条件设置的实验表明了我们方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过精心设计的输入噪声来条件化扩散模型，以实现可控的图像生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成中控制能力不足，现有方法如分类器引导存在多样性与保真度的权衡问题，需探索新方法增强控制能力。
AI.method: 通过在输入噪声中引入语义属性条件，而非在扩散模型推理阶段添加条件，实现对生成图像的控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种条件设置下能有效生成符合语义属性的图像，展现出良好潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种新颖的输入噪声条件化方法，提升了扩散模型的可控性，为可控图像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: John E. Laird
title: Introduction to Soar
title_zh: 翱翔简介
abstract: This paper is the recommended initial reading for a functional overview of Soar, version 9.6. It includes an abstract overview of the architectural structure of Soar including its processing, memories, learning modules, their interfaces, and the representations of knowledge used by those modules. From there it describes the processing supported by those modules, including decision making, impasses and substates, procedure learning via chunking, reinforcement learning, semantic memory, episodic memory, and spatial-visual reasoning. It then reviews the levels of decision making and variety of learning in Soar, and analysis of Soar as an architecture supporting general human-level AI. Following the references is an appendix that contains short descriptions of recent Soar agents and a glossary of the terminology we use in describing Soar.
summary: This paper is the recommended initial reading for a functional overview of Soar, version 9.6. It includes an abstract overview of the architectural structure of Soar including its processing, memories, learning modules, their interfaces, and the representations of knowledge used by those modules. From there it describes the processing supported by those modules, including decision making, impasses and substates, procedure learning via chunking, reinforcement learning, semantic memory, episodic memory, and spatial-visual reasoning. It then reviews the levels of decision making and variety of learning in Soar, and analysis of Soar as an architecture supporting general human-level AI. Following the references is an appendix that contains short descriptions of recent Soar agents and a glossary of the terminology we use in describing Soar.
abstract_zh: 本文是 Soar 9.6 版本功能概述的推荐初始阅读材料。它包括 Soar 架构结构的抽象概述，包括其处理、内存、学习模块、它们的接口以及这些模块使用的知识的表示。从那里它描述了这些模块支持的处理，包括决策、僵局和子状态、通过分块进行的过程学习、强化学习、语义记忆、情景记忆和空间视觉推理。然后回顾了 Soar 中的决策水平和学习多样性，并对 Soar 作为支持通用人类级 AI 的架构进行了分析。参考文献后面是一个附录，其中包含最新 Soar 代理的简短描述以及我们在描述 Soar 时使用的术语表。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Soar 9.6架构的结构、处理机制及学习模块，旨在提供其作为通用人类级AI支持系统的功能概述。
AI.motivation: 为读者提供Soar认知架构的全面概览，阐明其在决策、学习与记忆等方面的机制，以支持通用人工智能研究。
AI.method: 通过分模块解析Soar架构的组成（如记忆系统、学习机制）及处理流程，结合实例说明其决策层级与学习方式。
AI.result: 系统阐述了Soar的决策机制、多种学习模式（分块学习、强化学习）及记忆系统，并验证其作为人类级AI架构的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Soar架构通过模块化设计与多层级学习机制，有效支持复杂认知任务，为通用人工智能研究提供了可靠的框架基础。

authors_text: Ali Salah Hameed,Adil Al-Azzawi
title: Fully Automated Binary Pattern Extraction For Finger Vein Identification using Double Optimization Stages-Based Unsupervised Learning Approach
title_zh: 使用基于双优化阶段的无监督学习方法全自动二进制模式提取进行手指静脉识别
abstract: Today, finger vein identification is gaining popularity as a potential biometric identification framework solution. Machine learning-based unsupervised, supervised, and deep learning algorithms have had a significant influence on finger vein detection and recognition at the moment. Deep learning, on the other hand, necessitates a large number of training datasets that must be manually produced and labeled. In this research, we offer a completely automated unsupervised learning strategy for training dataset creation. Our method is intended to extract and build a decent binary mask training dataset completely automated. In this technique, two optimization steps are devised and employed. The initial stage of optimization is to create a completely automated unsupervised image clustering based on finger vein image localization. Worldwide finger vein pattern orientation estimation is employed in the second optimization to optimize the retrieved finger vein lines. Finally, the proposed system achieves 99.6 - percent pattern extraction accuracy, which is significantly higher than other common unsupervised learning methods like k-means and Fuzzy C-Means (FCM).
summary: Today, finger vein identification is gaining popularity as a potential biometric identification framework solution. Machine learning-based unsupervised, supervised, and deep learning algorithms have had a significant influence on finger vein detection and recognition at the moment. Deep learning, on the other hand, necessitates a large number of training datasets that must be manually produced and labeled. In this research, we offer a completely automated unsupervised learning strategy for training dataset creation. Our method is intended to extract and build a decent binary mask training dataset completely automated. In this technique, two optimization steps are devised and employed. The initial stage of optimization is to create a completely automated unsupervised image clustering based on finger vein image localization. Worldwide finger vein pattern orientation estimation is employed in the second optimization to optimize the retrieved finger vein lines. Finally, the proposed system achieves 99.6 - percent pattern extraction accuracy, which is significantly higher than other common unsupervised learning methods like k-means and Fuzzy C-Means (FCM).
abstract_zh: 如今，指静脉识别作为一种潜在的生物识别框架解决方案越来越受欢迎。基于机器学习的无监督、监督和深度学习算法目前对指静脉检测和识别产生了重大影响。另一方面，深度学习需要大量的训练数据集，而这些数据集必须手动生成和标记。在这项研究中，我们提供了一种完全自动化的无监督学习策略来创建训练数据集。我们的方法旨在完全自动化地提取和构建一个像样的二进制掩模训练数据集。在该技术中，设计并采用了两个优化步骤。优化的初始阶段是创建基于指静脉图像定位的完全自动化的无监督图像聚类。第二次优化采用全球手指静脉图案方向估计来优化检索到的手指静脉线。最后，所提出的系统实现了 99.6% 的模式提取准确率，这明显高于其他常见的无监督学习方法，如 k-means 和模糊 C-Means (FCM)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双优化阶段无监督学习的全自动二值模式提取方法，用于指纹静脉识别中的训练数据集生成。
AI.motivation: 深度学习方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而现有无监督学习方法在指纹静脉识别中存在准确率不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计双优化阶段：第一阶段通过无监督图像聚类实现指纹静脉定位，第二阶段利用全局静脉方向估计优化提取的静脉线，自动生成二值掩膜数据集。
AI.result: 系统达到99.6%的模式提取准确率，显著优于k-means和FCM等传统无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高质量训练数据集的自动化生成，为生物特征识别提供了更高效准确的解决方案。

The initial stage of optimization is to create a completely automated unsupervised image clustering based on finger vein image localization. Worldwide finger vein pattern orientation estimation is employed in the second optimization to optimize the retrieved finger vein lines. Finally, the proposed system achieves 99.6 - percent pattern extraction accuracy, which is significantly higher than other common unsupervised learning methods like k-means and Fuzzy C-Means (FCM). 如今，指静脉识别作为一种潜在的生物识别框架解决方案越来越受欢迎。基于机器学习的无监督、监督和深度学习算法目前对指静脉检测和识别产生了重大影响。另一方面，深度学习需要大量的训练数据集，而这些数据集必须手动生成和标记。在这项研究中，我们提供了一种完全自动化的无监督学习策略来创建训练数据集。我们的方法旨在完全自动化地提取和构建一个像样的二进制掩模训练数据集。在该技术中，设计并采用了两个优化步骤。优化的初始阶段是创建基于指静脉图像定位的完全自动化的无监督图像聚类。第二次优化采用全球手指静脉图案方向估计来优化检索到的手指静脉线。最后，所提出的系统实现了 99.6% 的模式提取准确率，这明显高于其他常见的无监督学习方法，如 k-means 和模糊 C-Means (FCM)。 本文提出一种基于双优化阶段无监督学习的全自动二值模式提取方法，用于指纹静脉识别中的训练数据集生成。 Ali Salah Hameed,Adil Al-Azzawi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongjie Wang,Chuan Wang,Ruobing Li,Hui Lin
title: On the Use of BERT for Automated Essay Scoring: Joint Learning of Multi-Scale Essay Representation
title_zh: 关于使用 BERT 进行自动作文评分：多尺度作文表示的联合学习
comment: Accepted to NAACL 2022 as a long paper
comments: Accepted to NAACL 2022 as a long paper
abstract: In recent years, pre-trained models have become dominant in most natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, in the area of Automated Essay Scoring (AES), pre-trained models such as BERT have not been properly used to outperform other deep learning models such as LSTM. In this paper, we introduce a novel multi-scale essay representation for BERT that can be jointly learned. We also employ multiple losses and transfer learning from out-of-domain essays to further improve the performance. Experiment results show that our approach derives much benefit from joint learning of multi-scale essay representation and obtains almost the state-of-the-art result among all deep learning models in the ASAP task. Our multi-scale essay representation also generalizes well to CommonLit Readability Prize data set, which suggests that the novel text representation proposed in this paper may be a new and effective choice for long-text tasks.
summary: In recent years, pre-trained models have become dominant in most natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, in the area of Automated Essay Scoring (AES), pre-trained models such as BERT have not been properly used to outperform other deep learning models such as LSTM. In this paper, we introduce a novel multi-scale essay representation for BERT that can be jointly learned. We also employ multiple losses and transfer learning from out-of-domain essays to further improve the performance. Experiment results show that our approach derives much benefit from joint learning of multi-scale essay representation and obtains almost the state-of-the-art result among all deep learning models in the ASAP task. Our multi-scale essay representation also generalizes well to CommonLit Readability Prize data set, which suggests that the novel text representation proposed in this paper may be a new and effective choice for long-text tasks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，预训练模型在大多数自然语言处理（NLP）任务中占据主导地位。然而，在自动作文评分（AES）领域，BERT 等预训练模型尚未得到适当使用，以超越 LSTM 等其他深度学习模型。在本文中，我们介绍了一种可以联合学习的 BERT 新颖的多尺度论文表示形式。我们还采用多重损失和来自域外论文的迁移学习来进一步提高性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法从多尺度论文表示的联合学习中获益匪浅，并且在 ASAP 任务中几乎获得了所有深度学习模型中最先进的结果。我们的多尺度论文表示也很好地推广到了 CommonLit Readability Awards 数据集，这表明本文提出的新颖文本表示可能是长文本任务的新且有效的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BERT的多尺度联合学习方法，用于改进自动作文评分（AES）任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练模型在NLP任务中占主导地位，但BERT等模型在AES领域尚未充分应用以超越LSTM等传统深度学习模型。
AI.method: 设计多尺度作文表征结构，结合联合学习、多任务损失函数及领域外知识迁移技术优化BERT模型。
AI.result: 在ASAP任务中达到深度学习模型的最先进水平，并在CommonLit数据集上展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多尺度表征方法为长文本任务提供了新的有效解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Ang Li,Shanshan Zhao,Qingjie Zhang,Qiuhong Ke
title: Iterative Geometry-Aware Cross Guidance Network for Stereo Image Inpainting
title_zh: 用于立体图像修复的迭代几何感知交叉指导网络
abstract: Currently, single image inpainting has achieved promising results based on deep convolutional neural networks. However, inpainting on stereo images with missing regions has not been explored thoroughly, which is also a significant but different problem. One crucial requirement for stereo image inpainting is stereo consistency. To achieve it, we propose an Iterative Geometry-Aware Cross Guidance Network (IGGNet). The IGGNet contains two key ingredients, i.e., a Geometry-Aware Attention (GAA) module and an Iterative Cross Guidance (ICG) strategy. The GAA module relies on the epipolar geometry cues and learns the geometry-aware guidance from one view to another, which is beneficial to make the corresponding regions in two views consistent. However, learning guidance from co-existing missing regions is challenging. To address this issue, the ICG strategy is proposed, which can alternately narrow down the missing regions of the two views in an iterative manner. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed network outperforms the latest stereo image inpainting model and state-of-the-art single image inpainting models.
summary: Currently, single image inpainting has achieved promising results based on deep convolutional neural networks. However, inpainting on stereo images with missing regions has not been explored thoroughly, which is also a significant but different problem. One crucial requirement for stereo image inpainting is stereo consistency. To achieve it, we propose an Iterative Geometry-Aware Cross Guidance Network (IGGNet). The IGGNet contains two key ingredients, i.e., a Geometry-Aware Attention (GAA) module and an Iterative Cross Guidance (ICG) strategy. The GAA module relies on the epipolar geometry cues and learns the geometry-aware guidance from one view to another, which is beneficial to make the corresponding regions in two views consistent. However, learning guidance from co-existing missing regions is challenging. To address this issue, the ICG strategy is proposed, which can alternately narrow down the missing regions of the two views in an iterative manner. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed network outperforms the latest stereo image inpainting model and state-of-the-art single image inpainting models.
abstract_zh: 目前，基于深度卷积神经网络的单图像修复已经取得了可喜的结果。然而，对缺失区域的立体图像的修复尚未得到彻底的探索，这也是一个重要但不同的问题。立体图像修复的一项关键要求是立体一致性。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了迭代几何感知交叉指导网络（IGGNet）。 IGGNet 包含两个关键要素，即几何感知注意力（GAA）模块和迭代交叉指导（ICG）策略。 GAA模块依赖于极线几何线索，学习从一个视图到另一个视图的几何感知引导，这有利于使两个视图中的相应区域保持一致。然而，从共存的缺失区域中学习指导具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，提出了ICG策略，它可以通过迭代的方式交替缩小两个视图的缺失区域。实验结果表明，我们提出的网络优于最新的立体图像修复模型和最先进的单图像修复模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于立体图像修复的迭代几何感知交叉引导网络（IGGNet），以解决立体图像缺失区域修复中的立体一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要集中在单图像修复，而立体图像修复因需保持立体一致性尚未被充分探索，需解决跨视图几何信息对齐与缺失区域协同修复的挑战。
AI.method: 设计包含几何感知注意力模块（GAA）和迭代交叉引导策略（ICG）的IGGNet：GAA利用极线几何线索实现跨视图几何感知引导，ICG通过迭代缩小缺失区域以解决协同修复难题。
AI.result: 实验表明，IGGNet在立体图像修复任务中优于最新立体修复模型及单图像修复模型，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过几何感知引导与迭代协同修复策略，有效解决了立体图像修复中的立体一致性问题，为该领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhenghua Chen,Min Wu,Alvin Chan,Xiaoli Li,Yew-Soon Ong
title: A Survey on AI Sustainability: Emerging Trends on Learning Algorithms and Research Challenges
title_zh: 人工智能可持续性调查：学习算法的新趋势和研究挑战
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a fast-growing research and development (R&D) discipline which is attracting increasing attention because of its promises to bring vast benefits for consumers and businesses, with considerable benefits promised in productivity growth and innovation. To date it has reported significant accomplishments in many areas that have been deemed as challenging for machines, ranging from computer vision, natural language processing, audio analysis to smart sensing and many others. The technical trend in realizing the successes has been towards increasing complex and large size AI models so as to solve more complex problems at superior performance and robustness. This rapid progress, however, has taken place at the expense of substantial environmental costs and resources. Besides, debates on the societal impacts of AI, such as fairness, safety and privacy, have continued to grow in intensity. These issues have presented major concerns pertaining to the sustainable development of AI. In this work, we review major trends in machine learning approaches that can address the sustainability problem of AI. Specifically, we examine emerging AI methodologies and algorithms for addressing the sustainability issue of AI in two major aspects, i.e., environmental sustainability and social sustainability of AI. We will also highlight the major limitations of existing studies and propose potential research challenges and directions for the development of next generation of sustainable AI techniques. We believe that this technical review can help to promote a sustainable development of AI R&D activities for the research community.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a fast-growing research and development (R&D) discipline which is attracting increasing attention because of its promises to bring vast benefits for consumers and businesses, with considerable benefits promised in productivity growth and innovation. To date it has reported significant accomplishments in many areas that have been deemed as challenging for machines, ranging from computer vision, natural language processing, audio analysis to smart sensing and many others. The technical trend in realizing the successes has been towards increasing complex and large size AI models so as to solve more complex problems at superior performance and robustness. This rapid progress, however, has taken place at the expense of substantial environmental costs and resources. Besides, debates on the societal impacts of AI, such as fairness, safety and privacy, have continued to grow in intensity. These issues have presented major concerns pertaining to the sustainable development of AI. In this work, we review major trends in machine learning approaches that can address the sustainability problem of AI. Specifically, we examine emerging AI methodologies and algorithms for addressing the sustainability issue of AI in two major aspects, i.e., environmental sustainability and social sustainability of AI. We will also highlight the major limitations of existing studies and propose potential research challenges and directions for the development of next generation of sustainable AI techniques. We believe that this technical review can help to promote a sustainable development of AI R&D activities for the research community.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 是一门快速发展的研发 (R&D) 学科，因其有望为消费者和企业带来巨大利益，并在生产力增长和创新方面带来巨大好处而受到越来越多的关注。迄今为止，它已经在许多被认为对机器具有挑战性的领域取得了重大成就，从计算机视觉、自然语言处理、音频分析到智能传感等等。实现成功的技术趋势是增加复杂和大型的人工智能模型，以便以卓越的性能和鲁棒性解决更复杂的问题。然而，这种快速进展是以大量环境成本和资源为代价的。此外，关于人工智能的公平、安全和隐私等社会影响的争论持续升温。这些问题成为人工智能可持续发展的重大问题。在这项工作中，我们回顾了可以解决人工智能可持续性问题的机器学习方法的主要趋势。具体来说，我们研究新兴的人工智能方法和算法，以解决人工智能的环境可持续性和社会可持续性两个主要方面的可持续性问题。我们还将强调现有研究的主要局限性，并为下一代可持续人工智能技术的发展提出潜在的研究挑战和方向。我们相信本次技术审查有助于促进研究界人工智能研发活动的可持续发展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能可持续性领域的新兴学习算法趋势及研究挑战，重点探讨环境与社会可持续性问题。
AI.motivation: 人工智能的快速发展带来了显著的环境成本和社会影响（如公平性、安全性和隐私问题），亟需通过技术手段实现可持续发展。
AI.method: 通过系统回顾现有机器学习方法，分析其在环境可持续性和社会可持续性方面的应用，并总结当前研究的局限性。
AI.result: 识别了当前AI可持续性研究的关键趋势，指出现有方法的不足，并提出了下一代可持续AI技术的研发方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为研究社区提供了推动AI研发可持续发展的技术路线参考，强调需平衡技术进步与社会环境责任。
