authors_text: Abraham Sanders,Tomek Strzalkowski,Mei Si,Albert Chang,Deepanshu Dey,Jonas Braasch,Dakuo Wang
title: Towards a Progression-Aware Autonomous Dialogue Agent
title_zh: 迈向具有进展意识的自主对话代理
abstract: Recent advances in large-scale language modeling and generation have enabled the creation of dialogue agents that exhibit human-like responses in a wide range of conversational scenarios spanning a diverse set of tasks, from general chit-chat to focused goal-oriented discourse. While these agents excel at generating high-quality responses that are relevant to prior context, they suffer from a lack of awareness of the overall direction in which the conversation is headed, and the likelihood of task success inherent therein. Thus, we propose a framework in which dialogue agents can evaluate the progression of a conversation toward or away from desired outcomes, and use this signal to inform planning for subsequent responses. Our framework is composed of three key elements: (1) the notion of a "global" dialogue state (GDS) space, (2) a task-specific progression function (PF) computed in terms of a conversation's trajectory through this space, and (3) a planning mechanism based on dialogue rollouts by which an agent may use progression signals to select its next response.
summary: Recent advances in large-scale language modeling and generation have enabled the creation of dialogue agents that exhibit human-like responses in a wide range of conversational scenarios spanning a diverse set of tasks, from general chit-chat to focused goal-oriented discourse. While these agents excel at generating high-quality responses that are relevant to prior context, they suffer from a lack of awareness of the overall direction in which the conversation is headed, and the likelihood of task success inherent therein. Thus, we propose a framework in which dialogue agents can evaluate the progression of a conversation toward or away from desired outcomes, and use this signal to inform planning for subsequent responses. Our framework is composed of three key elements: (1) the notion of a "global" dialogue state (GDS) space, (2) a task-specific progression function (PF) computed in terms of a conversation's trajectory through this space, and (3) a planning mechanism based on dialogue rollouts by which an agent may use progression signals to select its next response.
abstract_zh: 大规模语言建模和生成方面的最新进展使得对话代理的创建成为可能，这些对话代理能够在涵盖各种任务的广泛对话场景中表现出类似人类的响应，从一般的闲聊到以目标为导向的对话。虽然这些代理擅长生成与先前上下文相关的高质量响应，但他们缺乏对对话的总体方向以及其中固有的任务成功可能性的认识。因此，我们提出了一个框架，对话代理可以在其中评估对话朝着或远离预期结果的进展，并使用该信号来为后续响应的规划提供信息。我们的框架由三个关键要素组成：（1）“全局”对话状态（GDS）空间的概念，（2）根据通过该空间的对话轨迹计算的特定于任务的进展函数（PF），以及（3）基于对话推出的规划机制，代理可以通过该机制使用进展信号来选择其下一个响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向任务目标的对话代理框架，通过评估对话进展方向来优化响应生成。
AI.motivation: 现有对话代理虽能生成连贯回复，但缺乏对对话整体进展方向及任务成功率的全局感知能力，导致目标导向性不足。
AI.method: 构建全局对话状态空间（GDS），定义任务特定进展函数（PF）量化对话轨迹，结合对话回滚机制实现基于进展信号的响应规划。
AI.result: 框架使代理能动态评估对话进展趋势，通过规划机制提升目标导向型对话的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自主对话代理提供了结构化进展感知与响应规划方法，推动了面向任务的智能对话系统发展。

search_text: Towards a Progression-Aware Autonomous Dialogue Agent 迈向具有进展意识的自主对话代理 Recent advances in large-scale language modeling and generation have enabled the creation of dialogue agents that exhibit human-like responses in a wide range of conversational scenarios spanning a diverse set of tasks, from general chit-chat to focused goal-oriented discourse. While these agents excel at generating high-quality responses that are relevant to prior context, they suffer from a lack of awareness of the overall direction in which the conversation is headed, and the likelihood of task success inherent therein. Thus, we propose a framework in which dialogue agents can evaluate the progression of a conversation toward or away from desired outcomes, and use this signal to inform planning for subsequent responses. Our framework is composed of three key elements: (1) the notion of a "global" dialogue state (GDS) space, (2) a task-specific progression function (PF) computed in terms of a conversation's trajectory through this space, and (3) a planning mechanism based on dialogue rollouts by which an agent may use progression signals to select its next response. 大规模语言建模和生成方面的最新进展使得对话代理的创建成为可能，这些对话代理能够在涵盖各种任务的广泛对话场景中表现出类似人类的响应，从一般的闲聊到以目标为导向的对话。虽然这些代理擅长生成与先前上下文相关的高质量响应，但他们缺乏对对话的总体方向以及其中固有的任务成功可能性的认识。因此，我们提出了一个框架，对话代理可以在其中评估对话朝着或远离预期结果的进展，并使用该信号来为后续响应的规划提供信息。我们的框架由三个关键要素组成：（1）“全局”对话状态（GDS）空间的概念，（2）根据通过该空间的对话轨迹计算的特定于任务的进展函数（PF），以及（3）基于对话推出的规划机制，代理可以通过该机制使用进展信号来选择其下一个响应。 本文提出一种面向任务目标的对话代理框架，通过评估对话进展方向来优化响应生成。 Abraham Sanders,Tomek Strzalkowski,Mei Si,Albert Chang,Deepanshu Dey,Jonas Braasch,Dakuo Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Alexandre Amice,Hongkai Dai,Peter Werner,Annan Zhang,Russ Tedrake
title: Finding and Optimizing Certified, Collision-Free Regions in Configuration Space for Robot Manipulators
title_zh: 在机器人操纵器的配置空间中查找并优化经过认证的无碰撞区域
comment: To be published in The Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics 2022. 14 pages, 7 figures
comments: To be published in The Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics 2022. 14 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Configuration space (C-space) has played a central role in collision-free motion planning, particularly for robot manipulators. While it is possible to check for collisions at a point using standard algorithms, to date no practical method exists for computing collision-free C-space regions with rigorous certificates due to the complexities of mapping task-space obstacles through the kinematics. In this work, we present the first to our knowledge method for generating such regions and certificates through convex optimization. Our method, called C-Iris (C-space Iterative Regional Inflation by Semidefinite programming), generates large, convex polytopes in a rational parametrization of the configuration space which are guaranteed to be collision-free. Such regions have been shown to be useful for both optimization-based and randomized motion planning. Our regions are generated by alternating between two convex optimization problems: (1) a simultaneous search for a maximal-volume ellipse inscribed in a given polytope and a certificate that the polytope is collision-free and (2) a maximal expansion of the polytope away from the ellipse which does not violate the certificate. The volume of the ellipse and size of the polytope are allowed to grow over several iterations while being collision-free by construction. Our method works in arbitrary dimensions, only makes assumptions about the convexity of the obstacles in the task space, and scales to realistic problems in manipulation. We demonstrate our algorithm's ability to fill a non-trivial amount of collision-free C-space in a 3-DOF example where the C-space can be visualized, as well as the scalability of our algorithm on a 7-DOF KUKA iiwa and a 12-DOF bimanual manipulator.
summary: Configuration space (C-space) has played a central role in collision-free motion planning, particularly for robot manipulators. While it is possible to check for collisions at a point using standard algorithms, to date no practical method exists for computing collision-free C-space regions with rigorous certificates due to the complexities of mapping task-space obstacles through the kinematics. In this work, we present the first to our knowledge method for generating such regions and certificates through convex optimization. Our method, called C-Iris (C-space Iterative Regional Inflation by Semidefinite programming), generates large, convex polytopes in a rational parametrization of the configuration space which are guaranteed to be collision-free. Such regions have been shown to be useful for both optimization-based and randomized motion planning. Our regions are generated by alternating between two convex optimization problems: (1) a simultaneous search for a maximal-volume ellipse inscribed in a given polytope and a certificate that the polytope is collision-free and (2) a maximal expansion of the polytope away from the ellipse which does not violate the certificate. The volume of the ellipse and size of the polytope are allowed to grow over several iterations while being collision-free by construction. Our method works in arbitrary dimensions, only makes assumptions about the convexity of the obstacles in the task space, and scales to realistic problems in manipulation. We demonstrate our algorithm's ability to fill a non-trivial amount of collision-free C-space in a 3-DOF example where the C-space can be visualized, as well as the scalability of our algorithm on a 7-DOF KUKA iiwa and a 12-DOF bimanual manipulator.
abstract_zh: 配置空间（C 空间）在无碰撞运动规划中发挥着核心作用，特别是对于机器人操纵器。虽然可以使用标准算法检查某个点的碰撞，但迄今为止，由于通过运动学映射任务空间障碍物的复杂性，尚不存在用于计算具有严格证书的无碰撞 C 空间区域的实用方法。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了通过凸优化生成此类区域和证书的知识方法。我们的方法称为 C-Iris（半定规划的 C 空间迭代区域膨胀），在配置空间的合理参数化中生成大型凸多面体，并保证无碰撞。这些区域已被证明对于基于优化的运动规划和随机运动规划都很有用。我们的区域是通过两个凸优化问题之间的交替生成的：（1）同时搜索给定多面体中内接的最大体积椭圆，并证明该多面体是无碰撞的；（2）多面体远离椭圆的最大扩展，这不会违反证书。椭圆的体积和多面体的大小允许在多次迭代中增长，同时通过构造实现无碰撞。我们的方法适用于任意维度，仅对任务空间中障碍物的凸性做出假设，并可扩展到操纵中的实际问题。我们展示了我们的算法在 C 空间可视化的 3-DOF 示例中填充大量无碰撞 C 空间的能力，以及我们的算法在 7-DOF KUKA iiwa 和​​ 12-DOF 双手操纵器上的可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过凸优化生成机器人机械臂配置空间中认证的无碰撞区域的方法，称为C-Iris。
AI.motivation: 尽管可以检查单点碰撞，但缺乏实用方法计算具有严格证明的无碰撞配置空间区域，因任务空间障碍物映射复杂。
AI.method: 通过交替解决两个凸优化问题：（1）在给定多面体中寻找最大体积内切椭球及无碰撞证明；（2）在不违反证明的前提下扩展多面体。
AI.result: 在3-DOF示例中可视化填充非平凡无碰撞区域，并在7-DOF和12-DOF机械臂上验证算法可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能生成保证无碰撞的凸多面体区域，适用于优化和随机化路径规划，且适用于高维实际问题。

authors_text: Igor Morawski,Yu-An Chen,Yu-Sheng Lin,Shusil Dangi,Kai He,Winston H. Hsu
title: GenISP: Neural ISP for Low-Light Machine Cognition
title_zh: GenISP：用于弱光机器认知的神经 ISP
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022 Workshop NTIRE: New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement workshop and Challenges
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022 Workshop NTIRE: New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement workshop and Challenges
abstract: Object detection in low-light conditions remains a challenging but important problem with many practical implications. Some recent works show that, in low-light conditions, object detectors using raw image data are more robust than detectors using image data processed by a traditional ISP pipeline. To improve detection performance in low-light conditions, one can fine-tune the detector to use raw image data or use a dedicated low-light neural pipeline trained with paired low- and normal-light data to restore and enhance the image. However, different camera sensors have different spectral sensitivity and learning-based models using raw images process data in the sensor-specific color space. Thus, once trained, they do not guarantee generalization to other camera sensors. We propose to improve generalization to unseen camera sensors by implementing a minimal neural ISP pipeline for machine cognition, named GenISP, that explicitly incorporates Color Space Transformation to a device-independent color space. We also propose a two-stage color processing implemented by two image-to-parameter modules that take down-sized image as input and regress global color correction parameters. Moreover, we propose to train our proposed GenISP under the guidance of a pre-trained object detector and avoid making assumptions about perceptual quality of the image, but rather optimize the image representation for machine cognition. At the inference stage, GenISP can be paired with any object detector. We perform extensive experiments to compare our method to other low-light image restoration and enhancement methods in an extrinsic task-based evaluation and validate that GenISP can generalize to unseen sensors and object detectors. Finally, we contribute a low-light dataset of 7K raw images annotated with 46K bounding boxes for task-based benchmarking of future low-light image restoration and object detection.

Moreover, we propose to train our proposed GenISP under the guidance of a pre-trained object detector and avoid making assumptions about perceptual quality of the image, but rather optimize the image representation for machine cognition. We perform extensive experiments to compare our method to other low-light image restoration and enhancement methods in an extrinsic task-based evaluation and validate that GenISP can generalize to unseen sensors and object detectors. Finally, we contribute a low-light dataset of 7K raw images annotated with 46K bounding boxes for task-based benchmarking of future low-light image restoration and object detection.
abstract_zh: 弱光条件下的物体检测仍然是一个具有挑战性但重要的问题，具有许多实际意义。最近的一些研究表明，在弱光条件下，使用原始图像数据的物体检测器比使用传统 ISP 管道处理的图像数据的检测器更稳健。为了提高低光条件下的检测性能，可以微调检测器以使用原始图像数据，或使用经过配对的低光和正常光数据训练的专用低光神经管道来恢复和增强图像。然而，不同的相机传感器具有不同的光谱灵敏度和使用原始图像处理特定传感器色彩空间中的数据的基于学习的模型。因此，一旦经过训练，它们并不能保证泛化到其他相机传感器。我们建议通过实现一个用于机器认知的最小神经 ISP 管道（名为 GenISP）来改进对不可见相机传感器的泛化，该管道明确地将颜色空间转换合并到独立于设备的颜色空间。我们还提出了由两个图像到参数模块实现的两阶段颜色处理，该模块将缩小尺寸的图像作为输入并回归全局颜色校正参数。此外，我们建议在预先训练的目标检测器的指导下训练我们提出的 GenISP，并避免对图像的感知质量做出假设，而是优化机器认知的图像表示。在推理阶段，GenISP 可以与任何物体检测器配对。我们进行了大量的实验，在基于外在任务的评估中将我们的方法与其他低光图像恢复和增强方法进行比较，并验证 GenISP 可以推广到看不见的传感器和物体检测器。最后，我们贡献了一个包含 7K 原始图像的低光数据集，并带有 46K 边界框注释，用于未来低光图像恢复和对象检测的基于任务的基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenISP神经ISP方法，通过设备无关的色彩空间转换和两阶段颜色处理模块，提升低光环境下物体检测的跨传感器泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统ISP处理的低光图像在不同摄像头传感器间泛化性差，而基于原始图像的检测器需依赖特定传感器色彩空间，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计GenISP神经ISP管道，包含设备无关色彩空间转换和两阶段图像到参数的颜色校正模块，并通过预训练检测器指导训练以优化机器认知图像表示。
AI.result: GenISP在未见传感器和检测器上均表现优异，且贡献了包含7K低光原始图像和46K标注框的数据集用于任务基准测试。
AI.conclusion: GenISP通过解耦色彩空间和优化机器认知表征，有效解决了低光检测的跨传感器泛化问题，并为后续研究提供重要数据支持。

search_text: GenISP: Neural ISP for Low-Light Machine Cognition GenISP：用于弱光机器认知的神经 ISP Object detection in low-light conditions remains a challenging but important problem with many practical implications. Some recent works show that, in low-light conditions, object detectors using raw image data are more robust than detectors using image data processed by a traditional ISP pipeline. To improve detection performance in low-light conditions, one can fine-tune the detector to use raw image data or use a dedicated low-light neural pipeline trained with paired low- and normal-light data to restore and enhance the image. However, different camera sensors have different spectral sensitivity and learning-based models using raw images process data in the sensor-specific color space. Thus, once trained, they do not guarantee generalization to other camera sensors. We propose to improve generalization to unseen camera sensors by implementing a minimal neural ISP pipeline for machine cognition, named GenISP, that explicitly incorporates Color Space Transformation to a device-independent color space. We also propose a two-stage color processing implemented by two image-to-parameter modules that take down-sized image as input and regress global color correction parameters. Moreover, we propose to train our proposed GenISP under the guidance of a pre-trained object detector and avoid making assumptions about perceptual quality of the image, but rather optimize the image representation for machine cognition. At the inference stage, GenISP can be paired with any object detector. We perform extensive experiments to compare our method to other low-light image restoration and enhancement methods in an extrinsic task-based evaluation and validate that GenISP can generalize to unseen sensors and object detectors. Finally, we contribute a low-light dataset of 7K raw images annotated with 46K bounding boxes for task-based benchmarking of future low-light image restoration and object detection. 弱光条件下的物体检测仍然是一个具有挑战性但重要的问题，具有许多实际意义。最近的一些研究表明，在弱光条件下，使用原始图像数据的物体检测器比使用传统 ISP 管道处理的图像数据的检测器更稳健。为了提高低光条件下的检测性能，可以微调检测器以使用原始图像数据，或使用经过配对的低光和正常光数据训练的专用低光神经管道来恢复和增强图像。然而，不同的相机传感器具有不同的光谱灵敏度和使用原始图像处理特定传感器色彩空间中的数据的基于学习的模型。因此，一旦经过训练，它们并不能保证泛化到其他相机传感器。我们建议通过实现一个用于机器认知的最小神经 ISP 管道（名为 GenISP）来改进对不可见相机传感器的泛化，该管道明确地将颜色空间转换合并到独立于设备的颜色空间。我们还提出了由两个图像到参数模块实现的两阶段颜色处理，该模块将缩小尺寸的图像作为输入并回归全局颜色校正参数。此外，我们建议在预先训练的目标检测器的指导下训练我们提出的 GenISP，并避免对图像的感知质量做出假设，而是优化机器认知的图像表示。在推理阶段，GenISP 可以与任何物体检测器配对。我们进行了大量的实验，在基于外在任务的评估中将我们的方法与其他低光图像恢复和增强方法进行比较，并验证 GenISP 可以推广到看不见的传感器和物体检测器。最后，我们贡献了一个包含 7K 原始图像的低光数据集，并带有 46K 边界框注释，用于未来低光图像恢复和对象检测的基于任务的基准测试。 本文提出GenISP神经ISP方法，通过设备无关的色彩空间转换和两阶段颜色处理模块，提升低光环境下物体检测的跨传感器泛化能力。 Igor Morawski,Yu-An Chen,Yu-Sheng Lin,Shusil Dangi,Kai He,Winston H. authors_text: Siming Zheng,Yujia Xue,Waleed Tahir,Zhengjue Wang,Hao Zhang,Ziyi Meng,Gang Qu,Siwei Ma,Xin Yuan
title: Block Modulating Video Compression: An Ultra Low Complexity Image Compression Encoder for Resource Limited Platforms
title_zh: 块调制视频压缩：适用于资源有限平台的超低复杂度图像压缩编码器
abstract: We consider the image and video compression on resource limited platforms. An ultra low-cost image encoder, named Block Modulating Video Compression (BMVC) with an encoding complexity ${\cal O}(1)$ is proposed to be implemented on mobile platforms with low consumption of power and computation resources. We also develop two types of BMVC decoders, implemented by deep neural networks. The first BMVC decoder is based on the Plug-and-Play (PnP) algorithm, which is flexible to different compression ratios. And the second decoder is a memory efficient end-to-end convolutional neural network, which aims for real-time decoding. Extensive results on the high definition images and videos demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed codec and the robustness against bit quantization.
summary: We consider the image and video compression on resource limited platforms. An ultra low-cost image encoder, named Block Modulating Video Compression (BMVC) with an encoding complexity ${\cal O}(1)$ is proposed to be implemented on mobile platforms with low consumption of power and computation resources. We also develop two types of BMVC decoders, implemented by deep neural networks. The first BMVC decoder is based on the Plug-and-Play (PnP) algorithm, which is flexible to different compression ratios. And the second decoder is a memory efficient end-to-end convolutional neural network, which aims for real-time decoding. Extensive results on the high definition images and videos demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed codec and the robustness against bit quantization.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑资源有限平台上的图像和视频压缩。一种超低成本图像编码器，称为块调制视频压缩（BMVC），编码复杂度为${\cal O}(1)$，建议在移动平台上实现，功耗和计算资源消耗低。我们还开发了两种由深度神经网络实现的 BMVC 解码器。第一个 BMVC 解码器基于即插即用 (PnP) 算法，可灵活适应不同的压缩比。第二个解码器是一个内存高效的端到端卷积神经网络，旨在实时解码。高清图像和视频的广泛结果证明了所提出的编解码器的卓越性能和针对比特量化的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Block Modulating Video Compression (BMVC)的超低复杂度图像编码器及其两种解码器，旨在资源受限的移动平台上实现高效视频压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩算法在资源受限设备上存在计算消耗高、能耗大等问题，需开发低复杂度、低功耗的压缩方案以适应移动端应用需求。
AI.method: 设计复杂度为O(1)的BMVC编码器，并开发两种基于深度神经网络的解码器：1) 基于Plug-and-Play算法的灵活压缩比解码器；2) 内存高效的端到端卷积神经网络实时解码器。
AI.result: 在高清图像和视频上验证了BMVC在压缩性能和抗比特量化鲁棒性方面的优越性，且解码器可实现实时处理。
AI.conclusion: BMVC为资源受限平台提供了高效、低功耗的视频压缩解决方案，在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度。

authors_text: Quentin Renau,Johann Dreo,Alain Peres,Yann Semet,Carola Doerr,Benjamin Doerr
title: Automated Algorithm Selection for Radar Network Configuration
title_zh: 雷达网络配置的自动算法选择
comment: Author-generated version of a paper in the proceedings of The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO 2022)
comments: Author-generated version of a paper in the proceedings of The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO 2022)
abstract: The configuration of radar networks is a complex problem that is often performed manually by experts with the help of a simulator. Different numbers and types of radars as well as different locations that the radars shall cover give rise to different instances of the radar configuration problem. The exact modeling of these instances is complex, as the quality of the configurations depends on a large number of parameters, on internal radar processing, and on the terrains on which the radars need to be placed. Classic optimization algorithms can therefore not be applied to this problem, and we rely on "trial-and-error" black-box approaches. In this paper, we study the performances of 13 black-box optimization algorithms on 153 radar network configuration problem instances. The algorithms perform considerably better than human experts. Their ranking, however, depends on the budget of configurations that can be evaluated and on the elevation profile of the location. We therefore also investigate automated algorithm selection approaches. Our results demonstrate that a pipeline that extracts instance features from the elevation of the terrain performs on par with the classical, far more expensive approach that extracts features from the objective function.
summary: The configuration of radar networks is a complex problem that is often performed manually by experts with the help of a simulator. Different numbers and types of radars as well as different locations that the radars shall cover give rise to different instances of the radar configuration problem. The exact modeling of these instances is complex, as the quality of the configurations depends on a large number of parameters, on internal radar processing, and on the terrains on which the radars need to be placed. Classic optimization algorithms can therefore not be applied to this problem, and we rely on "trial-and-error" black-box approaches. In this paper, we study the performances of 13 black-box optimization algorithms on 153 radar network configuration problem instances. The algorithms perform considerably better than human experts. Their ranking, however, depends on the budget of configurations that can be evaluated and on the elevation profile of the location. We therefore also investigate automated algorithm selection approaches. Our results demonstrate that a pipeline that extracts instance features from the elevation of the terrain performs on par with the classical, far more expensive approach that extracts features from the objective function.
abstract_zh: 雷达网络的配置是一个复杂的问题，通常由专家在模拟器的帮助下手动执行。不同数量和类型的雷达以及雷达应覆盖的不同位置会导致雷达配置问题的不同情况。这些实例的精确建模非常复杂，因为配置的质量取决于大量参数、内部雷达处理以及需要放置雷达的地形。因此，经典的优化算法不能应用于这个问题，我们依赖于“试错”黑盒方法。在本文中，我们研究了 13 种黑盒优化算法在 153 个雷达网络配置问题实例上的性能。这些算法的表现比人类专家好得多。然而，它们的排名取决于可评估的配置预算以及位置的海拔剖面。因此，我们还研究了自动算法选择方法。我们的结果表明，从地形高程中提取实例特征的管道的性能与从目标函数中提取特征的传统且昂贵得多的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了13种黑盒优化算法在153个雷达网络配置问题实例上的性能，并探索了基于地形特征的自动算法选择方法。
AI.motivation: 雷达网络配置依赖专家手动完成且需复杂模拟，传统优化算法难以适用，需通过黑盒方法解决。但算法性能受预算和地形影响，需自动化选择更优算法。
AI.method: 对比13种黑盒算法在不同实例上的表现，分析其与预算和地形的关系，并构建基于地形特征的自动算法选择流水线。
AI.result: 算法性能显著优于人类专家，但排名依赖预算和地形；基于地形特征的自动选择方法效果与传统昂贵的目标函数特征提取方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 自动算法选择可有效提升雷达网络配置效率，基于地形特征的轻量级方法能替代高成本的目标函数分析，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Automated Algorithm Selection for Radar Network Configuration 雷达网络配置的自动算法选择 The configuration of radar networks is a complex problem that is often performed manually by experts with the help of a simulator. Different numbers and types of radars as well as different locations that the radars shall cover give rise to different instances of the radar configuration problem. The exact modeling of these instances is complex, as the quality of the configurations depends on a large number of parameters, on internal radar processing, and on the terrains on which the radars need to be placed. Classic optimization algorithms can therefore not be applied to this problem, and we rely on "trial-and-error" black-box approaches. In this paper, we study the performances of 13 black-box optimization algorithms on 153 radar network configuration problem instances. The algorithms perform considerably better than human experts. Their ranking, however, depends on the budget of configurations that can be evaluated and on the elevation profile of the location. We therefore also investigate automated algorithm selection approaches. Our results demonstrate that a pipeline that extracts instance features from the elevation of the terrain performs on par with the classical, far more expensive approach that extracts features from the objective function. 雷达网络的配置是一个复杂的问题，通常由专家在模拟器的帮助下手动执行。不同数量和类型的雷达以及雷达应覆盖的不同位置会导致雷达配置问题的不同情况。这些实例的精确建模非常复杂，因为配置的质量取决于大量参数、内部雷达处理以及需要放置雷达的地形。因此，经典的优化算法不能应用于这个问题，我们依赖于“试错”黑盒方法。在本文中，我们研究了 13 种黑盒优化算法在 153 个雷达网络配置问题实例上的性能。这些算法的表现比人类专家好得多。然而，它们的排名取决于可评估的配置预算以及位置的海拔剖面。因此，我们还研究了自动算法选择方法。我们的结果表明，从地形高程中提取实例特征的管道的性能与从目标函数中提取特征的传统且昂贵得多的方法相当。 本文研究了13种黑盒优化算法在153个雷达网络配置问题实例上的性能，并探索了基于地形特征的自动算法选择方法。 Quentin Renau,Johann Dreo,Alain Peres,Yann Semet,Carola Doerr,Benjamin Doerr cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Shuming Jiao,Jiaxiang Li,Wei Huang,Zibang Zhang
title: Playing Tic-Tac-Toe Games with Intelligent Single-pixel Imaging
title_zh: 利用智能单像素成像玩井字游戏
abstract: Single-pixel imaging (SPI) is a novel optical imaging technique by replacing a two-dimensional pixelated sensor with a single-pixel detector and pattern illuminations. SPI have been extensively used for various tasks related to image acquisition and processing. In this work, a novel non-image-based task of playing Tic-Tac-Toe games interactively is merged into the framework of SPI. An optoelectronic artificial intelligent (AI) player with minimal digital computation can detect the game states, generate optimal moves and display output results mainly by pattern illumination and single-pixel detection. Simulated and experimental results demonstrate the feasibility of proposed scheme and its unbeatable performance against human players.
summary: Single-pixel imaging (SPI) is a novel optical imaging technique by replacing a two-dimensional pixelated sensor with a single-pixel detector and pattern illuminations. SPI have been extensively used for various tasks related to image acquisition and processing. In this work, a novel non-image-based task of playing Tic-Tac-Toe games interactively is merged into the framework of SPI. An optoelectronic artificial intelligent (AI) player with minimal digital computation can detect the game states, generate optimal moves and display output results mainly by pattern illumination and single-pixel detection. Simulated and experimental results demonstrate the feasibility of proposed scheme and its unbeatable performance against human players.
abstract_zh: 单像素成像 (SPI) 是一种新颖的光学成像技术，用单像素探测器和图案照明取代二维像素化传感器。 SPI 已广泛用于与图像采集和处理相关的各种任务。在这项工作中，一种新颖的非基于图像的交互式 Tic-Tac-Toe 游戏任务被合并到 SPI 框架中。光电人工智能（AI）玩家只需最少的数字计算即可主要通过图案照明和单像素检测来检测游戏状态，生成最佳动作并显示输出结果。模拟和实验结果证明了所提出方案的可行性及其对人类玩家无与伦比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将单像素成像技术与井字棋游戏结合，提出一种基于光电子人工智能的非图像化交互任务框架。
AI.motivation: 单像素成像（SPI）传统上用于图像采集与处理，本文旨在探索其在非图像任务中的应用潜力，拓展SPI技术的适用场景。
AI.method: 设计一个基于光电子元件的AI玩家，通过模式照明和单像素检测实现游戏状态识别、最优策略生成及结果输出，仅需少量数字计算。
AI.result: 仿真与实验验证了该方案的可行性，AI玩家对人类对手展现出不可战胜的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方案成功将SPI技术扩展至交互式游戏领域，证明了其在非传统任务中的有效性与创新性。

authors_text: Ao Wang,Wenxing Xu,Hanshi Sun,Ninghao Pu,Zijin Liu,Hao Liu
title: Arrhythmia Classifier using Binarized Convolutional Neural Network for Resource-Constrained Devices
title_zh: 使用二值化卷积神经网络用于资源受限设备的心律失常分类器
abstract: Monitoring electrocardiogram signals is of great significance for the diagnosis of arrhythmias. In recent years, deep learning and convolutional neural networks have been widely used in the classification of cardiac arrhythmias. However, the existing neural network applied to ECG signal detection usually requires a lot of computing resources, which is not friendlyF to resource-constrained equipment, and it is difficult to realize real-time monitoring. In this paper, a binarized convolutional neural network suitable for ECG monitoring is proposed, which is hardware-friendly and more suitable for use in resource-constrained wearable devices. Targeting the MIT-BIH arrhythmia database, the classifier based on this network reached an accuracy of 95.67% in the five-class test. Compared with the proposed baseline full-precision network with an accuracy of 96.45%, it is only 0.78% lower. Importantly, it achieves 12.65 times the computing speedup, 24.8 times the storage compression ratio, and only requires a quarter of the memory overhead.
summary: Monitoring electrocardiogram signals is of great significance for the diagnosis of arrhythmias. In recent years, deep learning and convolutional neural networks have been widely used in the classification of cardiac arrhythmias. However, the existing neural network applied to ECG signal detection usually requires a lot of computing resources, which is not friendlyF to resource-constrained equipment, and it is difficult to realize real-time monitoring. In this paper, a binarized convolutional neural network suitable for ECG monitoring is proposed, which is hardware-friendly and more suitable for use in resource-constrained wearable devices. Targeting the MIT-BIH arrhythmia database, the classifier based on this network reached an accuracy of 95.67% in the five-class test. Compared with the proposed baseline full-precision network with an accuracy of 96.45%, it is only 0.78% lower. Importantly, it achieves 12.65 times the computing speedup, 24.8 times the storage compression ratio, and only requires a quarter of the memory overhead.
abstract_zh: 监测心电图信号对于心律失常的诊断具有重要意义。近年来，深度学习和卷积神经网络在心律失常的分类中得到了广泛的应用。然而，现有应用于心电信号检测的神经网络通常需要大量的计算资源，对资源受限的设备不友好，且难以实现实时监测。本文提出了一种适用于心电监测的二值化卷积神经网络，该网络硬件友好，更适合在资源受限的可穿戴设备中使用。针对MIT-BIH心律失常数据库，基于该网络的分类器在五类测试中达到了95.67%的准确率。与提出的基线全精度网络的准确率 96.45% 相比，仅降低了 0.78%。重要的是，它实现了12.65倍的计算加速，24.8倍的存储压缩比，并且只需要四分之一的内存开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于资源受限设备的二值化卷积神经网络，用于心电图信号的房颤分类。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在心电图检测中计算资源消耗大，难以在资源受限的可穿戴设备上实现实时监测。
AI.method: 设计二值化卷积神经网络架构，通过权重和激活值二值化降低计算复杂度，并在MIT-BIH数据库进行五分类测试。
AI.result: 二值化模型在五分类测试中达到95.67%准确率，较全精度模型仅低0.78%，同时实现12.65倍计算加速、24.8倍存储压缩和四分之一内存开销。
AI.conclusion: 二值化CNN在保持较高分类精度的同时显著降低计算和存储需求，适合资源受限的可穿戴设备部署。

authors_text: Shining Liang,Linjun Shou,Jian Pei,Ming Gong,Wanli Zuo,Xianglin Zuo,Daxin Jiang
title: Label-aware Multi-level Contrastive Learning for Cross-lingual Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于跨语言口语理解的标签感知多级对比学习
abstract: Despite the great success of spoken language understanding (SLU) in high-resource languages, it remains challenging in low-resource languages mainly due to the lack of labeled training data. The recent multilingual code-switching approach achieves better alignments of model representations across languages by constructing a mixed-language context in zero-shot cross-lingual SLU. However, current code-switching methods are limited to implicit alignment and disregard the inherent semantic structure in SLU, i.e., the hierarchical inclusion of utterances, slots, and words. In this paper, we propose to model the utterance-slot-word structure by a multi-level contrastive learning framework at the utterance, slot, and word levels to facilitate explicit alignment. Novel code-switching schemes are introduced to generate hard negative examples for our contrastive learning framework. Furthermore, we develop a label-aware joint model leveraging label semantics to enhance the implicit alignment and feed to contrastive learning. Our experimental results show that our proposed methods significantly improve the performance compared with the strong baselines on two zero-shot cross-lingual SLU benchmark datasets.
summary: Despite the great success of spoken language understanding (SLU) in high-resource languages, it remains challenging in low-resource languages mainly due to the lack of labeled training data. The recent multilingual code-switching approach achieves better alignments of model representations across languages by constructing a mixed-language context in zero-shot cross-lingual SLU. However, current code-switching methods are limited to implicit alignment and disregard the inherent semantic structure in SLU, i.e., the hierarchical inclusion of utterances, slots, and words. In this paper, we propose to model the utterance-slot-word structure by a multi-level contrastive learning framework at the utterance, slot, and word levels to facilitate explicit alignment. Novel code-switching schemes are introduced to generate hard negative examples for our contrastive learning framework. Furthermore, we develop a label-aware joint model leveraging label semantics to enhance the implicit alignment and feed to contrastive learning. Our experimental results show that our proposed methods significantly improve the performance compared with the strong baselines on two zero-shot cross-lingual SLU benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管口语理解（SLU）在高资源语言中取得了巨大成功，但在低资源语言中仍然面临挑战，这主要是由于缺乏标记的训练数据。最近的多语言代码转换方法通过在零样本跨语言 SLU 中构建混合语言上下文，实现了跨语言模型表示的更好对齐。然而，当前的语码转换方法仅限于隐式对齐，并且忽略了 SLU 中固有的语义结构，即话语、槽和单词的分层包含。在本文中，我们建议通过多级对比学习框架在话语、槽和单词级别对话语-槽-单词结构进行建模，以促进显式对齐。引入新颖的语码转换方案来为我们的对比学习框架生成困难的负面例子。此外，我们开发了一个标签感知联合模型，利用标签语义来增强隐式对齐和对比学习。我们的实验结果表明，与两个零样本跨语言 SLU 基准数据集上的强基线相比，我们提出的方法显着提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于标签感知的多级对比学习方法，旨在提升低资源语言的跨语言语音语言理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言语音语言理解方法在低资源语言中表现不佳，主要受限于标注数据不足及未能有效建模语义层级结构。
AI.method: 构建多级对比学习框架（utterance/slot/word层级），结合新型代码切换策略生成难负样本，并引入标签感知联合模型增强语义对齐。
AI.result: 在两个零样本跨语言SLU基准数据集上显著超越现有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多级显式对齐与标签语义建模相结合，有效解决了低资源语言跨语言理解中的对齐偏差问题。

Novel code-switching schemes are introduced to generate hard negative examples for our contrastive learning framework. Furthermore, we develop a label-aware joint model leveraging label semantics to enhance the implicit alignment and feed to contrastive learning. authors_text: Prajval Kumar Murali,Cong Wang,Ravinder Dahiya,Mohsen Kaboli
title: Towards Robust 3D Object Recognition with Dense-to-Sparse Deep Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 通过密集到稀疏的深域适应实现鲁棒的 3D 对象识别
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) object recognition is crucial for intelligent autonomous agents such as autonomous vehicles and robots alike to operate effectively in unstructured environments. Most state-of-art approaches rely on relatively dense point clouds and performance drops significantly for sparse point clouds. Unsupervised domain adaption allows to minimise the discrepancy between dense and sparse point clouds with minimal unlabelled sparse point clouds, thereby saving additional sparse data collection, annotation and retraining costs. In this work, we propose a novel method for point cloud based object recognition with competitive performance with state-of-art methods on dense and sparse point clouds while being trained only with dense point clouds.
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) object recognition is crucial for intelligent autonomous agents such as autonomous vehicles and robots alike to operate effectively in unstructured environments. Most state-of-art approaches rely on relatively dense point clouds and performance drops significantly for sparse point clouds. Unsupervised domain adaption allows to minimise the discrepancy between dense and sparse point clouds with minimal unlabelled sparse point clouds, thereby saving additional sparse data collection, annotation and retraining costs. In this work, we propose a novel method for point cloud based object recognition with competitive performance with state-of-art methods on dense and sparse point clouds while being trained only with dense point clouds.
abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 物体识别对于自动驾驶车辆和机器人等智能自主代理在非结构化环境中有效运行至关重要。大多数最先进的方法依赖于相对密集的点云，而稀疏点云的性能会显着下降。无监督域适应可以通过最小化未标记稀疏点云来最小化密集点云和稀疏点云之间的差异，从而节省额外的稀疏数据收集、注释和再训练成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于点云的对象识别的新方法，该方法在仅使用密集点云进行训练的同时，在密集和稀疏点云上具有与最先进的方法竞争的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密集到稀疏深度域适应的3D物体识别方法，旨在提升在稀疏点云环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D物体识别方法依赖密集点云，在稀疏点云下性能显著下降，而稀疏点云的数据采集与标注成本较高，需通过域适应技术减少差异以节省成本。
AI.method: 提出无监督域适应框架，通过最小化密集与稀疏点云间的分布差异，仅使用密集点云训练模型，使其在稀疏点云上保持竞争力。
AI.result: 该方法在密集和稀疏点云数据集上均达到与现有方法相当的性能，且无需额外标注稀疏数据即可完成模型训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度域适应技术有效解决了稀疏点云下的3D识别难题，为实际应用中的数据效率优化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhengbo Zhang,Chunluan Zhou,Zhigang Tu
title: Distilling Inter-Class Distance for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 提取类间距离进行语义分割
abstract: Knowledge distillation is widely adopted in semantic segmentation to reduce the computation cost.The previous knowledge distillation methods for semantic segmentation focus on pixel-wise feature alignment and intra-class feature variation distillation, neglecting to transfer the knowledge of the inter-class distance in the feature space, which is important for semantic segmentation. To address this issue, we propose an Inter-class Distance Distillation (IDD) method to transfer the inter-class distance in the feature space from the teacher network to the student network. Furthermore, semantic segmentation is a position-dependent task,thus we exploit a position information distillation module to help the student network encode more position information. Extensive experiments on three popular datasets: Cityscapes, Pascal VOC and ADE20K show that our method is helpful to improve the accuracy of semantic segmentation models and achieves the state-of-the-art performance. E.g. it boosts the benchmark model("PSPNet+ResNet18") by 7.50% in accuracy on the Cityscapes dataset.
summary: Knowledge distillation is widely adopted in semantic segmentation to reduce the computation cost.The previous knowledge distillation methods for semantic segmentation focus on pixel-wise feature alignment and intra-class feature variation distillation, neglecting to transfer the knowledge of the inter-class distance in the feature space, which is important for semantic segmentation. To address this issue, we propose an Inter-class Distance Distillation (IDD) method to transfer the inter-class distance in the feature space from the teacher network to the student network. Furthermore, semantic segmentation is a position-dependent task,thus we exploit a position information distillation module to help the student network encode more position information. Extensive experiments on three popular datasets: Cityscapes, Pascal VOC and ADE20K show that our method is helpful to improve the accuracy of semantic segmentation models and achieves the state-of-the-art performance. E.g. it boosts the benchmark model("PSPNet+ResNet18") by 7.50% in accuracy on the Cityscapes dataset.
abstract_zh: 语义分割中广泛采用知识蒸馏来降低计算成本。以往的语义分割知识蒸馏方法主要关注像素级特征对齐和类内特征变异蒸馏，而忽略了在特征空间中传递类间距离的知识，而这对于语义分割来说很重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种类间距离蒸馏（IDD）方法，将特征空间中的类间距离从教师网络转移到学生网络。此外，语义分割是一项与位置相关的任务，因此我们利用位置信息蒸馏模块来帮助学生网络编码更多位置信息。对三个流行数据集：Cityscapes、Pascal VOC 和 ADE20K 的大量实验表明，我们的方法有助于提高语义分割模型的准确性并实现最先进的性能。例如。它将 Cityscapes 数据集上的基准模型（“PSPNet+ResNet18”）的准确度提高了 7.50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类间距离蒸馏的方法（IDD），用于改进语义分割模型的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在语义分割中主要关注像素级特征对齐和类内特征变化，忽略了特征空间中类间距离的传递，而类间距离对语义分割至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了类间距离蒸馏（IDD）模块，将教师网络的类间距离知识传递到学生网络，并引入位置信息蒸馏模块以增强学生网络的位置感知能力。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、Pascal VOC和ADE20K三个数据集上取得最优性能，例如在Cityscapes数据集上将基准模型（PSPNet+ResNet18）的准确率提升7.50%。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时优化类间距离和位置信息蒸馏，本文方法有效提升了语义分割模型的性能，验证了类间距离传递在知识蒸馏中的重要性。

motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在语义分割中主要关注像素级特征对齐和类内特征变化，忽略了特征空间中类间距离的传递，而类间距离对语义分割至关重要。
method: 设计了类间距离蒸馏（IDD）模块，将教师网络的类间距离知识传递到学生网络，并引入位置信息蒸馏模块以增强学生网络的位置感知能力。
result: 在Cityscapes、Pascal VOC和ADE20K三个数据集上取得最优性能，例如在Cityscapes数据集上将基准模型（PSPNet+ResNet18）的准确率提升7.50%。
conclusion: 通过同时优化类间距离和位置信息蒸馏，本文方法有效提升了语义分割模型的性能，验证了类间距离传递在知识蒸馏中的重要性。
search_text: Distilling Inter-Class Distance for Semantic Segmentation 提取类间距离进行语义分割 Knowledge distillation is widely adopted in semantic segmentation to reduce the computation cost.The previous knowledge distillation methods for semantic segmentation focus on pixel-wise feature alignment and intra-class feature variation distillation, neglecting to transfer the knowledge of the inter-class distance in the feature space, which is important for semantic segmentation. To address this issue, we propose an Inter-class Distance Distillation (IDD) method to transfer the inter-class distance in the feature space from the teacher network to the student network. Furthermore, semantic segmentation is a position-dependent task,thus we exploit a position information distillation module to help the student network encode more position information. Extensive experiments on three popular datasets: Cityscapes, Pascal VOC and ADE20K show that our method is helpful to improve the accuracy of semantic segmentation models and achieves the state-of-the-art performance. E.g. it boosts the benchmark model("PSPNet+ResNet18") by 7.50% in accuracy on the Cityscapes dataset. 语义分割中广泛采用知识蒸馏来降低计算成本。以往的语义分割知识蒸馏方法主要关注像素级特征对齐和类内特征变异蒸馏，而忽略了在特征空间中传递类间距离的知识，而这对于语义分割来说很重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种类间距离蒸馏（IDD）方法，将特征空间中的类间距离从教师网络转移到学生网络。此外，语义分割是一项与位置相关的任务，因此我们利用位置信息蒸馏模块来帮助学生网络编码更多位置信息。对三个流行数据集：Cityscapes、Pascal VOC 和 ADE20K 的大量实验表明，我们的方法有助于提高语义分割模型的准确性并实现最先进的性能。例如。它将 Cityscapes 数据集上的基准模型（“PSPNet+ResNet18”）的准确度提高了 7.50%。 本文提出一种基于类间距离蒸馏的方法（IDD），用于改进语义分割模型的准确性。 Zhengbo Zhang,Chunluan Zhou,Zhigang Tu cs.CV

authors_text: Mingchao Li,Kun Huang,Zetian Zhang,Xiao Ma,Qiang Chen
title: Label Adversarial Learning for Skeleton-level to Pixel-level Adjustable Vessel Segmentation
title_zh: 骨骼级到像素级可调节血管分割的标签对抗性学习
abstract: You can have your cake and eat it too. Microvessel segmentation in optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) images remains challenging. Skeleton-level segmentation shows clear topology but without diameter information, while pixel-level segmentation shows a clear caliber but low topology. To close this gap, we propose a novel label adversarial learning (LAL) for skeleton-level to pixel-level adjustable vessel segmentation. LAL mainly consists of two designs: a label adversarial loss and an embeddable adjustment layer. The label adversarial loss establishes an adversarial relationship between the two label supervisions, while the adjustment layer adjusts the network parameters to match the different adversarial weights. Such a design can efficiently capture the variation between the two supervisions, making the segmentation continuous and tunable. This continuous process allows us to recommend high-quality vessel segmentation with clear caliber and topology. Experimental results show that our results outperform manual annotations of current public datasets and conventional filtering effects. Furthermore, such a continuous process can also be used to generate an uncertainty map representing weak vessel boundaries and noise.
summary: You can have your cake and eat it too. Microvessel segmentation in optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) images remains challenging. Skeleton-level segmentation shows clear topology but without diameter information, while pixel-level segmentation shows a clear caliber but low topology. To close this gap, we propose a novel label adversarial learning (LAL) for skeleton-level to pixel-level adjustable vessel segmentation. LAL mainly consists of two designs: a label adversarial loss and an embeddable adjustment layer. The label adversarial loss establishes an adversarial relationship between the two label supervisions, while the adjustment layer adjusts the network parameters to match the different adversarial weights. Such a design can efficiently capture the variation between the two supervisions, making the segmentation continuous and tunable. This continuous process allows us to recommend high-quality vessel segmentation with clear caliber and topology. Experimental results show that our results outperform manual annotations of current public datasets and conventional filtering effects. Furthermore, such a continuous process can also be used to generate an uncertainty map representing weak vessel boundaries and noise.
abstract_zh: 你可以鱼与熊掌兼得。光学相干断层扫描血管造影 (OCTA) 图像中的微血管分割仍然具有挑战性。骨架级分割显示清晰的拓扑，但没有直径信息，而像素级分割显示清晰的口径，但拓扑较低。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种新颖的标签对抗学习（LAL），用于骨架级到像素级可调节血管分割。 LAL主要由两种设计组成：标签对抗性损失和可嵌入调整层。标签对抗损失在两个标签监督之间建立对抗关系，而调整层则调整网络参数以匹配不同的对抗权重。这样的设计可以有效地捕获两个监督之间的变化，使分割连续且可调。这种连续的过程使我们能够推荐具有清晰口径和拓扑结构的高质量血管分割。实验结果表明，我们的结果优于当前公共数据集的手动注释和传统的过滤效果。此外，这种连续过程还可用于生成表示弱血管边界和噪声的不确定性图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种标签对抗学习方法，实现从骨架级到像素级可调节的血管分割，以解决光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）图像中微血管分割的挑战。
AI.motivation: 骨架级分割能体现拓扑结构但缺乏直径信息，像素级分割虽能显示管径却拓扑性较差，现有方法难以兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: 设计标签对抗损失函数建立两种监督间的对抗关系，并引入可嵌入调节层调整网络参数以匹配不同对抗权重，实现分割结果的连续可调。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在公开数据集上的分割效果优于人工标注和传统滤波方法，且能生成表示弱血管边界和噪声的不确定性图。
AI.conclusion: 该连续分割框架有效融合了骨架级与像素级优势，为高质量血管分割提供了新思路，并具备生成不确定性图的扩展能力。

authors_text: H. T. Wang,J. S. Zhang,Z. X. Zhao,C. X. Zhang,L. Li,Z. Y. Yang,W. F. Geng
title: Automatic Velocity Picking Using a Multi-Information Fusion Deep Semantic Segmentation Network
title_zh: 使用多信息融合深度语义分割网络的自动速度拾取
abstract: Velocity picking, a critical step in seismic data processing, has been studied for decades. Although manual picking can produce accurate normal moveout (NMO) velocities from the velocity spectra of prestack gathers, it is time-consuming and becomes infeasible with the emergence of large amount of seismic data. Numerous automatic velocity picking methods have thus been developed. In recent years, deep learning (DL) methods have produced good results on the seismic data with medium and high signal-to-noise ratios (SNR). Unfortunately, it still lacks a picking method to automatically generate accurate velocities in the situations of low SNR. In this paper, we propose a multi-information fusion network (MIFN) to estimate stacking velocity from the fusion information of velocity spectra and stack gather segments (SGS). In particular, we transform the velocity picking problem into a semantic segmentation problem based on the velocity spectrum images. Meanwhile, the information provided by SGS is used as a prior in the network to assist segmentation. The experimental results on two field datasets show that the picking results of MIFN are stable and accurate for the scenarios with medium and high SNR, and it also performs well in low SNR scenarios.
summary: Velocity picking, a critical step in seismic data processing, has been studied for decades. Although manual picking can produce accurate normal moveout (NMO) velocities from the velocity spectra of prestack gathers, it is time-consuming and becomes infeasible with the emergence of large amount of seismic data. Numerous automatic velocity picking methods have thus been developed. In recent years, deep learning (DL) methods have produced good results on the seismic data with medium and high signal-to-noise ratios (SNR). Unfortunately, it still lacks a picking method to automatically generate accurate velocities in the situations of low SNR. In this paper, we propose a multi-information fusion network (MIFN) to estimate stacking velocity from the fusion information of velocity spectra and stack gather segments (SGS). In particular, we transform the velocity picking problem into a semantic segmentation problem based on the velocity spectrum images. Meanwhile, the information provided by SGS is used as a prior in the network to assist segmentation. The experimental results on two field datasets show that the picking results of MIFN are stable and accurate for the scenarios with medium and high SNR, and it also performs well in low SNR scenarios.
abstract_zh: 速度拾取是地震数据处理中的关键步骤，人们对其进行了数十年的研究。虽然手动拾取可以从叠前道集的速度谱中产生准确的法向时差（NMO）速度，但这种方法非常耗时，并且随着大量地震数据的出现而变得不可行。因此开发了许多自动速度拾取方法。近年来，深度学习（DL）方法在中高信噪比（SNR）地震数据上取得了良好的效果。不幸的是，它仍然缺乏一种在低信噪比情况下自动生成准确速度的拾取方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种多信息融合网络（MIFN），用于根据速度谱和叠加收集段（SGS）的融合信息来估计叠加速度。特别是，我们将速度拾取问题转化为基于速度谱图像的语义分割问题。同时，SGS提供的信息在网络中作为先验来辅助分割。在两个现场数据集上的实验结果表明，MIFN在中、高信噪比场景下的拾取结果稳定准确，在低信噪比场景下也表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多信息融合深度语义分割网络（MIFN），用于从速度谱和叠后数据段中自动提取准确的速度信息。
AI.motivation: 尽管手动速度拾取可以得到准确的速度信息，但面对大量地震数据时效率低下。现有的自动方法在中高信噪比（SNR）情况下效果良好，但在低SNR情况下仍缺乏有效的方法。
AI.method: 本文将速度拾取问题转化为基于速度谱图像的语义分割问题，并利用叠后数据段（SGS）的信息作为网络的先验信息，辅助分割过程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MIFN在中高SNR和低SNR场景下均表现出稳定和准确的速度拾取能力。
AI.conclusion: MIFN方法在处理不同信噪比的地震数据时表现出良好的性能，为自动速度拾取提供了有效解决方案。

In particular, we transform the velocity picking problem into a semantic segmentation problem based on the velocity spectrum images. Meanwhile, the information provided by SGS is used as a prior in the network to assist segmentation. The experimental results on two field datasets show that the picking results of MIFN are stable and accurate for the scenarios with medium and high SNR, and it also performs well in low SNR scenarios. 速度拾取是地震数据处理中的关键步骤，人们对其进行了数十年的研究。虽然手动拾取可以从叠前道集的速度谱中产生准确的法向时差（NMO）速度，但这种方法非常耗时，并且随着大量地震数据的出现而变得不可行。因此开发了许多自动速度拾取方法。近年来，深度学习（DL）方法在中高信噪比（SNR）地震数据上取得了良好的效果。不幸的是，它仍然缺乏一种在低信噪比情况下自动生成准确速度的拾取方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种多信息融合网络（MIFN），用于根据速度谱和叠加收集段（SGS）的融合信息来估计叠加速度。特别是，我们将速度拾取问题转化为基于速度谱图像的语义分割问题。同时，SGS提供的信息在网络中作为先验来辅助分割。在两个现场数据集上的实验结果表明，MIFN在中、高信噪比场景下的拾取结果稳定准确，在低信噪比场景下也表现良好。 本文提出了一种多信息融合深度语义分割网络（MIFN），用于从速度谱和叠后数据段中自动提取准确的速度信息。 H. T. Wang,J. S. Zhang,Z. X. Zhao,C. X. Zhang,L. Li,Z. Y. Yang,W. F. Geng cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yiqun Lin,Huifeng Yao,Zezhong Li,Guoyan Zheng,Xiaomeng Li
title: Calibrating Label Distribution for Class-Imbalanced Barely-Supervised Knee Segmentation
title_zh: 校准类别不平衡的几乎没有监督的膝盖分割的标签分布
comment: Provisionally accepted to MICCAI 2022; 10 pages, 3 figures
comments: Provisionally accepted to MICCAI 2022; 10 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Segmentation of 3D knee MR images is important for the assessment of osteoarthritis. Like other medical data, the volume-wise labeling of knee MR images is expertise-demanded and time-consuming; hence semi-supervised learning (SSL), particularly barely-supervised learning, is highly desirable for training with insufficient labeled data. We observed that the class imbalance problem is severe in the knee MR images as the cartilages only occupy 6% of foreground volumes, and the situation becomes worse without sufficient labeled data. To address the above problem, we present a novel framework for barely-supervised knee segmentation with noisy and imbalanced labels. Our framework leverages label distribution to encourage the network to put more effort into learning cartilage parts. Specifically, we utilize 1.) label quantity distribution for modifying the objective loss function to a class-aware weighted form and 2.) label position distribution for constructing a cropping probability mask to crop more sub-volumes in cartilage areas from both labeled and unlabeled inputs. In addition, we design dual uncertainty-aware sampling supervision to enhance the supervision of low-confident categories for efficient unsupervised learning. Experiments show that our proposed framework brings significant improvements by incorporating the unlabeled data and alleviating the problem of class imbalance. More importantly, our method outperforms the state-of-the-art SSL methods, demonstrating the potential of our framework for the more challenging SSL setting.
summary: Segmentation of 3D knee MR images is important for the assessment of osteoarthritis. Like other medical data, the volume-wise labeling of knee MR images is expertise-demanded and time-consuming; hence semi-supervised learning (SSL), particularly barely-supervised learning, is highly desirable for training with insufficient labeled data. We observed that the class imbalance problem is severe in the knee MR images as the cartilages only occupy 6% of foreground volumes, and the situation becomes worse without sufficient labeled data. To address the above problem, we present a novel framework for barely-supervised knee segmentation with noisy and imbalanced labels. Our framework leverages label distribution to encourage the network to put more effort into learning cartilage parts. Specifically, we utilize 1.) label quantity distribution for modifying the objective loss function to a class-aware weighted form and 2.) label position distribution for constructing a cropping probability mask to crop more sub-volumes in cartilage areas from both labeled and unlabeled inputs. In addition, we design dual uncertainty-aware sampling supervision to enhance the supervision of low-confident categories for efficient unsupervised learning. Experiments show that our proposed framework brings significant improvements by incorporating the unlabeled data and alleviating the problem of class imbalance. More importantly, our method outperforms the state-of-the-art SSL methods, demonstrating the potential of our framework for the more challenging SSL setting.
abstract_zh: 3D 膝关节 MR 图像的分割对于骨关节炎的评估非常重要。与其他医学数据一样，膝关节 MR 图像的体积标记需要专业知识且耗时；因此，半监督学习（SSL），特别是几乎没有监督的学习，非常适合标记数据不足的训练。我们观察到，膝关节 MR 图像中的类不平衡问题很严重，因为软骨仅占前景体积的 6%，如果没有足够的标记数据，情况会变得更糟。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于具有噪声和不平衡标签的几乎没有监督的膝盖分割。我们的框架利用标签分布来鼓励网络投入更多精力来学习软骨部分。具体来说，我们利用 1.) 标签数量分布将目标损失函数修改为类感知加权形式，2.) 标签位置分布用于构建裁剪概率掩模，以从标记和未标记的输入中裁剪软骨区域中的更多子体积。此外，我们设计了双重不确定性采样监督来增强对低置信度类别的监督，以实现高效的无监督学习。实验表明，我们提出的框架通过合并未标记的数据并缓解类别不平衡问题带来了显着的改进。更重要的是，我们的方法优于最先进的 SSL 方法，展示了我们的框架在更具挑战性的 SSL 设置方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对类别不平衡的最少监督膝关节MRI分割框架，通过校准标签分布提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 膝关节MRI标注数据稀缺且软骨占比极低（仅6%），导致现有半监督方法难以有效处理类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 1) 通过标签数量分布构建类感知加权损失函数；2) 利用标签位置分布生成裁剪概率掩码增强软骨区域采样；3) 设计双不确定性感知采样机制强化低置信类别监督。
AI.result: 在未标注数据辅助下显著缓解类别不平衡问题，分割性能超越现有最先进SSL方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多维度标签分布校准，在挑战性最少监督场景下实现了更优的膝关节分割，为医学图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Jean-Nicolas Jérémie,Laurent U Perrinet
title: Ultrafast Image Categorization in Biology and Neural Models
title_zh: 生物学和神经模型中的超快图像分类
abstract: Humans are able to categorize images very efficiently, in particular to detect the presence of an animal very quickly. Recently, deep learning algorithms based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved higher than human accuracy for a wide range of visual categorization tasks. However, the tasks on which these artificial networks are typically trained and evaluated tend to be highly specialized and do not generalize well, e.g., accuracy drops after image rotation. In this respect, biological visual systems are more flexible and efficient than artificial systems for more general tasks, such as recognizing an animal. To further the comparison between biological and artificial neural networks, we re-trained the standard VGG 16 CNN on two independent tasks that are ecologically relevant to humans: detecting the presence of an animal or an artifact. We show that re-training the network achieves a human-like level of performance, comparable to that reported in psychophysical tasks. In addition, we show that the categorization is better when the outputs of the models are combined. Indeed, animals (e.g., lions) tend to be less present in photographs that contain artifacts (e.g., buildings). Furthermore, these re-trained models were able to reproduce some unexpected behavioral observations from human psychophysics, such as robustness to rotation (e.g., an upside-down or tilted image) or to a grayscale transformation. Finally, we quantified the number of CNN layers required to achieve such performance and showed that good accuracy for ultrafast image categorization can be achieved with only a few layers, challenging the belief that image recognition requires deep sequential analysis of visual objects.
summary: Humans are able to categorize images very efficiently, in particular to detect the presence of an animal very quickly. Recently, deep learning algorithms based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved higher than human accuracy for a wide range of visual categorization tasks. However, the tasks on which these artificial networks are typically trained and evaluated tend to be highly specialized and do not generalize well, e.g., accuracy drops after image rotation. In this respect, biological visual systems are more flexible and efficient than artificial systems for more general tasks, such as recognizing an animal. To further the comparison between biological and artificial neural networks, we re-trained the standard VGG 16 CNN on two independent tasks that are ecologically relevant to humans: detecting the presence of an animal or an artifact. We show that re-training the network achieves a human-like level of performance, comparable to that reported in psychophysical tasks. In addition, we show that the categorization is better when the outputs of the models are combined. Indeed, animals (e.g., lions) tend to be less present in photographs that contain artifacts (e.g., buildings). Furthermore, these re-trained models were able to reproduce some unexpected behavioral observations from human psychophysics, such as robustness to rotation (e.g., an upside-down or tilted image) or to a grayscale transformation. Finally, we quantified the number of CNN layers required to achieve such performance and showed that good accuracy for ultrafast image categorization can be achieved with only a few layers, challenging the belief that image recognition requires deep sequential analysis of visual objects.
abstract_zh: 人类能够非常有效地对图像进行分类，特别是能够非常快速地检测动物的存在。最近，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习算法在广泛的视觉分类任务中取得了高于人类的准确度。然而，这些人工网络通常训练和评估的任务往往是高度专业化的，并且不能很好地概括，例如，图像旋转后精度下降。在这方面，生物视觉系统比人工系统更灵活、更高效，可以完成更一般的任务，例如识别动物。为了进一步比较生物神经网络和人工神经网络，我们在与人类生态相关的两个独立任务上重新训练了标准 VGG 16 CNN：检测动物或人工制品的存在。我们表明，重新训练网络可以达到类似人类的性能水平，与心理物理任务中报告的性能相当。此外，我们还表明，当模型的输出组合在一起时，分类效果会更好。事实上，动物（例如狮子）往往较少出现在包含文物（例如建筑物）的照片中。此外，这些经过重新训练的模型能够重现人类心理物理学中的一些意想不到的行为观察结果，例如旋转（例如颠倒或倾斜的图像）或灰度变换的鲁棒性。最后，我们量化了实现这种性能所需的 CNN 层数，并表明仅用几层就可以实现超快图像分类的良好准确性，这挑战了图像识别需要对视觉对象进行深度顺序分析的信念。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过重新训练VGG16卷积神经网络，在动物与人工制品检测任务中实现类人水平的图像分类性能，并对比生物视觉系统与人工神经网络的差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在特定视觉任务中超越人类，但其泛化能力不足（如旋转图像后准确率下降），而生物视觉系统在生态相关任务中更具灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 对标准VGG16网络进行重新训练，针对两类生态相关任务（检测动物或人工制品），结合模型输出结果，并测试其对图像旋转、灰度转换的鲁棒性，量化所需网络层数。
AI.result: 重新训练的模型达到类人水平的性能，组合输出提升分类效果，可复现人类对旋转和灰度变换的鲁棒性行为，且仅需少量网络层即可实现高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 生态相关任务的重新训练使CNN逼近人类表现，挑战了深度网络必要性的传统观点，凸显生物视觉系统的灵活性优势。

We show that re-training the network achieves a human-like level of performance, comparable to that reported in psychophysical tasks. In addition, we show that the categorization is better when the outputs of the models are combined. Indeed, animals (e.g., lions) tend to be less present in photographs that contain artifacts (e.g., buildings). Furthermore, these re-trained models were able to reproduce some unexpected behavioral observations from human psychophysics, such as robustness to rotation (e.g., an upside-down or tilted image) or to a grayscale transformation. Finally, we quantified the number of CNN layers required to achieve such performance and showed that good accuracy for ultrafast image categorization can be achieved with only a few layers, challenging the belief that image recognition requires deep sequential analysis of visual objects. 人类能够非常有效地对图像进行分类，特别是能够非常快速地检测动物的存在。最近，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习算法在广泛的视觉分类任务中取得了高于人类的准确度。然而，这些人工网络通常训练和评估的任务往往是高度专业化的，并且不能很好地概括，例如，图像旋转后精度下降。在这方面，生物视觉系统比人工系统更灵活、更高效，可以完成更一般的任务，例如识别动物。为了进一步比较生物神经网络和人工神经网络，我们在与人类生态相关的两个独立任务上重新训练了标准 VGG 16 CNN：检测动物或人工制品的存在。我们表明，重新训练网络可以达到类似人类的性能水平，与心理物理任务中报告的性能相当。此外，我们还表明，当模型的输出组合在一起时，分类效果会更好。事实上，动物（例如狮子）往往较少出现在包含文物（例如建筑物）的照片中。此外，这些经过重新训练的模型能够重现人类心理物理学中的一些意想不到的行为观察结果，例如旋转（例如颠倒或倾斜的图像）或灰度变换的鲁棒性。最后，我们量化了实现这种性能所需的 CNN 层数，并表明仅用几层就可以实现超快图像分类的良好准确性，这挑战了图像识别需要对视觉对象进行深度顺序分析的信念。 该论文通过重新训练VGG16卷积神经网络，在动物与人工制品检测任务中实现类人水平的图像分类性能，并对比生物视觉系统与人工神经网络的差异。 Jean-Nicolas Jérémie,Laurent U Perrinet q-bio.NC,cs.CV

authors_text: Zunlei Feng,Tian Qiu,Sai Wu,Xiaotuan Jin,Zengliang He,Mingli Song,Huiqiong Wang
title: Comparison Knowledge Translation for Generalizable Image Classification
title_zh: 可泛化图像分类的比较知识翻译
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2022; Adding Supplementary Materials
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2022; Adding Supplementary Materials
abstract: Deep learning has recently achieved remarkable performance in image classification tasks, which depends heavily on massive annotation. However, the classification mechanism of existing deep learning models seems to contrast to humans' recognition mechanism. With only a glance at an image of the object even unknown type, humans can quickly and precisely find other same category objects from massive images, which benefits from daily recognition of various objects. In this paper, we attempt to build a generalizable framework that emulates the humans' recognition mechanism in the image classification task, hoping to improve the classification performance on unseen categories with the support of annotations of other categories. Specifically, we investigate a new task termed Comparison Knowledge Translation (CKT). Given a set of fully labeled categories, CKT aims to translate the comparison knowledge learned from the labeled categories to a set of novel categories. To this end, we put forward a Comparison Classification Translation Network (CCT-Net), which comprises a comparison classifier and a matching discriminator. The comparison classifier is devised to classify whether two images belong to the same category or not, while the matching discriminator works together in an adversarial manner to ensure whether classified results match the truth. Exhaustive experiments show that CCT-Net achieves surprising generalization ability on unseen categories and SOTA performance on target categories.
summary: Deep learning has recently achieved remarkable performance in image classification tasks, which depends heavily on massive annotation. However, the classification mechanism of existing deep learning models seems to contrast to humans' recognition mechanism. With only a glance at an image of the object even unknown type, humans can quickly and precisely find other same category objects from massive images, which benefits from daily recognition of various objects. In this paper, we attempt to build a generalizable framework that emulates the humans' recognition mechanism in the image classification task, hoping to improve the classification performance on unseen categories with the support of annotations of other categories. Specifically, we investigate a new task termed Comparison Knowledge Translation (CKT). Given a set of fully labeled categories, CKT aims to translate the comparison knowledge learned from the labeled categories to a set of novel categories. To this end, we put forward a Comparison Classification Translation Network (CCT-Net), which comprises a comparison classifier and a matching discriminator. The comparison classifier is devised to classify whether two images belong to the same category or not, while the matching discriminator works together in an adversarial manner to ensure whether classified results match the truth. Exhaustive experiments show that CCT-Net achieves surprising generalization ability on unseen categories and SOTA performance on target categories.
abstract_zh: 深度学习最近在图像分类任务中取得了显着的性能，这在很大程度上依赖于大量注释。然而，现有深度学习模型的分类机制似乎与人类的识别机制形成鲜明对比。即使是未知类型的物体，只要看一眼图像，人类就可以从海量图像中快速、准确地找到其他同类别物体，这得益于日常对各种物体的识别。在本文中，我们尝试建立一个在图像分类任务中模拟人类识别机制的通用框架，希望在其他类别注释的支持下提高对不可见类别的分类性能。具体来说，我们研究了一项名为比较知识翻译（CKT）的新任务。给定一组完全标记的类别，CKT 旨在将从标记类别中学到的比较知识转化为一组新的类别。为此，我们提出了比较分类翻译网络（CCT-Net），它包括比较分类器和匹配鉴别器。比较分类器的目的是对两个图像是否属于同一类别进行分类，而匹配鉴别器以对抗的方式协同工作，以确保分类结果是否与事实相符。详尽的实验表明，CCT-Net 在未见过的类别上实现了令人惊讶的泛化能力，在目标类别上实现了 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CCT-Net的通用图像分类框架，通过比较知识迁移（CKT）任务提升模型在未见类别上的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据，且分类机制与人类认知方式存在差异。人类可通过少量信息快速识别同类物体，因此需构建更接近人类机制的通用化框架。
AI.method: 设计包含比较分类器和匹配判别器的CCT-Net：比较分类器判断两图像是否同类，匹配判别器通过对抗训练确保分类结果与真实标签一致，实现跨类别知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明CCT-Net在未见类别上具有惊人泛化能力，在目标类别上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过模拟人类对比认知机制，有效提升了图像分类模型在无标注新类别上的泛化能力。

The comparison classifier is devised to classify whether two images belong to the same category or not, while the matching discriminator works together in an adversarial manner to ensure whether classified results match the truth. Exhaustive experiments show that CCT-Net achieves surprising generalization ability on unseen categories and SOTA performance on target categories. 深度学习最近在图像分类任务中取得了显着的性能，这在很大程度上依赖于大量注释。然而，现有深度学习模型的分类机制似乎与人类的识别机制形成鲜明对比。即使是未知类型的物体，只要看一眼图像，人类就可以从海量图像中快速、准确地找到其他同类别物体，这得益于日常对各种物体的识别。在本文中，我们尝试建立一个在图像分类任务中模拟人类识别机制的通用框架，希望在其他类别注释的支持下提高对不可见类别的分类性能。具体来说，我们研究了一项名为比较知识翻译（CKT）的新任务。给定一组完全标记的类别，CKT 旨在将从标记类别中学到的比较知识转化为一组新的类别。为此，我们提出了比较分类翻译网络（CCT-Net），它包括比较分类器和匹配鉴别器。比较分类器的目的是对两个图像是否属于同一类别进行分类，而匹配鉴别器以对抗的方式协同工作，以确保分类结果是否与事实相符。详尽的实验表明，CCT-Net 在未见过的类别上实现了令人惊讶的泛化能力，在目标类别上实现了 SOTA 性能。 本文提出一种名为CCT-Net的通用图像分类框架，通过比较知识迁移（CKT）任务提升模型在未见类别上的分类性能。 Zunlei Feng,Tian Qiu,Sai Wu,Xiaotuan Jin,Zengliang He,Mingli Song,Huiqiong Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Liqun Lin,Zheng Wang,Jiachen He,Weiling Chen,Yiwen Xu,Tiesong Zhao
title: Deep Quality Assessment of Compressed Videos: A Subjective and Objective Study
title_zh: 压缩视频的深度质量评估：主客观研究
abstract: In the video coding process, the perceived quality of a compressed video is evaluated by full-reference quality evaluation metrics. However, it is difficult to obtain reference videos with perfect quality. To solve this problem, it is critical to design no-reference compressed video quality assessment algorithms, which assists in measuring the quality of experience on the server side and resource allocation on the network side. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) has shown its advantage in Video Quality Assessment (VQA) with promising successes in recent years. A large-scale quality database is very important for learning accurate and powerful compressed video quality metrics. In this work, a semi-automatic labeling method is adopted to build a large-scale compressed video quality database, which allows us to label a large number of compressed videos with manageable human workload. The resulting Compressed Video quality database with Semi-Automatic Ratings (CVSAR), so far the largest of compressed video quality database. We train a no-reference compressed video quality assessment model with a 3D CNN for SpatioTemporal Feature Extraction and Evaluation (STFEE). Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art metrics and achieves promising generalization performance in cross-database tests. The CVSAR database and STFEE model will be made publicly available to facilitate reproducible research.
summary: In the video coding process, the perceived quality of a compressed video is evaluated by full-reference quality evaluation metrics. However, it is difficult to obtain reference videos with perfect quality. To solve this problem, it is critical to design no-reference compressed video quality assessment algorithms, which assists in measuring the quality of experience on the server side and resource allocation on the network side. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) has shown its advantage in Video Quality Assessment (VQA) with promising successes in recent years. A large-scale quality database is very important for learning accurate and powerful compressed video quality metrics. In this work, a semi-automatic labeling method is adopted to build a large-scale compressed video quality database, which allows us to label a large number of compressed videos with manageable human workload. The resulting Compressed Video quality database with Semi-Automatic Ratings (CVSAR), so far the largest of compressed video quality database. We train a no-reference compressed video quality assessment model with a 3D CNN for SpatioTemporal Feature Extraction and Evaluation (STFEE). Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art metrics and achieves promising generalization performance in cross-database tests. The CVSAR database and STFEE model will be made publicly available to facilitate reproducible research.
abstract_zh: 在视频编码过程中，压缩视频的感知质量是通过全参考质量评估指标来评估的。然而，很难获得质量完美的参考视频。为了解决这个问题，设计无参考压缩视频质量评估算法至关重要，该算法有助于衡量服务器端的体验质量和网络侧的资源分配。卷积神经网络（CNN）在视频质量评估（VQA）方面显示出其优势，近年来取得了可喜的成功。大规模的质量数据库对于学习准确且强大的压缩视频质量指标非常重要。在这项工作中，采用半自动标记方法来构建大规模压缩视频质量数据库，这使得我们能够以可管理的人力工作量来标记大量压缩视频。由此产生的具有半自动评级（CVSAR）的压缩视频质量数据库，是迄今为止最大的压缩视频质量数据库。我们使用 3D CNN 训练无参考压缩视频质量评估模型，用于时空特征提取和评估 (STFEE)。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的指标，并在跨数据库测试中实现了有希望的泛化性能。 CVSAR 数据库和 STFEE 模型将公开，以促进可重复的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无参考压缩视频质量评估方法，并构建大规模半自动标注数据库CVSAR。
AI.motivation: 传统全参考质量评估依赖难以获取的高质量参考视频，需开发无参考算法以支持服务器端质量评估与网络资源分配。
AI.method: 采用半自动标注方法构建CVSAR数据库，设计基于3D CNN的STFEE模型进行时空特征提取与评估。
AI.result: 所提方法在客观指标和跨数据库测试中均优于现有算法，且具备良好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: STFEE模型与CVSAR数据库为压缩视频质量评估提供了有效工具，将公开促进相关研究。

ai_content.conclusion: STFEE模型与CVSAR数据库为压缩视频质量评估提供了有效工具，将公开促进相关研究。

authors_text: Zhangjian Ji,Kai Feng,Yuhua Qian,Jiye Liang
title: Sparse Regularized Correlation Filter for UAV Object Tracking with adaptive Contextual Learning and Keyfilter Selection
title_zh: 用于无人机目标跟踪的稀疏正则相关滤波器，具有自适应上下文学习和关键滤波器选择
abstract: Recently, correlation filter has been widely applied in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) tracking due to its high frame rates, robustness and low calculation resources. However, it is fragile because of two inherent defects, i.e, boundary effect and filter corruption. Some methods by enlarging the search area can mitigate the boundary effect, yet introducing the undesired background distractors. Another approaches can alleviate the temporal degeneration of learned filters by introducing the temporal regularizer, which depends on the assumption that the filers between consecutive frames should be coherent. In fact, sometimes the filers at the ($t-1$)th frame is vulnerable to heavy occlusion from backgrounds, which causes that the assumption does not hold. To handle them, in this work, we propose a novel $\ell_{1}$ regularization correlation filter with adaptive contextual learning and keyfilter selection for UAV tracking. Firstly, we adaptively detect the positions of effective contextual distractors by the aid of the distribution of local maximum values on the response map of current frame which is generated by using the previous correlation filter model. Next, we eliminate inconsistent labels for the tracked target by removing one on each distractor and develop a new score scheme for each distractor. Then, we can select the keyfilter from the filters pool by finding the maximal similarity between the target at the current frame and the target template corresponding to each filter in the filters pool. Finally, quantitative and qualitative experiments on three authoritative UAV datasets show that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art tracking methods based on correlation filter framework.

Another approaches can alleviate the temporal degeneration of learned filters by introducing the temporal regularizer, which depends on the assumption that the filers between consecutive frames should be coherent. abstract_zh: 近年来，相关滤波器因其高帧率、鲁棒性和低计算资源而在无人机跟踪中得到广泛应用。然而，由于边界效应和过滤器损坏两个固有缺陷，它很脆弱。一些通过扩大搜索区域的方法可以减轻边界效应，但会引入不需要的背景干扰。另一种方法可以通过引入时间正则化器来减轻学习滤波器的时间退化，这取决于连续帧之间的滤波器应该是一致的假设。事实上，有时第 ($t-1$) 帧的过滤器很容易受到背景的严重遮挡，这导致假设不成立。为了解决这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 $\ell_{1}$ 正则化相关滤波器，具有自适应上下文学习和用于无人机跟踪的关键滤波器选择。首先，我们借助当前帧的响应图上的局部最大值的分布来自适应地检测有效上下文干扰的位置，该响应图是使用先前的相关滤波器模型生成的。接下来，我们通过删除每个干扰物上的标签来消除跟踪目标的不一致标签，并为每个干扰物开发一种新的评分方案。然后，我们可以通过找到当前帧的目标与过滤器池中每个过滤器对应的目标模板之间的最大相似度来从过滤器池中选择关键过滤器。最后，对三个权威无人机数据集的定量和定性实验表明，所提出的方法优于基于相关滤波器框架的最先进的跟踪方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合稀疏正则化、自适应上下文学习和关键滤波器选择的关联滤波器方法，以提升无人机（UAV）目标跟踪的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有关联滤波器在UAV跟踪中存在边界效应和滤波器退化问题，传统方法通过扩大搜索区域或引入时间正则化无法有效解决背景干扰和滤波器不一致性。
AI.method: 通过当前帧响应图的局部最大值分布自适应检测有效上下文干扰区域，消除不一致标签并设计新的评分方案；从滤波器池中选择与当前目标模板相似度最高的关键滤波器进行跟踪。
AI.result: 在三个权威UAV数据集上的定量和定性实验表明，所提方法优于基于关联滤波器框架的最先进跟踪算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稀疏正则化和动态滤波器选择机制，有效缓解了边界效应和滤波器退化问题，提升了UAV跟踪的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Nikhil Ayyadevara,Rajni Dabas,Arindam Khan,K. V. N. Sreenivas
title: Near-optimal Algorithms for Stochastic Online Bin Packing
title_zh: 随机在线装箱的近最优算法
abstract: We study the online bin packing problem under two stochastic settings. In the bin packing problem, we are given n items with sizes in (0,1] and the goal is to pack them into the minimum number of unit-sized bins. First, we study bin packing under the i.i.d. model, where item sizes are sampled independently and identically from a distribution in (0,1]. Both the distribution and the total number of items are unknown. The items arrive one by one and their sizes are revealed upon their arrival and they must be packed immediately and irrevocably in bins of size 1. We provide a simple meta-algorithm that takes an offline $α$-asymptotic approximation algorithm and provides a polynomial-time $(α+ \varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm for online bin packing under the i.i.d. model, where $\varepsilon$>0 is a small constant. Using the AFPTAS for offline bin packing, we thus provide a linear time $(1+\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm for online bin packing under i.i.d. model, thus settling the problem. We then study the random-order model, where an adversary specifies the items, but the order of arrival of items is drawn uniformly at random from the set of all permutations of the items. Kenyon's seminal result [SODA'96] showed that the Best-Fit algorithm has a competitive ratio of at most 3/2 in the random-order model, and conjectured the ratio to be around 1.15. However, it has been a long-standing open problem to break the barrier of 3/2 even for special cases. Recently, Albers et al. [Algorithmica'21] showed an improvement to 5/4 competitive ratio in the special case when all the item sizes are greater than 1/3. For this special case, we settle the analysis by showing that Best-Fit has a competitive ratio of 1. We make further progress by breaking the barrier of 3/2 for the 3-Partition problem, a notoriously hard special case of bin packing, where all item sizes lie in (1/4,1/2].

abstract_zh: 我们研究两种随机设置下的在线装箱问题。在装箱问题中，我们给定 n 个尺寸为 (0,1] 的物品，目标是将它们装进最少数量的单位尺寸的装箱中。首先，我们研究独立同分布模型下的装箱，其中物品尺寸是从 (0,1] 的分布中独立且相同地采样的。物品的分布和总数都是未知的。物品一一到达，它们的尺寸在到达时就会显示出来，必须立即不可撤销地包装在尺寸为箱中的物品中。 1. 我们提供了一种简单的元算法，采用离线 $α$ 渐近逼近算法，并为 i.i.d 模型下的在线装箱提供多项式时间 $(α+ \varepsilon)$ 竞争算法，其中 $\varepsilon$>0 是一个小常数，因此我们为在线装箱提供了线性时间 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 竞争算法。然后我们研究随机顺序模型，其中对手指定项目，但项目的到达顺序是从项目的所有排列集中随机抽取的 [SODA'96] 表明，最佳拟合算法在随机顺序模型中的竞争比最多为 3/2，并且推测该比值约为 1.15。即使在特殊情况下，打破 3/2 的障碍也是一个长期存在的问题。最近，Albers 等人 [Algorithmica'21] 显示，当所有项目大小都大于 1/3 时，竞争比可以提高到 5/4。对于这种特殊情况，我们通过证明 Best-Fit 的竞争比为 1 来解决分析。我们通过打破 3-Partition 问题（一个众所周知的困难特殊问题）的障碍，取得了进一步的进展。在装箱的情况下，所有物品尺寸均位于 (1/4,1/2]。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线装箱问题的两种随机模型（i.i.d.模型和随机顺序模型），提出近似最优算法并改进了竞争力分析。
AI.motivation: 在线装箱问题在资源分配和调度中至关重要，但传统算法在随机模型下的性能分析存在理论瓶颈，需探索更优策略。
AI.method: 设计元算法将离线近似算法转化为在线算法，并结合AFPTAS处理i.i.d.模型；针对随机顺序模型，通过数学分析改进Best-Fit算法的竞争力界。
AI.result: 在i.i.d.模型中提出线性时间(1+ε)-竞争算法；在随机顺序模型中证明Best-Fit对特定物品大小的竞争力为1，并突破3/2壁垒解决3-Partition问题。
AI.conclusion: 解决了i.i.d.模型下的最优性问题，突破随机顺序模型的长期理论瓶颈，为在线装箱算法设计提供新思路。

[Algorithmica'21] showed an improvement to 5/4 competitive ratio in the special case when all the item sizes are greater than 1/3. For this special case, we settle the analysis by showing that Best-Fit has a competitive ratio of 1. We make further progress by breaking the barrier of 3/2 for the 3-Partition problem, a notoriously hard special case of bin packing, where all item sizes lie in (1/4,1/2]. 我们研究两种随机设置下的在线装箱问题。在装箱问题中，我们给定 n 个尺寸为 (0,1] 的物品，目标是将它们装进最少数量的单位尺寸的装箱中。首先，我们研究独立同分布模型下的装箱，其中物品尺寸是从 (0,1] 的分布中独立且相同地采样的。物品的分布和总数都是未知的。物品一一到达，它们的尺寸在到达时就会显示出来，必须立即不可撤销地包装在尺寸为箱中的物品中。 1. 我们提供了一种简单的元算法，采用离线 $α$ 渐近逼近算法，并为 i.i.d 模型下的在线装箱提供多项式时间 $(α+ \varepsilon)$ 竞争算法，其中 $\varepsilon$>0 是一个小常数，因此我们为在线装箱提供了线性时间 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 竞争算法。然后我们研究随机顺序模型，其中对手指定项目，但项目的到达顺序是从项目的所有排列集中随机抽取的 [SODA'96] 表明，最佳拟合算法在随机顺序模型中的竞争比最多为 3/2，并且推测该比值约为 1.15。即使在特殊情况下，打破 3/2 的障碍也是一个长期存在的问题。最近，Albers 等人 [Algorithmica'21] 显示，当所有项目大小都大于 1/3 时，竞争比可以提高到 5/4。对于这种特殊情况，我们通过证明 Best-Fit 的竞争比为 1 来解决分析。我们通过打破 3-Partition 问题（一个众所周知的困难特殊问题）的障碍，取得了进一步的进展。在装箱的情况下，所有物品尺寸均位于 (1/4,1/2]。 本文研究了在线装箱问题的两种随机模型（i.i.d.模型和随机顺序模型），提出近似最优算法并改进了竞争力分析。 Nikhil Ayyadevara,Rajni Dabas,Arindam Khan,K. V. N. Sreenivas cs.DS

authors_text: Zhaofeng Si,Honggang Qi,Xiaoyu Song
title: Automatic Block-wise Pruning with Auxiliary Gating Structures for Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度卷积神经网络的辅助门结构自动分块剪枝
abstract: Convolutional neural networks are prevailing in deep learning tasks. However, they suffer from massive cost issues when working on mobile devices. Network pruning is an effective method of model compression to handle such problems. This paper presents a novel structured network pruning method with auxiliary gating structures which assigns importance marks to blocks in backbone network as a criterion when pruning. Block-wise pruning is then realized by proposed voting strategy, which is different from prevailing methods who prune a model in small granularity like channel-wise. We further develop a three-stage training scheduling for the proposed architecture incorporating knowledge distillation for better performance. Our experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-arts compression performance for the classification tasks. In addition, our approach can integrate synergistically with other pruning methods by providing pretrained models, thus achieving a better performance than the unpruned model with over 93\% FLOPs reduced.
summary: Convolutional neural networks are prevailing in deep learning tasks. However, they suffer from massive cost issues when working on mobile devices. Network pruning is an effective method of model compression to handle such problems. This paper presents a novel structured network pruning method with auxiliary gating structures which assigns importance marks to blocks in backbone network as a criterion when pruning. Block-wise pruning is then realized by proposed voting strategy, which is different from prevailing methods who prune a model in small granularity like channel-wise. We further develop a three-stage training scheduling for the proposed architecture incorporating knowledge distillation for better performance. Our experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-arts compression performance for the classification tasks. In addition, our approach can integrate synergistically with other pruning methods by providing pretrained models, thus achieving a better performance than the unpruned model with over 93\% FLOPs reduced.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络在深度学习任务中盛行。然而，他们在移动设备上工作时面临着巨大的成本问题。网络剪枝是处理此类问题的有效模型压缩方法。本文提出了一种具有辅助门结构的新型结构化网络剪枝方法，该方法为骨干网络中的块分配重要性标记作为剪枝时的标准。然后通过提出的投票策略实现分块剪枝，这与像通道方式那样以小粒度剪枝模型的流行方法不同。我们进一步为所提出的架构开发了一个三阶段训练调度，结合了知识蒸馏以获得更好的性能。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以为分类任务实现最先进的压缩性能。此外，我们的方法可以通过提供预训练模型与其他剪枝方法协同集成，从而实现比未剪枝模型更好的性能，减少超过 93% 的 FLOPs。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于辅助门控结构的块级结构化剪枝方法，用于深度卷积神经网络的模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络在移动端部署时面临计算成本高的问题，传统细粒度剪枝方法（如通道级）效率不足，需探索更高效的结构化剪枝方案。
AI.method: 设计辅助门控结构对骨干网络块进行重要性标记，通过投票策略实现块级剪枝，并结合三阶段训练计划与知识蒸馏优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在分类任务中达到最先进压缩效果，与其它剪枝方法协同使用可减少超过93%的FLOPs且性能优于原始模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过块级结构化剪枝有效降低计算成本，且具备与现有方法兼容的扩展性，为移动端部署提供新思路。
