authors_text: João Bento Sousa,Ricardo Moreira,Vladimir Balayan,Pedro Saleiro,Pedro Bizarro
title: ConceptDistil: Model-Agnostic Distillation of Concept Explanations
title_zh: ConceptDistil：概念解释的模型不可知蒸馏
abstract: Concept-based explanations aims to fill the model interpretability gap for non-technical humans-in-the-loop. Previous work has focused on providing concepts for specific models (eg, neural networks) or data types (eg, images), and by either trying to extract concepts from an already trained network or training self-explainable models through multi-task learning. In this work, we propose ConceptDistil, a method to bring concept explanations to any black-box classifier using knowledge distillation. ConceptDistil is decomposed into two components:(1) a concept model that predicts which domain concepts are present in a given instance, and (2) a distillation model that tries to mimic the predictions of a black-box model using the concept model predictions. We validate ConceptDistil in a real world use-case, showing that it is able to optimize both tasks, bringing concept-explainability to any black-box model.
summary: Concept-based explanations aims to fill the model interpretability gap for non-technical humans-in-the-loop. Previous work has focused on providing concepts for specific models (eg, neural networks) or data types (eg, images), and by either trying to extract concepts from an already trained network or training self-explainable models through multi-task learning. In this work, we propose ConceptDistil, a method to bring concept explanations to any black-box classifier using knowledge distillation. ConceptDistil is decomposed into two components:(1) a concept model that predicts which domain concepts are present in a given instance, and (2) a distillation model that tries to mimic the predictions of a black-box model using the concept model predictions. We validate ConceptDistil in a real world use-case, showing that it is able to optimize both tasks, bringing concept-explainability to any black-box model.
abstract_zh: 基于概念的解释旨在填补非技术人员在循环中的模型可解释性差距。以前的工作重点是为特定模型（例如神经网络）或数据类型（例如图像）提供概念，并尝试从已训练的网络中提取概念或通过多任务学习训练可自我解释的模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ConceptDistil，一种使用知识蒸馏为任何黑盒分类器带来概念解释的方法。 ConceptDistil 分解为两个组件：(1) 一个概念模型，用于预测给定实例中存在哪些领域概念；(2) 一个蒸馏模型，尝试使用概念模型预测来模拟黑盒模型的预测。我们在现实世界的用例中验证了 ConceptDistil，表明它能够优化这两项任务，为任何黑盒模型带来概念可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConceptDistil方法，通过知识蒸馏为任何黑盒分类器提供概念解释。
AI.motivation: 现有概念解释方法局限于特定模型或数据类型，难以普适性地提升黑盒模型可解释性。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：1）概念模型预测实例中的领域概念；2）蒸馏模型利用概念预测模仿黑盒模型输出。
AI.result: 在真实场景验证中，该方法成功优化概念预测与模型模仿双重任务，实现黑盒模型的概念可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ConceptDistil作为模型无关的方法，有效扩展了概念解释能力至任意黑盒模型，弥合了可解释性鸿沟。

authors_text: Chengdong Lan,Hao Yan,Cheng Luo,Tiesong Zhao
title: GAN-Based Multi-View Video Coding with Spatio-Temporal EPI Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于 GAN 的时空 EPI 重建多视图视频编码
abstract: The introduction of multiple viewpoints in video scenes inevitably increases the bitrates required for storage and transmission. To reduce bitrates, researchers have developed methods to skip intermediate viewpoints during compression and delivery, and ultimately reconstruct them using Side Information (SI). Typically, depth maps are used to construct SI. However, their methods suffer from inaccuracies in reconstruction and inherently high bitrates. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-view video coding method that leverages the image generation capabilities of Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) to improve the reconstruction accuracy of SI. Additionally, we consider incorporating information from adjacent temporal and spatial viewpoints to further reduce SI redundancy. At the encoder, we construct a spatio-temporal Epipolar Plane Image (EPI) and further utilize a convolutional network to extract the latent code of a GAN as SI. At the decoder side, we combine the SI and adjacent viewpoints to reconstruct intermediate views using the GAN generator. Specifically, we establish a joint encoder constraint for reconstruction cost and SI entropy to achieve an optimal trade-off between reconstruction quality and bitrates overhead. Experiments demonstrate significantly improved Rate-Distortion (RD) performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The introduction of multiple viewpoints in video scenes inevitably increases the bitrates required for storage and transmission. To reduce bitrates, researchers have developed methods to skip intermediate viewpoints during compression and delivery, and ultimately reconstruct them using Side Information (SI). Typically, depth maps are used to construct SI. However, their methods suffer from inaccuracies in reconstruction and inherently high bitrates. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-view video coding method that leverages the image generation capabilities of Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) to improve the reconstruction accuracy of SI. Additionally, we consider incorporating information from adjacent temporal and spatial viewpoints to further reduce SI redundancy. At the encoder, we construct a spatio-temporal Epipolar Plane Image (EPI) and further utilize a convolutional network to extract the latent code of a GAN as SI. At the decoder side, we combine the SI and adjacent viewpoints to reconstruct intermediate views using the GAN generator. Specifically, we establish a joint encoder constraint for reconstruction cost and SI entropy to achieve an optimal trade-off between reconstruction quality and bitrates overhead. Experiments demonstrate significantly improved Rate-Distortion (RD) performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 视频场景中多视点的引入不可避免地增加了存储和传输所需的比特率。为了降低比特率，研究人员开发了在压缩和传输过程中跳过中间视点的方法，并最终使用辅助信息（SI）重建它们。通常，深度图用于构建 SI。然而，他们的方法存在重建不准确和固有的高比特率的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多视图视频编码方法，该方法利用生成对抗网络（GAN）的图像生成能力来提高SI的重建精度。此外，我们考虑合并来自相邻时间和空间视点的信息，以进一步减少 SI 冗余。在编码器处，我们构建时空极平面图像（EPI），并进一步利用卷积网络提取 GAN 的潜在代码作为 SI。在解码器端，我们结合 SI 和相邻视点，使用 GAN 生成器重建中间视图。具体来说，我们为重建成本和 SI 熵建立联合编码器约束，以实现重建质量和比特率开销之间的最佳权衡。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，速率失真 (RD) 性能显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的多视角视频编码方法，通过时空EPI重建提升侧信息（SI）的重建精度，从而降低比特率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖深度图构建SI，存在重建不准确和比特率高的问题，需探索更高效的多视角视频压缩方案。
AI.method: 编码端构建时空EPI并提取GAN潜在码作为SI，解码端结合SI与相邻视角通过GAN生成器重建中间视图，联合优化重建代价与SI熵。
AI.result: 实验表明，与最先进方法相比，该方法在率失真（RD）性能上显著提升。

search_text: GAN-Based Multi-View Video Coding with Spatio-Temporal EPI Reconstruction 基于 GAN 的时空 EPI 重建多视图视频编码 The introduction of multiple viewpoints in video scenes inevitably increases the bitrates required for storage and transmission. To reduce bitrates, researchers have developed methods to skip intermediate viewpoints during compression and delivery, and ultimately reconstruct them using Side Information (SI). Typically, depth maps are used to construct SI. However, their methods suffer from inaccuracies in reconstruction and inherently high bitrates. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-view video coding method that leverages the image generation capabilities of Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) to improve the reconstruction accuracy of SI. Additionally, we consider incorporating information from adjacent temporal and spatial viewpoints to further reduce SI redundancy. At the encoder, we construct a spatio-temporal Epipolar Plane Image (EPI) and further utilize a convolutional network to extract the latent code of a GAN as SI. At the decoder side, we combine the SI and adjacent viewpoints to reconstruct intermediate views using the GAN generator. Specifically, we establish a joint encoder constraint for reconstruction cost and SI entropy to achieve an optimal trade-off between reconstruction quality and bitrates overhead. Experiments demonstrate significantly improved Rate-Distortion (RD) performance compared with state-of-the-art methods. 视频场景中多视点的引入不可避免地增加了存储和传输所需的比特率。为了降低比特率，研究人员开发了在压缩和传输过程中跳过中间视点的方法，并最终使用辅助信息（SI）重建它们。通常，深度图用于构建 SI。然而，他们的方法存在重建不准确和固有的高比特率的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多视图视频编码方法，该方法利用生成对抗网络（GAN）的图像生成能力来提高SI的重建精度。此外，我们考虑合并来自相邻时间和空间视点的信息，以进一步减少 SI 冗余。在编码器处，我们构建时空极平面图像（EPI），并进一步利用卷积网络提取 GAN 的潜在代码作为 SI。在解码器端，我们结合 SI 和相邻视点，使用 GAN 生成器重建中间视图。具体来说，我们为重建成本和 SI 熵建立联合编码器约束，以实现重建质量和比特率开销之间的最佳权衡。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，速率失真 (RD) 性能显着提高。 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的多视角视频编码方法，通过时空EPI重建提升侧信息（SI）的重建精度，从而降低比特率。 Chengdong Lan,Hao Yan,Cheng Luo,Tiesong Zhao eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuefeng Tsai,Yicheng Hsu,Mingsian Bai
title: Acoustic echo suppression using a learning-based multi-frame minimum variance distortionless response filter
title_zh: 使用基于学习的多帧最小方差无失真响应滤波器进行声学回声抑制
comment: Submitted to International Workshop on Acoustic Signal Enhancement (IWAENC) 2022
comments: Submitted to International Workshop on Acoustic Signal Enhancement (IWAENC) 2022
abstract: Distortion resulting from acoustic echo suppression (AES) is a common issue in full-duplex communication. To address the distortion problem, a multi-frame minimum variance distortionless response (MFMVDR) filtering technique is proposed. The MFMVDR filter with parameter estimation which was used in speech enhancement problems is extended in this study from a deep learning perspective. To alleviate numerical instability of the MFMVDR filter, we propose to directly estimate the inverse of the correlation matrix. The AES system is advantageous in that no double-talk detection is required. The negative scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio is employed as the loss function in training the network at the output of the MFMVDR filter. Simulation results have demonstrated the efficacy of the proposed learning-based AES system in double-talk, background noise, and nonlinear distortion conditions.
summary: Distortion resulting from acoustic echo suppression (AES) is a common issue in full-duplex communication. To address the distortion problem, a multi-frame minimum variance distortionless response (MFMVDR) filtering technique is proposed. The MFMVDR filter with parameter estimation which was used in speech enhancement problems is extended in this study from a deep learning perspective. To alleviate numerical instability of the MFMVDR filter, we propose to directly estimate the inverse of the correlation matrix. The AES system is advantageous in that no double-talk detection is required. The negative scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio is employed as the loss function in training the network at the output of the MFMVDR filter. Simulation results have demonstrated the efficacy of the proposed learning-based AES system in double-talk, background noise, and nonlinear distortion conditions.
abstract_zh: 声学回声抑制 (AES) 导致的失真是全双工通信中的常见问题。为了解决失真问题，提出了多帧最小方差失真响应（MFMVDR）滤波技术。本研究从深度学习的角度扩展了用于语音增强问题的具有参数估计的 MFMVDR 滤波器。为了减轻 MFMVDR 滤波器的数值不稳定性，我们建议直接估计相关矩阵的逆矩阵。 AES系统的优点在于不需要双端通话检测。在 MFMVDR 滤波器输出端训练网络时，采用负尺度不变信号失真比作为损失函数。仿真结果证明了所提出的基于学习的 AES 系统在双向通话、背景噪声和非线性失真条件下的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的多帧最小方差无失真响应（MFMVDR）滤波器，用于解决全双工通信中的声学回声抑制（AES）失真问题。
AI.motivation: 传统AES方法在双讲场景、背景噪声和非线性失真条件下易产生失真，且需依赖双讲检测机制，存在数值不稳定性问题。
AI.method: 从深度学习角度扩展MFMVDR滤波器，直接估计相关矩阵的逆以提升数值稳定性，并采用负尺度不变信噪比（SI-SNR）作为网络训练损失函数。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该系统在双讲、背景噪声和非线性失真条件下均能有效抑制回声，无需双讲检测即可保持语音质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于学习的AES系统通过深度学习优化MFMVDR滤波器参数，有效解决了传统方法的稳定性与检测依赖问题，提升了全双工通信的语音清晰度。

authors_text: Tiesong Zhao,Yuhang Huang,Weize Feng,Yiwen Xu,Sam Kwong
title: Efficient VVC Intra Prediction Based on Deep Feature Fusion and Probability Estimation
title_zh: 基于深度特征融合和概率估计的高效VVC帧内预测
abstract: The ever-growing multimedia traffic has underscored the importance of effective multimedia codecs. Among them, the up-to-date lossy video coding standard, Versatile Video Coding (VVC), has been attracting attentions of video coding community. However, the gain of VVC is achieved at the cost of significant encoding complexity, which brings the need to realize fast encoder with comparable Rate Distortion (RD) performance. In this paper, we propose to optimize the VVC complexity at intra-frame prediction, with a two-stage framework of deep feature fusion and probability estimation. At the first stage, we employ the deep convolutional network to extract the spatialtemporal neighboring coding features. Then we fuse all reference features obtained by different convolutional kernels to determine an optimal intra coding depth. At the second stage, we employ a probability-based model and the spatial-temporal coherence to select the candidate partition modes within the optimal coding depth. Finally, these selected depths and partitions are executed whilst unnecessary computations are excluded. Experimental results on standard database demonstrate the superiority of proposed method, especially for High Definition (HD) and Ultra-HD (UHD) video sequences.
summary: The ever-growing multimedia traffic has underscored the importance of effective multimedia codecs. Among them, the up-to-date lossy video coding standard, Versatile Video Coding (VVC), has been attracting attentions of video coding community. However, the gain of VVC is achieved at the cost of significant encoding complexity, which brings the need to realize fast encoder with comparable Rate Distortion (RD) performance. In this paper, we propose to optimize the VVC complexity at intra-frame prediction, with a two-stage framework of deep feature fusion and probability estimation. At the first stage, we employ the deep convolutional network to extract the spatialtemporal neighboring coding features. Then we fuse all reference features obtained by different convolutional kernels to determine an optimal intra coding depth. At the second stage, we employ a probability-based model and the spatial-temporal coherence to select the candidate partition modes within the optimal coding depth. Finally, these selected depths and partitions are executed whilst unnecessary computations are excluded. Experimental results on standard database demonstrate the superiority of proposed method, especially for High Definition (HD) and Ultra-HD (UHD) video sequences.
abstract_zh: 不断增长的多媒体流量凸显了有效多媒体编解码器的重要性。其中，最新的有损视频编码标准通用视频编码（VVC）一直吸引着视频编码界的关注。然而，VVC 的增益是以显着编码复杂性为代价实现的，这就需要实现具有可比率失真（RD）性能的快速编码器。在本文中，我们建议通过深度特征融合和概率估计的两阶段框架来优化帧内预测的 VVC 复杂度。在第一阶段，我们采用深度卷积网络来提取时空相邻编码特征。然后我们融合不同卷积核获得的所有参考特征来确定最佳帧内编码深度。在第二阶段，我们采用基于概率的模型和时空相干性来选择最佳编码深度内的候选划分模式。最后，执行这些选定的深度和分区，同时排除不必要的计算。标准数据库上的实验结果证明了该方法的优越性，特别是对于高清（HD）和超高清（UHD）视频序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度特征融合与概率估计的高效VVC帧内预测方法，以降低编码复杂度。
AI.motivation: VVC虽性能优越但编码复杂度高，亟需在保持率失真性能的同时实现快速编码。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段通过卷积网络提取时空特征并融合生成最优编码深度；第二阶段基于概率模型与时空一致性筛选候选分区模式。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在HD/UHD视频序列中显著优于现有方法，有效降低计算量。
AI.conclusion: 深度特征融合与概率估计结合可高效优化VVC帧内预测复杂度，兼顾性能与速度。

search_text: Efficient VVC Intra Prediction Based on Deep Feature Fusion and Probability Estimation 基于深度特征融合和概率估计的高效VVC帧内预测 The ever-growing multimedia traffic has underscored the importance of effective multimedia codecs. At the second stage, we employ a probability-based model and the spatial-temporal coherence to select the candidate partition modes within the optimal coding depth. Finally, these selected depths and partitions are executed whilst unnecessary computations are excluded. Experimental results on standard database demonstrate the superiority of proposed method, especially for High Definition (HD) and Ultra-HD (UHD) video sequences. 不断增长的多媒体流量凸显了有效多媒体编解码器的重要性。其中，最新的有损视频编码标准通用视频编码（VVC）一直吸引着视频编码界的关注。然而，VVC 的增益是以显着编码复杂性为代价实现的，这就需要实现具有可比率失真（RD）性能的快速编码器。在本文中，我们建议通过深度特征融合和概率估计的两阶段框架来优化帧内预测的 VVC 复杂度。在第一阶段，我们采用深度卷积网络来提取时空相邻编码特征。然后我们融合不同卷积核获得的所有参考特征来确定最佳帧内编码深度。在第二阶段，我们采用基于概率的模型和时空相干性来选择最佳编码深度内的候选划分模式。最后，执行这些选定的深度和分区，同时排除不必要的计算。标准数据库上的实验结果证明了该方法的优越性，特别是对于高清（HD）和超高清（UHD）视频序列。 本文提出基于深度特征融合与概率估计的高效VVC帧内预测方法，以降低编码复杂度。 Tiesong Zhao,Yuhang Huang,Weize Feng,Yiwen Xu,Sam Kwong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Keke Zhang,Tiesong Zhao,Weiling Chen,Yuzhen Niu,Jinsong Hu
title: SPQE: Structure-and-Perception-Based Quality Evaluation for Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: SPQE：基于结构和感知的图像超分辨率质量评估
abstract: The image Super-Resolution (SR) technique has greatly improved the visual quality of images by enhancing their resolutions. It also calls for an efficient SR Image Quality Assessment (SR-IQA) to evaluate those algorithms or their generated images. In this paper, we focus on the SR-IQA under deep learning and propose a Structure-and-Perception-based Quality Evaluation (SPQE). In emerging deep-learning-based SR, a generated high-quality, visually pleasing image may have different structures from its corresponding low-quality image. In such case, how to balance the quality scores between no-reference perceptual quality and referenced structural similarity is a critical issue. To help ease this problem, we give a theoretical analysis on this tradeoff and further calculate adaptive weights for the two types of quality scores. We also propose two deep-learning-based regressors to model the no-reference and referenced scores. By combining the quality scores and their weights, we propose a unified SPQE metric for SR-IQA. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-arts in different datasets.
summary: The image Super-Resolution (SR) technique has greatly improved the visual quality of images by enhancing their resolutions. It also calls for an efficient SR Image Quality Assessment (SR-IQA) to evaluate those algorithms or their generated images. In this paper, we focus on the SR-IQA under deep learning and propose a Structure-and-Perception-based Quality Evaluation (SPQE). In emerging deep-learning-based SR, a generated high-quality, visually pleasing image may have different structures from its corresponding low-quality image. In such case, how to balance the quality scores between no-reference perceptual quality and referenced structural similarity is a critical issue. To help ease this problem, we give a theoretical analysis on this tradeoff and further calculate adaptive weights for the two types of quality scores. We also propose two deep-learning-based regressors to model the no-reference and referenced scores. By combining the quality scores and their weights, we propose a unified SPQE metric for SR-IQA. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-arts in different datasets.
abstract_zh: 图像超分辨率（SR）技术通过提高图像的分辨率，极大地提高了图像的视觉质量。它还需要高效的 SR 图像质量评估 (SR-IQA) 来评估这些算法或其生成的图像。在本文中，我们专注于深度学习下的SR-IQA，并提出了基于结构和感知的质量评估（SPQE）。在新兴的基于深度学习的 SR 中，生成的高质量、视觉上令人愉悦的图像可能与其相应的低质量图像具有不同的结构。在这种情况下，如何平衡无参考感知质量和参考结构相似性之间的质量分数是一个关键问题。为了帮助缓解这个问题，我们对这种权衡进行了理论分析，并进一步计算了两种类型质量分数的自适应权重。我们还提出了两个基于深度学习的回归器来对无参考和参考分数进行建模。通过结合质量得分及其权重，我们为 SR-IQA 提出了统一的 SPQE 指标。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在不同数据集中优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构与感知质量的图像超分辨率评估方法SPQE，以解决深度学习超分辨率图像质量评估中结构相似性与感知质量的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率图像质量评估方法难以有效平衡无参考感知质量与参考结构相似性的评分，需通过自适应权重计算解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 通过理论分析确定质量评分的自适应权重，设计无参考和参考感知质量回归器，结合结构相似性与感知质量得分生成统一的SPQE评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明SPQE在多个数据集上优于现有最先进方法，有效提升了超分辨率图像质量评估的准确性。
AI.conclusion: SPQE通过结构-感知联合建模实现了更合理的质量评估，为深度学习超分辨率算法的优化提供了有效评价工具。

authors_text: Yanxiang Gong,Linjie Deng,Shuai Tao,Xinchen Lu,Peicheng Wu,Zhiwei Xie,Zheng Ma,Mei Xie
title: Unified Chinese License Plate Detection and Recognition with High Efficiency
title_zh: 统一中文车牌检测识别，高效
abstract: Recently, deep learning-based methods have reached an excellent performance on License Plate (LP) detection and recognition tasks. However, it is still challenging to build a robust model for Chinese LPs since there are not enough large and representative datasets. In this work, we propose a new dataset named Chinese Road Plate Dataset (CRPD) that contains multi-objective Chinese LP images as a supplement to the existing public benchmarks. The images are mainly captured with electronic monitoring systems with detailed annotations. To our knowledge, CRPD is the largest public multi-objective Chinese LP dataset with annotations of vertices. With CRPD, a unified detection and recognition network with high efficiency is presented as the baseline. The network is end-to-end trainable with totally real-time inference efficiency (30 fps with 640p). The experiments on several public benchmarks demonstrate that our method has reached competitive performance. The code and dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/yxgong0/CRPD.
summary: Recently, deep learning-based methods have reached an excellent performance on License Plate (LP) detection and recognition tasks. However, it is still challenging to build a robust model for Chinese LPs since there are not enough large and representative datasets. In this work, we propose a new dataset named Chinese Road Plate Dataset (CRPD) that contains multi-objective Chinese LP images as a supplement to the existing public benchmarks. The images are mainly captured with electronic monitoring systems with detailed annotations. To our knowledge, CRPD is the largest public multi-objective Chinese LP dataset with annotations of vertices. With CRPD, a unified detection and recognition network with high efficiency is presented as the baseline. The network is end-to-end trainable with totally real-time inference efficiency (30 fps with 640p). The experiments on several public benchmarks demonstrate that our method has reached competitive performance. The code and dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/yxgong0/CRPD.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于深度学习的方法在车牌（LP）检测和识别任务上取得了优异的性能。然而，由于没有足够大且有代表性的数据集，为中国LP建立稳健的模型仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为中国路牌数据集（CRPD）的新数据集，其中包含多目标中国车牌图像，作为现有公共基准的补充。这些图像主要是通过电子监控系统捕获的，并有详细的注释。据我们所知，CRPD 是最大的带有顶点注释的公共多目标中文 LP 数据集。 CRPD提出了一个高效的统一检测和识别网络作为基线。该网络是端到端可训练的，具有完全实时的推理效率（640p 时为 30 fps）。在几个公共基准上的实验表明我们的方法已经达到了有竞争力的性能。代码和数据集将在 https://github.com/yxgong0/CRPD 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效统一的中文车牌检测与识别方法，并构建了大规模公开数据集CRPD以支持相关研究。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在中文车牌任务上因缺乏足够大且具有代表性的数据集而难以构建鲁棒模型。
AI.method: 构建包含多目标中文车牌图像的CRPD数据集，并设计端到端可训练的统一检测识别网络，实现实时推理（30fps）。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准测试中达到竞争性性能，代码和数据集已公开发布。
AI.conclusion: CRPD数据集和高效网络为中文车牌检测识别提供了有效解决方案，推动了该领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Weiling Chen,Rongfu Lin,Honggang Liao,Tiesong Zhao,Ke Gu,Patrick Le Callet
title: Utility-Oriented Underwater Image Quality Assessment Based on Transfer Learning
title_zh: 基于迁移学习的面向实用的水下图像质量评估
abstract: The widespread image applications have greatly promoted the vision-based tasks, in which the Image Quality Assessment (IQA) technique has become an increasingly significant issue. For user enjoyment in multimedia systems, the IQA exploits image fidelity and aesthetics to characterize user experience; while for other tasks such as popular object recognition, there exists a low correlation between utilities and perceptions. In such cases, the fidelity-based and aesthetics-based IQA methods cannot be directly applied. To address this issue, this paper proposes a utility-oriented IQA in object recognition. In particular, we initialize our research in the scenario of underwater fish detection, which is a critical task that has not yet been perfectly addressed. Based on this task, we build an Underwater Image Utility Database (UIUD) and a learning-based Underwater Image Utility Measure (UIUM). Inspired by the top-down design of fidelity-based IQA, we exploit the deep models of object recognition and transfer their features to our UIUM. Experiments validate that the proposed transfer-learning-based UIUM achieves promising performance in the recognition task. We envision our research provides insights to bridge the researches of IQA and computer vision.
summary: The widespread image applications have greatly promoted the vision-based tasks, in which the Image Quality Assessment (IQA) technique has become an increasingly significant issue. For user enjoyment in multimedia systems, the IQA exploits image fidelity and aesthetics to characterize user experience; while for other tasks such as popular object recognition, there exists a low correlation between utilities and perceptions. In such cases, the fidelity-based and aesthetics-based IQA methods cannot be directly applied. To address this issue, this paper proposes a utility-oriented IQA in object recognition. In particular, we initialize our research in the scenario of underwater fish detection, which is a critical task that has not yet been perfectly addressed. Based on this task, we build an Underwater Image Utility Database (UIUD) and a learning-based Underwater Image Utility Measure (UIUM). Inspired by the top-down design of fidelity-based IQA, we exploit the deep models of object recognition and transfer their features to our UIUM. Experiments validate that the proposed transfer-learning-based UIUM achieves promising performance in the recognition task. We envision our research provides insights to bridge the researches of IQA and computer vision.
abstract_zh: 广泛的图像应用极大地促进了基于视觉的任务，其中图像质量评估（IQA）技术已成为一个日益重要的问题。为了让用户享受多媒体系统，IQA 利用图像保真度和美观来描述用户体验；而对于其他任务，例如流行的物体识别，效用和感知之间存在较低的相关性。在这种情况下，基于保真度和基于美观的IQA方法不能直接应用。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种面向实用程序的物体识别IQA。特别是，我们开始了水下鱼类检测场景的研究，这是一项尚未得到完美解决的关键任务。基于此任务，我们构建了水下图像效用数据库（UIUD）和基于学习的水下图像效用测量（UIUM）。受到基于保真度的 IQA 自上而下设计的启发，我们利用对象识别的深层模型并将其特征转移到我们的 UIUM 中。实验验证了所提出的基于迁移学习的 UIUM 在识别任务中取得了良好的性能。我们希望我们的研究能够为连接 IQA 和计算机视觉的研究提供见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于迁移学习的面向实用性的水下图像质量评估方法，专注于水下鱼类检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法侧重于图像保真度和美学，但与目标识别等任务的实用性关联较低，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 构建水下图像实用数据库（UIUD）和基于学习的实用度量模型（UIUM），通过迁移学习将目标识别模型特征迁移到UIUM中。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于迁移学习的UIUM在识别任务中表现出色，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为连接图像质量评估与计算机视觉任务提供了新思路，尤其在实用导向的场景中具有潜力。

search_text: Utility-Oriented Underwater Image Quality Assessment Based on Transfer Learning 基于迁移学习的面向实用的水下图像质量评估 The widespread image applications have greatly promoted the vision-based tasks, in which the Image Quality Assessment (IQA) technique has become an increasingly significant issue. For user enjoyment in multimedia systems, the IQA exploits image fidelity and aesthetics to characterize user experience; while for other tasks such as popular object recognition, there exists a low correlation between utilities and perceptions. In such cases, the fidelity-based and aesthetics-based IQA methods cannot be directly applied. To address this issue, this paper proposes a utility-oriented IQA in object recognition. In particular, we initialize our research in the scenario of underwater fish detection, which is a critical task that has not yet been perfectly addressed. Based on this task, we build an Underwater Image Utility Database (UIUD) and a learning-based Underwater Image Utility Measure (UIUM). Inspired by the top-down design of fidelity-based IQA, we exploit the deep models of object recognition and transfer their features to our UIUM. Experiments validate that the proposed transfer-learning-based UIUM achieves promising performance in the recognition task. We envision our research provides insights to bridge the researches of IQA and computer vision. 广泛的图像应用极大地促进了基于视觉的任务，其中图像质量评估（IQA）技术已成为一个日益重要的问题。为了让用户享受多媒体系统，IQA 利用图像保真度和美观来描述用户体验；而对于其他任务，例如流行的物体识别，效用和感知之间存在较低的相关性。在这种情况下，基于保真度和基于美观的IQA方法不能直接应用。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种面向实用程序的物体识别IQA。特别是，我们开始了水下鱼类检测场景的研究，这是一项尚未得到完美解决的关键任务。基于此任务，我们构建了水下图像效用数据库（UIUD）和基于学习的水下图像效用测量（UIUM）。受到基于保真度的 IQA 自上而下设计的启发，我们利用对象识别的深层模型并将其特征转移到我们的 UIUM 中。实验验证了所提出的基于迁移学习的 UIUM 在识别任务中取得了良好的性能。我们希望我们的研究能够为连接 IQA 和计算机视觉的研究提供见解。 本文提出了一种基于迁移学习的面向实用性的水下图像质量评估方法，专注于水下鱼类检测任务。 Weiling Chen,Rongfu Lin,Honggang Liao,Tiesong Zhao,Ke Gu,Patrick Le Callet cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Vincent Le Guen
title: Deep learning for spatio-temporal forecasting -- application to solar energy
title_zh: 时空预测的深度学习——在太阳能中的应用
abstract: This thesis tackles the subject of spatio-temporal forecasting with deep learning. The motivating application at Electricity de France (EDF) is short-term solar energy forecasting with fisheye images. We explore two main research directions for improving deep forecasting methods by injecting external physical knowledge. The first direction concerns the role of the training loss function. We show that differentiable shape and temporal criteria can be leveraged to improve the performances of existing models. We address both the deterministic context with the proposed DILATE loss function and the probabilistic context with the STRIPE model. Our second direction is to augment incomplete physical models with deep data-driven networks for accurate forecasting. For video prediction, we introduce the PhyDNet model that disentangles physical dynamics from residual information necessary for prediction, such as texture or details. We further propose a learning framework (APHYNITY) that ensures a principled and unique linear decomposition between physical and data-driven components under mild assumptions, leading to better forecasting performances and parameter identification.
summary: This thesis tackles the subject of spatio-temporal forecasting with deep learning. The motivating application at Electricity de France (EDF) is short-term solar energy forecasting with fisheye images. We explore two main research directions for improving deep forecasting methods by injecting external physical knowledge. The first direction concerns the role of the training loss function. We show that differentiable shape and temporal criteria can be leveraged to improve the performances of existing models. We address both the deterministic context with the proposed DILATE loss function and the probabilistic context with the STRIPE model. Our second direction is to augment incomplete physical models with deep data-driven networks for accurate forecasting. For video prediction, we introduce the PhyDNet model that disentangles physical dynamics from residual information necessary for prediction, such as texture or details. We further propose a learning framework (APHYNITY) that ensures a principled and unique linear decomposition between physical and data-driven components under mild assumptions, leading to better forecasting performances and parameter identification.
abstract_zh: 本论文研究了深度学习的时空预测主题。法国电力 (EDF) 的主要应用是利用鱼眼图像进行短期太阳能预测。我们探索了通过注入外部物理知识来改进深度预测方法的两个主要研究方向。第一个方向涉及训练损失函数的作用。我们表明，可以利用可微的形状和时间标准来提高现有模型的性能。我们使用所提出的 DILATE 损失函数来处理确定性上下文，并使用 STRIPE 模型来处理概率性上下文。我们的第二个方向是通过深度数据驱动的网络来增强不完整的物理模型，以实现准确的预测。对于视频预测，我们引入了 PhyDNet 模型，该模型将物理动力学与预测所需的残余信息（例如纹理或细节）分开。我们进一步提出了一个学习框架（APHYNITY），确保在温和的假设下物理和数据驱动组件之间有原则且独特的线性分解，从而实现更好的预测性能和参数识别。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何利用深度学习改进时空预测方法，并将其应用于法国电力公司（EDF）的短期太阳能预测，通过引入物理知识提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: EDF需要基于鱼眼图像的短期太阳能预测，但现有深度学习模型在时空预测中存在不足，需通过注入物理知识提高准确性。
AI.method: 提出两种改进方向：1）设计可微分的形状与时序损失函数（DILATE用于确定性预测，STRIPE用于概率预测）；2）结合物理模型与数据驱动网络（PhyDNet分离物理动态与残差信息，APHYNITY框架实现物理与数据驱动组件的线性分解）。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在视频预测和太阳能预测任务中均取得更优的预测性能和参数识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 将物理知识嵌入深度学习模型能有效提升时空预测的准确性，为能源领域提供更可靠的预测工具。

authors_text: Bing Li,Jiaxin Chen,Dongming Zhang,Xiuguo Bao,Di Huang
title: Representation Learning for Compressed Video Action Recognition via Attentive Cross-modal Interaction with Motion Enhancement
title_zh: 通过运动增强的专注跨模式交互进行压缩视频动作识别的表示学习
abstract: Compressed video action recognition has recently drawn growing attention, since it remarkably reduces the storage and computational cost via replacing raw videos by sparsely sampled RGB frames and compressed motion cues (e.g., motion vectors and residuals). However, this task severely suffers from the coarse and noisy dynamics and the insufficient fusion of the heterogeneous RGB and motion modalities. To address the two issues above, this paper proposes a novel framework, namely Attentive Cross-modal Interaction Network with Motion Enhancement (MEACI-Net). It follows the two-stream architecture, i.e. one for the RGB modality and the other for the motion modality. Particularly, the motion stream employs a multi-scale block embedded with a denoising module to enhance representation learning. The interaction between the two streams is then strengthened by introducing the Selective Motion Complement (SMC) and Cross-Modality Augment (CMA) modules, where SMC complements the RGB modality with spatio-temporally attentive local motion features and CMA further combines the two modalities with selective feature augmentation. Extensive experiments on the UCF-101, HMDB-51 and Kinetics-400 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of MEACI-Net.
summary: Compressed video action recognition has recently drawn growing attention, since it remarkably reduces the storage and computational cost via replacing raw videos by sparsely sampled RGB frames and compressed motion cues (e.g., motion vectors and residuals). However, this task severely suffers from the coarse and noisy dynamics and the insufficient fusion of the heterogeneous RGB and motion modalities. To address the two issues above, this paper proposes a novel framework, namely Attentive Cross-modal Interaction Network with Motion Enhancement (MEACI-Net). It follows the two-stream architecture, i.e. one for the RGB modality and the other for the motion modality. Particularly, the motion stream employs a multi-scale block embedded with a denoising module to enhance representation learning. The interaction between the two streams is then strengthened by introducing the Selective Motion Complement (SMC) and Cross-Modality Augment (CMA) modules, where SMC complements the RGB modality with spatio-temporally attentive local motion features and CMA further combines the two modalities with selective feature augmentation. Extensive experiments on the UCF-101, HMDB-51 and Kinetics-400 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of MEACI-Net.
abstract_zh: 压缩视频动作识别最近引起了越来越多的关注，因为它通过用稀疏采样的 RGB 帧和压缩运动线索（例如运动向量和残差）替换原始视频，显着降低了存储和计算成本。然而，该任务严重受到粗糙和噪声动态以及异构 RGB 和运动模式融合不足的影响。为了解决上述两个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的框架，即带有运动增强的注意力跨模态交互网络（MEACI-Net）。它遵循双流架构，即一个用于 RGB 模式，另一个用于运动模式。特别是，运动流采用嵌入去噪模块的多尺度块来增强表示学习。然后通过引入选择性运动补充（SMC）和跨模态增强（CMA）模块来加强两个流之间的交互，其中SMC通过时空关注局部运动特征补充RGB模态，而CMA进一步将两种模态与选择性特征增强结合起来。 UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 Kinetics-400 基准的大量实验证明了 MEACI-Net 的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MEACI-Net的新型框架，通过注意力机制和跨模态交互增强压缩视频的动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 压缩视频动作识别因存储和计算成本低而受到关注，但存在动态信息粗糙、噪声大以及RGB与运动模态融合不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用双流架构处理RGB和运动模态，运动流引入多尺度去噪模块，通过选择性运动补全（SMC）和跨模态增强（CMA）模块强化模态间交互。
AI.result: 在UCF-101、HMDB-51和Kinetics-400基准测试中验证了MEACI-Net的有效性和效率。
AI.conclusion: MEACI-Net通过增强运动特征和跨模态融合，显著提升了压缩视频动作识别的准确率与鲁棒性。

search_text: Representation Learning for Compressed Video Action Recognition via Attentive Cross-modal Interaction with Motion Enhancement 通过运动增强的专注跨模式交互进行压缩视频动作识别的表示学习 Compressed video action recognition has recently drawn growing attention, since it remarkably reduces the storage and computational cost via replacing raw videos by sparsely sampled RGB frames and compressed motion cues (e.g., motion vectors and residuals). However, this task severely suffers from the coarse and noisy dynamics and the insufficient fusion of the heterogeneous RGB and motion modalities. To address the two issues above, this paper proposes a novel framework, namely Attentive Cross-modal Interaction Network with Motion Enhancement (MEACI-Net). It follows the two-stream architecture, i.e. one for the RGB modality and the other for the motion modality. Particularly, the motion stream employs a multi-scale block embedded with a denoising module to enhance representation learning. The interaction between the two streams is then strengthened by introducing the Selective Motion Complement (SMC) and Cross-Modality Augment (CMA) modules, where SMC complements the RGB modality with spatio-temporally attentive local motion features and CMA further combines the two modalities with selective feature augmentation. Extensive experiments on the UCF-101, HMDB-51 and Kinetics-400 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of MEACI-Net. 压缩视频动作识别最近引起了越来越多的关注，因为它通过用稀疏采样的 RGB 帧和压缩运动线索（例如运动向量和残差）替换原始视频，显着降低了存储和计算成本。然而，该任务严重受到粗糙和噪声动态以及异构 RGB 和运动模式融合不足的影响。为了解决上述两个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的框架，即带有运动增强的注意力跨模态交互网络（MEACI-Net）。它遵循双流架构，即一个用于 RGB 模式，另一个用于运动模式。特别是，运动流采用嵌入去噪模块的多尺度块来增强表示学习。然后通过引入选择性运动补充（SMC）和跨模态增强（CMA）模块来加强两个流之间的交互，其中SMC通过时空关注局部运动特征补充RGB模态，而CMA进一步将两种模态与选择性特征增强结合起来。 UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 Kinetics-400 基准的大量实验证明了 MEACI-Net 的有效性和效率。 本文提出一种名为MEACI-Net的新型框架，通过注意力机制和跨模态交互增强压缩视频的动作识别性能。 Bing Li,Jiaxin Chen,Dongming Zhang,Xiuguo Bao,Di Huang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tsubasa Ochiai,Marc Delcroix,Tomohiro Nakatani,Shoko Araki
title: Mask-based Neural Beamforming for Moving Speakers with Self-Attention-based Tracking
title_zh: 用于具有自注意力跟踪功能的移动扬声器的基于掩模的神经波束形成
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, Submitted to IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, Submitted to IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
abstract: Beamforming is a powerful tool designed to enhance speech signals from the direction of a target source. Computing the beamforming filter requires estimating spatial covariance matrices (SCMs) of the source and noise signals. Time-frequency masks are often used to compute these SCMs. Most studies of mask-based beamforming have assumed that the sources do not move. However, sources often move in practice, which causes performance degradation. In this paper, we address the problem of mask-based beamforming for moving sources. We first review classical approaches to tracking a moving source, which perform online or blockwise computation of the SCMs. We show that these approaches can be interpreted as computing a sum of instantaneous SCMs weighted by attention weights. These weights indicate which time frames of the signal to consider in the SCM computation. Online or blockwise computation assumes a heuristic and deterministic way of computing these attention weights that, although simple, may not result in optimal performance. We thus introduce a learning-based framework that computes optimal attention weights for beamforming. We achieve this using a neural network implemented with self-attention layers. We show experimentally that our proposed framework can greatly improve beamforming performance in moving source situations while maintaining high performance in non-moving situations, thus enabling the development of mask-based beamformers robust to source movements.
summary: Beamforming is a powerful tool designed to enhance speech signals from the direction of a target source. Computing the beamforming filter requires estimating spatial covariance matrices (SCMs) of the source and noise signals. Time-frequency masks are often used to compute these SCMs. Most studies of mask-based beamforming have assumed that the sources do not move. However, sources often move in practice, which causes performance degradation. In this paper, we address the problem of mask-based beamforming for moving sources. We first review classical approaches to tracking a moving source, which perform online or blockwise computation of the SCMs. We show that these approaches can be interpreted as computing a sum of instantaneous SCMs weighted by attention weights. These weights indicate which time frames of the signal to consider in the SCM computation. Online or blockwise computation assumes a heuristic and deterministic way of computing these attention weights that, although simple, may not result in optimal performance. We thus introduce a learning-based framework that computes optimal attention weights for beamforming. We achieve this using a neural network implemented with self-attention layers. We show experimentally that our proposed framework can greatly improve beamforming performance in moving source situations while maintaining high performance in non-moving situations, thus enabling the development of mask-based beamformers robust to source movements.
abstract_zh: 波束成形是一种强大的工具，旨在增强来自目标源方向的语音信号。计算波束形成滤波器需要估计源信号和噪声信号的空间协方差矩阵 (SCM)。时频掩模通常用于计算这些 SCM。大多数基于掩模的波束形成的研究都假设源不移动。然而，在实践中源经常发生移动，这会导致性能下降。在本文中，我们解决了移动源的基于掩模的波束形成问题。我们首先回顾跟踪移动源的经典方法，该方法执行 SCM 的在线或块式计算。我们证明这些方法可以解释为计算按注意力权重加权的瞬时 SCM 之和。这些权重指示在 SCM 计算中要考虑信号的哪些时间帧。在线或分块计算采用启发式和确定性的方式来计算这些注意力权重，虽然简单，但可能不会产生最佳性能。因此，我们引入了一个基于学习的框架，用于计算波束成形的最佳注意力权重。我们使用带有自注意力层的神经网络来实现这一点。我们通过实验证明，我们提出的框架可以极大地提高移动源情况下的波束形成性能，同时在非移动情况下保持高性能，从而能够开发对源移动鲁棒的基于掩模的波束形成器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自注意力机制的神经网络框架，用于改进移动声源的掩码波束成形技术。
AI.motivation: 传统掩码波束成形方法假设声源静止，但在实际场景中移动声源会导致性能下降，需开发对运动鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过自注意力层学习最优注意力权重，替代传统启发式方法，动态调整时空协方差矩阵计算中的时间帧权重。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在移动声源场景下显著提升波束成形性能，同时保持静止声源场景的高精度。
AI.conclusion: 基于自注意力的框架可有效提升掩码波束成形对移动声源的鲁棒性，为实际应用提供新思路。

search_text: Mask-based Neural Beamforming for Moving Speakers with Self-Attention-based Tracking 用于具有自注意力跟踪功能的移动扬声器的基于掩模的神经波束形成 Beamforming is a powerful tool designed to enhance speech signals from the direction of a target source. authors_text: Maria Victorova,Heidi Hin Ting Lau,Timothy Tin-Yan Lee,David Navarro-Alarcon,Yongping Zheng
title: Reliability of Robotic Ultrasound Scanning for Scoliosis Assessment in Comparison with Manual Scanning
title_zh: 与手动扫描相比，机器人超声扫描评估脊柱侧凸的可靠性
abstract: Background: Ultrasound (US) imaging for scoliosis assessment is challenging for a non-experienced operator. The robotic scanning was developed to follow a spinal curvature with deep learning and apply consistent forces to the patient' back. Methods: 23 scoliosis patients were scanned with US devices both, robotically and manually. Two human raters measured each subject's spinous process angles (SPA) on robotic and manual coronal images. Results: The robotic method showed high intra- (ICC > 0.85) and inter-rater (ICC > 0.77) reliabilities. Compared with the manual method, the robotic approach showed no significant difference (p < 0.05) when measuring coronal deformity angles. The MAD for intra-rater analysis lies within an acceptable range from 0 deg to 5 deg for a minimum of 86% and a maximum 97% of a total number of the measured angles. Conclusions: This study demonstrated that scoliosis deformity angles measured on ultrasound images obtained with robotic scanning are comparable to those obtained by manual scanning.
summary: Background: Ultrasound (US) imaging for scoliosis assessment is challenging for a non-experienced operator. The robotic scanning was developed to follow a spinal curvature with deep learning and apply consistent forces to the patient' back. Methods: 23 scoliosis patients were scanned with US devices both, robotically and manually. Two human raters measured each subject's spinous process angles (SPA) on robotic and manual coronal images. Results: The robotic method showed high intra- (ICC > 0.85) and inter-rater (ICC > 0.77) reliabilities. Compared with the manual method, the robotic approach showed no significant difference (p < 0.05) when measuring coronal deformity angles. The MAD for intra-rater analysis lies within an acceptable range from 0 deg to 5 deg for a minimum of 86% and a maximum 97% of a total number of the measured angles. Conclusions: This study demonstrated that scoliosis deformity angles measured on ultrasound images obtained with robotic scanning are comparable to those obtained by manual scanning.
abstract_zh: 背景：用于脊柱侧凸评估的超声（US）成像对于没有经验的操作者来说是具有挑战性的。机器人扫描的开发目的是通过深度学习来跟踪脊柱弯曲，并向患者的背部施加一致的力。方法：使用美国设备对 23 名脊柱侧弯患者进行机器人和手动扫描。两名人类评估员在机器人和手动冠状图像上测量了每个受试者的棘突角 (SPA)。结果：机器人方法显示出较高的内部（ICC > 0.85）和评估者间（ICC > 0.77）可靠性。与手动方法相比，机器人方法在测量冠状畸形角度时没有显着差异（p < 0.05）。对于测量角度总数的最小 86% 和最大 97%，用于评估者内分析的 MAD 位于从 0 度到 5 度的可接受范围内。结论：这项研究表明，通过机器人扫描获得的超声图像测量的脊柱侧弯畸形角度与通过手动扫描获得的结果相当。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了机器人超声扫描与手动扫描在脊柱侧弯评估中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 由于非专业操作者在使用超声成像评估脊柱侧弯时面临挑战，因此开发了机器人扫描技术以提高一致性和准确性。
AI.method: 研究对23名脊柱侧弯患者进行了机器人和手动超声扫描，两名人类评分者分别测量了冠状位图像上的棘突角度。
AI.result: 机器人方法显示了高内部和评分者间可靠性（ICC > 0.85和ICC > 0.77），与手动方法相比在测量冠状畸形角度上无显著差异（p < 0.05）。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，使用机器人扫描获得的超声图像测量的脊柱侧弯畸形角度与手动扫描结果相当。

authors_text: Shi-Xue Zhang,Xiaobin Zhu,Jie-Bo Hou,Xu-Cheng Yin
title: Graph Fusion Network for Multi-Oriented Object Detection
title_zh: 用于多方向目标检测的图融合网络
abstract: In object detection, non-maximum suppression (NMS) methods are extensively adopted to remove horizontal duplicates of detected dense boxes for generating final object instances. However, due to the degraded quality of dense detection boxes and not explicit exploration of the context information, existing NMS methods via simple intersection-over-union (IoU) metrics tend to underperform on multi-oriented and long-size objects detection. Distinguishing with general NMS methods via duplicate removal, we propose a novel graph fusion network, named GFNet, for multi-oriented object detection. Our GFNet is extensible and adaptively fuse dense detection boxes to detect more accurate and holistic multi-oriented object instances. Specifically, we first adopt a locality-aware clustering algorithm to group dense detection boxes into different clusters. We will construct an instance sub-graph for the detection boxes belonging to one cluster. Then, we propose a graph-based fusion network via Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to learn to reason and fuse the detection boxes for generating final instance boxes. Extensive experiments both on public available multi-oriented text datasets (including MSRA-TD500, ICDAR2015, ICDAR2017-MLT) and multi-oriented object datasets (DOTA) verify the effectiveness and robustness of our method against general NMS methods in multi-oriented object detection.
summary: In object detection, non-maximum suppression (NMS) methods are extensively adopted to remove horizontal duplicates of detected dense boxes for generating final object instances. However, due to the degraded quality of dense detection boxes and not explicit exploration of the context information, existing NMS methods via simple intersection-over-union (IoU) metrics tend to underperform on multi-oriented and long-size objects detection. Distinguishing with general NMS methods via duplicate removal, we propose a novel graph fusion network, named GFNet, for multi-oriented object detection. Our GFNet is extensible and adaptively fuse dense detection boxes to detect more accurate and holistic multi-oriented object instances. Specifically, we first adopt a locality-aware clustering algorithm to group dense detection boxes into different clusters. We will construct an instance sub-graph for the detection boxes belonging to one cluster. Then, we propose a graph-based fusion network via Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to learn to reason and fuse the detection boxes for generating final instance boxes. Extensive experiments both on public available multi-oriented text datasets (including MSRA-TD500, ICDAR2015, ICDAR2017-MLT) and multi-oriented object datasets (DOTA) verify the effectiveness and robustness of our method against general NMS methods in multi-oriented object detection.
abstract_zh: 在目标检测中，广泛采用非极大值抑制（NMS）方法来去除检测到的密集框的水平重复项，以生成最终的目标实例。然而，由于密集检测框的质量下降以及对上下文信息的不明确探索，现有的通过简单交并集（IoU）指标的 NMS 方法往往在多方向和长尺寸物体检测上表现不佳。与通过重复去除的一般 NMS 方法不同，我们提出了一种新颖的图融合网络，称为 GFNet，用于多方向目标检测。我们的 GFNet 是可扩展的，可以自适应地融合密集检测框，以检测更准确、更全面的多方向对象实例。具体来说，我们首先采用局部感知聚类算法将密集的检测框分组到不同的簇中。我们将为属于一个簇的检测框构建一个实例子图。然后，我们通过图卷积网络（GCN）提出基于图的融合网络，以学习推理和融合检测框以生成最终实例框。在公共可用的多向文本数据集（包括 MSRA-TD500、ICDAR2015、ICDAR2017-MLT）和多向对象数据集（DOTA）上进行的大量实验验证了我们的方法相对于多向对象检测中的通用 NMS 方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GFNet的图融合网络，用于改进多方向和长尺寸物体检测中的非极大值抑制（NMS）方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于交并比（IoU）的NMS方法在处理密集检测框和多方向物体时表现不佳，因未充分利用上下文信息且检测框质量下降。
AI.method: 采用局部感知聚类算法将密集检测框分组为簇，构建实例子图，并通过图卷积网络（GCN）学习融合检测框生成最终实例框。
AI.result: 在MSRA-TD500、ICDAR2015等多方向文本和物体数据集上验证了GFNet的有效性和鲁棒性，优于传统NMS方法。
AI.conclusion: GFNet通过自适应融合检测框并结合上下文信息，显著提升了多方向物体检测的准确性。

Our GFNet is extensible and adaptively fuse dense detection boxes to detect more accurate and holistic multi-oriented object instances. Specifically, we first adopt a locality-aware clustering algorithm to group dense detection boxes into different clusters. We will construct an instance sub-graph for the detection boxes belonging to one cluster. Then, we propose a graph-based fusion network via Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to learn to reason and fuse the detection boxes for generating final instance boxes. Extensive experiments both on public available multi-oriented text datasets (including MSRA-TD500, ICDAR2015, ICDAR2017-MLT) and multi-oriented object datasets (DOTA) verify the effectiveness and robustness of our method against general NMS methods in multi-oriented object detection. 在目标检测中，广泛采用非极大值抑制（NMS）方法来去除检测到的密集框的水平重复项，以生成最终的目标实例。然而，由于密集检测框的质量下降以及对上下文信息的不明确探索，现有的通过简单交并集（IoU）指标的 NMS 方法往往在多方向和长尺寸物体检测上表现不佳。与通过重复去除的一般 NMS 方法不同，我们提出了一种新颖的图融合网络，称为 GFNet，用于多方向目标检测。我们的 GFNet 是可扩展的，可以自适应地融合密集检测框，以检测更准确、更全面的多方向对象实例。具体来说，我们首先采用局部感知聚类算法将密集的检测框分组到不同的簇中。我们将为属于一个簇的检测框构建一个实例子图。然后，我们通过图卷积网络（GCN）提出基于图的融合网络，以学习推理和融合检测框以生成最终实例框。在公共可用的多向文本数据集（包括 MSRA-TD500、ICDAR2015、ICDAR2017-MLT）和多向对象数据集（DOTA）上进行的大量实验验证了我们的方法相对于多向对象检测中的通用 NMS 方法的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出一种名为GFNet的图融合网络，用于改进多方向和长尺寸物体检测中的非极大值抑制（NMS）方法。 Shi-Xue Zhang,Xiaobin Zhu,Jie-Bo Hou,Xu-Cheng Yin cs.CV

authors_text: Zheng Chen,Jian Zhao,Mingyu Yang,Wengang Zhou,Houqiang Li
title: Multi-Target Active Object Tracking with Monte Carlo Tree Search and Target Motion Modeling
title_zh: 使用蒙特卡罗树搜索和目标运动建模进行多目标主动物体跟踪
abstract: In this work, we are dedicated to multi-target active object tracking (AOT), where there are multiple targets as well as multiple cameras in the environment. The goal is maximize the overall target coverage of all cameras. Previous work makes a strong assumption that each camera is fixed in a location and only allowed to rotate, which limits its application. In this work, we relax the setting by allowing all cameras to both move along the boundary lines and rotate. In our setting, the action space becomes much larger, which leads to much higher computational complexity to identify the optimal action. To this end, we propose to leverage the action selection from multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) network to prune the search tree of Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) method, so as to find the optimal action more efficiently. Besides, we model the motion of the targets to predict the future position of the targets, which makes a better estimation of the future environment state in the MCTS process. We establish a multi-target 2D environment to simulate the sports games, and experimental results demonstrate that our method can effectively improve the target coverage.
summary: In this work, we are dedicated to multi-target active object tracking (AOT), where there are multiple targets as well as multiple cameras in the environment. The goal is maximize the overall target coverage of all cameras. Previous work makes a strong assumption that each camera is fixed in a location and only allowed to rotate, which limits its application. In this work, we relax the setting by allowing all cameras to both move along the boundary lines and rotate. In our setting, the action space becomes much larger, which leads to much higher computational complexity to identify the optimal action. To this end, we propose to leverage the action selection from multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) network to prune the search tree of Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) method, so as to find the optimal action more efficiently. Besides, we model the motion of the targets to predict the future position of the targets, which makes a better estimation of the future environment state in the MCTS process. We establish a multi-target 2D environment to simulate the sports games, and experimental results demonstrate that our method can effectively improve the target coverage.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们致力于多目标主动对象跟踪（AOT），其中环境中存在多个目标以及多个摄像机。目标是最大化所有摄像机的总体目标覆盖范围。之前的工作强烈假设每个相机都固定在一个位置并且只允许旋转，这限制了其应用。在这项工作中，我们通过允许所有摄像机沿着边界线移动和旋转来放松设置。在我们的设置中，动作空间变得更大，这导致识别最佳动作的计算复杂性更高。为此，我们建议利用多智能体强化学习（MARL）网络的动作选择来修剪蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）方法的搜索树，从而更有效地找到最优动作。此外，我们对目标的运动进行建模来预测目标的未来位置，这使得MCTS过程中可以更好地估计未来的环境状态。我们建立了多目标2D环境来模拟体育比赛，实验结果表明我们的方法可以有效提高目标覆盖率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多目标主动物体跟踪问题，通过允许摄像头移动和旋转以最大化覆盖范围。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设摄像头固定位置仅可旋转，限制了实际应用。本文放松约束，允许摄像头移动和旋转，但导致计算复杂度增加。
AI.method: 结合多智能体强化学习（MARL）网络剪枝蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的搜索树，并通过目标运动模型预测未来位置。
AI.result: 在模拟体育比赛的2D环境中，实验表明方法有效提升了目标覆盖范围。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合MARL与运动建模，方法在复杂环境中高效找到最优动作，实现更优覆盖效果。

authors_text: Yuanbo Wen,Tao Gao,Jing Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Ting Chen
title: From heavy rain removal to detail restoration: A faster and better network
title_zh: 从大雨清除到细节恢复：更快更好的网络
abstract: The profound accumulation of precipitation during intense rainfall events can markedly degrade the quality of images, leading to the erosion of textural details. Despite the improvements observed in existing learning-based methods specialized for heavy rain removal, it is discerned that a significant proportion of these methods tend to overlook the precise reconstruction of the intricate details. In this work, we introduce a simple dual-stage progressive enhancement network, denoted as DPENet, aiming to achieve effective deraining while preserving the structural accuracy of rain-free images. This approach comprises two key modules, a rain streaks removal network (R$^2$Net) focusing on accurate rain removal, and a details reconstruction network (DRNet) designed to recover the textural details of rain-free images. Firstly, we introduce a dilated dense residual block (DDRB) within R$^2$Net, enabling the aggregation of high-level and low-level features. Secondly, an enhanced residual pixel-wise attention block (ERPAB) is integrated into DRNet to facilitate the incorporation of contextual information. To further enhance the fidelity of our approach, we employ a comprehensive loss function that accentuates both the marginal and regional accuracy of rain-free images. Extensive experiments conducted on publicly available benchmarks demonstrates the noteworthy efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed DPENet. The source code and pre-trained models are currently available at \url{https://github.com/chdwyb/DPENet}.
summary: The profound accumulation of precipitation during intense rainfall events can markedly degrade the quality of images, leading to the erosion of textural details. Despite the improvements observed in existing learning-based methods specialized for heavy rain removal, it is discerned that a significant proportion of these methods tend to overlook the precise reconstruction of the intricate details. In this work, we introduce a simple dual-stage progressive enhancement network, denoted as DPENet, aiming to achieve effective deraining while preserving the structural accuracy of rain-free images. This approach comprises two key modules, a rain streaks removal network (R$^2$Net) focusing on accurate rain removal, and a details reconstruction network (DRNet) designed to recover the textural details of rain-free images. Firstly, we introduce a dilated dense residual block (DDRB) within R$^2$Net, enabling the aggregation of high-level and low-level features. Secondly, an enhanced residual pixel-wise attention block (ERPAB) is integrated into DRNet to facilitate the incorporation of contextual information. To further enhance the fidelity of our approach, we employ a comprehensive loss function that accentuates both the marginal and regional accuracy of rain-free images. Extensive experiments conducted on publicly available benchmarks demonstrates the noteworthy efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed DPENet. The source code and pre-trained models are currently available at \url{https://github.com/chdwyb/DPENet}.
abstract_zh: 强降雨事件期间降水的深度积累会显着降低图像质量，导致纹理细节受到侵蚀。尽管在现有的专门用于去除大雨的基于学习的方法中观察到了改进，但我们发现这些方法中很大一部分往往忽视了复杂细节的精确重建。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种简单的双阶段渐进增强网络，表示为 DPENet，旨在实现有效的去雨，同时保持无雨图像的结构精度。该方法包括两个关键模块，一个专注于精确除雨的雨条纹去除网络（R$^2$Net），以及一个旨在恢复无雨图像的纹理细节的细节重建网络（DRNet）。首先，我们在 R$^2$Net 中引入了扩张密集残差块（DDRB），从而实现了高级和低级特征的聚合。其次，将增强型残差像素注意块（ERPAB）集成到 DRNet 中，以促进上下文信息的合并。为了进一步提高我们方法的保真度，我们采用了综合损失函数，增强了无雨图像的边缘和区域精度。在公开可用的基准上进行的广泛实验证明了我们提出的 DPENet 的显着效率和有效性。源代码和预训练模型目前可在 \url{https://github.com/chdwyb/DPENet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DPENet的双阶段渐进增强网络，用于有效去除图像中的强降雨并恢复雨天图像的纹理细节。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的强降雨去除方法在去除雨水时往往忽视了对图像纹理细节的精确重建，导致雨天图像质量下降。
AI.method: DPENet包含两个核心模块：专注于精确去雨的R²Net和用于恢复雨天图像纹理细节的DRNet。R²Net引入空洞密集残差块（DDRB）以聚合高低层次特征，DRNet集成增强残差像素级注意力块（ERPAB）以结合上下文信息，并采用综合损失函数提升图像保真度。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上的实验表明，DPENet在效率和效果上均优于现有方法，源代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: DPENet通过双阶段网络设计和创新模块有效解决了强降雨去除与细节恢复的矛盾，为雨天图像增强提供了新思路。

search_text: From heavy rain removal to detail restoration: A faster and better network 从大雨清除到细节恢复：更快更好的网络 The profound accumulation of precipitation during intense rainfall events can markedly degrade the quality of images, leading to the erosion of textural details. Despite the improvements observed in existing learning-based methods specialized for heavy rain removal, it is discerned that a significant proportion of these methods tend to overlook the precise reconstruction of the intricate details. In this work, we introduce a simple dual-stage progressive enhancement network, denoted as DPENet, aiming to achieve effective deraining while preserving the structural accuracy of rain-free images. This approach comprises two key modules, a rain streaks removal network (R$^2$Net) focusing on accurate rain removal, and a details reconstruction network (DRNet) designed to recover the textural details of rain-free images. Firstly, we introduce a dilated dense residual block (DDRB) within R$^2$Net, enabling the aggregation of high-level and low-level features. Secondly, an enhanced residual pixel-wise attention block (ERPAB) is integrated into DRNet to facilitate the incorporation of contextual information. To further enhance the fidelity of our approach, we employ a comprehensive loss function that accentuates both the marginal and regional accuracy of rain-free images. Extensive experiments conducted on publicly available benchmarks demonstrates the noteworthy efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed DPENet. The source code and pre-trained models are currently available at \url{https://github.com/chdwyb/DPENet}. 强降雨事件期间降水的深度积累会显着降低图像质量，导致纹理细节受到侵蚀。尽管在现有的专门用于去除大雨的基于学习的方法中观察到了改进，但我们发现这些方法中很大一部分往往忽视了复杂细节的精确重建。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种简单的双阶段渐进增强网络，表示为 DPENet，旨在实现有效的去雨，同时保持无雨图像的结构精度。该方法包括两个关键模块，一个专注于精确除雨的雨条纹去除网络（R$^2$Net），以及一个旨在恢复无雨图像的纹理细节的细节重建网络（DRNet）。首先，我们在 R$^2$Net 中引入了扩张密集残差块（DDRB），从而实现了高级和低级特征的聚合。其次，将增强型残差像素注意块（ERPAB）集成到 DRNet 中，以促进上下文信息的合并。为了进一步提高我们方法的保真度，我们采用了综合损失函数，增强了无雨图像的边缘和区域精度。在公开可用的基准上进行的广泛实验证明了我们提出的 DPENet 的显着效率和有效性。源代码和预训练模型目前可在 \url{https://github.com/chdwyb/DPENet} 获取。 本文提出一种名为DPENet的双阶段渐进增强网络，用于有效去除图像中的强降雨并恢复雨天图像的纹理细节。 Yuanbo Wen,Tao Gao,Jing Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Ting Chen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Hikaru Sasaki,Terushi Hirabayashi,Kaoru Kawabata,Takamitsu Matsubara
title: Gaussian Process Self-triggered Policy Search in Weakly Observable Environments
title_zh: 弱可观测环境中的高斯过程自触发策略搜索
abstract: The environments of such large industrial machines as waste cranes in waste incineration plants are often weakly observable, where little information about the environmental state is contained in the observations due to technical difficulty or maintenance cost (e.g., no sensors for observing the state of the garbage to be handled). Based on the findings that skilled operators in such environments choose predetermined control strategies (e.g., grasping and scattering) and their durations based on sensor values, %thereby improving the robustness of their actions, we propose a novel non-parametric policy search algorithm: Gaussian process self-triggered policy search (GPSTPS). GPSTPS has two types of control policies: action and duration. A gating mechanism either maintains the action selected by the action policy for the duration specified by the duration policy or updates the action and duration by passing new observations to the policy; therefore, it is categorized as self-triggered. GPSTPS simultaneously learns both policies by trial and error based on sparse GP priors and variational learning to maximize the return. To verify the performance of our proposed method, we conducted experiments on garbage-grasping-scattering task for a waste crane with weak observations using a simulation and a robotic waste crane system. As experimental results, the proposed method acquired suitable policies to determine the action and duration based on the garbage's characteristics.
summary: The environments of such large industrial machines as waste cranes in waste incineration plants are often weakly observable, where little information about the environmental state is contained in the observations due to technical difficulty or maintenance cost (e.g., no sensors for observing the state of the garbage to be handled). Based on the findings that skilled operators in such environments choose predetermined control strategies (e.g., grasping and scattering) and their durations based on sensor values, %thereby improving the robustness of their actions, we propose a novel non-parametric policy search algorithm: Gaussian process self-triggered policy search (GPSTPS). GPSTPS has two types of control policies: action and duration. A gating mechanism either maintains the action selected by the action policy for the duration specified by the duration policy or updates the action and duration by passing new observations to the policy; therefore, it is categorized as self-triggered. GPSTPS simultaneously learns both policies by trial and error based on sparse GP priors and variational learning to maximize the return. To verify the performance of our proposed method, we conducted experiments on garbage-grasping-scattering task for a waste crane with weak observations using a simulation and a robotic waste crane system. As experimental results, the proposed method acquired suitable policies to determine the action and duration based on the garbage's characteristics.
abstract_zh: 垃圾焚烧厂中的垃圾起重机等大型工业机械的环境往往是可观测性较弱的，由于技术难度或维护成本（例如没有用于观测待处理垃圾状态的传感器），观测中包含的环境状态信息很少。基于在此类环境中熟练操作员根据传感器值选择预定控制策略（例如抓取和分散）及其持续时间的研究结果，从而提高其动作的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种新颖的非参数策略搜索算法：高斯过程自触发策略搜索（GPSTPS）。 GPSTPS有两种类型的控制策略：动作和持续时间。门控机制要么在持续时间策略指定的持续时间内维持操作策略选择的操作，要么通过向策略传递新的观察来更新操作和持续时间；因此，它被归类为自触发。 GPSTPS 基于稀疏 GP 先验和变分学习，通过反复试验同时学习两种策略，以最大化回报。为了验证我们提出的方法的性能，我们使用模拟和机器人垃圾起重机系统对观测较弱的垃圾起重机进行垃圾抓取撒播任务的实验。作为实验结果，该方法根据垃圾的特性获得了合适的策略来确定操作和持续时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对弱可观测环境（如废料起重机）的高斯过程自触发策略搜索算法（GPSTPS），以解决传感器信息不足下的控制策略学习问题。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中弱可观测环境因传感器限制导致状态信息缺失，传统方法难以学习有效策略，而经验操作员能通过预设策略和持续时间调整实现鲁棒控制，需设计类似机制的算法。
AI.method: GPSTPS包含动作与持续时间双策略，通过门控机制在维持当前动作或更新动作/持续时间之间自触发决策，结合稀疏高斯过程先验与变分学习同步优化策略以最大化回报。
AI.result: 在垃圾抓取-散开任务的仿真与实际机器人系统中验证，算法能根据垃圾特性学习到合适的动作及持续时间策略，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: GPSTPS成功解决了弱可观测环境下的策略学习难题，为工业控制场景提供了可落地的自适应控制方法。

authors_text: Yuzhu Li,Tairan Liu,Hatice Ceylan Koydemir,Hongda Wang,Keelan O'Riordan,Bijie Bai,Yuta Haga,Junji Kobashi,Hitoshi Tanaka,Takaya Tamaru,Kazunori Yamaguchi,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Deep Learning-enabled Detection and Classification of Bacterial Colonies using a Thin Film Transistor (TFT) Image Sensor
title_zh: 使用薄膜晶体管 (TFT) 图像传感器进行深度学习的细菌菌落检测和分类
abstract: Early detection and identification of pathogenic bacteria such as Escherichia coli (E. coli) is an essential task for public health. The conventional culture-based methods for bacterial colony detection usually take >24 hours to get the final read-out. Here, we demonstrate a bacterial colony-forming-unit (CFU) detection system exploiting a thin-film-transistor (TFT)-based image sensor array that saves ~12 hours compared to the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)-approved methods. To demonstrate the efficacy of this CFU detection system, a lensfree imaging modality was built using the TFT image sensor with a sample field-of-view of ~10 cm^2. Time-lapse images of bacterial colonies cultured on chromogenic agar plates were automatically collected at 5-minute intervals. Two deep neural networks were used to detect and count the growing colonies and identify their species. When blindly tested with 265 colonies of E. coli and other coliform bacteria (i.e., Citrobacter and Klebsiella pneumoniae), our system reached an average CFU detection rate of 97.3% at 9 hours of incubation and an average recovery rate of 91.6% at ~12 hours. This TFT-based sensor can be applied to various microbiological detection methods. Due to the large scalability, ultra-large field-of-view, and low cost of the TFT-based image sensors, this platform can be integrated with each agar plate to be tested and disposed of after the automated CFU count. The imaging field-of-view of this platform can be cost-effectively increased to >100 cm^2 to provide a massive throughput for CFU detection using, e.g., roll-to-roll manufacturing of TFTs as used in the flexible display industry.

Due to the large scalability, ultra-large field-of-view, and low cost of the TFT-based image sensors, this platform can be integrated with each agar plate to be tested and disposed of after the automated CFU count. The imaging field-of-view of this platform can be cost-effectively increased to >100 cm^2 to provide a massive throughput for CFU detection using, e.g., roll-to-roll manufacturing of TFTs as used in the flexible display industry.
abstract_zh: 早期检测和鉴定大肠杆菌等致病菌是公共卫生的一项重要任务。传统的基于培养的细菌菌落检测方法通常需要 24 小时以上才能获得最终读数。在这里，我们展示了一种细菌菌落形成单位 (CFU) 检测系统，该系统利用基于薄膜晶体管 (TFT) 的图像传感器阵列，与环境保护局 (EPA) 批准的方法相比，该系统可节省约 12 小时。为了证明该 CFU 检测系统的功效，使用 TFT 图像传感器构建了无透镜成像模式，样本视场约为 10 cm^2。以 5 分钟的间隔自动收集在显色琼脂板上培养的细菌菌落的延时图像。使用两个深度神经网络来检测和计数正在生长的菌落并识别它们的物种。当对 265 个大肠杆菌和其他大肠菌菌落（即柠檬酸杆菌和肺炎克雷伯菌）进行盲测时，我们的系统在孵育 9 小时时平均 CFU 检出率为 97.3%，在约 12 小时时平均回收率为 91.6%。这种基于TFT的传感器可应用于各种微生物检测方法。由于基于TFT的图像传感器的大可扩展性、超大视场和低成本，该平台可以与每个琼脂板集成，以在自动CFU计数后进行测试和处理。该平台的成像视场可以经济高效地增加至 >100 cm^2，从而为 CFU 检测提供巨大的吞吐量，例如使用柔性显示器行业中使用的 TFT 卷对卷制造。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于薄膜晶体管（TFT）图像传感器和深度学习的细菌菌落检测与分类系统，显著缩短检测时间。
AI.motivation: 传统细菌培养方法需超24小时才能获得结果，无法满足公共卫生对快速检测的需求，亟需高效替代方案。
AI.method: 构建无透镜成像系统，利用TFT传感器阵列采集培养皿时间序列图像，通过两个深度神经网络实现菌落检测、计数及物种分类。
AI.result: 在265个大肠杆菌等菌株盲测中，9小时检测准确率达97.3%，12小时回收率达91.6%，且传感器可扩展至100 cm²视场。
AI.conclusion: 该TFT平台具备低成本、高通量特性，可集成于培养皿实现自动化检测，为微生物分析提供新型解决方案。

search_text: Deep Learning-enabled Detection and Classification of Bacterial Colonies using a Thin Film Transistor (TFT) Image Sensor 使用薄膜晶体管 (TFT) 图像传感器进行深度学习的细菌菌落检测和分类 Early detection and identification of pathogenic bacteria such as Escherichia coli (E. coli) is an essential task for public health. The conventional culture-based methods for bacterial colony detection usually take >24 hours to get the final read-out. Here, we demonstrate a bacterial colony-forming-unit (CFU) detection system exploiting a thin-film-transistor (TFT)-based image sensor array that saves ~12 hours compared to the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)-approved methods. To demonstrate the efficacy of this CFU detection system, a lensfree imaging modality was built using the TFT image sensor with a sample field-of-view of ~10 cm^2. Time-lapse images of bacterial colonies cultured on chromogenic agar plates were automatically collected at 5-minute intervals. Two deep neural networks were used to detect and count the growing colonies and identify their species. When blindly tested with 265 colonies of E. coli and other coliform bacteria (i.e., Citrobacter and Klebsiella pneumoniae), our system reached an average CFU detection rate of 97.3% at 9 hours of incubation and an average recovery rate of 91.6% at ~12 hours. This TFT-based sensor can be applied to various microbiological detection methods. Due to the large scalability, ultra-large field-of-view, and low cost of the TFT-based image sensors, this platform can be integrated with each agar plate to be tested and disposed of after the automated CFU count. The imaging field-of-view of this platform can be cost-effectively increased to >100 cm^2 to provide a massive throughput for CFU detection using, e.g., roll-to-roll manufacturing of TFTs as used in the flexible display industry. 早期检测和鉴定大肠杆菌等致病菌是公共卫生的一项重要任务。传统的基于培养的细菌菌落检测方法通常需要 24 小时以上才能获得最终读数。在这里，我们展示了一种细菌菌落形成单位 (CFU) 检测系统，该系统利用基于薄膜晶体管 (TFT) 的图像传感器阵列，与环境保护局 (EPA) 批准的方法相比，该系统可节省约 12 小时。为了证明该 CFU 检测系统的功效，使用 TFT 图像传感器构建了无透镜成像模式，样本视场约为 10 cm^2。以 5 分钟的间隔自动收集在显色琼脂板上培养的细菌菌落的延时图像。使用两个深度神经网络来检测和计数正在生长的菌落并识别它们的物种。当对 265 个大肠杆菌和其他大肠菌菌落（即柠檬酸杆菌和肺炎克雷伯菌）进行盲测时，我们的系统在孵育 9 小时时平均 CFU 检出率为 97.3%，在约 12 小时时平均回收率为 91.6%。这种基于TFT的传感器可应用于各种微生物检测方法。由于基于TFT的图像传感器的大可扩展性、超大视场和低成本，该平台可以与每个琼脂板集成，以在自动CFU计数后进行测试和处理。该平台的成像视场可以经济高效地增加至 >100 cm^2，从而为 CFU 检测提供巨大的吞吐量，例如使用柔性显示器行业中使用的 TFT 卷对卷制造。 本文提出一种基于薄膜晶体管（TFT）图像传感器和深度学习的细菌菌落检测与分类系统，显著缩短检测时间。 Yuzhu Li,Tairan Liu,Hatice Ceylan Koydemir,Hongda Wang,Keelan O'Riordan,Bijie Bai,Yuta Haga,Junji Kobashi,Hitoshi Tanaka,Takaya Tamaru,Kazunori Yamaguchi,Aydogan Ozcan physics.ins-det,cs.CV,eess.IV,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Binghui Wang,Youqi Li,Pan Zhou
title: Bandits for Structure Perturbation-based Black-box Attacks to Graph Neural Networks with Theoretical Guarantees
title_zh: Bandits 用于基于结构扰动的黑盒攻击，以理论保证图神经网络
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many graph-based tasks such as node classification and graph classification. However, many recent works have demonstrated that an attacker can mislead GNN models by slightly perturbing the graph structure. Existing attacks to GNNs are either under the less practical threat model where the attacker is assumed to access the GNN model parameters, or under the practical black-box threat model but consider perturbing node features that are shown to be not enough effective. In this paper, we aim to bridge this gap and consider black-box attacks to GNNs with structure perturbation as well as with theoretical guarantees. We propose to address this challenge through bandit techniques. Specifically, we formulate our attack as an online optimization with bandit feedback. This original problem is essentially NP-hard due to the fact that perturbing the graph structure is a binary optimization problem. We then propose an online attack based on bandit optimization which is proven to be {sublinear} to the query number $T$, i.e., $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{N}T^{3/4})$ where $N$ is the number of nodes in the graph. Finally, we evaluate our proposed attack by conducting experiments over multiple datasets and GNN models. The experimental results on various citation graphs and image graphs show that our attack is both effective and efficient. Source code is available at~\url{https://github.com/Metaoblivion/Bandit_GNN_Attack}
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many graph-based tasks such as node classification and graph classification. However, many recent works have demonstrated that an attacker can mislead GNN models by slightly perturbing the graph structure. Existing attacks to GNNs are either under the less practical threat model where the attacker is assumed to access the GNN model parameters, or under the practical black-box threat model but consider perturbing node features that are shown to be not enough effective. In this paper, we aim to bridge this gap and consider black-box attacks to GNNs with structure perturbation as well as with theoretical guarantees. We propose to address this challenge through bandit techniques. Specifically, we formulate our attack as an online optimization with bandit feedback. This original problem is essentially NP-hard due to the fact that perturbing the graph structure is a binary optimization problem. We then propose an online attack based on bandit optimization which is proven to be {sublinear} to the query number $T$, i.e., $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{N}T^{3/4})$ where $N$ is the number of nodes in the graph. Finally, we evaluate our proposed attack by conducting experiments over multiple datasets and GNN models. The experimental results on various citation graphs and image graphs show that our attack is both effective and efficient. Source code is available at~\url{https://github.com/Metaoblivion/Bandit_GNN_Attack}
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在许多基于图的任务（例如节点分类和图分类）中实现了最先进的性能。然而，最近的许多工作表明，攻击者可以通过稍微扰乱图结构来误导 GNN 模型。现有的对 GNN 的攻击要么是在不太实际的威胁模型下，假设攻击者访问 GNN 模型参数，要么是在实际的黑盒威胁模型下，但考虑到扰动节点特征，这些特征被证明是不够有效的。在本文中，我们的目标是弥合这一差距，并考虑对具有结构扰动和理论保证的 GNN 进行黑盒攻击。我们建议通过强盗技术来应对这一挑战。具体来说，我们将我们的攻击制定为带有强盗反馈的在线优化。这个原始问题本质上是 NP 困难的，因为扰动图结构是一个二元优化问题。然后，我们提出一种基于强盗优化的在线攻击，该攻击被证明对于查询数 $T$ 是{次线性}的，即 $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{N}T^{3/4})$，其中 $N$ 是图中的节点数。最后，我们通过对多个数据集和 GNN 模型进行实验来评估我们提出的攻击。在各种引文图和图像图上的实验结果表明，我们的攻击既有效又高效。源代码位于~\url{https://github.com/Metaoblivion/Bandit_GNN_Attack}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构扰动的黑盒攻击方法，用于攻击图神经网络，并提供了理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有的图神经网络攻击方法要么假设攻击者可以访问模型参数（不现实），要么仅考虑节点特征扰动（效果不佳）。因此，需要一种在黑盒威胁模型下，使用结构扰动进行攻击的方法，并具有理论保证。
AI.method: 作者将攻击问题建模为具有带反馈的在线优化问题，并使用多臂老虎机技术进行求解。提出了一个在线攻击算法，其查询复杂度为 $\\mathcal{O}(\\sqrt{N}T^{3/4})$。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和图神经网络模型上进行实验，结果表明该攻击方法既有效又高效。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种基于结构扰动的黑盒攻击方法，并通过理论分析和实验验证了其有效性与高效性。

authors_text: Wei Peng,Yue Hu,Yuqiang Xie,Luxi Xing,Yajing Sun
title: CogIntAc: Modeling the Relationships between Intention, Emotion and Action in Interactive Process from Cognitive Perspective
title_zh: CogIntAc：从认知角度建模交互过程中意图、情感和行动之间的关系
abstract: Intention, emotion and action are important psychological factors in human activities, which play an important role in the interaction between individuals. How to model the interaction process between individuals by analyzing the relationship of their intentions, emotions, and actions at the cognitive level is challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel cognitive framework of individual interaction. The core of the framework is that individuals achieve interaction through external action driven by their inner intention. Based on this idea, the interactions between individuals can be constructed by establishing relationships between the intention, emotion and action. Furthermore, we conduct analysis on the interaction between individuals and give a reasonable explanation for the predicting results. To verify the effectiveness of the framework, we reconstruct a dataset and propose three tasks as well as the corresponding baseline models, including action abduction, emotion prediction and action generation. The novel framework shows an interesting perspective on mimicking the mental state of human beings in cognitive science.
summary: Intention, emotion and action are important psychological factors in human activities, which play an important role in the interaction between individuals. How to model the interaction process between individuals by analyzing the relationship of their intentions, emotions, and actions at the cognitive level is challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel cognitive framework of individual interaction. The core of the framework is that individuals achieve interaction through external action driven by their inner intention. Based on this idea, the interactions between individuals can be constructed by establishing relationships between the intention, emotion and action. Furthermore, we conduct analysis on the interaction between individuals and give a reasonable explanation for the predicting results. To verify the effectiveness of the framework, we reconstruct a dataset and propose three tasks as well as the corresponding baseline models, including action abduction, emotion prediction and action generation. The novel framework shows an interesting perspective on mimicking the mental state of human beings in cognitive science.
abstract_zh: 意图、情感和行动是人类活动中重要的心理因素，在个体之间的交往中发挥着重要作用。如何通过在认知层面分析个体的意图、情绪和行为的关系来建模个体之间的交互过程是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的个体交互认知框架。该框架的核心是个体在其内在意图的驱动下通过外部行动实现互动。基于这一思想，个体之间的互动可以通过建立意图、情感和行动之间的关系来构建。此外，我们对个体之间的相互作用进行了分析，并对预测结果给出了合理的解释。为了验证该框架的有效性，我们重建了一个数据集，并提出了三个任务以及相应的基线模型，包括动作绑架、情绪预测和动作生成。这个新颖的框架展示了在认知科学中模仿人类心理状态的有趣视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CogIntAc框架，从认知角度建模个体交互过程中意图、情绪与行动之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 人类交互中意图、情绪与行动的关联机制复杂，现有方法难以有效模拟认知层面的心理状态交互过程。
AI.method: 构建以内在意图驱动外部行动为核心的认知框架，通过建立三者间关系实现交互建模，并设计动作归因、情绪预测和动作生成任务验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 框架在重构数据集上展现出对心理状态模拟的有效性，能合理解释预测结果并完成三项任务的基线模型验证。
AI.conclusion: CogIntAc为认知科学中模拟人类心智状态提供了新颖视角，揭示了意图-情绪-行动关系在交互过程中的关键作用。
