search_text: CogIntAc: Modeling the Relationships between Intention, Emotion and Action in Interactive Process from Cognitive Perspective CogIntAc：从认知角度建模交互过程中意图、情感和行动之间的关系 Intention, emotion and action are important psychological factors in human activities, which play an important role in the interaction between individuals. How to model the interaction process between individuals by analyzing the relationship of their intentions, emotions, and actions at the cognitive level is challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel cognitive framework of individual interaction. The core of the framework is that individuals achieve interaction through external action driven by their inner intention. Based on this idea, the interactions between individuals can be constructed by establishing relationships between the intention, emotion and action. Furthermore, we conduct analysis on the interaction between individuals and give a reasonable explanation for the predicting results. To verify the effectiveness of the framework, we reconstruct a dataset and propose three tasks as well as the corresponding baseline models, including action abduction, emotion prediction and action generation. The novel framework shows an interesting perspective on mimicking the mental state of human beings in cognitive science. 意图、情感和行动是人类活动中重要的心理因素，在个体之间的交往中发挥着重要作用。如何通过在认知层面分析个体的意图、情绪和行为的关系来建模个体之间的交互过程是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的个体交互认知框架。该框架的核心是个体在其内在意图的驱动下通过外部行动实现互动。基于这一思想，个体之间的互动可以通过建立意图、情感和行动之间的关系来构建。此外，我们对个体之间的相互作用进行了分析，并对预测结果给出了合理的解释。为了验证该框架的有效性，我们重建了一个数据集，并提出了三个任务以及相应的基线模型，包括动作绑架、情绪预测和动作生成。这个新颖的框架展示了在认知科学中模仿人类心理状态的有趣视角。 本文提出CogIntAc框架，从认知角度建模个体交互过程中意图、情绪与行动之间的关系。 Wei Peng,Yue Hu,Yuqiang Xie,Luxi Xing,Yajing Sun cs.HC,cs.CL

authors_text: Ajeet Kumar Dwivedi
title: Anomaly Detection in Intra-Vehicle Networks
title_zh: 车内网络异常检测
abstract: The progression of innovation and technology and ease of inter-connectivity among networks has allowed us to evolve towards one of the promising areas, the Internet of Vehicles. Nowadays, modern vehicles are connected to a range of networks, including intra-vehicle networks and external networks. However, a primary challenge in the automotive industry is to make the vehicle safe and reliable; particularly with the loopholes in the existing traditional protocols, cyber-attacks on the vehicle network are rising drastically. Practically every vehicle uses the universal Controller Area Network (CAN) bus protocol for the communication between electronic control units to transmit key vehicle functionality and messages related to driver safety. The CAN bus system, although its critical significance, lacks the key feature of any protocol authentication and authorization. Resulting in compromises of CAN bus security leads to serious issues to both car and driver safety. This paper discusses the security issues of the CAN bus protocol and proposes an Intrusion Detection System (IDS) that detects known attacks on in-vehicle networks. Multiple Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms are employed to provide recognition of known potential cyber-attacks based on messages, timestamps, and data packets traveling through the CAN. The main objective of this paper is to accurately detect cyberattacks by considering time-series features and attack frequency. The majority of the evaluated AI algorithms, when considering attack frequency, correctly identify known attacks with remarkable accuracy of more than 99%. However, these models achieve approximately 92% to 97% accuracy when timestamps are not taken into account. Long Short Term Memory (LSTM), Xgboost, and SVC have proved to the well-performing classifiers.
summary: The progression of innovation and technology and ease of inter-connectivity among networks has allowed us to evolve towards one of the promising areas, the Internet of Vehicles. Nowadays, modern vehicles are connected to a range of networks, including intra-vehicle networks and external networks. However, a primary challenge in the automotive industry is to make the vehicle safe and reliable; particularly with the loopholes in the existing traditional protocols, cyber-attacks on the vehicle network are rising drastically. Practically every vehicle uses the universal Controller Area Network (CAN) bus protocol for the communication between electronic control units to transmit key vehicle functionality and messages related to driver safety. The CAN bus system, although its critical significance, lacks the key feature of any protocol authentication and authorization. Resulting in compromises of CAN bus security leads to serious issues to both car and driver safety. This paper discusses the security issues of the CAN bus protocol and proposes an Intrusion Detection System (IDS) that detects known attacks on in-vehicle networks. Multiple Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms are employed to provide recognition of known potential cyber-attacks based on messages, timestamps, and data packets traveling through the CAN. The main objective of this paper is to accurately detect cyberattacks by considering time-series features and attack frequency. The majority of the evaluated AI algorithms, when considering attack frequency, correctly identify known attacks with remarkable accuracy of more than 99%. However, these models achieve approximately 92% to 97% accuracy when timestamps are not taken into account. Long Short Term Memory (LSTM), Xgboost, and SVC have proved to the well-performing classifiers.
abstract_zh: 创新和技术的进步以及网络之间互连的便利性使我们能够向最有前途的领域之一发展——车联网。如今，现代车辆连接到一系列网络，包括车内网络和外部网络。然而，汽车行业面临的首要挑战是如何使车辆安全可靠；尤其是现有传统协议存在漏洞，针对车载网络的网络攻击急剧上升。实际上，每辆车都使用通用控制器局域网 (CAN) 总线协议进行电子控制单元之间的通信，以传输关键的车辆功能和与驾驶员安全相关的消息。 CAN总线系统虽然具有重要意义，但缺乏任何协议认证和授权的关键特征。 CAN 总线安全性的受损会给汽车和驾驶员的安全带来严重问题。本文讨论了CAN总线协议的安全问题，并提出了一种入侵检测系统（IDS）来检测车载网络上的已知攻击。采用多种人工智能 (AI) 算法，根据通过 CAN 传输的消息、时间戳和数据包来识别已知的潜在网络攻击。本文的主要目标是通过考虑时间序列特征和攻击频率来准确检测网络攻击。大多数接受评估的 AI 算法在考虑攻击频率时都能正确识别已知攻击，准确率高达 99% 以上。然而，在不考虑时间戳的情况下，这些模型的准确率约为 92% 至 97%。长短期记忆 (LSTM)、Xgboost 和 SVC 已被证明是性能良好的分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过人工智能算法检测车载网络中的网络攻击，提升车辆通信安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统CAN总线协议缺乏认证和授权机制，导致车载网络面临日益严重的网络安全威胁，需有效检测方法保障驾驶安全。
AI.method: 采用LSTM、Xgboost和SVC等人工智能算法，结合时间序列特征和攻击频率分析CAN总线数据，识别已知网络攻击。
AI.result: 基于攻击频率的模型检测准确率超99%，未考虑时间戳时准确率为92%-97%，证明方法在攻击检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入时间序列特征和AI算法可显著提升车载网络入侵检测性能，为车辆安全提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Zelin Xu,Yichen Zhang,Ke Chen,Kui Jia
title: BiCo-Net: Regress Globally, Match Locally for Robust 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: BiCo-Net：全局回归，局部匹配以实现稳健的 6D 姿态估计
abstract: The challenges of learning a robust 6D pose function lie in 1) severe occlusion and 2) systematic noises in depth images. Inspired by the success of point-pair features, the goal of this paper is to recover the 6D pose of an object instance segmented from RGB-D images by locally matching pairs of oriented points between the model and camera space. To this end, we propose a novel Bi-directional Correspondence Mapping Network (BiCo-Net) to first generate point clouds guided by a typical pose regression, which can thus incorporate pose-sensitive information to optimize generation of local coordinates and their normal vectors. As pose predictions via geometric computation only rely on one single pair of local oriented points, our BiCo-Net can achieve robustness against sparse and occluded point clouds. An ensemble of redundant pose predictions from locally matching and direct pose regression further refines final pose output against noisy observations. Experimental results on three popularly benchmarking datasets can verify that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance, especially for the more challenging severe occluded scenes. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/BiCo-Net.
summary: The challenges of learning a robust 6D pose function lie in 1) severe occlusion and 2) systematic noises in depth images. Inspired by the success of point-pair features, the goal of this paper is to recover the 6D pose of an object instance segmented from RGB-D images by locally matching pairs of oriented points between the model and camera space. To this end, we propose a novel Bi-directional Correspondence Mapping Network (BiCo-Net) to first generate point clouds guided by a typical pose regression, which can thus incorporate pose-sensitive information to optimize generation of local coordinates and their normal vectors. As pose predictions via geometric computation only rely on one single pair of local oriented points, our BiCo-Net can achieve robustness against sparse and occluded point clouds. An ensemble of redundant pose predictions from locally matching and direct pose regression further refines final pose output against noisy observations. Experimental results on three popularly benchmarking datasets can verify that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance, especially for the more challenging severe occluded scenes. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/BiCo-Net.
abstract_zh: 学习鲁棒的 6D 位姿函数的挑战在于 1）严重遮挡和 2）深度图像中的系统噪声。受到点对特征成功的启发，本文的目标是通过在模型和相机空间之间局部匹配定向点对来恢复从 RGB-D 图像分割的对象实例的 6D 姿态。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的双向对应映射网络（BiCo-Net），首先生成由典型姿态回归引导的点云，从而可以结合姿态敏感信息来优化局部坐标及其法线向量的生成。由于通过几何计算进行姿态预测仅依赖于一对局部定向点，因此我们的 BiCo-Net 可以实现针对稀疏和遮挡点云的鲁棒性。来自局部匹配和直接姿势回归的冗余姿势预测的集合进一步细化了针对噪声观测的最终姿势输出。三个流行的基准测试数据集上的实验结果可以验证我们的方法可以实现最先进的性能，特别是对于更具挑战性的严重遮挡场景。源代码可在 https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/BiCo-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiCo-Net网络，通过全局回归与局部匹配结合的方法，解决RGB-D图像中因遮挡和深度噪声导致的6D姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在深度图像存在严重遮挡和系统性噪声时，难以准确估计物体6D姿态，需提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计双向对应映射网络（BiCo-Net），首先通过全局姿态回归生成点云，再通过局部定向点对匹配优化坐标与法向量，结合冗余预测结果提升抗噪能力。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在严重遮挡场景下表现显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BiCo-Net通过全局-局部协同机制有效应对遮挡和噪声，为鲁棒6D姿态估计提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BiCo-Net网络，通过全局回归与局部匹配结合的方法，解决RGB-D图像中因遮挡和深度噪声导致的6D姿态估计问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在深度图像存在严重遮挡和系统性噪声时，难以准确估计物体6D姿态，需提升鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 设计双向对应映射网络（BiCo-Net），首先通过全局姿态回归生成点云，再通过局部定向点对匹配优化坐标与法向量，结合冗余预测结果提升抗噪能力。
ai_content.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在严重遮挡场景下表现显著优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: BiCo-Net通过全局-局部协同机制有效应对遮挡和噪声，为鲁棒6D姿态估计提供新思路。

search_text: BiCo-Net: Regress Globally, Match Locally for Robust 6D Pose Estimation BiCo-Net：全局回归，局部匹配以实现稳健的 6D 姿态估计 The challenges of learning a robust 6D pose function lie in 1) severe occlusion and 2) systematic noises in depth images. Inspired by the success of point-pair features, the goal of this paper is to recover the 6D pose of an object instance segmented from RGB-D images by locally matching pairs of oriented points between the model and camera space. To this end, we propose a novel Bi-directional Correspondence Mapping Network (BiCo-Net) to first generate point clouds guided by a typical pose regression, which can thus incorporate pose-sensitive information to optimize generation of local coordinates and their normal vectors. As pose predictions via geometric computation only rely on one single pair of local oriented points, our BiCo-Net can achieve robustness against sparse and occluded point clouds. An ensemble of redundant pose predictions from locally matching and direct pose regression further refines final pose output against noisy observations. Experimental results on three popularly benchmarking datasets can verify that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance, especially for the more challenging severe occluded scenes. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/BiCo-Net. 学习鲁棒的 6D 位姿函数的挑战在于 1）严重遮挡和 2）深度图像中的系统噪声。受到点对特征成功的启发，本文的目标是通过在模型和相机空间之间局部匹配定向点对来恢复从 RGB-D 图像分割的对象实例的 6D 姿态。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的双向对应映射网络（BiCo-Net），首先生成由典型姿态回归引导的点云，从而可以结合姿态敏感信息来优化局部坐标及其法线向量的生成。由于通过几何计算进行姿态预测仅依赖于一对局部定向点，因此我们的 BiCo-Net 可以实现针对稀疏和遮挡点云的鲁棒性。来自局部匹配和直接姿势回归的冗余姿势预测的集合进一步细化了针对噪声观测的最终姿势输出。三个流行的基准测试数据集上的实验结果可以验证我们的方法可以实现最先进的性能，特别是对于更具挑战性的严重遮挡场景。源代码可在 https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/BiCo-Net 上获取。 本文提出BiCo-Net网络，通过全局回归与局部匹配结合的方法，解决RGB-D图像中因遮挡和深度噪声导致的6D姿态估计问题。 Zelin Xu,Yichen Zhang,Ke Chen,Kui Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Zhipeng Zhang,Xinglin Hou,Kai Niu,Zhongzhen Huang,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Qi Wu,Peng Wang
title: Attract me to Buy: Advertisement Copywriting Generation with Multimodal Multi-structured Information
title_zh: 吸引我购买：多模态多结构信息的广告文案生成
abstract: Recently, online shopping has gradually become a common way of shopping for people all over the world. Wonderful merchandise advertisements often attract more people to buy. These advertisements properly integrate multimodal multi-structured information of commodities, such as visual spatial information and fine-grained structure information. However, traditional multimodal text generation focuses on the conventional description of what existed and happened, which does not match the requirement of advertisement copywriting in the real world. Because advertisement copywriting has a vivid language style and higher requirements of faithfulness. Unfortunately, there is a lack of reusable evaluation frameworks and a scarcity of datasets. Therefore, we present a dataset, E-MMAD (e-commercial multimodal multi-structured advertisement copywriting), which requires, and supports much more detailed information in text generation. Noticeably, it is one of the largest video captioning datasets in this field. Accordingly, we propose a baseline method and faithfulness evaluation metric on the strength of structured information reasoning to solve the demand in reality on this dataset. It surpasses the previous methods by a large margin on all metrics. The dataset and method are coming soon on \url{https://e-mmad.github.io/e-mmad.net/index.html}.
summary: Recently, online shopping has gradually become a common way of shopping for people all over the world. Wonderful merchandise advertisements often attract more people to buy. These advertisements properly integrate multimodal multi-structured information of commodities, such as visual spatial information and fine-grained structure information. However, traditional multimodal text generation focuses on the conventional description of what existed and happened, which does not match the requirement of advertisement copywriting in the real world. Because advertisement copywriting has a vivid language style and higher requirements of faithfulness. Unfortunately, there is a lack of reusable evaluation frameworks and a scarcity of datasets. Therefore, we present a dataset, E-MMAD (e-commercial multimodal multi-structured advertisement copywriting), which requires, and supports much more detailed information in text generation. Noticeably, it is one of the largest video captioning datasets in this field. Accordingly, we propose a baseline method and faithfulness evaluation metric on the strength of structured information reasoning to solve the demand in reality on this dataset. It surpasses the previous methods by a large margin on all metrics. The dataset and method are coming soon on \url{https://e-mmad.github.io/e-mmad.net/index.html}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网上购物逐渐成为世界各地人们普遍的购物方式。精彩的商品广告往往会吸引更多的人购买。这些广告恰当地整合了商品的视觉空间信息、细粒度结构信息等多模态多结构信息。然而，传统的多模态文本生成侧重于对存在和发生的事物的常规描述，这与现实世界中广告文案的要求不符。因为广告文案语言风格生动，忠实度要求较高。不幸的是，缺乏可重用的评估框架和数据集。因此，我们提出了一个数据集 E-MMAD（电子商务多模式多结构广告文案），它需要并支持文本生成中更详细的信息。值得注意的是，它是该领域最大的视频字幕数据集之一。因此，我们提出了一种基于结构化信息推理的基线方法和可信度评估指标，以解决该数据集的现实需求。它在所有指标上都大大超过了以前的方法。数据集和方法即将在 \url{https://e-mmad.github.io/e-mmad.net/index.html} 上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多模态多结构信息的电商广告文案生成方法，并构建了大规模数据集E-MMAD。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态生成方法无法满足广告文案对生动语言和准确性的需求，且缺乏专用评估框架与数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含多模态多结构信息的E-MMAD数据集，并设计基于结构信息推理的基线方法与评估指标。
AI.result: 所提方法在多项指标上显著优于现有方法，数据集与方法已开源。
AI.conclusion: E-MMAD数据集和生成方法有效解决了广告文案生成的现实需求，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Yashraj Narang,Kier Storey,Iretiayo Akinola,Miles Macklin,Philipp Reist,Lukasz Wawrzyniak,Yunrong Guo,Adam Moravanszky,Gavriel State,Michelle Lu,Ankur Handa,Dieter Fox
title: Factory: Fast Contact for Robotic Assembly
title_zh: 工厂：快速接触机器人装配
comment: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2022
comments: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2022
abstract: Robotic assembly is one of the oldest and most challenging applications of robotics. In other areas of robotics, such as perception and grasping, simulation has rapidly accelerated research progress, particularly when combined with modern deep learning. However, accurately, efficiently, and robustly simulating the range of contact-rich interactions in assembly remains a longstanding challenge. In this work, we present Factory, a set of physics simulation methods and robot learning tools for such applications. We achieve real-time or faster simulation of a wide range of contact-rich scenes, including simultaneous simulation of 1000 nut-and-bolt interactions. We provide $60$ carefully-designed part models, 3 robotic assembly environments, and 7 robot controllers for training and testing virtual robots. Finally, we train and evaluate proof-of-concept reinforcement learning policies for nut-and-bolt assembly. We aim for Factory to open the doors to using simulation for robotic assembly, as well as many other contact-rich applications in robotics. Please see https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/factory for supplementary content, including videos.

In other areas of robotics, such as perception and grasping, simulation has rapidly accelerated research progress, particularly when combined with modern deep learning. In this work, we present Factory, a set of physics simulation methods and robot learning tools for such applications. We achieve real-time or faster simulation of a wide range of contact-rich scenes, including simultaneous simulation of 1000 nut-and-bolt interactions. We provide $60$ carefully-designed part models, 3 robotic assembly environments, and 7 robot controllers for training and testing virtual robots. Finally, we train and evaluate proof-of-concept reinforcement learning policies for nut-and-bolt assembly. We aim for Factory to open the doors to using simulation for robotic assembly, as well as many other contact-rich applications in robotics. Please see https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/factory for supplementary content, including videos.
abstract_zh: 机器人装配是机器人技术最古老、最具挑战性的应用之一。在机器人技术的其他领域，例如感知和抓取，模拟迅速加速了研究进展，特别是与现代深度学习相结合时。然而，准确、高效、稳健地模拟装配中一系列富含接触的相互作用仍然是一个长期的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Factory，一套用于此类应用的物理模拟方法和机器人学习工具。我们实现了对各种接触丰富的场景的实时或更快的模拟，包括同时模拟 1000 个具体的相互作用。我们提供价值 60 美元的精心设计的零件模型、3 个机器人装配环境和 7 个用于训练和测试虚拟机器人的机器人控制器。最后，我们训练和评估用于螺母和螺栓组装的概念验证强化学习策略。我们的目标是让 Factory 为机器人装配仿真以及机器人技术中许多其他接触丰富的应用打开大门。请参阅 https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/factory 了解补充内容，包括视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Factory工具，通过高效物理仿真和机器学习方法加速机器人装配研究。
AI.motivation: 机器人装配因复杂接触交互难以高效仿真，而其他领域通过仿真与深度学习取得进展，需解决此瓶颈。
AI.method: 开发实时接触仿真技术，提供60个零件模型、3个装配环境、7个控制器，并训练强化学习策略进行验证。
AI.result: 实现1000个螺栓连接的实时仿真，开放资源库并验证了概念性强化学习策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Factory为机器人装配及复杂接触场景的仿真研究提供了高效工具和标准化测试平台。

Please see https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/factory for supplementary content, including videos. 机器人装配是机器人技术最古老、最具挑战性的应用之一。在机器人技术的其他领域，例如感知和抓取，模拟迅速加速了研究进展，特别是与现代深度学习相结合时。然而，准确、高效、稳健地模拟装配中一系列富含接触的相互作用仍然是一个长期的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Factory，一套用于此类应用的物理模拟方法和机器人学习工具。我们实现了对各种接触丰富的场景的实时或更快的模拟，包括同时模拟 1000 个具体的相互作用。我们提供价值 60 美元的精心设计的零件模型、3 个机器人装配环境和 7 个用于训练和测试虚拟机器人的机器人控制器。最后，我们训练和评估用于螺母和螺栓组装的概念验证强化学习策略。我们的目标是让 Factory 为机器人装配仿真以及机器人技术中许多其他接触丰富的应用打开大门。请参阅 https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/factory 了解补充内容，包括视频。 本文提出Factory工具，通过高效物理仿真和机器学习方法加速机器人装配研究。 Yashraj Narang,Kier Storey,Iretiayo Akinola,Miles Macklin,Philipp Reist,Lukasz Wawrzyniak,Yunrong Guo,Adam Moravanszky,Gavriel State,Michelle Lu,Ankur Handa,Dieter Fox cs.RO,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Ashish Nair,Rahul Yadav,Anjali Gupta,Abhijnan Chakraborty,Sayan Ranu,Amitabha Bagchi
title: Gigs with Guarantees: Achieving Fair Wage for Food Delivery Workers
title_zh: 有保障的零工：为送餐工人实现公平工资
comment: Appeared in International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2022
comments: Appeared in International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2022
abstract: With the increasing popularity of food delivery platforms, it has become pertinent to look into the working conditions of the 'gig' workers in these platforms, especially providing them fair wages, reasonable working hours, and transparency on work availability. However, any solution to these problems must not degrade customer experience and be cost-effective to ensure that platforms are willing to adopt them. We propose WORK4FOOD, which provides income guarantees to delivery agents, while minimizing platform costs and ensuring customer satisfaction. WORK4FOOD ensures that the income guarantees are met in such a way that it does not lead to increased working hours or degrade environmental impact. To incorporate these objectives, WORK4FOOD balances supply and demand by controlling the number of agents in the system and providing dynamic payment guarantees to agents based on factors such as agent location, ratings, etc. We evaluate WORK4FOOD on a real-world dataset from a leading food delivery platform and establish its advantages over the state of the art in terms of the multi-dimensional objectives at hand.
summary: With the increasing popularity of food delivery platforms, it has become pertinent to look into the working conditions of the 'gig' workers in these platforms, especially providing them fair wages, reasonable working hours, and transparency on work availability. However, any solution to these problems must not degrade customer experience and be cost-effective to ensure that platforms are willing to adopt them. We propose WORK4FOOD, which provides income guarantees to delivery agents, while minimizing platform costs and ensuring customer satisfaction. WORK4FOOD ensures that the income guarantees are met in such a way that it does not lead to increased working hours or degrade environmental impact. To incorporate these objectives, WORK4FOOD balances supply and demand by controlling the number of agents in the system and providing dynamic payment guarantees to agents based on factors such as agent location, ratings, etc. We evaluate WORK4FOOD on a real-world dataset from a leading food delivery platform and establish its advantages over the state of the art in terms of the multi-dimensional objectives at hand.
abstract_zh: 随着外卖平台的日益普及，调查这些平台中“零工”工人的工作条件变得有意义，特别是为他们提供公平的工资、合理的工作时间和工作可用性的透明度。然而，解决这些问题的任何解决方案都不能降低客户体验，并且具有成本效益，以确保平台愿意采用它们。我们提出 WORK4FOOD，它为送货代理提供收入保证，同时最大限度地降低平台成本并确保客户满意度。 WORK4FOOD 确保在满足收入保障的同时不会导致工作时间增加或环境影响降低。为了实现这些目标，WORK4FOOD 通过控制系统中的代理数量并根据代理位置、评级等因素向代理提供动态支付保证来平衡供需。我们在领先的食品配送平台的真实数据集上评估 WORK4FOOD，并在当前的多维目标方面确立其相对于现有技术的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WORK4FOOD系统，旨在为食品配送平台零工劳动者提供收入保障，同时控制平台成本并确保客户体验。
AI.motivation: 食品配送平台的零工劳动者面临工资不公、工时过长等问题，现有解决方案可能损害客户体验或增加平台成本，亟需兼顾多方利益的创新方案。
AI.method: 通过动态支付保障机制和供需平衡控制，根据配送员位置、评分等因素调整收入保证，避免延长工时或加剧环境影响。
AI.result: 基于真实平台数据集的评估表明，WORK4FOOD在收入保障、成本控制和客户满意度等多维度目标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: WORK4FOOD为食品配送平台提供了可行的收入保障框架，在保障劳动者权益的同时维持平台运营效率与用户体验。

authors_text: Yuhan Xie,Kexin Jiang,Zhiyong Zhang,Shaolong Chen,Xiaodong Zhang,Changzhen Qiu
title: Automatic segmentation of meniscus based on MAE self-supervision and point-line weak supervision paradigm
title_zh: 基于MAE自监督和点线弱监督范式的半月板自动分割
abstract: Medical image segmentation based on deep learning is often faced with the problems of insufficient datasets and long time-consuming labeling. In this paper, we introduce the self-supervised method MAE(Masked Autoencoders) into knee joint images to provide a good initial weight for the segmentation model and improve the adaptability of the model to small datasets. Secondly, we propose a weakly supervised paradigm for meniscus segmentation based on the combination of point and line to reduce the time of labeling. Based on the weak label ,we design a region growing algorithm to generate pseudo-label. Finally we train the segmentation network based on pseudo-labels with weight transfer from self-supervision. Sufficient experimental results show that our proposed method combining self-supervision and weak supervision can almost approach the performance of purely fully supervised models while greatly reducing the required labeling time and dataset size.
summary: Medical image segmentation based on deep learning is often faced with the problems of insufficient datasets and long time-consuming labeling. In this paper, we introduce the self-supervised method MAE(Masked Autoencoders) into knee joint images to provide a good initial weight for the segmentation model and improve the adaptability of the model to small datasets. Secondly, we propose a weakly supervised paradigm for meniscus segmentation based on the combination of point and line to reduce the time of labeling. Based on the weak label ,we design a region growing algorithm to generate pseudo-label. Finally we train the segmentation network based on pseudo-labels with weight transfer from self-supervision. Sufficient experimental results show that our proposed method combining self-supervision and weak supervision can almost approach the performance of purely fully supervised models while greatly reducing the required labeling time and dataset size.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的医学图像分割常常面临数据集不足、标注耗时长的问题。本文将自监督方法MAE（Masked Autoencoders）引入膝关节图像中，为分割模型提供良好的初始权重，提高模型对小数据集的适应性。其次，我们提出了一种基于点和线组合的半月板分割的弱监督范式，以减少标记时间。基于弱标签，我们设计了区域生长算法来生成伪标签。最后，我们基于伪标签训练分割网络，并通过自监督进行权重转移。足够的实验结果表明，我们提出的结合自监督和弱监督的方法几乎可以接近纯完全监督模型的性能，同时大大减少所需的标记时间和数据集大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合MAE自监督与点线弱监督的半月板分割方法，解决医学图像分割中数据不足和标注耗时问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割面临标注数据不足及人工标注耗时的挑战，需探索减少标注依赖且保持模型性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用MAE自监督预训练提供初始权重，结合点线弱监督生成伪标签，并通过区域生长算法优化伪标签，最终基于伪标签训练分割网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在减少标注时间与数据量的同时，性能接近全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 融合自监督与弱监督范式可有效降低标注成本，为小数据集下的医学图像分割提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出结合MAE自监督与点线弱监督的半月板分割方法，解决医学图像分割中数据不足和标注耗时问题。

authors_text: Xiaoqian Xu,Pengxu Wei,Weikai Chen,Mingzhi Mao,Liang Lin,Guanbin Li
title: Dual Adversarial Adaptation for Cross-Device Real-World Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 跨设备真实世界图像超分辨率的双重对抗适应
abstract: Due to the sophisticated imaging process, an identical scene captured by different cameras could exhibit distinct imaging patterns, introducing distinct proficiency among the super-resolution (SR) models trained on images from different devices. In this paper, we investigate a novel and practical task coded cross-device SR, which strives to adapt a real-world SR model trained on the paired images captured by one camera to low-resolution (LR) images captured by arbitrary target devices. The proposed task is highly challenging due to the absence of paired data from various imaging devices. To address this issue, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation mechanism for real-world SR, named Dual ADversarial Adaptation (DADA), which only requires LR images in the target domain with available real paired data from a source camera. DADA employs the Domain-Invariant Attention (DIA) module to establish the basis of target model training even without HR supervision. Furthermore, the dual framework of DADA facilitates an Inter-domain Adversarial Adaptation (InterAA) in one branch for two LR input images from two domains, and an Intra-domain Adversarial Adaptation (IntraAA) in two branches for an LR input image. InterAA and IntraAA together improve the model transferability from the source domain to the target. We empirically conduct experiments under six Real to Real adaptation settings among three different cameras, and achieve superior performance compared with existing state-of-the-art approaches. We also evaluate the proposed DADA to address the adaptation to the video camera, which presents a promising research topic to promote the wide applications of real-world super-resolution. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lonelyhope/DADA.git.
summary: Due to the sophisticated imaging process, an identical scene captured by different cameras could exhibit distinct imaging patterns, introducing distinct proficiency among the super-resolution (SR) models trained on images from different devices. In this paper, we investigate a novel and practical task coded cross-device SR, which strives to adapt a real-world SR model trained on the paired images captured by one camera to low-resolution (LR) images captured by arbitrary target devices. The proposed task is highly challenging due to the absence of paired data from various imaging devices. To address this issue, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation mechanism for real-world SR, named Dual ADversarial Adaptation (DADA), which only requires LR images in the target domain with available real paired data from a source camera. DADA employs the Domain-Invariant Attention (DIA) module to establish the basis of target model training even without HR supervision. Furthermore, the dual framework of DADA facilitates an Inter-domain Adversarial Adaptation (InterAA) in one branch for two LR input images from two domains, and an Intra-domain Adversarial Adaptation (IntraAA) in two branches for an LR input image. InterAA and IntraAA together improve the model transferability from the source domain to the target. We empirically conduct experiments under six Real to Real adaptation settings among three different cameras, and achieve superior performance compared with existing state-of-the-art approaches. We also evaluate the proposed DADA to address the adaptation to the video camera, which presents a promising research topic to promote the wide applications of real-world super-resolution. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lonelyhope/DADA.git.
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的成像过程，不同相机捕获的相同场景可能表现出不同的成像模式，从而在不同设备的图像上训练的超分辨率（SR）模型之间引入不同的熟练程度。在本文中，我们研究了一种新颖且实用的跨设备 SR 编码任务，该模型致力于将在一台相机捕获的配对图像上训练的现实世界 SR 模型调整为任意目标设备捕获的低分辨率 (LR) 图像。由于缺乏来自各种成像设备的配对数据，所提出的任务非常具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于现实世界 SR 的无监督域适应机制，称为双重对抗适应（DADA），它只需要目标域中的 LR 图像以及来自源相机的可用真实配对数据。 DADA 采用领域不变注意力（DIA）模块来建立目标模型训练的基础，即使没有 HR 监督。此外，DADA 的双框架促进了在一个分支中针对来自两个域的两个 LR 输入图像的域间对抗适应（InterAA），以及在两个分支中针对 LR 输入图像的域内对抗适应（IntraAA）。 InterAA 和 IntraAA 共同提高了模型从源域到目标域的可迁移性。我们在三个不同相机之间的六种“真实到真实”适应设置下进行了实证实验，与现有的最先进方法相比，取得了卓越的性能。我们还评估了所提出的 DADA，以解决对摄像机的适应问题，这提出了一个有前途的研究课题，以促进现实世界超分辨率的广泛应用。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/lonelyhope/DADA.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨设备真实世界图像超分辨率的自适应方法，解决不同相机设备间成像差异导致的模型性能不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 不同设备拍摄的图像存在成像差异，导致超分辨率模型在跨设备场景下表现不佳，且缺乏多设备配对数据进行训练。
AI.method: 提出无监督领域自适应框架DADA，包含Domain-Invariant Attention模块和双对抗自适应（InterAA与IntraAA），仅需目标域低分辨率图像和源设备配对数据。
AI.result: 在三种相机的六种真实场景适应实验中优于现有方法，并验证了对视频相机的适应性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DADA通过双对抗机制有效提升跨设备超分辨率模型的迁移能力，为真实场景应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Dual Adversarial Adaptation for Cross-Device Real-World Image Super-Resolution 跨设备真实世界图像超分辨率的双重对抗适应 Due to the sophisticated imaging process, an identical scene captured by different cameras could exhibit distinct imaging patterns, introducing distinct proficiency among the super-resolution (SR) models trained on images from different devices. In this paper, we investigate a novel and practical task coded cross-device SR, which strives to adapt a real-world SR model trained on the paired images captured by one camera to low-resolution (LR) images captured by arbitrary target devices. The proposed task is highly challenging due to the absence of paired data from various imaging devices. To address this issue, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation mechanism for real-world SR, named Dual ADversarial Adaptation (DADA), which only requires LR images in the target domain with available real paired data from a source camera. DADA employs the Domain-Invariant Attention (DIA) module to establish the basis of target model training even without HR supervision. Furthermore, the dual framework of DADA facilitates an Inter-domain Adversarial Adaptation (InterAA) in one branch for two LR input images from two domains, and an Intra-domain Adversarial Adaptation (IntraAA) in two branches for an LR input image. InterAA and IntraAA together improve the model transferability from the source domain to the target. We empirically conduct experiments under six Real to Real adaptation settings among three different cameras, and achieve superior performance compared with existing state-of-the-art approaches. We also evaluate the proposed DADA to address the adaptation to the video camera, which presents a promising research topic to promote the wide applications of real-world super-resolution. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lonelyhope/DADA.git. 由于复杂的成像过程，不同相机捕获的相同场景可能表现出不同的成像模式，从而在不同设备的图像上训练的超分辨率（SR）模型之间引入不同的熟练程度。在本文中，我们研究了一种新颖且实用的跨设备 SR 编码任务，该模型致力于将在一台相机捕获的配对图像上训练的现实世界 SR 模型调整为任意目标设备捕获的低分辨率 (LR) 图像。由于缺乏来自各种成像设备的配对数据，所提出的任务非常具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于现实世界 SR 的无监督域适应机制，称为双重对抗适应（DADA），它只需要目标域中的 LR 图像以及来自源相机的可用真实配对数据。 DADA 采用领域不变注意力（DIA）模块来建立目标模型训练的基础，即使没有 HR 监督。此外，DADA 的双框架促进了在一个分支中针对来自两个域的两个 LR 输入图像的域间对抗适应（InterAA），以及在两个分支中针对 LR 输入图像的域内对抗适应（IntraAA）。 InterAA 和 IntraAA 共同提高了模型从源域到目标域的可迁移性。我们在三个不同相机之间的六种“真实到真实”适应设置下进行了实证实验，与现有的最先进方法相比，取得了卓越的性能。我们还评估了所提出的 DADA，以解决对摄像机的适应问题，这提出了一个有前途的研究课题，以促进现实世界超分辨率的广泛应用。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/lonelyhope/DADA.git 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种跨设备真实世界图像超分辨率的自适应方法，解决不同相机设备间成像差异导致的模型性能不一致问题。 Xiaoqian Xu,Pengxu Wei,Weikai Chen,Mingzhi Mao,Liang Lin,Guanbin Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Pedro F. Proença,Jeff Delaune,Roland Brockers
title: Optimizing Terrain Mapping and Landing Site Detection for Autonomous UAVs
title_zh: 优化自主无人机的地形测绘和着陆点检测
abstract: The next generation of Mars rotorcrafts requires on-board autonomous hazard avoidance landing. To this end, this work proposes a system that performs continuous multi-resolution height map reconstruction and safe landing spot detection. Structure-from-Motion measurements are aggregated in a pyramid structure using a novel Optimal Mixture of Gaussians formulation that provides a comprehensive uncertainty model. Our multiresolution pyramid is built more efficiently and accurately than past work by decoupling pyramid filling from the measurement updates of different resolutions. To detect the safest landing location, after an optimized hazard segmentation, we use a mean shift algorithm on multiple distance transform peaks to account for terrain roughness and uncertainty. The benefits of our contributions are evaluated on real and synthetic flight data.
summary: The next generation of Mars rotorcrafts requires on-board autonomous hazard avoidance landing. To this end, this work proposes a system that performs continuous multi-resolution height map reconstruction and safe landing spot detection. Structure-from-Motion measurements are aggregated in a pyramid structure using a novel Optimal Mixture of Gaussians formulation that provides a comprehensive uncertainty model. Our multiresolution pyramid is built more efficiently and accurately than past work by decoupling pyramid filling from the measurement updates of different resolutions. To detect the safest landing location, after an optimized hazard segmentation, we use a mean shift algorithm on multiple distance transform peaks to account for terrain roughness and uncertainty. The benefits of our contributions are evaluated on real and synthetic flight data.
abstract_zh: 下一代火星旋翼机需要机载自主避险着陆。为此，这项工作提出了一种执行连续多分辨率高度图重建和安全着陆点检测的系统。使用新颖的高斯最佳混合公式将运动结构测量结果聚合在金字塔结构中，该公式提供了全面的不确定性模型。通过将金字塔填充与不同分辨率的测量更新解耦，我们的多分辨率金字塔比过去的工作更高效、更准确地构建。为了检测最安全的着陆位置，在优化危险分割后，我们在多个距离变换峰值上使用均值平移算法来考虑地形粗糙度和不确定性。我们的贡献的好处是根据真实和合成的飞行数据进行评估的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化自主无人机地形映射与着陆点检测的系统，用于火星任务的自主避障着陆。
AI.motivation: 下一代火星旋翼机需要机载自主避障着陆能力，现有方法在地形建模效率与着陆安全性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 基于结构从运动（SfM）的多分辨率金字塔模型，结合最优高斯混合不确定性建模，解耦金字塔填充与测量更新过程，并采用均值漂移算法处理地形粗糙度与不确定性。
AI.result: 在真实与合成飞行数据集上验证了方法的有效性，实现了更高效准确的地形映射与安全着陆点检测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统提升了火星无人机在复杂地形下的自主着陆能力，为未来行星探测任务提供关键技术支撑。

authors_text: Xiang Chen,Ningyu Zhang,Lei Li,Yunzhi Yao,Shumin Deng,Chuanqi Tan,Fei Huang,Luo Si,Huajun Chen
title: Good Visual Guidance Makes A Better Extractor: Hierarchical Visual Prefix for Multimodal Entity and Relation Extraction
title_zh: 良好的视觉引导造就更好的提取器：用于多模式实体和关系提取的分层视觉前缀
abstract: Multimodal named entity recognition and relation extraction (MNER and MRE) is a fundamental and crucial branch in information extraction. However, existing approaches for MNER and MRE usually suffer from error sensitivity when irrelevant object images incorporated in texts. To deal with these issues, we propose a novel Hierarchical Visual Prefix fusion NeTwork (HVPNeT) for visual-enhanced entity and relation extraction, aiming to achieve more effective and robust performance. Specifically, we regard visual representation as pluggable visual prefix to guide the textual representation for error insensitive forecasting decision. We further propose a dynamic gated aggregation strategy to achieve hierarchical multi-scaled visual features as visual prefix for fusion. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and achieve state-of-the-art performance. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/HVPNeT.
summary: Multimodal named entity recognition and relation extraction (MNER and MRE) is a fundamental and crucial branch in information extraction. However, existing approaches for MNER and MRE usually suffer from error sensitivity when irrelevant object images incorporated in texts. To deal with these issues, we propose a novel Hierarchical Visual Prefix fusion NeTwork (HVPNeT) for visual-enhanced entity and relation extraction, aiming to achieve more effective and robust performance. Specifically, we regard visual representation as pluggable visual prefix to guide the textual representation for error insensitive forecasting decision. We further propose a dynamic gated aggregation strategy to achieve hierarchical multi-scaled visual features as visual prefix for fusion. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and achieve state-of-the-art performance. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/HVPNeT.
abstract_zh: 多模态命名实体识别和关系提取（MNER 和 MRE）是信息提取中的一个基本且关键的分支。然而，当文本中包含不相关的对象图像时，现有的 MNER 和 MRE 方法通常会出现错误敏感性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的分层视觉前缀融合网络（HVPNeT），用于视觉增强实体和关系提取，旨在实现更有效和鲁棒的性能。具体来说，我们将视觉表示视为可插入的视觉前缀，以指导错误不敏感的预测决策的文本表示。我们进一步提出了一种动态门控聚合策略，以实现分层多尺度视觉特征作为融合的视觉前缀。对三个基准数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/HVPNeT 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层视觉前缀融合网络（HVPNeT）的多模态实体和关系抽取方法，旨在提升视觉增强下的抽取效果与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态命名实体识别与关系抽取方法在处理文本中无关对象图像时易受误差影响，需提升模型对干扰的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将视觉表示作为可插拔的视觉前缀引导文本表示，并提出动态门控聚合策略以分层提取多尺度视觉特征进行融合。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，取得了最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层视觉前缀与动态聚合策略，HVPNeT显著提升了多模态实体和关系抽取的鲁棒性与准确性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层视觉前缀融合网络（HVPNeT）的多模态实体和关系抽取方法，旨在提升视觉增强下的抽取效果与鲁棒性。
motivation: 现有多模态命名实体识别与关系抽取方法在处理文本中无关对象图像时易受误差影响，需提升模型对干扰的鲁棒性。
method: 将视觉表示作为可插拔的视觉前缀引导文本表示，并提出动态门控聚合策略以分层提取多尺度视觉特征进行融合。
result: 在三个基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，取得了最先进的性能表现。
conclusion: 通过分层视觉前缀与动态聚合策略，HVPNeT显著提升了多模态实体和关系抽取的鲁棒性与准确性。
search_text: Good Visual Guidance Makes A Better Extractor: Hierarchical Visual Prefix for Multimodal Entity and Relation Extraction 良好的视觉引导造就更好的提取器：用于多模式实体和关系提取的分层视觉前缀 Multimodal named entity recognition and relation extraction (MNER and MRE) is a fundamental and crucial branch in information extraction. However, existing approaches for MNER and MRE usually suffer from error sensitivity when irrelevant object images incorporated in texts. To deal with these issues, we propose a novel Hierarchical Visual Prefix fusion NeTwork (HVPNeT) for visual-enhanced entity and relation extraction, aiming to achieve more effective and robust performance. Specifically, we regard visual representation as pluggable visual prefix to guide the textual representation for error insensitive forecasting decision. We further propose a dynamic gated aggregation strategy to achieve hierarchical multi-scaled visual features as visual prefix for fusion. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and achieve state-of-the-art performance. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/HVPNeT. 多模态命名实体识别和关系提取（MNER 和 MRE）是信息提取中的一个基本且关键的分支。然而，当文本中包含不相关的对象图像时，现有的 MNER 和 MRE 方法通常会出现错误敏感性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的分层视觉前缀融合网络（HVPNeT），用于视觉增强实体和关系提取，旨在实现更有效和鲁棒的性能。具体来说，我们将视觉表示视为可插入的视觉前缀，以指导错误不敏感的预测决策的文本表示。我们进一步提出了一种动态门控聚合策略，以实现分层多尺度视觉特征作为融合的视觉前缀。对三个基准数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/HVPNeT 中找到。 本文提出了一种基于分层视觉前缀融合网络（HVPNeT）的多模态实体和关系抽取方法，旨在提升视觉增强下的抽取效果与鲁棒性。 Xiang Chen,Ningyu Zhang,Lei Li,Yunzhi Yao,Shumin Deng,Chuanqi Tan,Fei Huang,Luo Si,Huajun Chen cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Peizhou Huang,Chaoyi Zhang,Xiaoliang Zhang,Xiaojuan Li,Liang Dong,Leslie Ying
title: Self-supervised Deep Unrolled Reconstruction Using Regularization by Denoising
title_zh: 使用正则化去噪的自监督深度展开重建
abstract: Deep learning methods have been successfully used in various computer vision tasks. Inspired by that success, deep learning has been explored in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction. In particular, integrating deep learning and model-based optimization methods has shown considerable advantages. However, a large amount of labeled training data is typically needed for high reconstruction quality, which is challenging for some MRI applications. In this paper, we propose a novel reconstruction method, named DURED-Net, that enables interpretable self-supervised learning for MR image reconstruction by combining a self-supervised denoising network and a plug-and-play method. We aim to boost the reconstruction performance of Noise2Noise in MR reconstruction by adding an explicit prior that utilizes imaging physics. Specifically, the leverage of a denoising network for MRI reconstruction is achieved using Regularization by Denoising (RED). Experiment results demonstrate that the proposed method requires a reduced amount of training data to achieve high reconstruction quality among the state-of-art of MR reconstruction utilizing the Noise2Noise method.
summary: Deep learning methods have been successfully used in various computer vision tasks. Inspired by that success, deep learning has been explored in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction. In particular, integrating deep learning and model-based optimization methods has shown considerable advantages. However, a large amount of labeled training data is typically needed for high reconstruction quality, which is challenging for some MRI applications. In this paper, we propose a novel reconstruction method, named DURED-Net, that enables interpretable self-supervised learning for MR image reconstruction by combining a self-supervised denoising network and a plug-and-play method. We aim to boost the reconstruction performance of Noise2Noise in MR reconstruction by adding an explicit prior that utilizes imaging physics. Specifically, the leverage of a denoising network for MRI reconstruction is achieved using Regularization by Denoising (RED). Experiment results demonstrate that the proposed method requires a reduced amount of training data to achieve high reconstruction quality among the state-of-art of MR reconstruction utilizing the Noise2Noise method.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法已成功应用于各种计算机视觉任务。受这一成功的启发，深度学习在磁共振成像 (MRI) 重建中得到了探索。特别是，深度学习和基于模型的优化方法的结合已经显示出相当大的优势。然而，为了获得高重建质量，通常需要大量标记的训练数据，这对于某些 MRI 应用来说是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 DURED-Net 的新颖重建方法，该方法通过结合自监督去噪网络和即插即用方法，实现 MR 图像重建的可解释自监督学习。我们的目标是通过添加利用成像物理的显式先验来提高 MR 重建中 Noise2Noise 的重建性能。具体来说，利用去噪正则化 (RED) 来实现 MRI 重建的去噪网络的作用。实验结果表明，所提出的方法需要减少训练数据量，以在利用 Noise2Noise 方法进行 MR 重建的现有技术中实现较高的重建质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DURED-Net的自监督深度展开重建方法，通过结合去噪网络和即插即用方法，减少MRI重建对大量标记数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI重建需要大量标记数据，而获取这些数据存在挑战，需探索减少数据需求且能利用成像物理先验的重建方法。
AI.method: 结合自监督去噪网络与即插即用优化框架，通过Regularization by Denoising（RED）引入成像物理先验，构建DURED-Net实现MRI重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在较少训练数据下达到与现有Noise2Noise方法相当的高重建质量，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DURED-Net通过自监督学习和物理先验融合，为MRI重建提供了减少数据依赖的新框架，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jing Liang,Kasun Weerakoon,Tianrui Guan,Nare Karapetyan,Dinesh Manocha
title: AdaptiveON: Adaptive Outdoor Local Navigation Method For Stable and Reliable Actions
title_zh: AdaptiveON：自适应户外本地导航方法，动作稳定可靠
abstract: We present a novel outdoor navigation algorithm to generate stable and efficient actions to navigate a robot to reach a goal. We use a multi-stage training pipeline and show that our approach produces policies that result in stable and reliable robot navigation on complex terrains. Based on the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, we developed a novel method to achieve multiple capabilities for outdoor navigation tasks, namely alleviating the robot's drifting, keeping the robot stable on bumpy terrains, avoiding climbing on hills with steep elevation changes, and avoiding collisions. Our training process mitigates the reality (sim-to-real) gap by introducing generalized environmental and robotic parameters and training with rich features of Lidar perception in a high-fidelity Unity simulator. We evaluate our method in both simulation and real world environments using Clearpath Husky and Jackal robots. Further, we compare our method against the state-of-the-art approaches and observe that, in the real world it improves stability by at least 30.7% on uneven terrains, reduces drifting by 8.08% and decreases the elevation changes by 14.75%.
summary: We present a novel outdoor navigation algorithm to generate stable and efficient actions to navigate a robot to reach a goal. We use a multi-stage training pipeline and show that our approach produces policies that result in stable and reliable robot navigation on complex terrains. Based on the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, we developed a novel method to achieve multiple capabilities for outdoor navigation tasks, namely alleviating the robot's drifting, keeping the robot stable on bumpy terrains, avoiding climbing on hills with steep elevation changes, and avoiding collisions. Our training process mitigates the reality (sim-to-real) gap by introducing generalized environmental and robotic parameters and training with rich features of Lidar perception in a high-fidelity Unity simulator. We evaluate our method in both simulation and real world environments using Clearpath Husky and Jackal robots. Further, we compare our method against the state-of-the-art approaches and observe that, in the real world it improves stability by at least 30.7% on uneven terrains, reduces drifting by 8.08% and decreases the elevation changes by 14.75%.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的户外导航算法，可以生成稳定有效的动作来导航机器人到达目标。我们使用多阶段训练流程，并表明我们的方法产生的策略可以在复杂地形上实现稳定可靠的机器人导航。基于近端策略优化（PPO）算法，我们开发了一种新颖的方法来实现户外导航任务的多种能力，即减轻机器人漂移、保持机器人在崎岖地形上保持稳定、避免爬上海拔变化陡峭的山丘以及避免碰撞。我们的训练过程通过引入通用环境和机器人参数以及在高保真 Unity 模拟器中使用激光雷达感知的丰富功能进行训练来缩小现实（模拟与真实）差距。我们使用 Clearpath Husky 和 ​​Jackal 机器人在模拟和现实环境中评估我们的方法。此外，我们将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较，并观察到，在现实世界中，它在不平坦地形上的稳定性提高了至少 30.7%，漂移减少了 8.08%，海拔变化减少了 14.75%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AdaptiveON的户外局部导航方法，旨在生成稳定且高效的机器人导航动作以到达目标。
AI.motivation: 户外环境中的复杂地形和动态障碍物导致传统导航方法存在漂移、稳定性差和碰撞风险等问题，亟需提升机器人导航的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于近端策略优化（PPO）算法，设计多阶段训练流程，结合高保真Unity仿真器中的LiDAR感知数据，通过引入通用环境与机器人参数缩小仿真与现实差距，并实现防漂移、防碰撞及地形适应等功能。
AI.result: 在Clearpath Husky和Jackal机器人实测中，相比现有方法，复杂地形稳定性提升30.7%，漂移减少8.08%，地形起伏降低14.75%。
AI.conclusion: AdaptiveON通过仿真与现实联合训练有效解决了户外导航中的稳定性与可靠性问题，验证了其在复杂环境中的优越性。

authors_text: Mili Wadhwani,Sakshi Deshmukh,Harsh S. Dhiman
title: Digital Twin Framework for Time to Failure Forecasting of Wind Turbine Gearbox: A Concept
title_zh: 风力涡轮机齿轮箱故障时间预测的数字孪生框架：一个概念
abstract: Wind turbine is a complex machine with its rotating and non-rotating equipment being sensitive to faults. Due to increased wear and tear, the maintenance aspect of a wind turbine is of critical importance. Unexpected failure of wind turbine components can lead to increased O\&M costs which ultimately reduces effective power capture of a wind farm. Fault detection in wind turbines is often supplemented with SCADA data available from wind farm operators in the form of time-series format with a 10-minute sample interval. Moreover, time-series analysis and data representation has become a powerful tool to get a deeper understating of the dynamic processes in complex machinery like wind turbine. Wind turbine SCADA data is usually available in form of a multivariate time-series with variables like gearbox oil temperature, gearbox bearing temperature, nacelle temperature, rotor speed and active power produced. In this preprint, we discuss the concept of a digital twin for time to failure forecasting of the wind turbine gearbox where a predictive module continuously gets updated with real-time SCADA data and generates meaningful insights for the wind farm operator.
summary: Wind turbine is a complex machine with its rotating and non-rotating equipment being sensitive to faults. Due to increased wear and tear, the maintenance aspect of a wind turbine is of critical importance. Unexpected failure of wind turbine components can lead to increased O\&M costs which ultimately reduces effective power capture of a wind farm. Fault detection in wind turbines is often supplemented with SCADA data available from wind farm operators in the form of time-series format with a 10-minute sample interval. Moreover, time-series analysis and data representation has become a powerful tool to get a deeper understating of the dynamic processes in complex machinery like wind turbine. Wind turbine SCADA data is usually available in form of a multivariate time-series with variables like gearbox oil temperature, gearbox bearing temperature, nacelle temperature, rotor speed and active power produced. In this preprint, we discuss the concept of a digital twin for time to failure forecasting of the wind turbine gearbox where a predictive module continuously gets updated with real-time SCADA data and generates meaningful insights for the wind farm operator.
abstract_zh: 风力发电机组是一种复杂的机械，其旋转和非旋转设备对故障都很敏感。由于磨损增加，风力涡轮机的维护至关重要。风力涡轮机组件的意外故障可能会导致运维成本增加，最终降低风电场的有效电力捕获。风力涡轮机的故障检测通常由风电场运营商提供的 SCADA 数据进行补充，这些数据采用时间序列格式，采样间隔为 10 分钟。此外，时间序列分析和数据表示已成为深入了解风力涡轮机等复杂机械动态过程的强大工具。风力涡轮机 SCADA 数据通常以多变量时间序列的形式提供，其中包括齿轮箱油温、齿轮箱轴承温度、机舱温度、转子速度和产生的有功功率等变量。在本预印本中，我们讨论了用于风力涡轮机齿轮箱故障时间预测的数字孪生概念，其中预测模块不断使用实时 SCADA 数据进行更新，并为风电场运营商生成有意义的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生框架的风力涡轮机齿轮箱故障预测方法，利用实时SCADA数据进行时间到故障的预测。
AI.motivation: 风力涡轮机故障会导致运维成本增加和发电效率下降，传统方法难以有效预测齿轮箱故障，需借助实时数据提升预测能力。
AI.method: 构建数字孪生模型，通过实时更新SCADA多变量时间序列数据（如油温、轴承温度、转速等），结合预测模块生成故障预警信息。
AI.result: 提出了数字孪生框架的概念验证，展示了实时数据驱动的预测模块在风场运维中的潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生框架可有效提升风力涡轮机齿轮箱故障预测精度，为运维决策提供数据支持，优化风场运营效率。

authors_text: Qiang Zheng,Xiaoguang Yin,Dongxiao Zhang
title: Inferring electrochemical performance and parameters of Li-ion batteries based on deep operator networks
title_zh: 基于深度算子网络推断锂离子电池的电化学性能和参数
abstract: The Li-ion battery is a complex physicochemical system that generally takes applied current as input and terminal voltage as output. The mappings from current to voltage can be described by several kinds of models, such as accurate but inefficient physics-based models, and efficient but sometimes inaccurate equivalent circuit and black-box models. To realize accuracy and efficiency simultaneously in battery modeling, we propose to build a data-driven surrogate for a battery system while incorporating the underlying physics as constraints. In this work, we innovatively treat the functional mapping from current curve to terminal voltage as a composite of operators, which is approximated by the powerful deep operator network (DeepONet). Its learning capability is firstly verified through a predictive test for Li-ion concentration at two electrodes. In this experiment, the physics-informed DeepONet is found to be more robust than the purely data-driven DeepONet, especially in temporal extrapolation scenarios. A composite surrogate is then constructed for mapping current curve and solid diffusivity to terminal voltage with three operator networks, in which two parallel physics-informed DeepONets are firstly used to predict Li-ion concentration at two electrodes, and then based on their surface values, a DeepONet is built to give terminal voltage predictions. Since the surrogate is differentiable anywhere, it is endowed with the ability to learn from data directly, which was validated by using terminal voltage measurements to estimate input parameters. The proposed surrogate built upon operator networks possesses great potential to be applied in on-board scenarios, such as battery management system, since it integrates efficiency and accuracy by incorporating underlying physics, and also leaves an interface for model refinement through a totally differentiable model structure.
summary: The Li-ion battery is a complex physicochemical system that generally takes applied current as input and terminal voltage as output. The mappings from current to voltage can be described by several kinds of models, such as accurate but inefficient physics-based models, and efficient but sometimes inaccurate equivalent circuit and black-box models. To realize accuracy and efficiency simultaneously in battery modeling, we propose to build a data-driven surrogate for a battery system while incorporating the underlying physics as constraints. In this work, we innovatively treat the functional mapping from current curve to terminal voltage as a composite of operators, which is approximated by the powerful deep operator network (DeepONet). Its learning capability is firstly verified through a predictive test for Li-ion concentration at two electrodes. In this experiment, the physics-informed DeepONet is found to be more robust than the purely data-driven DeepONet, especially in temporal extrapolation scenarios. A composite surrogate is then constructed for mapping current curve and solid diffusivity to terminal voltage with three operator networks, in which two parallel physics-informed DeepONets are firstly used to predict Li-ion concentration at two electrodes, and then based on their surface values, a DeepONet is built to give terminal voltage predictions. Since the surrogate is differentiable anywhere, it is endowed with the ability to learn from data directly, which was validated by using terminal voltage measurements to estimate input parameters. The proposed surrogate built upon operator networks possesses great potential to be applied in on-board scenarios, such as battery management system, since it integrates efficiency and accuracy by incorporating underlying physics, and also leaves an interface for model refinement through a totally differentiable model structure.
abstract_zh: 锂离子电池是一个复杂的物理化学系统，通常以施加电流为输入，端电压为输出。从电流到电压的映射可以通过多种模型来描述，例如准确但低效的基于物理的模型，以及高效但有时不准确的等效电路和黑盒模型。为了同时实现电池建模的准确性和效率，我们建议为电池系统构建数据驱动的替代方案，同时将基础物理作为约束。在这项工作中，我们创新地将从电流曲线到端电压的函数映射视为算子的组合，并由强大的深度算子网络（DeepONet）来近似。其学习能力首先通过两个电极处锂离子浓度的预测测试来验证。在这个实验中，发现基于物理的 DeepONet 比纯粹数据驱动的 DeepONet 更稳健，尤其是在时间外推场景中。然后构建一个复合代理，用三个算子网络将电流曲线和固体扩散率映射到端电压，其中首先使用两个并行的物理信息 DeepONet 来预测两个电极处的锂离子浓度，然后根据它们的表面值，构建 DeepONet 来给出端电压预测。由于代理在任何地方都是可微的，因此它具有直接从数据中学习的能力，这一点通过使用端电压测量来估计输入参数进行了验证。所提出的基于运营商网络的代理在车载场景（例如电池管理系统）中具有巨大的应用潜力，因为它通过结合底层物理来整合效率和准确性，并且还通过完全可微的模型结构为模型细化留下了接口。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度算子网络（DeepONet）的数据驱动代理模型，结合物理约束以同时实现锂离子电池建模的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统锂离子电池模型存在物理模型效率低、等效电路模型精度不足的矛盾，需开发兼顾准确性与效率的新方法。
AI.method: 将电流曲线到端电压的映射视为算子复合，采用物理信息DeepONet预测电极锂离子浓度，并通过可微分代理模型实现参数估计与模型优化。
AI.result: 物理信息DeepONet在时间外推场景下表现更稳健，构建的复合代理模型可直接通过端电压数据估计输入参数，具备车载电池管理系统应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合物理约束与数据驱动特性，在保证精度的同时提升计算效率，为电池管理系统提供可微分的模型优化接口。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于深度算子网络（DeepONet）的数据驱动代理模型，结合物理约束以同时实现锂离子电池建模的准确性与效率。

authors_text: Deepak Ravikumar,Kaushik Roy
title: Norm-Scaling for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于分布外检测的范数缩放
abstract: Out-of-Distribution (OoD) inputs are examples that do not belong to the true underlying distribution of the dataset. Research has shown that deep neural nets make confident mispredictions on OoD inputs. Therefore, it is critical to identify OoD inputs for safe and reliable deployment of deep neural nets. Often a threshold is applied on a similarity score to detect OoD inputs. One such similarity is angular similarity which is the dot product of latent representation with the mean class representation. Angular similarity encodes uncertainty, for example, if the angular similarity is less, it is less certain that the input belongs to that class. However, we observe that, different classes have different distributions of angular similarity. Therefore, applying a single threshold for all classes is not ideal since the same similarity score represents different uncertainties for different classes. In this paper, we propose norm-scaling which normalizes the logits separately for each class. This ensures that a single value consistently represents similar uncertainty for various classes. We show that norm-scaling, when used with maximum softmax probability detector, achieves 9.78% improvement in AUROC, 5.99% improvement in AUPR and 33.19% reduction in FPR95 metrics over previous state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Out-of-Distribution (OoD) inputs are examples that do not belong to the true underlying distribution of the dataset. Research has shown that deep neural nets make confident mispredictions on OoD inputs. Therefore, it is critical to identify OoD inputs for safe and reliable deployment of deep neural nets. Often a threshold is applied on a similarity score to detect OoD inputs. One such similarity is angular similarity which is the dot product of latent representation with the mean class representation. Angular similarity encodes uncertainty, for example, if the angular similarity is less, it is less certain that the input belongs to that class. However, we observe that, different classes have different distributions of angular similarity. Therefore, applying a single threshold for all classes is not ideal since the same similarity score represents different uncertainties for different classes. In this paper, we propose norm-scaling which normalizes the logits separately for each class. This ensures that a single value consistently represents similar uncertainty for various classes. We show that norm-scaling, when used with maximum softmax probability detector, achieves 9.78% improvement in AUROC, 5.99% improvement in AUPR and 33.19% reduction in FPR95 metrics over previous state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OoD) 输入是不属于数据集的真实基础分布的示例。研究表明，深度神经网络会对 OoD 输入做出自信的错误预测。因此，识别 OoD 输入对于安全可靠地部署深度神经网络至关重要。通常对相似性分数应用阈值来检测 OoD 输入。其中一种相似性是角度相似性，它是潜在表示与平均类表示的点积。角度相似度编码不确定性，例如，如果角度相似度较小，则不太确定输入属于该类。然而，我们观察到，不同的类别具有不同的角度相似度分布。因此，对所有类别应用单一阈值并不理想，因为相同的相似性分数代表不同类别的不同不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了范数缩放，它分别对每个类别的逻辑进行归一化。这确保单个值始终代表不同类别的相似不确定性。我们表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，范数缩放与最大 softmax 概率检测器一起使用时，AUROC 提高了 9.78%，AUPR 提高了 5.99%，FPR95 指标降低了 33.19%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为norm-scaling的方法，用于改进深度神经网络中对分布外（OoD）输入的检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过单一阈值检测OoD输入时，不同类别在角度相似性分布上存在差异，导致相同相似性得分对应不同不确定性，影响检测效果。
AI.method: 对每个类别的logits进行单独归一化处理（norm-scaling），使相似性得分在不同类别间保持一致的不确定性表示，并结合最大softmax概率检测器进行OoD判定。
AI.result: 在多个指标上优于现有方法，AUROC提升9.78%，AUPR提升5.99%，FPR95降低33.19%。
AI.conclusion: norm-scaling通过归一化处理解决了类别间相似性分布差异问题，显著提升了OoD检测性能。

search_text: Norm-Scaling for Out-of-Distribution Detection 用于分布外检测的范数缩放 Out-of-Distribution (OoD) inputs are examples that do not belong to the true underlying distribution of the dataset. Research has shown that deep neural nets make confident mispredictions on OoD inputs. Therefore, it is critical to identify OoD inputs for safe and reliable deployment of deep neural nets. Often a threshold is applied on a similarity score to detect OoD inputs. One such similarity is angular similarity which is the dot product of latent representation with the mean class representation. Angular similarity encodes uncertainty, for example, if the angular similarity is less, it is less certain that the input belongs to that class. However, we observe that, different classes have different distributions of angular similarity. Therefore, applying a single threshold for all classes is not ideal since the same similarity score represents different uncertainties for different classes. In this paper, we propose norm-scaling which normalizes the logits separately for each class. This ensures that a single value consistently represents similar uncertainty for various classes. We show that norm-scaling, when used with maximum softmax probability detector, achieves 9.78% improvement in AUROC, 5.99% improvement in AUPR and 33.19% reduction in FPR95 metrics over previous state-of-the-art methods. 分布外 (OoD) 输入是不属于数据集的真实基础分布的示例。研究表明，深度神经网络会对 OoD 输入做出自信的错误预测。因此，识别 OoD 输入对于安全可靠地部署深度神经网络至关重要。通常对相似性分数应用阈值来检测 OoD 输入。其中一种相似性是角度相似性，它是潜在表示与平均类表示的点积。角度相似度编码不确定性，例如，如果角度相似度较小，则不太确定输入属于该类。然而，我们观察到，不同的类别具有不同的角度相似度分布。因此，对所有类别应用单一阈值并不理想，因为相同的相似性分数代表不同类别的不同不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了范数缩放，它分别对每个类别的逻辑进行归一化。这确保单个值始终代表不同类别的相似不确定性。我们表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，范数缩放与最大 softmax 概率检测器一起使用时，AUROC 提高了 9.78%，AUPR 提高了 5.99%，FPR95 指标降低了 33.19%。 本文提出了一种名为norm-scaling的方法，用于改进深度神经网络中对分布外（OoD）输入的检测。 Deepak Ravikumar,Kaushik Roy cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Amir Yazdani,Roya Sabbagh Novin,Andrew Merryweather,Tucker Hermans
title: DULA and DEBA: Differentiable Ergonomic Risk Models for Postural Assessment and Optimization in Ergonomically Intelligent pHRI
title_zh: DULA 和 DEBA：用于人体工学智能 pHRI 中姿势评估和优化的可微人体工学风险模型
comment: Submitted to IROS 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.05971
comments: Submitted to IROS 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.05971
abstract: Ergonomics and human comfort are essential concerns in physical human-robot interaction applications. Defining an accurate and easy-to-use ergonomic assessment model stands as an important step in providing feedback for postural correction to improve operator health and comfort. Common practical methods in the area suffer from inaccurate ergonomics models in performing postural optimization. In order to retain assessment quality, while improving computational considerations, we propose a novel framework for postural assessment and optimization for ergonomically intelligent physical human-robot interaction. We introduce DULA and DEBA, differentiable and continuous ergonomics models learned to replicate the popular and scientifically validated RULA and REBA assessments with more than 99% accuracy. We show that DULA and DEBA provide assessment comparable to RULA and REBA while providing computational benefits when being used in postural optimization. We evaluate our framework through human and simulation experiments. We highlight DULA and DEBA's strength in a demonstration of postural optimization for a simulated pHRI task.
summary: Ergonomics and human comfort are essential concerns in physical human-robot interaction applications. Defining an accurate and easy-to-use ergonomic assessment model stands as an important step in providing feedback for postural correction to improve operator health and comfort. Common practical methods in the area suffer from inaccurate ergonomics models in performing postural optimization. In order to retain assessment quality, while improving computational considerations, we propose a novel framework for postural assessment and optimization for ergonomically intelligent physical human-robot interaction. We introduce DULA and DEBA, differentiable and continuous ergonomics models learned to replicate the popular and scientifically validated RULA and REBA assessments with more than 99% accuracy. We show that DULA and DEBA provide assessment comparable to RULA and REBA while providing computational benefits when being used in postural optimization. We evaluate our framework through human and simulation experiments. We highlight DULA and DEBA's strength in a demonstration of postural optimization for a simulated pHRI task.
abstract_zh: 人体工程学和人体舒适度是人机交互应用中的基本问题。定义准确且易于使用的人体工程学评估模型是为姿势矫正提供反馈以改善操作员健康和舒适度的重要一步。该领域常见的实用方法在执行姿势优化时存在不准确的人体工程学模型。为了保持评估质量，同时改进计算考虑，我们提出了一种新的姿势评估和优化框架，用于符合人体工程学的智能物理人机交互。我们引入 DULA 和 DEBA，这是一种可微分且连续的人体工程学模型，旨在复制流行且经过科学验证的 RULA 和 REBA 评估，准确率超过 99%。我们表明，DULA 和 DEBA 提供的评估与 RULA 和 REBA 相当，同时在用于姿势优化时提供计算优势。我们通过人体实验和模拟实验评估我们的框架。我们强调 DULA 和 DEBA 在模拟 pHRI 任务的姿势优化演示中的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DULA和DEBA两种可微分的工效学风险模型，用于物理人机交互中的姿态评估与优化。
AI.motivation: 现有工效学评估方法在姿态优化中存在准确性不足和计算效率低的问题，亟需更精确且高效的模型以提升操作者健康与舒适度。
AI.method: 通过机器学习构建可微分且连续的DULA/DEBA模型，模拟科学验证的RULA和REBA评估体系，并在姿态优化任务中验证其计算优势。
AI.result: DULA和DEBA在姿态评估准确率超过99%，且在姿态优化中展现显著计算效率提升，经人体实验与仿真验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: DULA和DEBA为工效学智能人机交互提供了高精度、高效的姿态评估与优化解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sankaran Panchapagesan,Arun Narayanan,Turaj Zakizadeh Shabestary,Shuai Shao,Nathan Howard,Alex Park,James Walker,Alexander Gruenstein
title: A Conformer-based Waveform-domain Neural Acoustic Echo Canceller Optimized for ASR Accuracy
title_zh: 基于一致性的波形域神经声学回声消除器，针对 ASR 精度进行了优化
abstract: Acoustic Echo Cancellation (AEC) is essential for accurate recognition of queries spoken to a smart speaker that is playing out audio. Previous work has shown that a neural AEC model operating on log-mel spectral features (denoted "logmel" hereafter) can greatly improve Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) accuracy when optimized with an auxiliary loss utilizing a pre-trained ASR model encoder. In this paper, we develop a conformer-based waveform-domain neural AEC model inspired by the "TasNet" architecture. The model is trained by jointly optimizing Negative Scale-Invariant SNR (SISNR) and ASR losses on a large speech dataset. On a realistic rerecorded test set, we find that cascading a linear adaptive AEC and a waveform-domain neural AEC is very effective, giving 56-59% word error rate (WER) reduction over the linear AEC alone. On this test set, the 1.6M parameter waveform-domain neural AEC also improves over a larger 6.5M parameter logmel-domain neural AEC model by 20-29% in easy to moderate conditions. By operating on smaller frames, the waveform neural model is able to perform better at smaller sizes and is better suited for applications where memory is limited.
summary: Acoustic Echo Cancellation (AEC) is essential for accurate recognition of queries spoken to a smart speaker that is playing out audio. Previous work has shown that a neural AEC model operating on log-mel spectral features (denoted "logmel" hereafter) can greatly improve Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) accuracy when optimized with an auxiliary loss utilizing a pre-trained ASR model encoder. In this paper, we develop a conformer-based waveform-domain neural AEC model inspired by the "TasNet" architecture. The model is trained by jointly optimizing Negative Scale-Invariant SNR (SISNR) and ASR losses on a large speech dataset. On a realistic rerecorded test set, we find that cascading a linear adaptive AEC and a waveform-domain neural AEC is very effective, giving 56-59% word error rate (WER) reduction over the linear AEC alone. On this test set, the 1.6M parameter waveform-domain neural AEC also improves over a larger 6.5M parameter logmel-domain neural AEC model by 20-29% in easy to moderate conditions. By operating on smaller frames, the waveform neural model is able to perform better at smaller sizes and is better suited for applications where memory is limited.
abstract_zh: 声学回声消除 (AEC) 对于准确识别正在播放音频的智能扬声器发出的查询至关重要。先前的工作表明，在使用预训练的 ASR 模型编码器进行辅助损失优化时，基于 log-mel 频谱特征（以下称为“logmel”）运行的神经 AEC 模型可以极大地提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 的准确性。在本文中，我们受“TasNet”架构的启发，开发了一种基于构象异构体的波形域神经 AEC 模型。该模型是通过在大型语音数据集上联合优化负尺度不变 SNR (SISNR) 和 ASR 损失来训练的。在真实的重新录制测试集上，我们发现级联线性自适应 AEC 和波形域神经 AEC 非常有效，与单独的线性 AEC 相比，字错误率 (WER) 降低了 56-59%。在此测试集上，在简单到中等条件下，1.6M 参数波形域神经 AEC 也比更大的 6.5M 参数 logmel 域神经 AEC 模型提高了 20-29%。通过在较小的帧上运行，波形神经模型能够在较小的尺寸下表现更好，并且更适合内存有限的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Conformer架构的波形域神经声学回声消除器，旨在优化自动语音识别（ASR）的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于log-mel频谱特征的神经网络回声消除模型虽能提升ASR准确率，但存在参数量大、内存占用高的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 受TasNet架构启发，设计波形域神经网络模型，结合负对数SNR（SISNR）损失与ASR辅助损失进行联合训练，并与线性自适应AEC级联以提升性能。
AI.result: 在真实重录测试集上，级联方案使词错误率（WER）降低56-59%；1.6M参数的波形域模型在易至中等条件下优于6.5M参数的logmel域模型20-29%。
AI.conclusion: 波形域模型在保持较小参数量的同时实现更优ASR性能，适用于内存受限场景，为高效回声消除提供了新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Conformer架构的波形域神经声学回声消除器，旨在优化自动语音识别（ASR）的准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统基于log-mel频谱特征的神经网络回声消除模型虽能提升ASR准确率，但存在参数量大、内存占用高的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 受TasNet架构启发，设计波形域神经网络模型，结合负对数SNR（SISNR）损失与ASR辅助损失进行联合训练，并与线性自适应AEC级联以提升性能。
ai_content.result: 在真实重录测试集上，级联方案使词错误率（WER）降低56-59%；1.6M参数的波形域模型在易至中等条件下优于6.5M参数的logmel域模型20-29%。
ai_content.conclusion: 波形域模型在保持较小参数量的同时实现更优ASR性能，适用于内存受限场景，为高效回声消除提供了新方向。

search_text: A Conformer-based Waveform-domain Neural Acoustic Echo Canceller Optimized for ASR Accuracy 基于一致性的波形域神经声学回声消除器，针对 ASR 精度进行了优化 Acoustic Echo Cancellation (AEC) is essential for accurate recognition of queries spoken to a smart speaker that is playing out audio. Previous work has shown that a neural AEC model operating on log-mel spectral features (denoted "logmel" hereafter) can greatly improve Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) accuracy when optimized with an auxiliary loss utilizing a pre-trained ASR model encoder. In this paper, we develop a conformer-based waveform-domain neural AEC model inspired by the "TasNet" architecture. The model is trained by jointly optimizing Negative Scale-Invariant SNR (SISNR) and ASR losses on a large speech dataset. On a realistic rerecorded test set, we find that cascading a linear adaptive AEC and a waveform-domain neural AEC is very effective, giving 56-59% word error rate (WER) reduction over the linear AEC alone. On this test set, the 1.6M parameter waveform-domain neural AEC also improves over a larger 6.5M parameter logmel-domain neural AEC model by 20-29% in easy to moderate conditions. By operating on smaller frames, the waveform neural model is able to perform better at smaller sizes and is better suited for applications where memory is limited. 声学回声消除 (AEC) 对于准确识别正在播放音频的智能扬声器发出的查询至关重要。先前的工作表明，在使用预训练的 ASR 模型编码器进行辅助损失优化时，基于 log-mel 频谱特征（以下称为“logmel”）运行的神经 AEC 模型可以极大地提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 的准确性。在本文中，我们受“TasNet”架构的启发，开发了一种基于构象异构体的波形域神经 AEC 模型。该模型是通过在大型语音数据集上联合优化负尺度不变 SNR (SISNR) 和 ASR 损失来训练的。在真实的重新录制测试集上，我们发现级联线性自适应 AEC 和波形域神经 AEC 非常有效，与单独的线性 AEC 相比，字错误率 (WER) 降低了 56-59%。在此测试集上，在简单到中等条件下，1.6M 参数波形域神经 AEC 也比更大的 6.5M 参数 logmel 域神经 AEC 模型提高了 20-29%。通过在较小的帧上运行，波形神经模型能够在较小的尺寸下表现更好，并且更适合内存有限的应用。 本文提出了一种基于Conformer架构的波形域神经声学回声消除器，旨在优化自动语音识别（ASR）的准确性。 Sankaran Panchapagesan,Arun Narayanan,Turaj Zakizadeh Shabestary,Shuai Shao,Nathan Howard,Alex Park,James Walker,Alexander Gruenstein eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Soheil Habibian,Dylan P Losey
title: Encouraging Human Interaction with Robot Teams: Legible and Fair Subtask Allocations
title_zh: 鼓励人类与机器人团队的互动：清晰且公平的子任务分配
abstract: Recent works explore collaboration between humans and teams of robots. These approaches make sense if the human is already working with the robot team; but how should robots encourage nearby humans to join their teams in the first place? Inspired by behavioral economics, we recognize that humans care about more than just team efficiency -- humans also have biases and expectations for team dynamics. Our hypothesis is that the way inclusive robots divide the task (i.e., how the robots split a larger task into subtask allocations) should be both legible and fair to the human partner. In this paper we introduce a bilevel optimization approach that enables robot teams to identify high-level subtask allocations and low-level trajectories that optimize for legibility, fairness, or a combination of both objectives. We then test our resulting algorithm across studies where humans watch or play with robot teams. We find that our approach to generating legible teams makes the human's role clear, and that humans typically prefer to join and collaborate with legible teams instead of teams that only optimize for efficiency. Incorporating fairness alongside legibility further encourages participation: when humans play with robots, we find that they prefer (potentially inefficient) teams where the subtasks or effort are evenly divided. See videos of our studies here https://youtu.be/cfN7O5na3mg

These approaches make sense if the human is already working with the robot team; but how should robots encourage nearby humans to join their teams in the first place? Inspired by behavioral economics, we recognize that humans care about more than just team efficiency -- humans also have biases and expectations for team dynamics. Our hypothesis is that the way inclusive robots divide the task (i.e., how the robots split a larger task into subtask allocations) should be both legible and fair to the human partner. In this paper we introduce a bilevel optimization approach that enables robot teams to identify high-level subtask allocations and low-level trajectories that optimize for legibility, fairness, or a combination of both objectives. We then test our resulting algorithm across studies where humans watch or play with robot teams. We find that our approach to generating legible teams makes the human's role clear, and that humans typically prefer to join and collaborate with legible teams instead of teams that only optimize for efficiency. Incorporating fairness alongside legibility further encourages participation: when humans play with robots, we find that they prefer (potentially inefficient) teams where the subtasks or effort are evenly divided. See videos of our studies here https://youtu.be/cfN7O5na3mg
abstract_zh: 最近的作品探索了人类和机器人团队之间的协作。如果人类已经在与机器人团队合作，那么这些方法就有意义。但机器人首先应该如何鼓励附近的人类加入他们的团队呢？受行为经济学的启发，我们认识到人类关心的不仅仅是团队效率——人类对团队动态也有偏见和期望。我们的假设是，包容性机器人划分任务的方式（即机器人如何将较大的任务划分为子任务分配）对于人类伙伴来说应该既清晰又公平。在本文中，我们介绍了一种双层优化方法，使机器人团队能够识别高级子任务分配和低级轨迹，从而优化易读性、公平性或这两个目标的组合。然后，我们在人类观看或与机器人团队一起比赛的研究中测试我们得到的算法。我们发现，我们生成清晰团队的方法使人类的角色变得清晰，并且人们通常更喜欢加入清晰的团队并与之协作，而不是只优化效率的团队。将公平性与易读性结合起来进一步鼓励参与：当人类与机器人一起玩时，我们发现他们更喜欢（可能效率低下）子任务或努力平均分配的团队。请在此处查看我们的研究视频 https://youtu.be/cfN7O​​5na3mg

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过设计可理解且公平的子任务分配策略，鼓励人类与机器人团队进行有效协作。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注人类与机器人团队的协作效率，但忽视了如何吸引人类主动加入团队。人类在决策时不仅考虑效率，还关注任务分配的公平性与可理解性，因此需设计符合人类期望的子任务分配策略。
AI.method: 采用双层优化框架，高层优化子任务分配以确保可读性与公平性，低层优化机器人轨迹，结合两者以生成符合人类期望的协作方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，人类更倾向于加入具有清晰任务分工的团队，且当子任务分配公平时，人类参与意愿显著提升，甚至优先选择效率较低但更公平的团队。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证实了可读性与公平性在子任务分配中的关键作用，为提升人机协作效率与接受度提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniel Zhang,Nestor Maslej,Erik Brynjolfsson,John Etchemendy,Terah Lyons,James Manyika,Helen Ngo,Juan Carlos Niebles,Michael Sellitto,Ellie Sakhaee,Yoav Shoham,Jack Clark,Raymond Perrault
title: The AI Index 2022 Annual Report
title_zh: AI 指数 2022 年年度报告
abstract: Welcome to the fifth edition of the AI Index Report! The latest edition includes data from a broad set of academic, private, and nonprofit organizations as well as more self-collected data and original analysis than any previous editions, including an expanded technical performance chapter, a new survey of robotics researchers around the world, data on global AI legislation records in 25 countries, and a new chapter with an in-depth analysis of technical AI ethics metrics. The AI Index Report tracks, collates, distills, and visualizes data related to artificial intelligence. Its mission is to provide unbiased, rigorously vetted, and globally sourced data for policymakers, researchers, executives, journalists, and the general public to develop a more thorough and nuanced understanding of the complex field of AI. The report aims to be the world's most credible and authoritative source for data and insights about AI.

abstract_zh: 欢迎来到第五版人工智能指数报告！最新版本包含了来自广泛的学术、私人和非营利组织的数据，以及比之前任何版本更多的自行收集的数据和原创分析，包括扩展的技术性能章节、对世界各地机器人研究人员的新调查、25个国家的全球人工智能立法记录数据，以及对技术人工智能道德指标进行深入分析的新章节。人工智能指数报告跟踪、整理、提炼和可视化与人工智能相关的数据。其使命是为政策制定者、研究人员、高管、记者和公众提供公正、经过严格审查和全球来源的数据，以更全面、更细致地了解复杂的人工智能领域。该报告旨在成为世界上最可信、最权威的人工智能数据和见解来源。

AI.tldr: 该报告旨在通过收集和分析全球AI领域的多维度数据，为各利益相关者提供全面、客观的AI发展洞察。
AI.motivation: 为政策制定者、研究人员等提供可靠数据，促进对AI技术发展的全面理解与合理决策。
AI.method: 通过整合学术、产业及非营利组织的多方数据，结合原创调研与深度分析，构建覆盖技术、伦理、政策等多维度的AI评估框架。
AI.result: 系统梳理了全球AI技术进展、伦理挑战、立法动态及产业应用趋势，形成多维度的可视化数据呈现与分析结论。
AI.conclusion: 该报告通过全面、多维度的数据分析，为AI领域的发展提供了权威参考，助力各方把握技术趋势与挑战，推动负责任的AI创新。

method: 通过整合学术、产业及非营利组织的多方数据，结合原创调研与深度分析，构建覆盖技术、伦理、政策等多维度的AI评估框架。
result: 系统梳理了全球AI技术进展、伦理挑战、立法动态及产业应用趋势，形成多维度的可视化数据呈现与分析结论。
conclusion: 该报告通过全面、多维度的数据分析，为AI领域的发展提供了权威参考，助力各方把握技术趋势与挑战，推动负责任的AI创新。
search_text: The AI Index 2022 Annual Report AI 指数 2022 年年度报告 Welcome to the fifth edition of the AI Index Report! The latest edition includes data from a broad set of academic, private, and nonprofit organizations as well as more self-collected data and original analysis than any previous editions, including an expanded technical performance chapter, a new survey of robotics researchers around the world, data on global AI legislation records in 25 countries, and a new chapter with an in-depth analysis of technical AI ethics metrics. The AI Index Report tracks, collates, distills, and visualizes data related to artificial intelligence. Its mission is to provide unbiased, rigorously vetted, and globally sourced data for policymakers, researchers, executives, journalists, and the general public to develop a more thorough and nuanced understanding of the complex field of AI. The report aims to be the world's most credible and authoritative source for data and insights about AI. 欢迎来到第五版人工智能指数报告！最新版本包含了来自广泛的学术、私人和非营利组织的数据，以及比之前任何版本更多的自行收集的数据和原创分析，包括扩展的技术性能章节、对世界各地机器人研究人员的新调查、25个国家的全球人工智能立法记录数据，以及对技术人工智能道德指标进行深入分析的新章节。人工智能指数报告跟踪、整理、提炼和可视化与人工智能相关的数据。其使命是为政策制定者、研究人员、高管、记者和公众提供公正、经过严格审查和全球来源的数据，以更全面、更细致地了解复杂的人工智能领域。该报告旨在成为世界上最可信、最权威的人工智能数据和见解来源。 该报告旨在通过收集和分析全球AI领域的多维度数据，为各利益相关者提供全面、客观的AI发展洞察。 Daniel Zhang,Nestor Maslej,Erik Brynjolfsson,John Etchemendy,Terah Lyons,James Manyika,Helen Ngo,Juan Carlos Niebles,Michael Sellitto,Ellie Sakhaee,Yoav Shoham,Jack Clark,Raymond Perrault cs.AI

authors_text: Levi Burner,Anton Mitrokhin,Cornelia Fermüller,Yiannis Aloimonos
title: EVIMO2: An Event Camera Dataset for Motion Segmentation, Optical Flow, Structure from Motion, and Visual Inertial Odometry in Indoor Scenes with Monocular or Stereo Algorithms
title_zh: EVIMO2：事件摄像机数据集，用于使用单目或立体算法在室内场景中进行运动分割、光流、运动结构和视觉惯性里程计
abstract: A new event camera dataset, EVIMO2, is introduced that improves on the popular EVIMO dataset by providing more data, from better cameras, in more complex scenarios. As with its predecessor, EVIMO2 provides labels in the form of per-pixel ground truth depth and segmentation as well as camera and object poses. All sequences use data from physical cameras and many sequences feature multiple independently moving objects. Typically, such labeled data is unavailable in physical event camera datasets. Thus, EVIMO2 will serve as a challenging benchmark for existing algorithms and rich training set for the development of new algorithms. In particular, EVIMO2 is suited for supporting research in motion and object segmentation, optical flow, structure from motion, and visual (inertial) odometry in both monocular or stereo configurations. EVIMO2 consists of 41 minutes of data from three 640$\times$480 event cameras, one 2080$\times$1552 classical color camera, inertial measurements from two six axis inertial measurement units, and millimeter accurate object poses from a Vicon motion capture system. The dataset's 173 sequences are arranged into three categories. 3.75 minutes of independently moving household objects, 22.55 minutes of static scenes, and 14.85 minutes of basic motions in shallow scenes. Some sequences were recorded in low-light conditions where conventional cameras fail. Depth and segmentation are provided at 60 Hz for the event cameras and 30 Hz for the classical camera. The masks can be regenerated using open-source code up to rates as high as 200 Hz. This technical report briefly describes EVIMO2. The full documentation is available online. Videos of individual sequences can be sampled on the download page.
