The masks can be regenerated using open-source code up to rates as high as 200 Hz. This technical report briefly describes EVIMO2. The full documentation is available online. Videos of individual sequences can be sampled on the download page.
abstract_zh: 引入了新的事件相机数据集 EVIMO2，该数据集通过在更复杂的场景中提供来自更好相机的更多数据来改进流行的 EVIMO 数据集。与其前身一样，EVIMO2 以每像素地面真实深度和分割以及相机和物体姿势的形式提供标签。所有序列都使用来自物理摄像机的数据，并且许多序列具有多个独立移动的对象。通常，此类标记数据在物理事件相机数据集中不可用。因此，EVIMO2将作为现有算法的具有挑战性的基准，并为新算法的开发提供丰富的训练集。特别是，EVIMO2 适合支持运动和对象分割、光流、运动结构以及单目或立体配置中的视觉（惯性）里程计方面的研究。 EVIMO2 包含来自三台 640$\times$480 事件摄像机、一台 2080$\times$1552 经典彩色摄像机的 41 分钟数据、来自两个六轴惯性测量单元的惯性测量以及来自 Vicon 运动捕捉系统的毫米级精确物体姿态。该数据集的 173 个序列分为三类。独立移动的家居物体3.75分钟，静态场景22.55分钟，浅层场景中的基本运动14.85分钟。一些序列是在传统相机无法拍摄的弱光条件下录制的。事件相机的深度和分割频率为 60 Hz，经典相机的深度和分割频率为 30 Hz。掩模可以使用开源代码重新生成，频率高达 200 Hz。本技术报告简要介绍了EVIMO2。完整的文档可在线获取。可以在下载页面上获取各个序列的视频样本。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为EVIMO2的新型事件相机数据集，用于室内场景下的运动分割、光流、运动恢复结构和视觉惯性里程计等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有物理事件相机数据集缺乏标注数据，而EVIMO2通过提供更多复杂场景数据和精确标注，旨在为算法研究提供更具挑战性的基准和丰富的训练集。
AI.method: EVIMO2包含三台事件相机、一台经典彩色相机、双六轴IMU和Vicon系统获取的毫米级物体位姿，数据按场景复杂度分为三类，并提供60Hz/30Hz标注及200Hz再生掩码的开源代码。
AI.result: 数据集包含41分钟数据，涵盖静态场景、浅景基础运动及独立移动物体，支持单目/立体算法研究，标注数据可再生至200Hz，相关资源已在线发布。
AI.conclusion: EVIMO2通过高精度标注和多样化场景，为事件相机在运动分割、光流等任务的研究提供了重要基准，推动新算法开发与验证。

authors_text: Poorna Banerjee Dasgupta
title: Comparative Analysis of Non-Blind Deblurring Methods for Noisy Blurred Images
title_zh: 噪声模糊图像非盲去模糊方法对比分析
comment: 8 pages, Published with International Journal of Computer Trends and Technology (IJCTT), Volume-70 Issue-3, 2022
comments: 8 pages, Published with International Journal of Computer Trends and Technology (IJCTT), Volume-70 Issue-3, 2022
abstract: Image blurring refers to the degradation of an image wherein the image's overall sharpness decreases. Image blurring is caused by several factors. Additionally, during the image acquisition process, noise may get added to the image. Such a noisy and blurred image can be represented as the image resulting from the convolution of the original image with the associated point spread function, along with additive noise. However, the blurred image often contains inadequate information to uniquely determine the plausible original image. Based on the availability of blurring information, image deblurring methods can be classified as blind and non-blind. In non-blind image deblurring, some prior information is known regarding the corresponding point spread function and the added noise. The objective of this study is to determine the effectiveness of non-blind image deblurring methods with respect to the identification and elimination of noise present in blurred images. In this study, three non-blind image deblurring methods, namely Wiener deconvolution, Lucy-Richardson deconvolution, and regularized deconvolution were comparatively analyzed for noisy images featuring salt-and-pepper noise. Two types of blurring effects were simulated, namely motion blurring and Gaussian blurring. The said three non-blind deblurring methods were applied under two scenarios: direct deblurring of noisy blurred images and deblurring of images after denoising through the application of the adaptive median filter. The obtained results were then compared for each scenario to determine the best approach for deblurring noisy images.
summary: Image blurring refers to the degradation of an image wherein the image's overall sharpness decreases. Image blurring is caused by several factors. Additionally, during the image acquisition process, noise may get added to the image. Such a noisy and blurred image can be represented as the image resulting from the convolution of the original image with the associated point spread function, along with additive noise. However, the blurred image often contains inadequate information to uniquely determine the plausible original image. Based on the availability of blurring information, image deblurring methods can be classified as blind and non-blind. In non-blind image deblurring, some prior information is known regarding the corresponding point spread function and the added noise. The objective of this study is to determine the effectiveness of non-blind image deblurring methods with respect to the identification and elimination of noise present in blurred images. In this study, three non-blind image deblurring methods, namely Wiener deconvolution, Lucy-Richardson deconvolution, and regularized deconvolution were comparatively analyzed for noisy images featuring salt-and-pepper noise. Two types of blurring effects were simulated, namely motion blurring and Gaussian blurring. The said three non-blind deblurring methods were applied under two scenarios: direct deblurring of noisy blurred images and deblurring of images after denoising through the application of the adaptive median filter. The obtained results were then compared for each scenario to determine the best approach for deblurring noisy images.
abstract_zh: 图像模糊是指图像的整体清晰度下降的退化。图像模糊是由多种因素造成的。此外，在图像采集过程中，噪声可能会添加到图像中。这种有噪声且模糊的图像可以表示为原始图像与相关点扩散函数以及加性噪声的卷积所产生的图像。然而，模糊图像通常包含的信息不足以唯一地确定合理的原始图像。根据模糊信息的可用性，图像去模糊方法可以分为盲去模糊方法和非盲去模糊方法。在非盲图像去模糊中，关于相应的点扩散函数和添加的噪声的一些先验信息是已知的。本研究的目的是确定非盲图像去模糊方法在识别和消除模糊图像中存在的噪声方面的有效性。本研究针对椒盐噪声的噪声图像，对三种非盲图像去模糊方法，即维纳去卷积、Lucy-Richardson去卷积和正则化去卷积进行了比较分析。模拟了两种类型的模糊效果，即运动模糊和高斯模糊。上述三种非盲去模糊方法分别应用于两种场景：对带噪声的模糊图像直接去模糊和应用自适应中值滤波器去噪后的图像去模糊。然后对每种场景所获得的结果进行比较，以确定去模糊噪声图像的最佳方法。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种非盲图像去模糊方法在处理含噪模糊图像时的有效性。
AI.motivation: 模糊和噪声会显著降低图像质量，但现有非盲去模糊方法对噪声的处理效果存在差异，需通过对比分析确定最佳方案。
AI.method: 采用维纳反卷积、Lucy-Richardson反卷积和正则化反卷积三种方法，模拟运动模糊和高斯模糊，分别在直接处理模糊噪声图像和先通过自适应中值滤波去噪后处理两种场景下进行测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，不同方法在两种模糊类型和两种处理场景下的去噪与去模糊效果存在显著差异，部分方法在特定条件下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 非盲去模糊方法的效果依赖于噪声处理流程与模糊类型，需根据具体场景选择合适的方法组合以实现最佳图像恢复效果。

tldr: 本文比较了三种非盲图像去模糊方法在处理含噪模糊图像时的有效性。
motivation: 模糊和噪声会显著降低图像质量，但现有非盲去模糊方法对噪声的处理效果存在差异，需通过对比分析确定最佳方案。
method: 采用维纳反卷积、Lucy-Richardson反卷积和正则化反卷积三种方法，模拟运动模糊和高斯模糊，分别在直接处理模糊噪声图像和先通过自适应中值滤波去噪后处理两种场景下进行测试。
result: 实验结果表明，不同方法在两种模糊类型和两种处理场景下的去噪与去模糊效果存在显著差异，部分方法在特定条件下表现更优。
conclusion: 非盲去模糊方法的效果依赖于噪声处理流程与模糊类型，需根据具体场景选择合适的方法组合以实现最佳图像恢复效果。
search_text: Comparative Analysis of Non-Blind Deblurring Methods for Noisy Blurred Images 噪声模糊图像非盲去模糊方法对比分析 Image blurring refers to the degradation of an image wherein the image's overall sharpness decreases. Image blurring is caused by several factors. Additionally, during the image acquisition process, noise may get added to the image. Such a noisy and blurred image can be represented as the image resulting from the convolution of the original image with the associated point spread function, along with additive noise. However, the blurred image often contains inadequate information to uniquely determine the plausible original image. Based on the availability of blurring information, image deblurring methods can be classified as blind and non-blind. In non-blind image deblurring, some prior information is known regarding the corresponding point spread function and the added noise. The objective of this study is to determine the effectiveness of non-blind image deblurring methods with respect to the identification and elimination of noise present in blurred images. In this study, three non-blind image deblurring methods, namely Wiener deconvolution, Lucy-Richardson deconvolution, and regularized deconvolution were comparatively analyzed for noisy images featuring salt-and-pepper noise. Two types of blurring effects were simulated, namely motion blurring and Gaussian blurring. The said three non-blind deblurring methods were applied under two scenarios: direct deblurring of noisy blurred images and deblurring of images after denoising through the application of the adaptive median filter. The obtained results were then compared for each scenario to determine the best approach for deblurring noisy images. 图像模糊是指图像的整体清晰度下降的退化。图像模糊是由多种因素造成的。此外，在图像采集过程中，噪声可能会添加到图像中。这种有噪声且模糊的图像可以表示为原始图像与相关点扩散函数以及加性噪声的卷积所产生的图像。然而，模糊图像通常包含的信息不足以唯一地确定合理的原始图像。根据模糊信息的可用性，图像去模糊方法可以分为盲去模糊方法和非盲去模糊方法。在非盲图像去模糊中，关于相应的点扩散函数和添加的噪声的一些先验信息是已知的。本研究的目的是确定非盲图像去模糊方法在识别和消除模糊图像中存在的噪声方面的有效性。本研究针对椒盐噪声的噪声图像，对三种非盲图像去模糊方法，即维纳去卷积、Lucy-Richardson去卷积和正则化去卷积进行了比较分析。模拟了两种类型的模糊效果，即运动模糊和高斯模糊。上述三种非盲去模糊方法分别应用于两种场景：对带噪声的模糊图像直接去模糊和应用自适应中值滤波器去噪后的图像去模糊。然后对每种场景所获得的结果进行比较，以确定去模糊噪声图像的最佳方法。 本文比较了三种非盲图像去模糊方法在处理含噪模糊图像时的有效性。 Poorna Banerjee Dasgupta cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Danila Rozhevskii,Jie Zhu,Boyuan Zhao
title: Psychologically-Inspired Music Recommendation System
title_zh: 心理启发的音乐推荐系统
abstract: In the last few years, automated recommendation systems have been a major focus in the music field, where companies such as Spotify, Amazon, and Apple are competing in the ability to generate the most personalized music suggestions for their users. One of the challenges developers still fail to tackle is taking into account the psychological and emotional aspects of the music. Our goal is to find a way to integrate users' personal traits and their current emotional state into a single music recommendation system with both collaborative and content-based filtering. We seek to relate the personality and the current emotional state of the listener to the audio features in order to build an emotion-aware MRS. We compare the results both quantitatively and qualitatively to the output of the traditional MRS based on the Spotify API data to understand if our advancements make a significant impact on the quality of music recommendations.
summary: In the last few years, automated recommendation systems have been a major focus in the music field, where companies such as Spotify, Amazon, and Apple are competing in the ability to generate the most personalized music suggestions for their users. One of the challenges developers still fail to tackle is taking into account the psychological and emotional aspects of the music. Our goal is to find a way to integrate users' personal traits and their current emotional state into a single music recommendation system with both collaborative and content-based filtering. We seek to relate the personality and the current emotional state of the listener to the audio features in order to build an emotion-aware MRS. We compare the results both quantitatively and qualitatively to the output of the traditional MRS based on the Spotify API data to understand if our advancements make a significant impact on the quality of music recommendations.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，自动推荐系统一直是音乐领域的主要焦点，Spotify、亚马逊和苹果等公司都在争夺为用户生成最个性化音乐建议的能力。开发者仍然未能解决的挑战之一是考虑音乐的心理和情感方面。我们的目标是找到一种方法，将用户的个人特征和当前的情绪状态整合到一个具有协作和基于内容的过滤的音乐推荐系统中。我们寻求将听众的个性和当前情绪状态与音频特征联系起来，以构建情绪感知的 MRS。我们将结果与基于 Spotify API 数据的传统 MRS 的输出进行定量和定性比较，以了解我们的进步是否对音乐推荐的质量产生重大影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种结合用户心理特征和情绪状态的音乐推荐系统，以提升推荐质量。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐推荐系统未能充分考虑用户的心理和情感因素，导致个性化不足，需通过整合这些因素提升推荐效果。
AI.method: 融合协同过滤与内容过滤方法，将用户个性特征和情绪状态与音频特征关联，基于Spotify API数据进行对比验证。
AI.result: 定量和定性结果均显示，新系统在推荐质量上优于传统方法，情感感知能力显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 整合心理与情感因素的音乐推荐系统能有效提升个性化水平，为用户提供更贴合需求的音乐体验。

authors_text: Xingzhe He,Bastian Wandt,Helge Rhodin
title: LatentKeypointGAN: Controlling Images via Latent Keypoints -- Extended Abstract
title_zh: LatentKeypointGAN：通过潜在关键点控制图像——扩展摘要
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.15812
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.15812
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) can now generate photo-realistic images. However, how to best control the image content remains an open challenge. We introduce LatentKeypointGAN, a two-stage GAN internally conditioned on a set of keypoints and associated appearance embeddings providing control of the position and style of the generated objects and their respective parts. A major difficulty that we address is disentangling the image into spatial and appearance factors with little domain knowledge and supervision signals. We demonstrate in a user study and quantitative experiments that LatentKeypointGAN provides an interpretable latent space that can be used to re-arrange the generated images by re-positioning and exchanging keypoint embeddings, such as generating portraits by combining the eyes, and mouth from different images. Notably, our method does not require labels as it is self-supervised and thereby applies to diverse application domains, such as editing portraits, indoor rooms, and full-body human poses.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) can now generate photo-realistic images. However, how to best control the image content remains an open challenge. We introduce LatentKeypointGAN, a two-stage GAN internally conditioned on a set of keypoints and associated appearance embeddings providing control of the position and style of the generated objects and their respective parts. A major difficulty that we address is disentangling the image into spatial and appearance factors with little domain knowledge and supervision signals. We demonstrate in a user study and quantitative experiments that LatentKeypointGAN provides an interpretable latent space that can be used to re-arrange the generated images by re-positioning and exchanging keypoint embeddings, such as generating portraits by combining the eyes, and mouth from different images. Notably, our method does not require labels as it is self-supervised and thereby applies to diverse application domains, such as editing portraits, indoor rooms, and full-body human poses.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 现在可以生成逼真的图像。然而，如何最好地控制图像内容仍然是一个开放的挑战。我们引入 LatentKeypointGAN，这是一种两阶段 GAN，内部以一组关键点和相关外观嵌入为条件，提供对生成对象及其各自部分的位置和样式的控制。我们解决的一个主要困难是在几乎没有领域知识和监督信号的情况下将图像分解为空间和外观因素。我们在用户研究和定量实验中证明，LatentKeypointGAN 提供了一个可解释的潜在空间，可用于通过重新定位和交换关键点嵌入来重新排列生成的图像，例如通过组合不同图像的眼睛和嘴巴来生成肖像。值得注意的是，我们的方法不需要标签，因为它是自我监督的，因此适用于不同的应用领域，例如编辑肖像、室内房间和全身人体姿势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过潜在关键点控制图像生成的两阶段GAN模型，实现对图像内容的可解释控制。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN难以有效控制生成图像内容，如何在无监督条件下分离空间与外观因素是关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用两阶段GAN架构，结合关键点位置与外观嵌入实现内容控制，通过自监督学习无需领域标签。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成可解释潜在空间，支持关键点重排与嵌入交换，适用于多领域图像编辑。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法无需标注数据，有效解耦空间与外观因素，适用于多样化图像生成与编辑任务。

authors_text: Yuan He,Jiaoyan Chen,Hang Dong,Ernesto Jiménez-Ruiz,Ali Hadian,Ian Horrocks
title: Machine Learning-Friendly Biomedical Datasets for Equivalence and Subsumption Ontology Matching
title_zh: 用于等价和包含本体匹配的机器学习友好的生物医学数据集
comment: Accepted paper (Best Resource Paper Candidate) in the 21st International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC-2022); Bio-ML Dataset: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6510086
comments: Accepted paper (Best Resource Paper Candidate) in the 21st International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC-2022); Bio-ML Dataset: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6510086
abstract: Ontology Matching (OM) plays an important role in many domains such as bioinformatics and the Semantic Web, and its research is becoming increasingly popular, especially with the application of machine learning (ML) techniques. Although the Ontology Alignment Evaluation Initiative (OAEI) represents an impressive effort for the systematic evaluation of OM systems, it still suffers from several limitations including limited evaluation of subsumption mappings, suboptimal reference mappings, and limited support for the evaluation of ML-based systems. To tackle these limitations, we introduce five new biomedical OM tasks involving ontologies extracted from Mondo and UMLS. Each task includes both equivalence and subsumption matching; the quality of reference mappings is ensured by human curation, ontology pruning, etc.; and a comprehensive evaluation framework is proposed to measure OM performance from various perspectives for both ML-based and non-ML-based OM systems. We report evaluation results for OM systems of different types to demonstrate the usage of these resources, all of which are publicly available as part of the new BioML track at OAEI 2022.
summary: Ontology Matching (OM) plays an important role in many domains such as bioinformatics and the Semantic Web, and its research is becoming increasingly popular, especially with the application of machine learning (ML) techniques. Although the Ontology Alignment Evaluation Initiative (OAEI) represents an impressive effort for the systematic evaluation of OM systems, it still suffers from several limitations including limited evaluation of subsumption mappings, suboptimal reference mappings, and limited support for the evaluation of ML-based systems. To tackle these limitations, we introduce five new biomedical OM tasks involving ontologies extracted from Mondo and UMLS. Each task includes both equivalence and subsumption matching; the quality of reference mappings is ensured by human curation, ontology pruning, etc.; and a comprehensive evaluation framework is proposed to measure OM performance from various perspectives for both ML-based and non-ML-based OM systems. We report evaluation results for OM systems of different types to demonstrate the usage of these resources, all of which are publicly available as part of the new BioML track at OAEI 2022.
abstract_zh: 本体匹配（OM）在生物信息学和语义网等许多领域发挥着重要作用，其研究越来越受欢迎，特别是随着机器学习（ML）技术的应用。尽管本体对齐评估计划（OAEI）在 OM 系统的系统评估方面做出了令人印象深刻的努力，但它仍然受到一些限制，包括对包含映射的有限评估、次优参考映射以及对基于 ML 的系统评估的有限支持。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了五种新的生物医学 OM 任务，涉及从 Mondo 和 UMLS 中提取的本体。每个任务都包含等价匹配和包含匹配；参考映射的质量通过人工管理、本体修剪等来保证；并提出了一个综合评估框架，从不同角度衡量基于机器学习和非基于机器学习的 OM 系统的 OM 性能。我们报告了不同类型的 OM 系统的评估结果，以展示这些资源的使用情况，所有这些资源都作为 OAEI 2022 上新 BioML 轨道的一部分公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出五个新的生物医学本体匹配任务，旨在解决现有评估框架对机器学习友好型系统的支持不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有OAEI评估框架存在对subsumption映射评估不足、参考映射质量不高及对ML系统支持有限等缺陷，需构建更完善的评估数据集。
AI.method: 基于Mondo和UMLS本体构建包含等价与subsumption匹配的五项任务，通过人工审核和本体精简确保参考映射质量，并设计多维度评估框架。
AI.result: 评估了多种OM系统性能，所有资源作为OAEI 2022 BioML赛道公开，验证了数据集对ML和非ML系统的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集和评估框架为生物医学领域本体匹配研究提供了标准化资源，推动了机器学习技术在OM中的应用发展。

search_text: Machine Learning-Friendly Biomedical Datasets for Equivalence and Subsumption Ontology Matching 用于等价和包含本体匹配的机器学习友好的生物医学数据集 Ontology Matching (OM) plays an important role in many domains such as bioinformatics and the Semantic Web, and its research is becoming increasingly popular, especially with the application of machine learning (ML) techniques. Although the Ontology Alignment Evaluation Initiative (OAEI) represents an impressive effort for the systematic evaluation of OM systems, it still suffers from several limitations including limited evaluation of subsumption mappings, suboptimal reference mappings, and limited support for the evaluation of ML-based systems. To tackle these limitations, we introduce five new biomedical OM tasks involving ontologies extracted from Mondo and UMLS. Each task includes both equivalence and subsumption matching; the quality of reference mappings is ensured by human curation, ontology pruning, etc.; and a comprehensive evaluation framework is proposed to measure OM performance from various perspectives for both ML-based and non-ML-based OM systems. We report evaluation results for OM systems of different types to demonstrate the usage of these resources, all of which are publicly available as part of the new BioML track at OAEI 2022. 本体匹配（OM）在生物信息学和语义网等许多领域发挥着重要作用，其研究越来越受欢迎，特别是随着机器学习（ML）技术的应用。尽管本体对齐评估计划（OAEI）在 OM 系统的系统评估方面做出了令人印象深刻的努力，但它仍然受到一些限制，包括对包含映射的有限评估、次优参考映射以及对基于 ML 的系统评估的有限支持。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了五种新的生物医学 OM 任务，涉及从 Mondo 和 UMLS 中提取的本体。每个任务都包含等价匹配和包含匹配；参考映射的质量通过人工管理、本体修剪等来保证；并提出了一个综合评估框架，从不同角度衡量基于机器学习和非基于机器学习的 OM 系统的 OM 性能。我们报告了不同类型的 OM 系统的评估结果，以展示这些资源的使用情况，所有这些资源都作为 OAEI 2022 上新 BioML 轨道的一部分公开提供。 本文提出五个新的生物医学本体匹配任务，旨在解决现有评估框架对机器学习友好型系统的支持不足问题。 Yuan He,Jiaoyan Chen,Hang Dong,Ernesto Jiménez-Ruiz,Ali Hadian,Ian Horrocks cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.GN

authors_text: Viktoria Markova,Matteo Ronchetti,Wolfgang Wein,Oliver Zettinig,Raphael Prevost
title: Global Multi-modal 2D/3D Registration via Local Descriptors Learning
title_zh: 通过局部描述符学习进行全局多模态 2D/3D 配准
comment: This preprint was submitted to MICCAI 2022 and has not undergone post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution will be published in Springer LNCS
comments: This preprint was submitted to MICCAI 2022 and has not undergone post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution will be published in Springer LNCS
abstract: Multi-modal registration is a required step for many image-guided procedures, especially ultrasound-guided interventions that require anatomical context. While a number of such registration algorithms are already available, they all require a good initialization to succeed due to the challenging appearance of ultrasound images and the arbitrary coordinate system they are acquired in. In this paper, we present a novel approach to solve the problem of registration of an ultrasound sweep to a pre-operative image. We learn dense keypoint descriptors from which we then estimate the registration. We show that our method overcomes the challenges inherent to registration tasks with freehand ultrasound sweeps, namely, the multi-modality and multidimensionality of the data in addition to lack of precise ground truth and low amounts of training examples. We derive a registration method that is fast, generic, fully automatic, does not require any initialization and can naturally generate visualizations aiding interpretability and explainability. Our approach is evaluated on a clinical dataset of paired MR volumes and ultrasound sequences.
summary: Multi-modal registration is a required step for many image-guided procedures, especially ultrasound-guided interventions that require anatomical context. While a number of such registration algorithms are already available, they all require a good initialization to succeed due to the challenging appearance of ultrasound images and the arbitrary coordinate system they are acquired in. In this paper, we present a novel approach to solve the problem of registration of an ultrasound sweep to a pre-operative image. We learn dense keypoint descriptors from which we then estimate the registration. We show that our method overcomes the challenges inherent to registration tasks with freehand ultrasound sweeps, namely, the multi-modality and multidimensionality of the data in addition to lack of precise ground truth and low amounts of training examples. We derive a registration method that is fast, generic, fully automatic, does not require any initialization and can naturally generate visualizations aiding interpretability and explainability. Our approach is evaluated on a clinical dataset of paired MR volumes and ultrasound sequences.
abstract_zh: 多模态配准是许多图像引导手术的必需步骤，尤其是需要解剖背景的超声引导干预措施。虽然已经有许多这样的配准算法可用，但由于超声图像的外观和采集它们的任意坐标系具有挑战性，它们都需要良好的初始化才能成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来解决超声扫描与术前图像的配准问题。我们学习密集的关键点描述符，然后从中估计配准。我们表明，我们的方法克服了徒手超声扫描配准任务固有的挑战，即数据的多模态和多维性，以及缺乏精确的地面实况和少量训练示例。我们推导出一种快速、通用、全自动的配准方法，不需要任何初始化，并且可以自然地生成有助于解释和解释的可视化。我们的方法在配对 MR 体积和超声序列的临床数据集上进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需初始化的多模态2D/3D配准方法，通过学习局部描述子实现超声影像与术前图像的自动配准。
AI.motivation: 现有超声引导手术配准方法依赖良好初始化，但超声影像模态差异大且缺乏精确标注，传统方法难以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 从超声影像中学习密集关键点描述子，构建全局配准模型，通过端到端学习实现多模态数据对齐并生成可视化解释。
AI.result: 在临床MR-超声配准数据集上验证，方法在无初始化条件下达到较高配准精度，且具备良好的泛化能力和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的描述子学习框架有效解决了自由手超声配准中的多模态、多维数据挑战，为术中导航提供了可靠解决方案。

search_text: Global Multi-modal 2D/3D Registration via Local Descriptors Learning 通过局部描述符学习进行全局多模态 2D/3D 配准 Multi-modal registration is a required step for many image-guided procedures, especially ultrasound-guided interventions that require anatomical context. While a number of such registration algorithms are already available, they all require a good initialization to succeed due to the challenging appearance of ultrasound images and the arbitrary coordinate system they are acquired in. In this paper, we present a novel approach to solve the problem of registration of an ultrasound sweep to a pre-operative image. We learn dense keypoint descriptors from which we then estimate the registration. We show that our method overcomes the challenges inherent to registration tasks with freehand ultrasound sweeps, namely, the multi-modality and multidimensionality of the data in addition to lack of precise ground truth and low amounts of training examples. We derive a registration method that is fast, generic, fully automatic, does not require any initialization and can naturally generate visualizations aiding interpretability and explainability. Our approach is evaluated on a clinical dataset of paired MR volumes and ultrasound sequences. 多模态配准是许多图像引导手术的必需步骤，尤其是需要解剖背景的超声引导干预措施。虽然已经有许多这样的配准算法可用，但由于超声图像的外观和采集它们的任意坐标系具有挑战性，它们都需要良好的初始化才能成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来解决超声扫描与术前图像的配准问题。我们学习密集的关键点描述符，然后从中估计配准。我们表明，我们的方法克服了徒手超声扫描配准任务固有的挑战，即数据的多模态和多维性，以及缺乏精确的地面实况和少量训练示例。我们推导出一种快速、通用、全自动的配准方法，不需要任何初始化，并且可以自然地生成有助于解释和解释的可视化。我们的方法在配对 MR 体积和超声序列的临床数据集上进行评估。 本文提出一种无需初始化的多模态2D/3D配准方法，通过学习局部描述子实现超声影像与术前图像的自动配准。 Viktoria Markova,Matteo Ronchetti,Wolfgang Wein,Oliver Zettinig,Raphael Prevost eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Junting Pan,Adrian Bulat,Fuwen Tan,Xiatian Zhu,Lukasz Dudziak,Hongsheng Li,Georgios Tzimiropoulos,Brais Martinez
title: EdgeViTs: Competing Light-weight CNNs on Mobile Devices with Vision Transformers
title_zh: EdgeViTs：移动设备上的轻量级 CNN 与 Vision Transformers 竞争
abstract: Self-attention based models such as vision transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a very competitive architecture alternative to convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in computer vision. Despite increasingly stronger variants with ever-higher recognition accuracies, due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention, existing ViTs are typically demanding in computation and model size. Although several successful design choices (e.g., the convolutions and hierarchical multi-stage structure) of prior CNNs have been reintroduced into recent ViTs, they are still not sufficient to meet the limited resource requirements of mobile devices. This motivates a very recent attempt to develop light ViTs based on the state-of-the-art MobileNet-v2, but still leaves a performance gap behind. In this work, pushing further along this under-studied direction we introduce EdgeViTs, a new family of light-weight ViTs that, for the first time, enable attention-based vision models to compete with the best light-weight CNNs in the tradeoff between accuracy and on-device efficiency. This is realized by introducing a highly cost-effective local-global-local (LGL) information exchange bottleneck based on optimal integration of self-attention and convolutions. For device-dedicated evaluation, rather than relying on inaccurate proxies like the number of FLOPs or parameters, we adopt a practical approach of focusing directly on on-device latency and, for the first time, energy efficiency. Specifically, we show that our models are Pareto-optimal when both accuracy-latency and accuracy-energy trade-offs are considered, achieving strict dominance over other ViTs in almost all cases and competing with the most efficient CNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/saic-fi/edgevit.
summary: Self-attention based models such as vision transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a very competitive architecture alternative to convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in computer vision. Despite increasingly stronger variants with ever-higher recognition accuracies, due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention, existing ViTs are typically demanding in computation and model size. Although several successful design choices (e.g., the convolutions and hierarchical multi-stage structure) of prior CNNs have been reintroduced into recent ViTs, they are still not sufficient to meet the limited resource requirements of mobile devices. This motivates a very recent attempt to develop light ViTs based on the state-of-the-art MobileNet-v2, but still leaves a performance gap behind. In this work, pushing further along this under-studied direction we introduce EdgeViTs, a new family of light-weight ViTs that, for the first time, enable attention-based vision models to compete with the best light-weight CNNs in the tradeoff between accuracy and on-device efficiency. This is realized by introducing a highly cost-effective local-global-local (LGL) information exchange bottleneck based on optimal integration of self-attention and convolutions. For device-dedicated evaluation, rather than relying on inaccurate proxies like the number of FLOPs or parameters, we adopt a practical approach of focusing directly on on-device latency and, for the first time, energy efficiency. Specifically, we show that our models are Pareto-optimal when both accuracy-latency and accuracy-energy trade-offs are considered, achieving strict dominance over other ViTs in almost all cases and competing with the most efficient CNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/saic-fi/edgevit.
abstract_zh: 基于自注意力的模型，例如视觉变换器（ViT），已经成为计算机视觉中卷积神经网络（CNN）的一种非常有竞争力的架构替代品。尽管变体越来越强大，识别精度也越来越高，但由于自注意力的二次复杂性，现有的 ViT 通常对计算和模型大小要求很高。尽管先前 CNN 的几种成功设计选择（例如，卷积和分层多级结构）已被重新引入到最近的 ViT 中，但它们仍然不足以满足移动设备有限的资源需求。这促使人们最近尝试开发基于最先进的 MobileNet-v2 的轻型 ViT，但仍然存在性能差距。在这项工作中，为了进一步推动这个尚未充分研究的方向，我们引入了 EdgeViTs，这是一个新的轻量级 ViT 系列，它首次使基于注意力的视觉模型能够在准确性和设备效率之间的权衡中与最好的轻量级 CNN 竞争。这是通过引入基于自注意力和卷积优化集成的高度成本效益的局部-全局-局部（LGL）信息交换瓶颈来实现的。对于设备专用评估，我们不依赖于浮点运算数或参数等不准确的代理，而是采用直接关注设备上延迟和能源效率的实用方法。具体来说，我们表明，当考虑准确性-延迟和准确性-能量权衡时，我们的模型是帕累托最优，在几乎所有情况下都实现了对其他 ViT 的严格优势，并与最高效的 CNN 竞争。代码可在 https://github.com/saic-fi/edgevit 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型轻量级视觉Transformer模型EdgeViTs，在移动端设备上实现与最佳轻量级CNN模型的精度与效率平衡。
AI.motivation: 尽管Vision Transformers（ViTs）在精度上表现优异，但其二次复杂度导致计算量和模型体积过大，难以满足移动端资源限制，现有轻量ViT仍存在性能差距。
AI.method: 设计了基于自注意力与卷积最优融合的局部-全局-局部（LGL）信息交换瓶颈结构，并采用实际设备延迟和能耗效率作为评估指标，而非传统FLOPs或参数量代理指标。
AI.result: EdgeViTs在精度-延迟和精度-能耗双目标下达到帕累托最优，在几乎所有场景中严格优于其他ViT模型，并与最高效CNN模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 通过LGL结构创新与真实设备评估方法，EdgeViTs首次实现注意力机制视觉模型在移动端与轻量CNN的全面竞争，为模型轻量化提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型轻量级视觉Transformer模型EdgeViTs，在移动端设备上实现与最佳轻量级CNN模型的精度与效率平衡。

search_text: EdgeViTs: Competing Light-weight CNNs on Mobile Devices with Vision Transformers EdgeViTs：移动设备上的轻量级 CNN 与 Vision Transformers 竞争 Self-attention based models such as vision transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a very competitive architecture alternative to convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in computer vision. Despite increasingly stronger variants with ever-higher recognition accuracies, due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention, existing ViTs are typically demanding in computation and model size. Although several successful design choices (e.g., the convolutions and hierarchical multi-stage structure) of prior CNNs have been reintroduced into recent ViTs, they are still not sufficient to meet the limited resource requirements of mobile devices. This motivates a very recent attempt to develop light ViTs based on the state-of-the-art MobileNet-v2, but still leaves a performance gap behind. In this work, pushing further along this under-studied direction we introduce EdgeViTs, a new family of light-weight ViTs that, for the first time, enable attention-based vision models to compete with the best light-weight CNNs in the tradeoff between accuracy and on-device efficiency. This is realized by introducing a highly cost-effective local-global-local (LGL) information exchange bottleneck based on optimal integration of self-attention and convolutions. For device-dedicated evaluation, rather than relying on inaccurate proxies like the number of FLOPs or parameters, we adopt a practical approach of focusing directly on on-device latency and, for the first time, energy efficiency. Specifically, we show that our models are Pareto-optimal when both accuracy-latency and accuracy-energy trade-offs are considered, achieving strict dominance over other ViTs in almost all cases and competing with the most efficient CNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/saic-fi/edgevit. 基于自注意力的模型，例如视觉变换器（ViT），已经成为计算机视觉中卷积神经网络（CNN）的一种非常有竞争力的架构替代品。尽管变体越来越强大，识别精度也越来越高，但由于自注意力的二次复杂性，现有的 ViT 通常对计算和模型大小要求很高。尽管先前 CNN 的几种成功设计选择（例如，卷积和分层多级结构）已被重新引入到最近的 ViT 中，但它们仍然不足以满足移动设备有限的资源需求。这促使人们最近尝试开发基于最先进的 MobileNet-v2 的轻型 ViT，但仍然存在性能差距。在这项工作中，为了进一步推动这个尚未充分研究的方向，我们引入了 EdgeViTs，这是一个新的轻量级 ViT 系列，它首次使基于注意力的视觉模型能够在准确性和设备效率之间的权衡中与最好的轻量级 CNN 竞争。这是通过引入基于自注意力和卷积优化集成的高度成本效益的局部-全局-局部（LGL）信息交换瓶颈来实现的。对于设备专用评估，我们不依赖于浮点运算数或参数等不准确的代理，而是采用直接关注设备上延迟和能源效率的实用方法。具体来说，我们表明，当考虑准确性-延迟和准确性-能量权衡时，我们的模型是帕累托最优，在几乎所有情况下都实现了对其他 ViT 的严格优势，并与最高效的 CNN 竞争。代码可在 https://github.com/saic-fi/edgevit 获取。 本文提出了一种新型轻量级视觉Transformer模型EdgeViTs，在移动端设备上实现与最佳轻量级CNN模型的精度与效率平衡。 Junting Pan,Adrian Bulat,Fuwen Tan,Xiatian Zhu,Lukasz Dudziak,Hongsheng Li,Georgios Tzimiropoulos,Brais Martinez cs.CV

authors_text: Yuan Gong,Jin Yu,James Glass
title: Vocalsound: A Dataset for Improving Human Vocal Sounds Recognition
title_zh: Vocalsound：改善人类声音识别的数据集
comment: Accepted at ICASSP 2022. Dataset and code at https://github.com/YuanGongND/vocalsound Interactive Colab demo at https://colab.research.google.com/github/YuanGongND/vocalsound/blob/main/colab/VocalSound.ipynb
comments: Accepted at ICASSP 2022. Dataset and code at https://github.com/YuanGongND/vocalsound Interactive Colab demo at https://colab.research.google.com/github/YuanGongND/vocalsound/blob/main/colab/VocalSound.ipynb
abstract: Recognizing human non-speech vocalizations is an important task and has broad applications such as automatic sound transcription and health condition monitoring. However, existing datasets have a relatively small number of vocal sound samples or noisy labels. As a consequence, state-of-the-art audio event classification models may not perform well in detecting human vocal sounds. To support research on building robust and accurate vocal sound recognition, we have created a VocalSound dataset consisting of over 21,000 crowdsourced recordings of laughter, sighs, coughs, throat clearing, sneezes, and sniffs from 3,365 unique subjects. Experiments show that the vocal sound recognition performance of a model can be significantly improved by 41.9% by adding VocalSound dataset to an existing dataset as training material. In addition, different from previous datasets, the VocalSound dataset contains meta information such as speaker age, gender, native language, country, and health condition.
summary: Recognizing human non-speech vocalizations is an important task and has broad applications such as automatic sound transcription and health condition monitoring. However, existing datasets have a relatively small number of vocal sound samples or noisy labels. As a consequence, state-of-the-art audio event classification models may not perform well in detecting human vocal sounds. To support research on building robust and accurate vocal sound recognition, we have created a VocalSound dataset consisting of over 21,000 crowdsourced recordings of laughter, sighs, coughs, throat clearing, sneezes, and sniffs from 3,365 unique subjects. Experiments show that the vocal sound recognition performance of a model can be significantly improved by 41.9% by adding VocalSound dataset to an existing dataset as training material. In addition, different from previous datasets, the VocalSound dataset contains meta information such as speaker age, gender, native language, country, and health condition.
abstract_zh: 识别人类非语音发声是一项重要任务，具有广泛的应用，例如自动声音转录和健康状况监测。然而，现有数据集的声音样本或噪声标签数量相对较少。因此，最先进的音频事件分类模型在检测人类声音方面可能表现不佳。为了支持建立强大且准确的声音识别的研究，我们创建了一个 VocalSound 数据集，其中包含来自 3,365 个独特受试者的 21,000 多个笑声、叹息、咳嗽、清喉咙、打喷嚏和嗅觉的众包录音。实验表明，通过将VocalSound数据集添加到现有数据集作为训练材料，模型的人声识别性能可以显着提高41.9%。此外，与以往的数据集不同的是，VocalSound数据集包含说话者年龄、性别、母语、国家和健康状况等元信息。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为VocalSound的数据集，用于改进人类非语音声音的识别。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集中非语音声音样本数量较少或标签存在噪声，导致现有音频事件分类模型在检测人类声音时表现不佳。
AI.method: 创建了一个包含超过21,000个来自3,365名不同受试者的笑声、叹息、咳嗽、清嗓、打喷嚏和嗅觉等非语音声音的众包数据集，并包含说话人年龄、性别、母语、国家和健康状况等元信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，将VocalSound数据集作为训练材料加入现有数据集中，可以显著提高模型在非语音声音识别任务中的性能，提升幅度达41.9%。
AI.conclusion: VocalSound数据集为构建更准确和鲁棒的非语音声音识别模型提供了重要的支持。

authors_text: Yuan Gong,Ziyi Chen,Iek-Heng Chu,Peng Chang,James Glass
title: Transformer-Based Multi-Aspect Multi-Granularity Non-Native English Speaker Pronunciation Assessment
title_zh: 基于Transformer的多方面多粒度非英语母语者发音评估
comment: Accepted at ICASSP 2022. Code at https://github.com/YuanGongND/gopt Interactive Colab demo at https://colab.research.google.com/github/YuanGongND/gopt/blob/master/colab/GOPT_GPU.ipynb . ICASSP 2022
comments: Accepted at ICASSP 2022. Code at https://github.com/YuanGongND/gopt Interactive Colab demo at https://colab.research.google.com/github/YuanGongND/gopt/blob/master/colab/GOPT_GPU.ipynb . ICASSP 2022
abstract: Automatic pronunciation assessment is an important technology to help self-directed language learners. While pronunciation quality has multiple aspects including accuracy, fluency, completeness, and prosody, previous efforts typically only model one aspect (e.g., accuracy) at one granularity (e.g., at the phoneme-level). In this work, we explore modeling multi-aspect pronunciation assessment at multiple granularities. Specifically, we train a Goodness Of Pronunciation feature-based Transformer (GOPT) with multi-task learning. Experiments show that GOPT achieves the best results on speechocean762 with a public automatic speech recognition (ASR) acoustic model trained on Librispeech.
summary: Automatic pronunciation assessment is an important technology to help self-directed language learners. While pronunciation quality has multiple aspects including accuracy, fluency, completeness, and prosody, previous efforts typically only model one aspect (e.g., accuracy) at one granularity (e.g., at the phoneme-level). In this work, we explore modeling multi-aspect pronunciation assessment at multiple granularities. Specifically, we train a Goodness Of Pronunciation feature-based Transformer (GOPT) with multi-task learning. Experiments show that GOPT achieves the best results on speechocean762 with a public automatic speech recognition (ASR) acoustic model trained on Librispeech.
abstract_zh: 自动发音评估是帮助自主语言学习者的一项重要技术。虽然发音质量具有多个方面，包括准确性、流畅性、完整性和韵律，但以前的努力通常仅在一种粒度（例如，音素级别）对一方面（例如，准确性）进行建模。在这项工作中，我们探索了多粒度的多方面发音评估建模。具体来说，我们通过多任务学习来训练基于发音特征的 Transformer (GOPT)。实验表明，GOPT 使用在 Librispeech 上训练的公共自动语音识别 (ASR) 声学模型在 Speechocean762 上取得了最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的多方面多粒度非母语英语发音评估方法，以提高自动发音评估的全面性。
AI.motivation: 现有发音评估模型通常仅关注单一维度（如准确性）和单一粒度（如音素级），难以全面反映发音质量的多维度特征。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架训练基于发音质量特征的Transformer模型（GOPT），同时建模多方面（准确性、流畅性等）和多粒度（音素级、词级等）评估任务。
AI.result: 在speechocean762数据集上，使用Librispeech训练的公开ASR模型作为基础，GOPT在发音评估任务中取得最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 多方面多粒度建模有效提升了发音评估的准确性，为非母语者发音评估系统提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Transformer-Based Multi-Aspect Multi-Granularity Non-Native English Speaker Pronunciation Assessment 基于Transformer的多方面多粒度非英语母语者发音评估 Automatic pronunciation assessment is an important technology to help self-directed language learners. While pronunciation quality has multiple aspects including accuracy, fluency, completeness, and prosody, previous efforts typically only model one aspect (e.g., accuracy) at one granularity (e.g., at the phoneme-level). In this work, we explore modeling multi-aspect pronunciation assessment at multiple granularities. Specifically, we train a Goodness Of Pronunciation feature-based Transformer (GOPT) with multi-task learning. Experiments show that GOPT achieves the best results on speechocean762 with a public automatic speech recognition (ASR) acoustic model trained on Librispeech. 自动发音评估是帮助自主语言学习者的一项重要技术。虽然发音质量具有多个方面，包括准确性、流畅性、完整性和韵律，但以前的努力通常仅在一种粒度（例如，音素级别）对一方面（例如，准确性）进行建模。在这项工作中，我们探索了多粒度的多方面发音评估建模。具体来说，我们通过多任务学习来训练基于发音特征的 Transformer (GOPT)。实验表明，GOPT 使用在 Librispeech 上训练的公共自动语音识别 (ASR) 声学模型在 Speechocean762 上取得了最佳结果。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的多方面多粒度非母语英语发音评估方法，以提高自动发音评估的全面性。 Yuan Gong,Ziyi Chen,Iek-Heng Chu,Peng Chang,James Glass cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Liangbin Xie. Xintao Wang,Honglun Zhang,Chao Dong,Ying Shan
title: VFHQ: A High-Quality Dataset and Benchmark for Video Face Super-Resolution
title_zh: VFHQ：视频人脸超分辨率的高质量数据集和基准
abstract: Most of the existing video face super-resolution (VFSR) methods are trained and evaluated on VoxCeleb1, which is designed specifically for speaker identification and the frames in this dataset are of low quality. As a consequence, the VFSR models trained on this dataset can not output visual-pleasing results. In this paper, we develop an automatic and scalable pipeline to collect a high-quality video face dataset (VFHQ), which contains over $16,000$ high-fidelity clips of diverse interview scenarios. To verify the necessity of VFHQ, we further conduct experiments and demonstrate that VFSR models trained on our VFHQ dataset can generate results with sharper edges and finer textures than those trained on VoxCeleb1. In addition, we show that the temporal information plays a pivotal role in eliminating video consistency issues as well as further improving visual performance. Based on VFHQ, by analyzing the benchmarking study of several state-of-the-art algorithms under bicubic and blind settings. See our project page: https://liangbinxie.github.io/projects/vfhq
summary: Most of the existing video face super-resolution (VFSR) methods are trained and evaluated on VoxCeleb1, which is designed specifically for speaker identification and the frames in this dataset are of low quality. As a consequence, the VFSR models trained on this dataset can not output visual-pleasing results. In this paper, we develop an automatic and scalable pipeline to collect a high-quality video face dataset (VFHQ), which contains over $16,000$ high-fidelity clips of diverse interview scenarios. To verify the necessity of VFHQ, we further conduct experiments and demonstrate that VFSR models trained on our VFHQ dataset can generate results with sharper edges and finer textures than those trained on VoxCeleb1. In addition, we show that the temporal information plays a pivotal role in eliminating video consistency issues as well as further improving visual performance. Based on VFHQ, by analyzing the benchmarking study of several state-of-the-art algorithms under bicubic and blind settings. See our project page: https://liangbinxie.github.io/projects/vfhq
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的视频人脸超分辨率（VFSR）方法都是在 VoxCeleb1 上进行训练和评估的，VoxCeleb1 是专门为说话人识别而设计的，并且该数据集中的帧质量较低。因此，在此数据集上训练的 VFSR 模型无法输出令人愉悦的结果。在本文中，我们开发了一个自动且可扩展的管道来收集高质量的视频人脸数据集 (VFHQ)，其中包含超过 16,000 美元的不同采访场景的高保真剪辑。为了验证 VFHQ 的必要性，我们进一步进行了实验，并证明在我们的 VFHQ 数据集上训练的 VFSR 模型可以生成比在 VoxCeleb1 上训练的结果具有更锐利的边缘和更精细的纹理的结果。此外，我们还表明时间信息在消除视频一致性问题以及进一步提高视觉性能方面发挥着关键作用。基于VFHQ，通过分析双三次和盲设置下几种最先进算法的基准测试研究。请参阅我们的项目页面：https://liangbinxie.github.io/projects/vfhq

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个高质量的视频人脸超分辨率数据集VFHQ，并通过实验验证其在提升模型视觉效果上的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有视频人脸超分辨率方法依赖低质量的VoxCeleb1数据集，导致模型输出效果不佳，需构建更高质量的数据集以推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 开发自动可扩展的采集管道，收集超过16,000个高保真度访谈场景视频片段，并通过时序信息分析提升视频一致性与视觉表现。
AI.result: 基于VFHQ训练的模型在边缘锐度和纹理细节上优于VoxCeleb1训练模型，且时序信息对消除视频不一致性和提升性能至关重要。
AI.conclusion: VFHQ为视频人脸超分辨率提供了必要基准，时序信息分析进一步优化了模型表现，推动了该领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Iraj Abedi,Mahsa Vali,Bentolhoda Otroshi,Maryam Zamanian,Hamidreza Bolhasani
title: HRCTCov19 -- A High-Resolution Chest CT Scan Image Dataset for COVID-19 Diagnosis and Differentiation
title_zh: HRCTCov19——用于 COVID-19 诊断和鉴别的高分辨率胸部 CT 扫描图像数据集
abstract: Introduction: During the COVID-19 pandemic, computed tomography (CT) was a popular method for diagnosing COVID-19 patients. HRCT (High-Resolution Computed Tomography) is a form of computed tomography that uses advanced methods to improve image resolution. Publicly accessible COVID-19 CT image datasets are very difficult to come by due to privacy concerns, which impedes the study and development of AI-powered COVID-19 diagnostic algorithms based on CT images. Data description: To address this problem, we have introduced HRCTCov19, a new COVID-19 high-resolution chest CT scan image dataset that includes not only COVID-19 cases of Ground Glass Opacity (GGO), Crazy Paving, and Air Space Consolidation but also CT images of cases with negative COVID-19. The HRCTCov19 dataset, which includes slice-level, and patient-level labels, has the potential to aid COVID-19 research, especially for diagnosis and differentiation using artificial intelligence algorithms, machine learning, and deep learning methods. This dataset is accessible through the web at: http://databiox.com and includes 181,106 chest HRCT images from 395 patients with four labels: GGO, Crazy Paving, Air Space Consolidation, and Negative. Keywords: COVID-19, CT scan, Computed Tomography, Chest Image, Dataset, Medical Imaging
summary: Introduction: During the COVID-19 pandemic, computed tomography (CT) was a popular method for diagnosing COVID-19 patients. HRCT (High-Resolution Computed Tomography) is a form of computed tomography that uses advanced methods to improve image resolution. Publicly accessible COVID-19 CT image datasets are very difficult to come by due to privacy concerns, which impedes the study and development of AI-powered COVID-19 diagnostic algorithms based on CT images. The HRCTCov19 dataset, which includes slice-level, and patient-level labels, has the potential to aid COVID-19 research, especially for diagnosis and differentiation using artificial intelligence algorithms, machine learning, and deep learning methods. This dataset is accessible through the web at: http://databiox.com and includes 181,106 chest HRCT images from 395 patients with four labels: GGO, Crazy Paving, Air Space Consolidation, and Negative. Keywords: COVID-19, CT scan, Computed Tomography, Chest Image, Dataset, Medical Imaging
abstract_zh: 简介：在 COVID-19 大流行期间，计算机断层扫描 (CT) 是诊断 COVID-19 患者的流行方法。 HRCT（高分辨率计算机断层扫描）是计算机断层扫描的一种形式，它使用先进的方法来提高图像分辨率。由于隐私问题，公开访问的 COVID-19 CT 图像数据集非常困难，这阻碍了基于 CT 图像的人工智能驱动的 COVID-19 诊断算法的研究和开发。数据描述：为了解决这个问题，我们推出了HRCTCov19，这是一个新的COVID-19高分辨率胸部CT扫描图像数据集，不仅包括磨玻璃混浊（GGO）、疯狂铺路和气隙巩固的COVID-19病例，还包括COVID-19阴性病例的CT图像。 HRCTCov19 数据集包括切片级和患者级标签，有潜力帮助 COVID-19 研究，特别是使用人工智能算法、机器学习和深度学习方法进行诊断和区分。该数据集可通过以下网址访问：http://databiox.com，包含来自 395 名患者的 181,106 张胸部 HRCT 图像，带有四个标签：GGO、Crazy Paving、Air Space Consolidation 和 Negative。关键词：COVID-19、CT 扫描、计算机断层扫描、胸部影像、数据集、医学成像

AI.tldr: 本文提出HRCTCov19数据集，包含181,106张高分辨率胸部CT图像，用于支持基于人工智能的COVID-19诊断与鉴别研究。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间公开的CT图像数据集因隐私问题难以获取，阻碍了AI诊断算法的研发。
AI.method: 收集395名患者的高分辨率CT扫描图像，标注包含GGO、Crazy Paving、Air Space Consolidation及阴性四类标签，并提供切片级和患者级标注。
AI.result: 构建包含181,106张图像的公开数据集（网址：http://databiox.com），支持机器学习与深度学习方法的模型训练与验证。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为AI辅助诊断COVID-19提供了高质量资源，有助于提升算法在CT影像分析中的准确性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Kumar Saurav,Rahul Vaze
title: Minimizing Age of Information under Arbitrary Arrival Model with Arbitrary Packet Size
title_zh: 任意数据包大小的任意到达模型下信息时效最小化
abstract: We consider a single source-destination pair, where information updates arrive at the source at arbitrary time instants. For each update, its size, i.e. the service time required for complete transmission to the destination, is also arbitrary. At any time, age of information (AoI) is equal to the difference between the current time, and the arrival time of the latest update (at the source) that has been completely transmitted (to the destination). AoI quantifies the staleness of the update (information) at the destination. The goal is to find a causal scheduling policy that minimizes the time average of AoI, where the possible decisions at any time are i) whether to preempt the update under transmission upon arrival of a new update, and ii) if no update is under transmission, then choose which update to transmit (among the available updates). In this paper, we propose a causal policy called SRPT$^+$ that at each time, i) preempts the update under transmission if a new update arrives with a smaller size, and ii) if no update is under transmission, then begins to transmit the update for which the ratio of the reduction in AoI upon complete transmission (if not preempted in future) and the remaining size, is maximum. We characterize the performance of SRPT$^+$ using the metric called the competitive ratio, i.e. the ratio of the average AoI of causal policy and the average AoI of an optimal offline policy (that knows the entire input in advance), maximized over all possible inputs. We show that the competitive ratio of SRPT$^+$ is at most $4$. Further, we propose a simpler policy called SRPT$^L$, that i) preempts the update under transmission if a new update arrives with a smaller size, and ii) if no update is under transmission, then begins to transmit the update with the latest arrival time. We show that the competitive ratio of SRPT$^L$ is at most $29$.
summary: We consider a single source-destination pair, where information updates arrive at the source at arbitrary time instants. For each update, its size, i.e. the service time required for complete transmission to the destination, is also arbitrary. At any time, age of information (AoI) is equal to the difference between the current time, and the arrival time of the latest update (at the source) that has been completely transmitted (to the destination). AoI quantifies the staleness of the update (information) at the destination. The goal is to find a causal scheduling policy that minimizes the time average of AoI, where the possible decisions at any time are i) whether to preempt the update under transmission upon arrival of a new update, and ii) if no update is under transmission, then choose which update to transmit (among the available updates). In this paper, we propose a causal policy called SRPT$^+$ that at each time, i) preempts the update under transmission if a new update arrives with a smaller size, and ii) if no update is under transmission, then begins to transmit the update for which the ratio of the reduction in AoI upon complete transmission (if not preempted in future) and the remaining size, is maximum. We characterize the performance of SRPT$^+$ using the metric called the competitive ratio, i.e. the ratio of the average AoI of causal policy and the average AoI of an optimal offline policy (that knows the entire input in advance), maximized over all possible inputs. We show that the competitive ratio of SRPT$^+$ is at most $4$. Further, we propose a simpler policy called SRPT$^L$, that i) preempts the update under transmission if a new update arrives with a smaller size, and ii) if no update is under transmission, then begins to transmit the update with the latest arrival time. We show that the competitive ratio of SRPT$^L$ is at most $29$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑单个源-目的地对，其中信息更新在任意时刻到达源。对于每次更新，其大小，即完整传输到目的地所需的服务时间，也是任意的。在任何时候，信息年龄（AoI）等于当前时间与已完全传输（到目的地）的最新更新（在源处）的到达时间之间的差。 AoI 量化目的地更新（信息）的陈旧程度。目标是找到一种因果调度策略，使 AoI 的时间平均值最小化，其中任何时间的可能决策是 i) 是否在新更新到达时抢占传输中的更新，以及 ii) 如果没有更新正在传输，则选择传输哪个更新（在可用更新中）。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 SRPT$^+$ 的因果策略，每次，i）如果新的更新以较小的大小到达，则抢占正在传输的更新，ii）如果没有正在传输的更新，则开始传输更新，其中完成传输时 AoI 的减少（如果将来不抢占）与剩余大小的比率最大。我们使用称为竞争比的指标来描述 SRPT$^+$ 的性能，即因果策略的平均 AoI 与最优离线策略（提前知道整个输入）的平均 AoI 的比率，在所有可能的输入上最大化。我们证明 SRPT$^+$ 的竞争比至多为 $4$。此外，我们提出了一种更简单的策略，称为 SRPT$^L$，i）如果新的更新以较小的大小到达，则抢占传输中的更新；ii）如果没有更新正在传输，则开始传输具有最晚到达时间的更新。我们证明 SRPT$^L$ 的竞争比最多为 29$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在任意到达时间和任意数据包大小下，如何设计因果调度策略以最小化信息新鲜度（AoI）。
AI.motivation: 现有调度策略难以有效应对信息更新的任意到达时间和不规则数据包大小，导致信息过时问题。需设计无需未来信息的因果策略以优化AoI。
AI.method: 提出两种因果调度策略SRPT$^+$和SRPT$^L$：SRPT$^+$基于剩余传输时间与AoI减少量的比值选择传输任务，SRPT$^L$基于最新到达时间选择任务，并通过竞争比评估性能。
AI.result: SRPT$^+$的竞争比上限为4，SRPT$^L$的竞争比上限为29，表明其性能接近最优离线策略。
AI.conclusion: SRPT$^+$在任意到达模型下能有效最小化AoI，为实时信息更新系统提供了高效调度方案。

authors_text: Ulrike Kuhl,André Artelt,Barbara Hammer
title: Let's Go to the Alien Zoo: Introducing an Experimental Framework to Study Usability of Counterfactual Explanations for Machine Learning
title_zh: 让我们去外星动物园：引入一个实验框架来研究机器学习反事实解释的可用性
comment: We provide the entire code, together with the underlying models and user data: https://github.com/ukuhl/IntroAlienZoo
comments: We provide the entire code, together with the underlying models and user data: https://github.com/ukuhl/IntroAlienZoo
abstract: To foster usefulness and accountability of machine learning (ML), it is essential to explain a model's decisions in addition to evaluating its performance. Accordingly, the field of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has resurfaced as a topic of active research, offering approaches to address the "how" and "why" of automated decision-making. Within this domain, counterfactual explanations (CFEs) have gained considerable traction as a psychologically grounded approach to generate post-hoc explanations. To do so, CFEs highlight what changes to a model's input would have changed its prediction in a particular way. However, despite the introduction of numerous CFE approaches, their usability has yet to be thoroughly validated at the human level. Thus, to advance the field of XAI, we introduce the Alien Zoo, an engaging, web-based and game-inspired experimental framework. The Alien Zoo provides the means to evaluate usability of CFEs for gaining new knowledge from an automated system, targeting novice users in a domain-general context. As a proof of concept, we demonstrate the practical efficacy and feasibility of this approach in a user study. Our results suggest that users benefit from receiving CFEs compared to no explanation, both in terms of objective performance in the proposed iterative learning task, and subjective usability. With this work, we aim to equip research groups and practitioners with the means to easily run controlled and well-powered user studies to complement their otherwise often more technology-oriented work. Thus, in the interest of reproducible research, we provide the entire code, together with the underlying models and user data.
summary: To foster usefulness and accountability of machine learning (ML), it is essential to explain a model's decisions in addition to evaluating its performance. Accordingly, the field of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has resurfaced as a topic of active research, offering approaches to address the "how" and "why" of automated decision-making. Within this domain, counterfactual explanations (CFEs) have gained considerable traction as a psychologically grounded approach to generate post-hoc explanations. To do so, CFEs highlight what changes to a model's input would have changed its prediction in a particular way. However, despite the introduction of numerous CFE approaches, their usability has yet to be thoroughly validated at the human level. Thus, to advance the field of XAI, we introduce the Alien Zoo, an engaging, web-based and game-inspired experimental framework. The Alien Zoo provides the means to evaluate usability of CFEs for gaining new knowledge from an automated system, targeting novice users in a domain-general context. As a proof of concept, we demonstrate the practical efficacy and feasibility of this approach in a user study. Our results suggest that users benefit from receiving CFEs compared to no explanation, both in terms of objective performance in the proposed iterative learning task, and subjective usability. With this work, we aim to equip research groups and practitioners with the means to easily run controlled and well-powered user studies to complement their otherwise often more technology-oriented work. Thus, in the interest of reproducible research, we provide the entire code, together with the underlying models and user data.
abstract_zh: 为了提高机器学习 (ML) 的实用性和责任感，除了评估模型的性能之外，还必须解释模型的决策。因此，可解释人工智能（XAI）领域重新成为一个活跃的研究主题，提供了解决自动化决策“如何”和“为什么”的方法。在这个领域内，反事实解释（CFE）作为一种基于心理学的方法来产生事后解释，已经获得了相当大的关注。为此，CFE 强调模型输入的哪些变化会以特定方式改变其预测。然而，尽管引入了多种 CFE 方法，但它们的可用性尚未在人类层面得到彻底验证。因此，为了推进 XAI 领域的发展，我们引入了 Alien Zoo，这是一个引人入胜、基于网络且受游戏启发的实验框架。 Alien Zoo 提供了评估 CFE 可用性的方法，以从自动化系统中获取新知识，针对通用领域环境中的新手用户。作为概念证明，我们在用户研究中展示了这种方法的实际功效和可行性。我们的结果表明，与没有解释相比，用户从接收 CFE 中受益，无论是在所提出的迭代学习任务的客观表现方面，还是在主观可用性方面。通过这项工作，我们的目标是为研究小组和从业人员提供轻松运行受控且功能强大的用户研究的方法，以补充他们通常更以技术为导向的工作。因此，为了可重复的研究，我们提供整个代码以及底层模型和用户数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Alien Zoo'的实验框架，用于评估反事实解释（CFEs）在机器学习中的可用性，通过用户研究验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管反事实解释（CFEs）在可解释AI领域受到关注，但其对人类用户的实际可用性尚未得到充分验证，需通过实验框架进行系统评估。
AI.method: 开发了基于网络的互动游戏化框架'Alien Zoo'，通过用户研究对比提供CFEs与无解释条件下的任务表现和主观体验差异。
AI.result: 用户在接受CFEs后，在迭代学习任务中的客观表现和主观可用性评分均优于无解释组，证明框架的有效性和可行性。
AI.conclusion: Alien Zoo为研究CFEs可用性提供了可复现的实验工具，推动XAI研究从技术导向转向用户需求导向，并开源所有代码和数据。

authors_text: Sarah A. Jacobson,Luyao Zhang,Jiasheng Zhu
title: The Right Tool for the Job: Matching Active Learning Techniques to Learning Objectives
title_zh: 适合工作的工具：将主动学习技术与学习目标相匹配
abstract: Active learning comprises many varied techniques that engage students actively in the construction of their understanding. Because of this variation, different active learning techniques may be best suited to achieving different learning objectives. We study students' perceptions of a set of active learning techniques (including a Python simulation and an interactive game) and some traditional techniques (like lecture). We find that students felt they engaged fairly actively with all of the techniques, though more with those with a heavy grade weight and some of the active learning techniques, and they reported enjoying the active learning techniques the most except for an assignment that required soliciting peer advice on a research idea. All of the techniques were rated as relatively effective for achieving each of six learning objectives, but to varying extents. The most traditional techniques like exams were rated highest for achieving an objective associated with lower order cognitive skills, remembering concepts. In contrast, some active learning techniques like class presentations and the Python simulation were rated highest for achieving objectives related to higher order cognitive skills, including learning to conduct research, though lectures also performed surprisingly well for these objectives. Other technique-objective matches are intuitive; for example, the debate is rated highly for understanding pros and cons of an issue, and small group discussion is rated highly for collaborative learning. Our results support the idea that different teaching techniques are best suited for different outcomes, which implies that a mix of techniques may be optimal in course design.

Because of this variation, different active learning techniques may be best suited to achieving different learning objectives. We study students' perceptions of a set of active learning techniques (including a Python simulation and an interactive game) and some traditional techniques (like lecture). We find that students felt they engaged fairly actively with all of the techniques, though more with those with a heavy grade weight and some of the active learning techniques, and they reported enjoying the active learning techniques the most except for an assignment that required soliciting peer advice on a research idea. All of the techniques were rated as relatively effective for achieving each of six learning objectives, but to varying extents. The most traditional techniques like exams were rated highest for achieving an objective associated with lower order cognitive skills, remembering concepts. In contrast, some active learning techniques like class presentations and the Python simulation were rated highest for achieving objectives related to higher order cognitive skills, including learning to conduct research, though lectures also performed surprisingly well for these objectives. Other technique-objective matches are intuitive; for example, the debate is rated highly for understanding pros and cons of an issue, and small group discussion is rated highly for collaborative learning. Our results support the idea that different teaching techniques are best suited for different outcomes, which implies that a mix of techniques may be optimal in course design.
abstract_zh: 主动学习包括许多不同的技巧，让学生积极地构建他们的理解。由于这种差异，不同的主动学习技术可能最适合实现不同的学习目标。我们研究学生对一套主动学习技术（包括 Python 模拟和互动游戏）和一些传统技术（如讲座）的看法。我们发现，学生们认为他们相当积极地参与了所有技术，尽管更多的是那些成绩比重较大的学生和一些主动学习技术，并且他们报告说，除了需要就研究想法征求同伴建议的作业外，他们最喜欢主动学习技术。所有这些技术都被认为对于实现六个学习目标相对有效，但程度不同。最传统的技术（例如考试）在实现与低阶认知技能（记住概念）相关的目标方面得分最高。相比之下，一些主动学习技术，如课堂演示和 Python 模拟，在实现与高阶认知技能相关的目标（包括学习进行研究）方面获得最高评价，尽管讲座在实现这些目标方面也表现得令人惊讶。其他技术-目标匹配是直观的；例如，辩论因了解问题的利弊而受到高度评价，小组讨论因协作学习而受到高度评价。我们的结果支持这样的观点，即不同的教学技术最适合不同的结果，这意味着在课程设计中混合使用技术可能是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同主动学习技术与学习目标的匹配关系，评估其在学生参与度、享受度和效果上的差异。
AI.motivation: 主动学习技术多样但缺乏系统性研究，需明确不同技术对特定学习目标的适用性以优化教学设计。
AI.method: 通过调查学生对多种主动学习技术（如Python模拟、互动游戏）及传统方法（如讲座）的感知，评估其在六类学习目标上的有效性。
AI.result: 学生普遍认为主动学习技术参与度和享受度更高，但传统方法如考试在记忆概念上效果最佳，而主动学习技术如课堂展示在高阶认知技能上表现更优，讲座在部分高阶目标上也有效。
AI.conclusion: 不同教学技术适合不同学习目标，课程设计应结合多种方法以最大化教学效果。

authors_text: Alexander Kathan,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Xiangheng He,Manuel Milling,Tianhao Yan,Srividya Tirunellai Rajamani,Ludwig Küster,Mathias Harrer,Elena Heber,Inga Grossmann,David D. Ebert,Björn W. Schuller
title: Journaling Data for Daily PHQ-2 Depression Prediction and Forecasting
title_zh: 每日 PHQ-2 抑郁症预测和预报的日志数据
abstract: Digital health applications are becoming increasingly important for assessing and monitoring the wellbeing of people suffering from mental health conditions like depression. A common target of said applications is to predict the results of self-assessed Patient-Health-Questionnaires (PHQ), indicating current symptom severity of depressive individuals. In this work, we explore the potential of using actively-collected data to predict and forecast daily PHQ-2 scores on a newly-collected longitudinal dataset. We obtain a best MAE of 1.417 for daily prediction of PHQ-2 scores, which specifically in the used dataset have a range of 0 to 12, using leave-one-subject-out cross-validation, as well as a best MAE of 1.914 for forecasting PHQ-2 scores using data from up to the last 7 days. This illustrates the additive value that can be obtained by incorporating actively-collected data in a depression monitoring application.
summary: Digital health applications are becoming increasingly important for assessing and monitoring the wellbeing of people suffering from mental health conditions like depression. A common target of said applications is to predict the results of self-assessed Patient-Health-Questionnaires (PHQ), indicating current symptom severity of depressive individuals. In this work, we explore the potential of using actively-collected data to predict and forecast daily PHQ-2 scores on a newly-collected longitudinal dataset. We obtain a best MAE of 1.417 for daily prediction of PHQ-2 scores, which specifically in the used dataset have a range of 0 to 12, using leave-one-subject-out cross-validation, as well as a best MAE of 1.914 for forecasting PHQ-2 scores using data from up to the last 7 days. This illustrates the additive value that can be obtained by incorporating actively-collected data in a depression monitoring application.
abstract_zh: 数字健康应用对于评估和监测患有抑郁症等心理健康问题的人们的健康状况变得越来越重要。所述应用程序的一个共同目标是预测自我评估的患者健康问卷（PHQ）的结果，表明抑郁症个体当前症状的严重程度。在这项工作中，我们探索了使用主动收集的数据来预测新收集的纵向数据集上的每日 PHQ-2 分数的潜力。我们使用留一主题交叉验证获得每日 PHQ-2 分数预测的最佳 MAE 为 1.417，特别是在使用的数据集中，其范围为 0 到 12，并且使用最近 7 天的数据预测 PHQ-2 分数的最佳 MAE 为 1.914。这说明了通过将主动收集的数据纳入抑郁症监测应用程序可以获得的附加价值。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨利用主动收集的数据预测和预测每日PHQ-2抑郁评分的可行性，并在新收集的纵向数据集上进行验证。
AI.motivation: 数字健康应用在评估和监测抑郁症等精神疾病患者的健康状况中日益重要，而准确预测PHQ-2评分有助于实时监测抑郁症状严重程度。
AI.method: 基于新收集的纵向数据集，采用留一法交叉验证，利用主动收集的行为数据构建模型，预测每日PHQ-2评分并进行7天前瞻性预测。
AI.result: 每日预测的平均绝对误差(MAE)为1.417（PHQ-2评分范围0-12），7天预测的MAE为1.914，验证了主动数据在抑郁监测中的附加价值。
AI.conclusion: 主动收集的日常行为数据能有效提升抑郁症状的实时预测精度，为数字健康应用提供重要参考依据。

authors_text: Yuhang Cao,Jiaqi Wang,Yiqi Lin,Dahua Lin
title: MINI: Mining Implicit Novel Instances for Few-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: MINI：挖掘隐式新颖实例以进行少样本目标检测
abstract: Learning from a few training samples is a desirable ability of an object detector, inspiring the explorations of Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD). Most existing approaches employ a pretrain-transfer paradigm. The model is first pre-trained on base classes with abundant data and then transferred to novel classes with a few annotated samples. Despite the substantial progress, the FSOD performance is still far behind satisfactory. During pre-training, due to the co-occurrence between base and novel classes, the model is learned to treat the co-occurred novel classes as backgrounds. During transferring, given scarce samples of novel classes, the model suffers from learning discriminative features to distinguish novel instances from backgrounds and base classes. To overcome the obstacles, we propose a novel framework, Mining Implicit Novel Instances (MINI), to mine the implicit novel instances as auxiliary training samples, which widely exist in abundant base data but are not annotated. MINI comprises an offline mining mechanism and an online mining mechanism. The offline mining mechanism leverages a self-supervised discriminative model to collaboratively mine implicit novel instances with a trained FSOD network. Taking the mined novel instances as auxiliary training samples, the online mining mechanism takes a teacher-student framework to simultaneously update the FSOD network and the mined implicit novel instances on the fly. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO datasets show MINI achieves new state-of-the-art performance on any shot and split. The significant performance improvements demonstrate the superiority of our method.
summary: Learning from a few training samples is a desirable ability of an object detector, inspiring the explorations of Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD). Most existing approaches employ a pretrain-transfer paradigm. The model is first pre-trained on base classes with abundant data and then transferred to novel classes with a few annotated samples. Despite the substantial progress, the FSOD performance is still far behind satisfactory. During pre-training, due to the co-occurrence between base and novel classes, the model is learned to treat the co-occurred novel classes as backgrounds. During transferring, given scarce samples of novel classes, the model suffers from learning discriminative features to distinguish novel instances from backgrounds and base classes. To overcome the obstacles, we propose a novel framework, Mining Implicit Novel Instances (MINI), to mine the implicit novel instances as auxiliary training samples, which widely exist in abundant base data but are not annotated. MINI comprises an offline mining mechanism and an online mining mechanism. The offline mining mechanism leverages a self-supervised discriminative model to collaboratively mine implicit novel instances with a trained FSOD network. Taking the mined novel instances as auxiliary training samples, the online mining mechanism takes a teacher-student framework to simultaneously update the FSOD network and the mined implicit novel instances on the fly. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO datasets show MINI achieves new state-of-the-art performance on any shot and split. The significant performance improvements demonstrate the superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 从少量训练样本中学习是目标检测器的一项理想能力，激发了对少样本目标检测（FSOD）的探索。大多数现有方法都采用预训练传输范例。该模型首先在具有丰富数据的基类上进行预训练，然后转移到具有一些注释样本的新类。尽管取得了实质性进展，但 FSOD 性能仍然远远不能令人满意。在预训练期间，由于基础类和新类之间的共现，模型被学习将共现的新类视为背景。在转移过程中，鉴于新类的稀缺样本，该模型会学习判别特征以将新实例与背景和基类区分开来。为了克服这些障碍，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即挖掘隐式新颖实例（MINI），以挖掘隐式新颖实例作为辅助训练样本，这些样本广泛存在于丰富的基础数据中但没有注释。 MINI包括离线挖矿机制和在线挖矿机制。离线挖掘机制利用自监督判别模型与经过训练的 FSOD 网络协作挖掘隐式新颖实例。以挖掘的小说实例作为辅助训练样本，在线挖掘机制采用师生框架，实时更新FSOD网络和挖掘的隐式小说实例。在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS-COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，MINI 在任何镜头和分割上都实现了最先进的性能。显着的性能改进证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MINI框架，通过挖掘隐式新型实例提升少样本目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法在预训练阶段易将新型类误判为背景，迁移阶段因样本稀缺难以学习区分特征。
AI.method: MINI框架包含离线挖掘机制（自监督模型协同挖掘隐式实例）和在线挖掘机制（教师-学生框架动态更新模型与实例）。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS-COCO数据集上，MINI在任意样本量和划分下均达到新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘隐式新型实例辅助训练，有效解决了少样本检测中的特征区分难题，验证了方法的优越性。

search_text: MINI: Mining Implicit Novel Instances for Few-Shot Object Detection MINI：挖掘隐式新颖实例以进行少样本目标检测 Learning from a few training samples is a desirable ability of an object detector, inspiring the explorations of Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD). Most existing approaches employ a pretrain-transfer paradigm. The model is first pre-trained on base classes with abundant data and then transferred to novel classes with a few annotated samples. Despite the substantial progress, the FSOD performance is still far behind satisfactory. During pre-training, due to the co-occurrence between base and novel classes, the model is learned to treat the co-occurred novel classes as backgrounds. During transferring, given scarce samples of novel classes, the model suffers from learning discriminative features to distinguish novel instances from backgrounds and base classes. To overcome the obstacles, we propose a novel framework, Mining Implicit Novel Instances (MINI), to mine the implicit novel instances as auxiliary training samples, which widely exist in abundant base data but are not annotated. MINI comprises an offline mining mechanism and an online mining mechanism. The offline mining mechanism leverages a self-supervised discriminative model to collaboratively mine implicit novel instances with a trained FSOD network. Taking the mined novel instances as auxiliary training samples, the online mining mechanism takes a teacher-student framework to simultaneously update the FSOD network and the mined implicit novel instances on the fly. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO datasets show MINI achieves new state-of-the-art performance on any shot and split. The significant performance improvements demonstrate the superiority of our method. 从少量训练样本中学习是目标检测器的一项理想能力，激发了对少样本目标检测（FSOD）的探索。大多数现有方法都采用预训练传输范例。该模型首先在具有丰富数据的基类上进行预训练，然后转移到具有一些注释样本的新类。尽管取得了实质性进展，但 FSOD 性能仍然远远不能令人满意。在预训练期间，由于基础类和新类之间的共现，模型被学习将共现的新类视为背景。在转移过程中，鉴于新类的稀缺样本，该模型会学习判别特征以将新实例与背景和基类区分开来。为了克服这些障碍，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即挖掘隐式新颖实例（MINI），以挖掘隐式新颖实例作为辅助训练样本，这些样本广泛存在于丰富的基础数据中但没有注释。 MINI包括离线挖矿机制和在线挖矿机制。离线挖掘机制利用自监督判别模型与经过训练的 FSOD 网络协作挖掘隐式新颖实例。以挖掘的小说实例作为辅助训练样本，在线挖掘机制采用师生框架，实时更新FSOD网络和挖掘的隐式小说实例。在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS-COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，MINI 在任何镜头和分割上都实现了最先进的性能。显着的性能改进证明了我们方法的优越性。 本文提出MINI框架，通过挖掘隐式新型实例提升少样本目标检测性能。 Yuhang Cao,Jiaqi Wang,Yiqi Lin,Dahua Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Gaohang Yu,Shaochun Wan,Liqun Qi,Yanwei Xu
title: Multi-mode Tensor Train Factorization with Spatial-spectral Regularization for Remote Sensing Images Recovery
title_zh: 具有空间谱正则化的多模式张量序列分解用于遥感图像恢复
abstract: Tensor train (TT) factorization and corresponding TT rank, which can well express the low-rankness and mode correlations of higher-order tensors, have attracted much attention in recent years. However, TT factorization based methods are generally not sufficient to characterize low-rankness along each mode of third-order tensor. Inspired by this, we generalize the tensor train factorization to the mode-k tensor train factorization and introduce a corresponding multi-mode tensor train (MTT) rank. Then, we proposed a novel low-MTT-rank tensor completion model via multi-mode TT factorization and spatial-spectral smoothness regularization. To tackle the proposed model, we develop an efficient proximal alternating minimization (PAM) algorithm. Extensive numerical experiment results on visual data demonstrate that the proposed MTTD3R method outperforms compared methods in terms of visual and quantitative measures.
summary: Tensor train (TT) factorization and corresponding TT rank, which can well express the low-rankness and mode correlations of higher-order tensors, have attracted much attention in recent years. However, TT factorization based methods are generally not sufficient to characterize low-rankness along each mode of third-order tensor. Inspired by this, we generalize the tensor train factorization to the mode-k tensor train factorization and introduce a corresponding multi-mode tensor train (MTT) rank. Then, we proposed a novel low-MTT-rank tensor completion model via multi-mode TT factorization and spatial-spectral smoothness regularization. To tackle the proposed model, we develop an efficient proximal alternating minimization (PAM) algorithm. Extensive numerical experiment results on visual data demonstrate that the proposed MTTD3R method outperforms compared methods in terms of visual and quantitative measures.
abstract_zh: 张量序列（TT）分解和相应的TT秩可以很好地表达高阶张量的低秩性和模态相关性，近年来引起了广泛的关注。然而，基于 TT 分解的方法通常不足以表征沿着三阶张量的每个模式的低秩性。受此启发，我们将张量序列分解推广到 k 模式张量序列分解，并引入相应的多模式张量序列（MTT）秩。然后，我们通过多模式 TT 分解和空间谱平滑正则化提出了一种新颖的低 MTT 秩张量补全模型。为了解决所提出的模型，我们开发了一种高效的近端交替最小化（PAM）算法。对视觉数据的大量数值实验结果表明，所提出的 MTTD3R 方法在视觉和定量测量方面优于对比方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模式张量训练分解和空谱正则化的遥感图像恢复方法。
AI.motivation: 传统张量训练分解方法难以充分表征三阶张量各模态的低秩特性，导致图像恢复效果受限。
AI.method: 推广张量训练分解为模式-k张量训练分解，定义多模式张量训练秩（MTT），结合空谱平滑正则化构建低MTT秩张量补全模型，并开发高效近端交替最小化算法。
AI.result: 在视觉数据上的实验表明，所提MTTD3R方法在视觉质量和定量指标上均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模式张量训练分解框架有效提升了遥感图像恢复性能，为空谱数据处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Debarun Bhattacharjya,Saurabh Sihag,Oktie Hassanzadeh,Liza Bialik
title: Summary Markov Models for Event Sequences
title_zh: 事件序列的马尔可夫总结模型
comment: In Proceedings of International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2022
comments: In Proceedings of International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2022
abstract: Datasets involving sequences of different types of events without meaningful time stamps are prevalent in many applications, for instance when extracted from textual corpora. We propose a family of models for such event sequences -- summary Markov models -- where the probability of observing an event type depends only on a summary of historical occurrences of its influencing set of event types. This Markov model family is motivated by Granger causal models for time series, with the important distinction that only one event can occur in a position in an event sequence. We show that a unique minimal influencing set exists for any set of event types of interest and choice of summary function, formulate two novel models from the general family that represent specific sequence dynamics, and propose a greedy search algorithm for learning them from event sequence data. We conduct an experimental investigation comparing the proposed models with relevant baselines, and illustrate their knowledge acquisition and discovery capabilities through case studies involving sequences from text.
summary: Datasets involving sequences of different types of events without meaningful time stamps are prevalent in many applications, for instance when extracted from textual corpora. We propose a family of models for such event sequences -- summary Markov models -- where the probability of observing an event type depends only on a summary of historical occurrences of its influencing set of event types. This Markov model family is motivated by Granger causal models for time series, with the important distinction that only one event can occur in a position in an event sequence. We show that a unique minimal influencing set exists for any set of event types of interest and choice of summary function, formulate two novel models from the general family that represent specific sequence dynamics, and propose a greedy search algorithm for learning them from event sequence data. We conduct an experimental investigation comparing the proposed models with relevant baselines, and illustrate their knowledge acquisition and discovery capabilities through case studies involving sequences from text.
abstract_zh: 涉及不同类型事件序列且没有有意义的时间戳的数据集在许多应用中很普遍，例如从文本语料库中提取时。我们为此类事件序列提出了一系列模型——摘要马尔可夫模型——其中观察事件类型的概率仅取决于其影响事件类型集的历史发生的摘要。该马尔可夫模型系列受到时间序列格兰杰因果模型的启发，其重要区别在于事件序列中的某个位置只能发生一个事件。我们证明，对于任何感兴趣的事件类型和汇总函数的选择，都存在唯一的最小影响集，从代表特定序列动态的一般族中制定两个新颖的模型，并提出一种从事件序列数据中学习它们的贪婪搜索算法。我们进行了实验研究，将所提出的模型与相关基线进行比较，并通过涉及文本序列的案例研究说明其知识获取和发现能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的马尔可夫模型家族——摘要马尔可夫模型，用于处理无时间戳的事件序列数据，模型概率依赖于历史事件类型的摘要信息。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列模型难以处理无明确时间戳的事件序列数据，而Granger因果模型无法直接应用于此类离散事件序列，需设计新型概率模型捕捉事件间依赖关系。
AI.method: 构建基于历史事件摘要的马尔可夫模型，证明存在唯一最小影响集；提出两种具体模型形式，并设计贪婪搜索算法从事件序列数据中学习模型参数。
AI.result: 实验表明新模型优于相关基线方法，案例研究验证了其在文本序列中的知识发现能力，能有效捕捉事件间的动态依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 摘要马尔可夫模型为无时间戳事件序列分析提供了有效方法，通过理论证明与实验验证，展示了模型在序列建模和知识发现中的应用潜力。

method: 构建基于历史事件摘要的马尔可夫模型，证明存在唯一最小影响集；提出两种具体模型形式，并设计贪婪搜索算法从事件序列数据中学习模型参数。
result: 实验表明新模型优于相关基线方法，案例研究验证了其在文本序列中的知识发现能力，能有效捕捉事件间的动态依赖关系。
conclusion: 摘要马尔可夫模型为无时间戳事件序列分析提供了有效方法，通过理论证明与实验验证，展示了模型在序列建模和知识发现中的应用潜力。
search_text: Summary Markov Models for Event Sequences 事件序列的马尔可夫总结模型 Datasets involving sequences of different types of events without meaningful time stamps are prevalent in many applications, for instance when extracted from textual corpora. We propose a family of models for such event sequences -- summary Markov models -- where the probability of observing an event type depends only on a summary of historical occurrences of its influencing set of event types. This Markov model family is motivated by Granger causal models for time series, with the important distinction that only one event can occur in a position in an event sequence. We show that a unique minimal influencing set exists for any set of event types of interest and choice of summary function, formulate two novel models from the general family that represent specific sequence dynamics, and propose a greedy search algorithm for learning them from event sequence data. We conduct an experimental investigation comparing the proposed models with relevant baselines, and illustrate their knowledge acquisition and discovery capabilities through case studies involving sequences from text. 涉及不同类型事件序列且没有有意义的时间戳的数据集在许多应用中很普遍，例如从文本语料库中提取时。我们为此类事件序列提出了一系列模型——摘要马尔可夫模型——其中观察事件类型的概率仅取决于其影响事件类型集的历史发生的摘要。该马尔可夫模型系列受到时间序列格兰杰因果模型的启发，其重要区别在于事件序列中的某个位置只能发生一个事件。我们证明，对于任何感兴趣的事件类型和汇总函数的选择，都存在唯一的最小影响集，从代表特定序列动态的一般族中制定两个新颖的模型，并提出一种从事件序列数据中学习它们的贪婪搜索算法。我们进行了实验研究，将所提出的模型与相关基线进行比较，并通过涉及文本序列的案例研究说明其知识获取和发现能力。 本文提出一种新的马尔可夫模型家族——摘要马尔可夫模型，用于处理无时间戳的事件序列数据，模型概率依赖于历史事件类型的摘要信息。 Debarun Bhattacharjya,Saurabh Sihag,Oktie Hassanzadeh,Liza Bialik cs.AI

authors_text: Quentin Bramas,Jean-Romain Luttringer,Sébastien Tixeuil
title: Constrained Backward Time Travel Planning is in P
title_zh: 受约束的向后时间旅行计划处于 P 状态
abstract: We consider transportation networks that are modeled by dynamic graphs, and introduce the possibility for traveling agents to use Backward Time-Travel (BTT) devices at any node to go back in time (to some extent, and with some appropriate fee) before resuming their trip. We focus on dynamic line graphs. In more detail, we propose exact algorithms to compute travel plans with constraints on the BTT cost or on how far back in time you can go, while minimizing travel delay (that is, the time difference between the arrival instant and the starting instant), in polynomial time. We study the impact of the BTT devices pricing policies on the computation process of those plans considering travel delay and cost, and provide necessary properties that pricing policies should satisfy to enable to compute such plans. Finally, we provide an optimal online algorithm for the unconstrained problem when the cost function is the identity.
summary: We consider transportation networks that are modeled by dynamic graphs, and introduce the possibility for traveling agents to use Backward Time-Travel (BTT) devices at any node to go back in time (to some extent, and with some appropriate fee) before resuming their trip. We focus on dynamic line graphs. In more detail, we propose exact algorithms to compute travel plans with constraints on the BTT cost or on how far back in time you can go, while minimizing travel delay (that is, the time difference between the arrival instant and the starting instant), in polynomial time. We study the impact of the BTT devices pricing policies on the computation process of those plans considering travel delay and cost, and provide necessary properties that pricing policies should satisfy to enable to compute such plans. Finally, we provide an optimal online algorithm for the unconstrained problem when the cost function is the identity.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑通过动态图建模的交通网络，并引入旅行社在任何节点使用向后时间旅行（BTT）设备的可能性，以便在恢复旅行之前回到过去（在某种程度上，并支付一些适当的费用）。我们专注于动态线图。更详细地说，我们提出了精确的算法来计算旅行计划，限制 BTT 成本或可以回溯多远的时间，同时在多项式时间内最小化旅行延迟（即到达时刻和出发时刻之间的时间差）。我们研究了 BTT 设备定价策略对考虑行程延误和成本的这些计划的计算过程的影响，并提供了定价策略应满足的必要属性，以便能够计算此类计划。最后，我们针对成本函数为恒等式的无约束问题提供了一种最优在线算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在动态线图中使用受限时间倒流设备的旅行规划问题，提出多项式时间算法以最小化旅行延迟并满足成本或时间限制。
AI.motivation: 现实交通网络中动态变化可能导致路径优化困难，引入时间倒流机制可帮助减少延迟，但需平衡成本与时间约束。
AI.method: 提出精确算法处理BTT成本及回溯时间限制，分析定价策略对计算的影响，并设计针对无约束问题的在线算法。
AI.result: 证明受限BTT规划问题属于P类，给出满足条件的定价策略属性，并提供最优在线算法（当成本函数为恒等函数时）。
AI.conclusion: 在合理定价策略下，受限时间倒流旅行规划可多项式时间求解，且算法能有效平衡延迟与成本约束。
