authors_text: Qi Bi,Beichen Zhou,Kun Qin,Qinghao Ye,Gui-Song Xia
title: All Grains, One Scheme (AGOS): Learning Multi-grain Instance Representation for Aerial Scene Classification
title_zh: 所有谷物，一种方案（AGOS）：学习用于航空场景分类的多谷物实例表示
abstract: Aerial scene classification remains challenging as: 1) the size of key objects in determining the scene scheme varies greatly; 2) many objects irrelevant to the scene scheme are often flooded in the image. Hence, how to effectively perceive the region of interests (RoIs) from a variety of sizes and build more discriminative representation from such complicated object distribution is vital to understand an aerial scene. In this paper, we propose a novel all grains, one scheme (AGOS) framework to tackle these challenges. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work to extend the classic multiple instance learning into multi-grain formulation. Specially, it consists of a multi-grain perception module (MGP), a multi-branch multi-instance representation module (MBMIR) and a self-aligned semantic fusion (SSF) module. Firstly, our MGP preserves the differential dilated convolutional features from the backbone, which magnifies the discriminative information from multi-grains. Then, our MBMIR highlights the key instances in the multi-grain representation under the MIL formulation. Finally, our SSF allows our framework to learn the same scene scheme from multi-grain instance representations and fuses them, so that the entire framework is optimized as a whole. Notably, our AGOS is flexible and can be easily adapted to existing CNNs in a plug-and-play manner. Extensive experiments on UCM, AID and NWPU benchmarks demonstrate that our AGOS achieves a comparable performance against the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Aerial scene classification remains challenging as: 1) the size of key objects in determining the scene scheme varies greatly; 2) many objects irrelevant to the scene scheme are often flooded in the image. Hence, how to effectively perceive the region of interests (RoIs) from a variety of sizes and build more discriminative representation from such complicated object distribution is vital to understand an aerial scene. In this paper, we propose a novel all grains, one scheme (AGOS) framework to tackle these challenges. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work to extend the classic multiple instance learning into multi-grain formulation. Specially, it consists of a multi-grain perception module (MGP), a multi-branch multi-instance representation module (MBMIR) and a self-aligned semantic fusion (SSF) module. Firstly, our MGP preserves the differential dilated convolutional features from the backbone, which magnifies the discriminative information from multi-grains. Then, our MBMIR highlights the key instances in the multi-grain representation under the MIL formulation. Finally, our SSF allows our framework to learn the same scene scheme from multi-grain instance representations and fuses them, so that the entire framework is optimized as a whole. Notably, our AGOS is flexible and can be easily adapted to existing CNNs in a plug-and-play manner. Extensive experiments on UCM, AID and NWPU benchmarks demonstrate that our AGOS achieves a comparable performance against the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 航空场景分类仍然具有挑战性，因为：1）确定场景方案时关键物体的大小变化很大； 2）许多与场景方案无关的物体经常被淹没在图像中。因此，如何有效地感知各种尺寸的感兴趣区域（RoI）并从如此复杂的目标分布中构建更具辨别力的表示对于理解航空场景至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的全谷物单一方案（AGOS）框架来应对这些挑战。据我们所知，这是第一个将经典的多实例学习扩展到多粒度公式的工作。具体来说，它由多粒度感知模块（MGP）、多分支多实例表示模块（MBMIR）和自对齐语义融合（SSF）模块组成。首先，我们的 MGP 保留了主干网的差分扩张卷积特征，这放大了多颗粒的判别信息。然后，我们的 MBMIR 突出显示了 MIL 公式下多粒度表示中的关键实例。最后，我们的SSF允许我们的框架从多粒度实例表示中学习相同的场景方案并融合它们，从而使整个框架得到整体优化。值得注意的是，我们的 AGOS 非常灵活，可以以即插即用的方式轻松适应现有的 CNN。对 UCM、AID 和 NWPU 基准的大量实验表明，我们的 AGOS 实现了与最先进方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AGOS的框架，用于解决遥感场景分类中多尺度目标感知和冗余信息过滤的问题。
AI.motivation: 遥感场景分类面临关键目标尺度差异大、图像中存在大量无关对象的挑战，需有效提取多尺度感兴趣区域并构建判别性表示。
AI.method: 设计包含多粒度感知模块（MGP）、多分支多实例表示模块（MBMIR）和自对齐语义融合模块（SSF）的AGOS框架，通过扩展多实例学习至多粒度形式实现多尺度特征融合与关键实例挖掘。
AI.result: 在UCM、AID和NWPU数据集上实验表明，AGOS性能与现有最先进方法相当，且可灵活适配现有CNN架构。
AI.conclusion: AGOS通过多粒度实例表示学习有效解决了遥感场景分类中的尺度差异与冗余干扰问题，为多实例学习在遥感领域的应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Arturo Oncevay,Duygu Ataman,Niels van Berkel,Barry Haddow,Alexandra Birch,Johannes Bjerva
title: Quantifying Synthesis and Fusion and their Impact on Machine Translation
title_zh: 量化合成和融合及其对机器翻译的影响
abstract: Theoretical work in morphological typology offers the possibility of measuring morphological diversity on a continuous scale. However, literature in Natural Language Processing (NLP) typically labels a whole language with a strict type of morphology, e.g. fusional or agglutinative. In this work, we propose to reduce the rigidity of such claims, by quantifying morphological typology at the word and segment level. We consider Payne (2017)'s approach to classify morphology using two indices: synthesis (e.g. analytic to polysynthetic) and fusion (agglutinative to fusional). For computing synthesis, we test unsupervised and supervised morphological segmentation methods for English, German and Turkish, whereas for fusion, we propose a semi-automatic method using Spanish as a case study. Then, we analyse the relationship between machine translation quality and the degree of synthesis and fusion at word (nouns and verbs for English-Turkish, and verbs in English-Spanish) and segment level (previous language pairs plus English-German in both directions). We complement the word-level analysis with human evaluation, and overall, we observe a consistent impact of both indexes on machine translation quality.
summary: Theoretical work in morphological typology offers the possibility of measuring morphological diversity on a continuous scale. However, literature in Natural Language Processing (NLP) typically labels a whole language with a strict type of morphology, e.g. fusional or agglutinative. In this work, we propose to reduce the rigidity of such claims, by quantifying morphological typology at the word and segment level. We consider Payne (2017)'s approach to classify morphology using two indices: synthesis (e.g. analytic to polysynthetic) and fusion (agglutinative to fusional). For computing synthesis, we test unsupervised and supervised morphological segmentation methods for English, German and Turkish, whereas for fusion, we propose a semi-automatic method using Spanish as a case study. Then, we analyse the relationship between machine translation quality and the degree of synthesis and fusion at word (nouns and verbs for English-Turkish, and verbs in English-Spanish) and segment level (previous language pairs plus English-German in both directions). We complement the word-level analysis with human evaluation, and overall, we observe a consistent impact of both indexes on machine translation quality.
abstract_zh: 形态类型学的理论工作提供了连续测量形态多样性的可能性。然而，自然语言处理（NLP）领域的文献通常用严格的词法类型来标记整个语言，例如融合或凝集。在这项工作中，我们建议通过量化单词和句段级别的形态类型学来降低此类主张的僵化性。我们考虑 Payne (2017) 使用两个指数对形态进行分类的方法：合成（例如分析到聚合成）和融合（凝集到融合）。对于计算合成，我们测试了英语、德语和土耳其语的无监督和监督形态分割方法，而对于融合，我们提出了一种使用西班牙语作为案例研究的半自动方法。然后，我们分析了机器翻译质量与词（英语-土耳其语中的名词和动词，以及英语-西班牙语中的动词）和句段层面（先前语言对加上英语-德语双向）的合成和融合程度之间的关系。我们通过人工评估补充了词级分析，总体而言，我们观察到这两个指标对机器翻译质量的一致影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在量化形态学中的合成与融合特性，并分析其对机器翻译质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统NLP领域将语言形态学严格分类为单一类型，而形态学类型学理论支持连续度量。作者希望通过更细粒度的量化分析，揭示形态特征对机器翻译的具体影响。
AI.method: 采用无监督和监督分割方法处理英语、德语、土耳其语的合成度，用半自动方法分析西班牙语的融合度，并通过机器翻译质量评估与人类评价验证关联性。
AI.result: 发现合成与融合指数在词和分段层面均显著影响机器翻译质量，且人类评估结果与自动分析一致。
AI.conclusion: 形态学特征的量化分析能有效解释语言结构差异对机器翻译性能的影响，为跨语言模型优化提供依据。

authors_text: Maggie Wigness,John G. Rogers III,Luis E. Navarro-Serment
title: Robot navigation from human demonstration: learning control behaviors with environment feature maps
title_zh: 来自人类演示的机器人导航：利用环境特征图学习控制行为
abstract: When working alongside human collaborators in dynamic and unstructured environments, such as disaster recovery or military operation, fast field adaptation is necessary for an unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) to perform its duties or learn novel tasks. In these scenarios, personnel and equipment are constrained, making training with minimal human supervision a desirable learning attribute. We address the problem of making UGVs more reliable and adaptable teammates with a novel framework that uses visual perception and inverse optimal control to learn traversal costs for environment features. Through extensive evaluation in a real-world environment, we show that our framework requires few human demonstrated trajectory exemplars to learn feature costs that reliably encode several different traversal behaviors. Additionally, we present an on-line version of the framework that allows a human teammate to intervene during live operation to correct deteriorated behavior or to adapt behavior to dynamic changes in complex and unstructured environments.
summary: When working alongside human collaborators in dynamic and unstructured environments, such as disaster recovery or military operation, fast field adaptation is necessary for an unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) to perform its duties or learn novel tasks. In these scenarios, personnel and equipment are constrained, making training with minimal human supervision a desirable learning attribute. We address the problem of making UGVs more reliable and adaptable teammates with a novel framework that uses visual perception and inverse optimal control to learn traversal costs for environment features. Through extensive evaluation in a real-world environment, we show that our framework requires few human demonstrated trajectory exemplars to learn feature costs that reliably encode several different traversal behaviors. Additionally, we present an on-line version of the framework that allows a human teammate to intervene during live operation to correct deteriorated behavior or to adapt behavior to dynamic changes in complex and unstructured environments.
abstract_zh: 当在动态和非结构化环境中与人类协作者一起工作时，例如灾难恢复或军事行动，无人地面车辆 (UGV) 需要快速现场适应来履行其职责或学习新任务。在这些场景中，人员和设备受到限制，使得在最少的人工监督下进行培训成为理想的学习属性。我们通过一种新颖的框架来解决使 UGV 更加可靠和适应性更强的问题，该框架使用视觉感知和逆最优控制来学习环境特征的遍历成本。通过在现实世界环境中的广泛评估，我们表明我们的框架需要很少的人类演示轨迹样本来学习可靠地编码几种不同遍历行为的特征成本。此外，我们还提供了该框架的在线版本，允许人类队友在实时操作期间进行干预，以纠正恶化的行为或使行为适应复杂和非结构化环境中的动态变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类示范和环境特征图的框架，使无人地面车辆能够学习导航控制行为以适应动态环境。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据且难以适应复杂环境，而灾难救援等场景中人类监督有限，需更高效的学习方式。
AI.method: 结合视觉感知与逆最优控制技术，通过少量人类示范轨迹学习环境特征的穿越成本，并设计在线干预机制实现实时调整。
AI.result: 真实环境测试表明，框架仅需少量示例即可可靠编码多种导航行为，且在线版本能有效纠正退化行为并适应环境变化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著提升无人车在动态场景中的适应性与可靠性，为少样本学习与人机协作提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Alex X. Lee,Coline Devin,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Yuxiang Zhou,Thomas Lampe,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Konstantinos Bousmalis
title: How to Spend Your Robot Time: Bridging Kickstarting and Offline Reinforcement Learning for Vision-based Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 如何利用机器人时间：为基于视觉的机器人操作桥接启动和离线强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been shown to be effective at learning control from experience. However, RL typically requires a large amount of online interaction with the environment. This limits its applicability to real-world settings, such as in robotics, where such interaction is expensive. In this work we investigate ways to minimize online interactions in a target task, by reusing a suboptimal policy we might have access to, for example from training on related prior tasks, or in simulation. To this end, we develop two RL algorithms that can speed up training by using not only the action distributions of teacher policies, but also data collected by such policies on the task at hand. We conduct a thorough experimental study of how to use suboptimal teachers on a challenging robotic manipulation benchmark on vision-based stacking with diverse objects. We compare our methods to offline, online, offline-to-online, and kickstarting RL algorithms. By doing so, we find that training on data from both the teacher and student, enables the best performance for limited data budgets. We examine how to best allocate a limited data budget -- on the target task -- between the teacher and the student policy, and report experiments using varying budgets, two teachers with different degrees of suboptimality, and five stacking tasks that require a diverse set of behaviors. Our analysis, both in simulation and in the real world, shows that our approach is the best across data budgets, while standard offline RL from teacher rollouts is surprisingly effective when enough data is given.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been shown to be effective at learning control from experience. However, RL typically requires a large amount of online interaction with the environment. This limits its applicability to real-world settings, such as in robotics, where such interaction is expensive. In this work we investigate ways to minimize online interactions in a target task, by reusing a suboptimal policy we might have access to, for example from training on related prior tasks, or in simulation. To this end, we develop two RL algorithms that can speed up training by using not only the action distributions of teacher policies, but also data collected by such policies on the task at hand. We conduct a thorough experimental study of how to use suboptimal teachers on a challenging robotic manipulation benchmark on vision-based stacking with diverse objects. We compare our methods to offline, online, offline-to-online, and kickstarting RL algorithms. By doing so, we find that training on data from both the teacher and student, enables the best performance for limited data budgets. We examine how to best allocate a limited data budget -- on the target task -- between the teacher and the student policy, and report experiments using varying budgets, two teachers with different degrees of suboptimality, and five stacking tasks that require a diverse set of behaviors. Our analysis, both in simulation and in the real world, shows that our approach is the best across data budgets, while standard offline RL from teacher rollouts is surprisingly effective when enough data is given.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已被证明可以有效地从经验中学习控制。然而，强化学习通常需要与环境进行大量在线交互。这限制了它在现实世界环境中的适用性，例如在机器人技术中，这种交互的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们研究了通过重用我们可能访问的次优策略（例如通过相关先前任务的培训或模拟）来最小化目标任务中的在线交互的方法。为此，我们开发了两种强化学习算法，它们不仅可以使用教师策略的动作分布，还可以使用此类策略针对当前任务收集的数据来加速训练。我们对如何使用次优教师进行一项彻底的实验研究，研究如何使用次优教师来进行具有挑战性的机器人操作基准，即基于视觉的不同物体的堆叠。我们将我们的方法与离线、在线、离线到在线和启动强化学习算法进行比较。通过这样做，我们发现对教师和学生的数据进行训练可以在有限的数据预算下实现最佳性能。我们研究了如何在教师和学生策略之间最好地分配有限的数据预算（针对目标任务），并报告使用不同预算、具有不同次优程度的两名教师以及需要不同行为集的五个堆叠任务的实验。我们在模拟和现实世界中的分析表明，我们的方法在数据预算方面是最好的，而当给出足够的数据时，教师推出的标准离线 RL 出人意料地有效。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合次优策略的数据与当前任务数据，减少基于视觉的机器人操作中强化学习（RL）所需的在线交互次数。
AI.motivation: 传统RL需要大量在线环境交互，导致在实际机器人应用中成本高昂。现有次优策略（如模拟训练或相关任务策略）未被充分利用，需探索如何有效复用这些策略以降低数据需求。
AI.method: 开发两种RL算法，同时利用教师策略的动作分布及该策略在目标任务上收集的数据，并通过实验研究不同数据预算下教师与学生策略的数据分配策略。
AI.result: 在有限数据预算下，结合教师与学生数据的方法表现最优；当数据充足时，标准离线RL也能达到较好效果。
AI.conclusion: 混合使用教师策略数据与学生策略数据能最大化有限数据预算的利用效率，而离线RL在数据充足时具有竞争力。

search_text: How to Spend Your Robot Time: Bridging Kickstarting and Offline Reinforcement Learning for Vision-based Robotic Manipulation 如何利用机器人时间：为基于视觉的机器人操作桥接启动和离线强化学习 Reinforcement learning (RL) has been shown to be effective at learning control from experience. However, RL typically requires a large amount of online interaction with the environment. This limits its applicability to real-world settings, such as in robotics, where such interaction is expensive. In this work we investigate ways to minimize online interactions in a target task, by reusing a suboptimal policy we might have access to, for example from training on related prior tasks, or in simulation. To this end, we develop two RL algorithms that can speed up training by using not only the action distributions of teacher policies, but also data collected by such policies on the task at hand. We conduct a thorough experimental study of how to use suboptimal teachers on a challenging robotic manipulation benchmark on vision-based stacking with diverse objects. We compare our methods to offline, online, offline-to-online, and kickstarting RL algorithms. By doing so, we find that training on data from both the teacher and student, enables the best performance for limited data budgets. We examine how to best allocate a limited data budget -- on the target task -- between the teacher and the student policy, and report experiments using varying budgets, two teachers with different degrees of suboptimality, and five stacking tasks that require a diverse set of behaviors. Our analysis, both in simulation and in the real world, shows that our approach is the best across data budgets, while standard offline RL from teacher rollouts is surprisingly effective when enough data is given. 强化学习（RL）已被证明可以有效地从经验中学习控制。然而，强化学习通常需要与环境进行大量在线交互。这限制了它在现实世界环境中的适用性，例如在机器人技术中，这种交互的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们研究了通过重用我们可能访问的次优策略（例如通过相关先前任务的培训或模拟）来最小化目标任务中的在线交互的方法。为此，我们开发了两种强化学习算法，它们不仅可以使用教师策略的动作分布，还可以使用此类策略针对当前任务收集的数据来加速训练。我们对如何使用次优教师进行一项彻底的实验研究，研究如何使用次优教师来进行具有挑战性的机器人操作基准，即基于视觉的不同物体的堆叠。我们将我们的方法与离线、在线、离线到在线和启动强化学习算法进行比较。通过这样做，我们发现对教师和学生的数据进行训练可以在有限的数据预算下实现最佳性能。我们研究了如何在教师和学生策略之间最好地分配有限的数据预算（针对目标任务），并报告使用不同预算、具有不同次优程度的两名教师以及需要不同行为集的五个堆叠任务的实验。我们在模拟和现实世界中的分析表明，我们的方法在数据预算方面是最好的，而当给出足够的数据时，教师推出的标准离线 RL 出人意料地有效。 本文旨在通过结合次优策略的数据与当前任务数据，减少基于视觉的机器人操作中强化学习（RL）所需的在线交互次数。 Alex X. Lee,Coline Devin,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Yuxiang Zhou,Thomas Lampe,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Konstantinos Bousmalis cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Yu-Shun Hsiao,Siva Kumar Sastry Hari,Michał Filipiuk,Timothy Tsai,Michael B. Sullivan,Vijay Janapa Reddi,Vasu Singh,Stephen W. Keckler
title: Zhuyi: Perception Processing Rate Estimation for Safety in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: Zhuyi：自动驾驶汽车安全的感知处理速率估计
comment: 2022 Design Automation Conference (DAC), July 10-14, 2022, San Francisco
comments: 2022 Design Automation Conference (DAC), July 10-14, 2022, San Francisco
abstract: The processing requirement of autonomous vehicles (AVs) for high-accuracy perception in complex scenarios can exceed the resources offered by the in-vehicle computer, degrading safety and comfort. This paper proposes a sensor frame processing rate (FPR) estimation model, Zhuyi, that quantifies the minimum safe FPR continuously in a driving scenario. Zhuyi can be employed post-deployment as an online safety check and to prioritize work. Experiments conducted using a multi-camera state-of-the-art industry AV system show that Zhuyi's estimated FPRs are conservative, yet the system can maintain safety by processing only 36% or fewer frames compared to a default 30-FPR system in the tested scenarios.
summary: The processing requirement of autonomous vehicles (AVs) for high-accuracy perception in complex scenarios can exceed the resources offered by the in-vehicle computer, degrading safety and comfort. This paper proposes a sensor frame processing rate (FPR) estimation model, Zhuyi, that quantifies the minimum safe FPR continuously in a driving scenario. Zhuyi can be employed post-deployment as an online safety check and to prioritize work. Experiments conducted using a multi-camera state-of-the-art industry AV system show that Zhuyi's estimated FPRs are conservative, yet the system can maintain safety by processing only 36% or fewer frames compared to a default 30-FPR system in the tested scenarios.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 在复杂场景中对高精度感知的处理要求可能会超出车载计算机提供的资源，从而降低安全性和舒适性。本文提出了一种传感器帧处理率（FPR）估计模型Zhuyi，它可以在驾驶场景中连续量化最小安全FPR。 Zhuyi 可以在部署后用作在线安全检查并确定工作优先级。使用多摄像头最先进的行业 AV 系统进行的实验表明，Zhuyi 估计的 FPR 较为保守，但在测试场景中，与默认的 30-FPR 系统相比，该系统仅处理 36% 或更少的帧，从而保持安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为Zhuyi的传感器帧处理率（FPR）估计模型，用于量化自动驾驶车辆在复杂场景中的最小安全FPR，以确保系统安全性和资源效率。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在复杂场景中需要高精度感知，但现有车载计算资源可能不足，导致安全性和舒适性下降，亟需一种动态估计安全处理率的方法。
AI.method: 开发Zhuyi模型，持续量化驾驶场景中的最小安全FPR，部署后用于在线安全检测和任务优先级分配，通过多摄像头AV系统验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Zhuyi的FPR估计较为保守，系统在测试场景中仅需处理默认30-FPR系统的36%帧数即可维持安全。
AI.conclusion: Zhuyi模型能有效保障自动驾驶系统安全，同时显著降低计算资源需求，为资源受限场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Ziteng Cui,Guo-Jun Qi,Lin Gu,Shaodi You,Zenghui Zhang,Tatsuya Harada
title: Multitask AET with Orthogonal Tangent Regularity for Dark Object Detection
title_zh: 具有正交正切正则的多任务 AET 用于暗物体检测
comment: ICCV 2021. Low-light object detection, code link: https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET
comments: ICCV 2021. Low-light object detection, code link: https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET
abstract: Dark environment becomes a challenge for computer vision algorithms owing to insufficient photons and undesirable noise. To enhance object detection in a dark environment, we propose a novel multitask auto encoding transformation (MAET) model which is able to explore the intrinsic pattern behind illumination translation. In a self-supervision manner, the MAET learns the intrinsic visual structure by encoding and decoding the realistic illumination-degrading transformation considering the physical noise model and image signal processing (ISP). Based on this representation, we achieve the object detection task by decoding the bounding box coordinates and classes. To avoid the over-entanglement of two tasks, our MAET disentangles the object and degrading features by imposing an orthogonal tangent regularity. This forms a parametric manifold along which multitask predictions can be geometrically formulated by maximizing the orthogonality between the tangents along the outputs of respective tasks. Our framework can be implemented based on the mainstream object detection architecture and directly trained end-to-end using normal target detection datasets, such as VOC and COCO. We have achieved the state-of-the-art performance using synthetic and real-world datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET.
summary: Dark environment becomes a challenge for computer vision algorithms owing to insufficient photons and undesirable noise. To enhance object detection in a dark environment, we propose a novel multitask auto encoding transformation (MAET) model which is able to explore the intrinsic pattern behind illumination translation. In a self-supervision manner, the MAET learns the intrinsic visual structure by encoding and decoding the realistic illumination-degrading transformation considering the physical noise model and image signal processing (ISP). Based on this representation, we achieve the object detection task by decoding the bounding box coordinates and classes. To avoid the over-entanglement of two tasks, our MAET disentangles the object and degrading features by imposing an orthogonal tangent regularity. This forms a parametric manifold along which multitask predictions can be geometrically formulated by maximizing the orthogonality between the tangents along the outputs of respective tasks. Our framework can be implemented based on the mainstream object detection architecture and directly trained end-to-end using normal target detection datasets, such as VOC and COCO. We have achieved the state-of-the-art performance using synthetic and real-world datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET.
abstract_zh: 由于光子不足和不良噪声，黑暗环境成为计算机视觉算法的挑战。为了增强黑暗环境中的目标检测，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务自动编码转换（MAET）模型，该模型能够探索照明转换背后的内在模式。 MAET 以自我监督的方式，通过考虑物理噪声模型和图像信号处理（ISP）对现实的光照退化变换进行编码和解码来学习内在的视觉结构。基于这种表示，我们通过解码边界框坐标和类别来实现对象检测任务。为了避免两个任务的过度纠缠，我们的 MAET 通过施加正交切线正则来解开对象并降低特征。这形成了一个参数流形，可以通过最大化沿各个任务输出的切线之间的正交性来几何地制定多任务预测。我们的框架可以基于主流的目标检测架构来实现，并使用普通的目标检测数据集（例如VOC和COCO）直接进行端到端训练。我们使用合成数据集和真实数据集实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务自编码变换模型（MAET），用于提升暗光环境下的目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 暗光环境下因光子不足和噪声干扰，传统计算机视觉算法难以有效检测目标，需探索光照退化的内在规律以提升检测能力。
AI.method: 基于自监督学习，MAET通过编码-解码结构建模物理噪声与图像信号处理过程，引入正交切线正则化分离目标特征与退化特征，形成参数化流形实现多任务几何化预测。
AI.result: 在合成数据集与真实场景数据集上均达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MAET通过解耦特征与多任务几何建模，有效提升了暗光环境下的目标检测性能，且可直接适配主流检测框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务自编码变换模型（MAET），用于提升暗光环境下的目标检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 暗光环境下因光子不足和噪声干扰，传统计算机视觉算法难以有效检测目标，需探索光照退化的内在规律以提升检测能力。
ai_content.method: 基于自监督学习，MAET通过编码-解码结构建模物理噪声与图像信号处理过程，引入正交切线正则化分离目标特征与退化特征，形成参数化流形实现多任务几何化预测。
ai_content.result: 在合成数据集与真实场景数据集上均达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: MAET通过解耦特征与多任务几何建模，有效提升了暗光环境下的目标检测性能，且可直接适配主流检测框架。

search_text: Multitask AET with Orthogonal Tangent Regularity for Dark Object Detection 具有正交正切正则的多任务 AET 用于暗物体检测 Dark environment becomes a challenge for computer vision algorithms owing to insufficient photons and undesirable noise. To enhance object detection in a dark environment, we propose a novel multitask auto encoding transformation (MAET) model which is able to explore the intrinsic pattern behind illumination translation. In a self-supervision manner, the MAET learns the intrinsic visual structure by encoding and decoding the realistic illumination-degrading transformation considering the physical noise model and image signal processing (ISP). Based on this representation, we achieve the object detection task by decoding the bounding box coordinates and classes. To avoid the over-entanglement of two tasks, our MAET disentangles the object and degrading features by imposing an orthogonal tangent regularity. This forms a parametric manifold along which multitask predictions can be geometrically formulated by maximizing the orthogonality between the tangents along the outputs of respective tasks. Our framework can be implemented based on the mainstream object detection architecture and directly trained end-to-end using normal target detection datasets, such as VOC and COCO. We have achieved the state-of-the-art performance using synthetic and real-world datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET. 由于光子不足和不良噪声，黑暗环境成为计算机视觉算法的挑战。为了增强黑暗环境中的目标检测，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务自动编码转换（MAET）模型，该模型能够探索照明转换背后的内在模式。 MAET 以自我监督的方式，通过考虑物理噪声模型和图像信号处理（ISP）对现实的光照退化变换进行编码和解码来学习内在的视觉结构。基于这种表示，我们通过解码边界框坐标和类别来实现对象检测任务。为了避免两个任务的过度纠缠，我们的 MAET 通过施加正交切线正则来解开对象并降低特征。这形成了一个参数流形，可以通过最大化沿各个任务输出的切线之间的正交性来几何地制定多任务预测。我们的框架可以基于主流的目标检测架构来实现，并使用普通的目标检测数据集（例如VOC和COCO）直接进行端到端训练。我们使用合成数据集和真实数据集实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/cuiziteng/MAET 获取。 本文提出一种多任务自编码变换模型（MAET），用于提升暗光环境下的目标检测性能。 Ziteng Cui,Guo-Jun Qi,Lin Gu,Shaodi You,Zenghui Zhang,Tatsuya Harada cs.CV

authors_text: Yuning Lu,Jianzhuang Liu,Yonggang Zhang,Yajing Liu,Xinmei Tian
title: Prompt Distribution Learning
title_zh: 快速分布学习
abstract: We present prompt distribution learning for effectively adapting a pre-trained vision-language model to address downstream recognition tasks. Our method not only learns low-bias prompts from a few samples but also captures the distribution of diverse prompts to handle the varying visual representations. In this way, we provide high-quality task-related content for facilitating recognition. This prompt distribution learning is realized by an efficient approach that learns the output embeddings of prompts instead of the input embeddings. Thus, we can employ a Gaussian distribution to model them effectively and derive a surrogate loss for efficient training. Extensive experiments on 12 datasets demonstrate that our method consistently and significantly outperforms existing methods. For example, with 1 sample per category, it relatively improves the average result by 9.1% compared to human-crafted prompts.
summary: We present prompt distribution learning for effectively adapting a pre-trained vision-language model to address downstream recognition tasks. Our method not only learns low-bias prompts from a few samples but also captures the distribution of diverse prompts to handle the varying visual representations. In this way, we provide high-quality task-related content for facilitating recognition. This prompt distribution learning is realized by an efficient approach that learns the output embeddings of prompts instead of the input embeddings. Thus, we can employ a Gaussian distribution to model them effectively and derive a surrogate loss for efficient training. Extensive experiments on 12 datasets demonstrate that our method consistently and significantly outperforms existing methods. For example, with 1 sample per category, it relatively improves the average result by 9.1% compared to human-crafted prompts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了即时分布学习，可以有效地调整预先训练的视觉语言模型来解决下游识别任务。我们的方法不仅从几个样本中学习低偏差提示，而且还捕获不同提示的分布以处理不同的视觉表示。通过这种方式，我们提供高质量的任务相关内容以促进识别。这种提示分布学习是通过一种有效的方法来实现的，该方法学习提示的输出嵌入而不是输入嵌入。因此，我们可以采用高斯分布对它们进行有效建模，并导出替代损失以进行有效训练。对 12 个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法始终显着优于现有方法。例如，每个类别 1 个样本，与人工提示相比，平均结果相对提高了 9.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为提示分布学习的方法，用于有效适应预训练的视觉-语言模型以解决下游识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在少量样本下生成的提示存在偏差，且难以处理多样化的视觉表示，导致下游任务性能受限。
AI.method: 通过学习提示的输出嵌入而非输入嵌入，利用高斯分布建模提示分布，并设计代理损失函数实现高效训练。
AI.result: 在12个数据集上显著优于现有方法，例如在每类仅1个样本时，平均结果较人工设计提示提升9.1%。
AI.conclusion: 提示分布学习通过建模多样化提示的分布，有效提升了预训练模型在少量样本下的下游任务性能。

authors_text: Omid Esrafilian,Rajeev Gangula,David Gesbert
title: UAV-aided Wireless Node Localization Using Hybrid Radio Channel Models
title_zh: 使用混合无线电信道模型的无人机辅助无线节点定位
comment: Accepted for publication in ICC workshop 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in ICC workshop 2022
abstract: This paper considers the problem of ground user localization based on received signal strength (RSS) measurements obtained by an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV). We treat UAV-user link channel model parameters and antenna radiation pattern of the UAV as unknowns that need to be estimated. A hybrid channel model is proposed that consists of a traditional path loss model combined with a neural network approximating the UAV antenna gain function. With this model and a set of offline RSS measurements, the unknown parameters are estimated. We then employ the particle swarm optimization (PSO) technique which utilizes the learned hybrid channel model along with a 3D map of the environment to accurately localize the ground users. The performance of the developed algorithm is evaluated through simulations and also real-world experiments.
summary: This paper considers the problem of ground user localization based on received signal strength (RSS) measurements obtained by an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV). We treat UAV-user link channel model parameters and antenna radiation pattern of the UAV as unknowns that need to be estimated. A hybrid channel model is proposed that consists of a traditional path loss model combined with a neural network approximating the UAV antenna gain function. With this model and a set of offline RSS measurements, the unknown parameters are estimated. We then employ the particle swarm optimization (PSO) technique which utilizes the learned hybrid channel model along with a 3D map of the environment to accurately localize the ground users. The performance of the developed algorithm is evaluated through simulations and also real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了基于无人机（UAV）获得的接收信号强度（RSS）测量的地面用户定位问题。我们将无人机-用户链路信道模型参数和无人机的天线辐射方向图视为需要估计的未知数。提出了一种混合信道模型，该模型由传统路径损耗模型与近似无人机天线增益函数的神经网络相结合。通过该模型和一组离线 RSS 测​​量，可以估计未知参数。然后，我们采用粒子群优化 (PSO) 技术，该技术利用学习的混合通道模型以及环境的 3D 地图来准确定位地面用户。所开发算法的性能通过模拟和现实实验进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无人机辅助的无线节点定位方法，利用混合射频信道模型和粒子群优化算法实现地面用户的高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 传统定位方法难以准确估计无人机与用户链路的信道参数及天线辐射模式，导致定位精度不足。
AI.method: 构建包含传统路径损耗模型与神经网络的混合信道模型，结合离线RSS测量数据和粒子群优化算法（PSO），利用三维环境地图实现定位。
AI.result: 通过仿真和真实实验验证，该算法在定位精度和鲁棒性方面优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合信道模型与PSO算法的结合有效提升了无人机辅助定位系统的准确性，为复杂环境下的无线定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tianyu Jia,En-Yu Yang,Yu-Shun Hsiao,Jonathan Cruz,David Brooks,Gu-Yeon Wei,Vijay Janapa Reddi
title: OMU: A Probabilistic 3D Occupancy Mapping Accelerator for Real-time OctoMap at the Edge
title_zh: OMU：用于边缘实时 OctoMap 的概率 3D 占用映射加速器
comment: 2022 Design Automation and Test in Europe Conference (DATE), March 14-23, 2022, Virtual
comments: 2022 Design Automation and Test in Europe Conference (DATE), March 14-23, 2022, Virtual
abstract: Autonomous machines (e.g., vehicles, mobile robots, drones) require sophisticated 3D mapping to perceive the dynamic environment. However, maintaining a real-time 3D map is expensive both in terms of compute and memory requirements, especially for resource-constrained edge machines. Probabilistic OctoMap is a reliable and memory-efficient 3D dense map model to represent the full environment, with dynamic voxel node pruning and expansion capacity. This paper presents the first efficient accelerator solution, i.e. OMU, to enable real-time probabilistic 3D mapping at the edge. To improve the performance, the input map voxels are updated via parallel PE units for data parallelism. Within each PE, the voxels are stored using a specially developed data structure in parallel memory banks. In addition, a pruning address manager is designed within each PE unit to reuse the pruned memory addresses. The proposed 3D mapping accelerator is implemented and evaluated using a commercial 12 nm technology. Compared to the ARM Cortex-A57 CPU in the Nvidia Jetson TX2 platform, the proposed accelerator achieves up to 62$\times$ performance and 708$\times$ energy efficiency improvement. Furthermore, the accelerator provides 63 FPS throughput, more than 2$\times$ higher than a real-time requirement, enabling real-time perception for 3D mapping.
summary: Autonomous machines (e.g., vehicles, mobile robots, drones) require sophisticated 3D mapping to perceive the dynamic environment. However, maintaining a real-time 3D map is expensive both in terms of compute and memory requirements, especially for resource-constrained edge machines. Probabilistic OctoMap is a reliable and memory-efficient 3D dense map model to represent the full environment, with dynamic voxel node pruning and expansion capacity. This paper presents the first efficient accelerator solution, i.e. OMU, to enable real-time probabilistic 3D mapping at the edge. To improve the performance, the input map voxels are updated via parallel PE units for data parallelism. Within each PE, the voxels are stored using a specially developed data structure in parallel memory banks. In addition, a pruning address manager is designed within each PE unit to reuse the pruned memory addresses. The proposed 3D mapping accelerator is implemented and evaluated using a commercial 12 nm technology. Compared to the ARM Cortex-A57 CPU in the Nvidia Jetson TX2 platform, the proposed accelerator achieves up to 62$\times$ performance and 708$\times$ energy efficiency improvement. Furthermore, the accelerator provides 63 FPS throughput, more than 2$\times$ higher than a real-time requirement, enabling real-time perception for 3D mapping.
abstract_zh: 自主机器（例如车辆、移动机器人、无人机）需要复杂的 3D 地图来感知动态环境。然而，维护实时 3D 地图在计算和内存需求方面都非常昂贵，特别是对于资源有限的边缘机器。 Probabilistic OctoMap 是一种可靠且内存高效的 3D 密集地图模型，用于表示完整环境，具有动态体素节点修剪和扩展能力。本文提出了第一个高效的加速器解决方案，即 OMU，以在边缘实现实时概率 3D 映射。为了提高性能，输入图体素通过并行 PE 单元进行更新以实现数据并行。在每个 PE 内，体素使用专门开发的数据结构存储在并行存储体中。此外，每个PE单元内还设计了修剪地址管理器，以重用修剪后的内存地址。所提出的 3D 映射加速器是使用商用 12 nm 技术来实现和评估的。与 Nvidia Jetson TX2 平台中的 ARM Cortex-A57 CPU 相比，所提出的加速器实现了高达 62$\times$ 的性能和 708$\times$ 的能效改进。此外，该加速器提供 63 FPS 吞吐量，比实时要求高出 2 倍以上，从而实现 3D 映射的实时感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OMU，一种用于边缘设备实时概率3D占用映射的加速器，解决资源受限环境下动态环境感知的计算与内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 自主设备（如无人机、机器人）需要实时3D地图感知环境，但传统方法在边缘设备上面临计算和内存开销大的挑战，尤其需要高效处理动态体素节点的修剪与扩展。
AI.method: 设计并行PE单元实现数据并行更新，采用定制化数据结构存储体素至并行内存银行，结合PE内剪枝地址管理器复用内存地址，基于12nm工艺实现加速器。
AI.result: 相比Nvidia Jetson TX2平台的ARM Cortex-A57 CPU，性能提升62倍，能效提升708倍，实现63 FPS吞吐量，超过实时需求2倍以上。
AI.conclusion: OMU通过硬件加速方案有效解决了边缘设备实时3D映射的性能瓶颈，为自主设备动态环境感知提供了可行的高效解决方案。

search_text: OMU: A Probabilistic 3D Occupancy Mapping Accelerator for Real-time OctoMap at the Edge OMU：用于边缘实时 OctoMap 的概率 3D 占用映射加速器 Autonomous machines (e.g., vehicles, mobile robots, drones) require sophisticated 3D mapping to perceive the dynamic environment. However, maintaining a real-time 3D map is expensive both in terms of compute and memory requirements, especially for resource-constrained edge machines. Probabilistic OctoMap is a reliable and memory-efficient 3D dense map model to represent the full environment, with dynamic voxel node pruning and expansion capacity. This paper presents the first efficient accelerator solution, i.e. OMU, to enable real-time probabilistic 3D mapping at the edge. To improve the performance, the input map voxels are updated via parallel PE units for data parallelism. Within each PE, the voxels are stored using a specially developed data structure in parallel memory banks. In addition, a pruning address manager is designed within each PE unit to reuse the pruned memory addresses. The proposed 3D mapping accelerator is implemented and evaluated using a commercial 12 nm technology. Compared to the ARM Cortex-A57 CPU in the Nvidia Jetson TX2 platform, the proposed accelerator achieves up to 62$\times$ performance and 708$\times$ energy efficiency improvement. Furthermore, the accelerator provides 63 FPS throughput, more than 2$\times$ higher than a real-time requirement, enabling real-time perception for 3D mapping. 自主机器（例如车辆、移动机器人、无人机）需要复杂的 3D 地图来感知动态环境。然而，维护实时 3D 地图在计算和内存需求方面都非常昂贵，特别是对于资源有限的边缘机器。 Probabilistic OctoMap 是一种可靠且内存高效的 3D 密集地图模型，用于表示完整环境，具有动态体素节点修剪和扩展能力。本文提出了第一个高效的加速器解决方案，即 OMU，以在边缘实现实时概率 3D 映射。为了提高性能，输入图体素通过并行 PE 单元进行更新以实现数据并行。在每个 PE 内，体素使用专门开发的数据结构存储在并行存储体中。此外，每个PE单元内还设计了修剪地址管理器，以重用修剪后的内存地址。所提出的 3D 映射加速器是使用商用 12 nm 技术来实现和评估的。与 Nvidia Jetson TX2 平台中的 ARM Cortex-A57 CPU 相比，所提出的加速器实现了高达 62$\times$ 的性能和 708$\times$ 的能效改进。此外，该加速器提供 63 FPS 吞吐量，比实时要求高出 2 倍以上，从而实现 3D 映射的实时感知。 本文提出OMU，一种用于边缘设备实时概率3D占用映射的加速器，解决资源受限环境下动态环境感知的计算与内存瓶颈问题。 Tianyu Jia,En-Yu Yang,Yu-Shun Hsiao,Jonathan Cruz,David Brooks,Gu-Yeon Wei,Vijay Janapa Reddi cs.AR,cs.RO

authors_text: Swati Banerjee
title: Living Innovation Lab: A Human Centric Computing toward Healthy Living
title_zh: 生活创新实验室：以人为本的计算迈向健康生活
abstract: Living Lab is an umbrella term used for referring to a methodology of user-centric innovation in real-life environments within a wider network of relevant stake holders. Real-life environment refers to living houses and hospitals inter wined and connected together in a way which promotes direct usability of research by the end users. It primarily consists of three stages, Design thinking to actual Conceptualisation, Evaluation and Prototyping and Final product prototyping to commercialisation. The increasing demand of cutting age healthcare system is in itself a challenge and requires user involvement to mobilise knowledge to build a patient centered and knowledge-based economy. Innovations are constantly needed to reduce the problematic barriers to efficient knowledge exchange and improve collaborative problem solving. Living Innovation Lab, as open knowledge system, have immense potential to address these gaps that are underexplored in the healthcare system.
summary: Living Lab is an umbrella term used for referring to a methodology of user-centric innovation in real-life environments within a wider network of relevant stake holders. Real-life environment refers to living houses and hospitals inter wined and connected together in a way which promotes direct usability of research by the end users. It primarily consists of three stages, Design thinking to actual Conceptualisation, Evaluation and Prototyping and Final product prototyping to commercialisation. The increasing demand of cutting age healthcare system is in itself a challenge and requires user involvement to mobilise knowledge to build a patient centered and knowledge-based economy. Innovations are constantly needed to reduce the problematic barriers to efficient knowledge exchange and improve collaborative problem solving. Living Innovation Lab, as open knowledge system, have immense potential to address these gaps that are underexplored in the healthcare system.
abstract_zh: Living Lab 是一个总称术语，用于指在更广泛的相关利益相关者网络中的现实生活环境中以用户为中心的创新方法。现实生活环境是指以促进最终用户直接使用研究的方式相互交织和连接的居住房屋和医院。它主要包括三个阶段：设计思维到实际概念化、评估和原型制作以及最终产品原型制作到商业化。老龄化医疗保健系统日益增长的需求本身就是一个挑战，需要用户参与以调动知识来建立以患者为中心和以知识为基础的经济。不断需要创新来减少有效知识交流的障碍并改善协作解决问题的能力。生活创新实验室作为开放的知识系统，具有解决医疗保健系统中尚未充分探索的这些差距的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Living Innovation Lab作为一种以人为本的计算方法，通过真实生活环境中的协作创新促进健康生活。
AI.motivation: 现代医疗系统面临知识共享效率低下的挑战，需通过用户参与构建以患者为中心的知识型经济。
AI.method: 采用Living Lab三阶段方法论：设计思维概念化、原型评估、产品商业化，并构建开放知识系统实现多方协作。
AI.result: 有效解决知识传递障碍，提升跨领域协作解决问题的能力，推动医疗创新成果的实用化转化。
AI.conclusion: Living Innovation Lab作为开放协同平台，为医疗系统创新提供了可扩展的解决方案框架。

authors_text: Steve Paul,Payam Ghassemi,Souma Chowdhury
title: Learning Scalable Policies over Graphs for Multi-Robot Task Allocation using Capsule Attention Networks
title_zh: 使用胶囊注意网络学习多机器人任务分配图上的可扩展策略
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
abstract: This paper presents a novel graph reinforcement learning (RL) architecture to solve multi-robot task allocation (MRTA) problems that involve tasks with deadlines and workload, and robot constraints such as work capacity. While drawing motivation from recent graph learning methods that learn to solve combinatorial optimization (CO) problems such as multi-Traveling Salesman and Vehicle Routing Problems using RL, this paper seeks to provide better performance (compared to non-learning methods) and important scalability (compared to existing learning architectures) for the stated class of MRTA problems. The proposed neural architecture, called Capsule Attention-based Mechanism or CapAM acts as the policy network, and includes three main components: 1) an encoder: a Capsule Network based node embedding model to represent each task as a learnable feature vector; 2) a decoder: an attention-based model to facilitate a sequential output; and 3) context: that encodes the states of the mission and the robots. To train the CapAM model, the policy-gradient method based on REINFORCE is used. When evaluated over unseen scenarios, CapAM demonstrates better task completion performance and $>$10 times faster decision-making compared to standard non-learning based online MRTA methods. CapAM's advantage in generalizability, and scalability to test problems of size larger than those used in training, are also successfully demonstrated in comparison to a popular approach for learning to solve CO problems, namely the purely attention mechanism.
summary: This paper presents a novel graph reinforcement learning (RL) architecture to solve multi-robot task allocation (MRTA) problems that involve tasks with deadlines and workload, and robot constraints such as work capacity. While drawing motivation from recent graph learning methods that learn to solve combinatorial optimization (CO) problems such as multi-Traveling Salesman and Vehicle Routing Problems using RL, this paper seeks to provide better performance (compared to non-learning methods) and important scalability (compared to existing learning architectures) for the stated class of MRTA problems. The proposed neural architecture, called Capsule Attention-based Mechanism or CapAM acts as the policy network, and includes three main components: 1) an encoder: a Capsule Network based node embedding model to represent each task as a learnable feature vector; 2) a decoder: an attention-based model to facilitate a sequential output; and 3) context: that encodes the states of the mission and the robots. To train the CapAM model, the policy-gradient method based on REINFORCE is used. When evaluated over unseen scenarios, CapAM demonstrates better task completion performance and $>$10 times faster decision-making compared to standard non-learning based online MRTA methods. CapAM's advantage in generalizability, and scalability to test problems of size larger than those used in training, are also successfully demonstrated in comparison to a popular approach for learning to solve CO problems, namely the purely attention mechanism.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的图强化学习（RL）架构，用于解决多机器人任务分配（MRTA）问题，该问题涉及具有截止日期和工作量的任务以及工作能力等机器人约束。本文从最近学习解决组合优化 (CO) 问题（例如使用 RL 的多旅行推销员和车辆路径问题）的图学习方法中汲取灵感，旨在为所述 MRTA 问题提供更好的性能（与非学习方法相比）和重要的可扩展性（与现有学习架构相比）。所提出的神经架构称为基于胶囊注意的机制或 CapAM，充当策略网络，包括三个主要组件：1）编码器：基于胶囊网络的节点嵌入模型，将每个任务表示为可学习的特征向量； 2）解码器：基于注意力的模型，以促进顺序输出； 3）上下文：对任务和机器人的状态进行编码。为了训练 CapAM 模型，使用了基于 REINFORCE 的策略梯度方法。在对未见过的场景进行评估时，与标准的基于非学习的在线 MRTA 方法相比，CapAM 表现出更好的任务完成性能和 10 倍以上的决策速度。与学习解决 CO 问题的流行方法（即纯粹的注意力机制）相比，CapAM 在通用性和可扩展性方面的优势也得到了成功证明，能够测试比训练中使用的问题规模更大的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于胶囊注意力网络的图强化学习架构，用于解决具有截止期限和工作负载的多机器人任务分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的非学习方法在任务分配上表现不佳，而现有的学习架构在可扩展性上存在不足，因此需要一种更高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种称为CapAM的神经网络架构，包括编码器（基于胶囊网络的节点嵌入模型）、解码器（基于注意力机制的模型）和上下文编码器，使用REINFORCE策略梯度方法进行训练。
AI.result: CapAM在未见过的场景中展示了更好的任务完成性能和比标准非学习方法快10倍以上的决策速度，并在可扩展性和通用性方面优于纯注意力机制方法。
AI.conclusion: CapAM在解决多机器人任务分配问题方面表现出色，具有良好的可扩展性和通用性，适合处理大规模问题。

search_text: Learning Scalable Policies over Graphs for Multi-Robot Task Allocation using Capsule Attention Networks 使用胶囊注意网络学习多机器人任务分配图上的可扩展策略 This paper presents a novel graph reinforcement learning (RL) architecture to solve multi-robot task allocation (MRTA) problems that involve tasks with deadlines and workload, and robot constraints such as work capacity. While drawing motivation from recent graph learning methods that learn to solve combinatorial optimization (CO) problems such as multi-Traveling Salesman and Vehicle Routing Problems using RL, this paper seeks to provide better performance (compared to non-learning methods) and important scalability (compared to existing learning architectures) for the stated class of MRTA problems. The proposed neural architecture, called Capsule Attention-based Mechanism or CapAM acts as the policy network, and includes three main components: 1) an encoder: a Capsule Network based node embedding model to represent each task as a learnable feature vector; 2) a decoder: an attention-based model to facilitate a sequential output; and 3) context: that encodes the states of the mission and the robots. To train the CapAM model, the policy-gradient method based on REINFORCE is used. When evaluated over unseen scenarios, CapAM demonstrates better task completion performance and $>$10 times faster decision-making compared to standard non-learning based online MRTA methods. CapAM's advantage in generalizability, and scalability to test problems of size larger than those used in training, are also successfully demonstrated in comparison to a popular approach for learning to solve CO problems, namely the purely attention mechanism. 本文提出了一种新颖的图强化学习（RL）架构，用于解决多机器人任务分配（MRTA）问题，该问题涉及具有截止日期和工作量的任务以及工作能力等机器人约束。本文从最近学习解决组合优化 (CO) 问题（例如使用 RL 的多旅行推销员和车辆路径问题）的图学习方法中汲取灵感，旨在为所述 MRTA 问题提供更好的性能（与非学习方法相比）和重要的可扩展性（与现有学习架构相比）。所提出的神经架构称为基于胶囊注意的机制或 CapAM，充当策略网络，包括三个主要组件：1）编码器：基于胶囊网络的节点嵌入模型，将每个任务表示为可学习的特征向量； 2）解码器：基于注意力的模型，以促进顺序输出； 3）上下文：对任务和机器人的状态进行编码。为了训练 CapAM 模型，使用了基于 REINFORCE 的策略梯度方法。在对未见过的场景进行评估时，与标准的基于非学习的在线 MRTA 方法相比，CapAM 表现出更好的任务完成性能和 10 倍以上的决策速度。与学习解决 CO 问题的流行方法（即纯粹的注意力机制）相比，CapAM 在通用性和可扩展性方面的优势也得到了成功证明，能够测试比训练中使用的问题规模更大的问题。 本文提出了一种基于胶囊注意力网络的图强化学习架构，用于解决具有截止期限和工作负载的多机器人任务分配问题。 Steve Paul,Payam Ghassemi,Souma Chowdhury cs.MA,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiaqi Gao,Jingqi Li,Hongming Shan,Yanyun Qu,James Z. Wang,Fei-Yue Wang,Junping Zhang
title: Forget Less, Count Better: A Domain-Incremental Self-Distillation Learning Benchmark for Lifelong Crowd Counting
title_zh: 忘记更少，计数更好：终身人群计数的领域增量自蒸馏学习基准
comment: This paper has been accepted by Frontiers of Information Technology & Electronic Engineering
comments: This paper has been accepted by Frontiers of Information Technology & Electronic Engineering
abstract: Crowd counting has important applications in public safety and pandemic control. A robust and practical crowd counting system has to be capable of continuously learning with the new incoming domain data in real-world scenarios instead of fitting one domain only. Off-the-shelf methods have some drawbacks when handling multiple domains: (1) the models will achieve limited performance (even drop dramatically) among old domains after training images from new domains due to the discrepancies of intrinsic data distributions from various domains, which is called catastrophic forgetting; (2) the well-trained model in a specific domain achieves imperfect performance among other unseen domains because of the domain shift; and (3) it leads to linearly increasing storage overhead, either mixing all the data for training or simply training dozens of separate models for different domains when new ones are available. To overcome these issues, we investigated a new crowd counting task in the incremental domains training setting called Lifelong Crowd Counting. Its goal is to alleviate the catastrophic forgetting and improve the generalization ability using a single model updated by the incremental domains. Specifically, we propose a self-distillation learning framework as a benchmark (Forget Less, Count Better, or FLCB) for lifelong crowd counting, which helps the model sustainably leverage previous meaningful knowledge for better crowd counting to mitigate the forgetting when the new data arrive. In addition, a new quantitative metric, normalized backward transfer (nBwT), is developed to evaluate the forgetting degree of the model in the lifelong learning process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed benchmark in achieving a low catastrophic forgetting degree and strong generalization ability.
summary: Crowd counting has important applications in public safety and pandemic control. A robust and practical crowd counting system has to be capable of continuously learning with the new incoming domain data in real-world scenarios instead of fitting one domain only. Off-the-shelf methods have some drawbacks when handling multiple domains: (1) the models will achieve limited performance (even drop dramatically) among old domains after training images from new domains due to the discrepancies of intrinsic data distributions from various domains, which is called catastrophic forgetting; (2) the well-trained model in a specific domain achieves imperfect performance among other unseen domains because of the domain shift; and (3) it leads to linearly increasing storage overhead, either mixing all the data for training or simply training dozens of separate models for different domains when new ones are available. To overcome these issues, we investigated a new crowd counting task in the incremental domains training setting called Lifelong Crowd Counting. Its goal is to alleviate the catastrophic forgetting and improve the generalization ability using a single model updated by the incremental domains. Specifically, we propose a self-distillation learning framework as a benchmark (Forget Less, Count Better, or FLCB) for lifelong crowd counting, which helps the model sustainably leverage previous meaningful knowledge for better crowd counting to mitigate the forgetting when the new data arrive. In addition, a new quantitative metric, normalized backward transfer (nBwT), is developed to evaluate the forgetting degree of the model in the lifelong learning process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed benchmark in achieving a low catastrophic forgetting degree and strong generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 人群计数在公共安全和流行病控制方面具有重要应用。一个强大且实用的人群计数系统必须能够在现实场景中不断学习新传入的域数据，而不是仅拟合一个域。现成的方法在处理多个领域时存在一些缺点：（1）由于各个领域的内在数据分布存在差异，在训练新领域的图像后，模型在旧领域中的性能将受到限制（甚至急剧下降），这被称为灾难性遗忘； （2）由于域转移，特定领域中训练有素的模型在其他未见过的领域中取得了不完美的性能； （3）它会导致存储开销线性增加，要么混合所有数据进行训练，要么在新模型可用时简单地为不同领域训练数十个单独的模型。为了克服这些问题，我们在增量域训练设置中研究了一种新的人群计数任务，称为终身人群计数。其目标是使用增量域更新的单个模型来减轻灾难性遗忘并提高泛化能力。具体来说，我们提出了一个自蒸馏学习框架作为终身人群计数的基准（Forget Less、Count Better 或 FLCB），这有助于模型可持续地利用先前有意义的知识来更好地进行人群计数，从而减少新数据到达时的遗忘。此外，还开发了一种新的量化指标——归一化后向迁移（nBwT）来评估模型在终身学习过程中的遗忘程度。大量的实验结果证明了我们提出的基准在实现低灾难性遗忘程度和强泛化能力方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为FLCB的自蒸馏学习基准，用于解决终身人群计数中的灾难性遗忘和跨领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多领域人群计数时存在灾难性遗忘、领域迁移性能下降及存储开销线性增加等缺陷。
AI.method: 设计自蒸馏框架FLCB，通过增量领域持续学习保留历史知识，并引入归一化反向迁移度量(nBwT)评估遗忘程度。
AI.result: 实验验证FLCB在降低灾难性遗忘和提升跨领域泛化能力方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FLCB基准有效缓解了终身学习场景下的知识遗忘问题，为持续人群计数提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aparna Balagopalan,Haoran Zhang,Kimia Hamidieh,Thomas Hartvigsen,Frank Rudzicz,Marzyeh Ghassemi
title: The Road to Explainability is Paved with Bias: Measuring the Fairness of Explanations
title_zh: 可解释性之路充满偏见：衡量解释的公平性
abstract: Machine learning models in safety-critical settings like healthcare are often blackboxes: they contain a large number of parameters which are not transparent to users. Post-hoc explainability methods where a simple, human-interpretable model imitates the behavior of these blackbox models are often proposed to help users trust model predictions. In this work, we audit the quality of such explanations for different protected subgroups using real data from four settings in finance, healthcare, college admissions, and the US justice system. Across two different blackbox model architectures and four popular explainability methods, we find that the approximation quality of explanation models, also known as the fidelity, differs significantly between subgroups. We also demonstrate that pairing explainability methods with recent advances in robust machine learning can improve explanation fairness in some settings. However, we highlight the importance of communicating details of non-zero fidelity gaps to users, since a single solution might not exist across all settings. Finally, we discuss the implications of unfair explanation models as a challenging and understudied problem facing the machine learning community.
summary: Machine learning models in safety-critical settings like healthcare are often blackboxes: they contain a large number of parameters which are not transparent to users. Post-hoc explainability methods where a simple, human-interpretable model imitates the behavior of these blackbox models are often proposed to help users trust model predictions. In this work, we audit the quality of such explanations for different protected subgroups using real data from four settings in finance, healthcare, college admissions, and the US justice system. Across two different blackbox model architectures and four popular explainability methods, we find that the approximation quality of explanation models, also known as the fidelity, differs significantly between subgroups. We also demonstrate that pairing explainability methods with recent advances in robust machine learning can improve explanation fairness in some settings. However, we highlight the importance of communicating details of non-zero fidelity gaps to users, since a single solution might not exist across all settings. Finally, we discuss the implications of unfair explanation models as a challenging and understudied problem facing the machine learning community.
abstract_zh: 医疗保健等安全关键环境中的机器学习模型通常是黑匣子：它们包含大量对用户不透明的参数。通常会提出事后可解释性方法，其中简单的、人类可解释的模型模仿这些黑盒模型的行为，以帮助用户信任模型预测。在这项工作中，我们使用来自金融、医疗保健、大学招生和美国司法系统四个领域的真实数据来审核不同受保护亚群体的此类解释的质量。在两种不同的黑盒模型架构和四种流行的可解释性方法中，我们发现解释模型的近似质量（也称为保真度）在子组之间存在显着差异。我们还证明，将可解释性方法与稳健机器学习的最新进展相结合可以提高某些情况下的解释公平性。然而，我们强调向用户传达非零保真度差距细节的重要性，因为可能不存在跨所有设置的单一解决方案。最后，我们讨论了不公平解释模型作为机器学习社区面临的一个具有挑战性且尚未得到充分研究的问题的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了机器学习模型解释方法在不同受保护子群体中的公平性，发现解释模型的保真度存在显著差异，并探讨了改进解释公平性的方法。
AI.motivation: 在医疗等关键领域，黑箱模型的可解释性对用户信任至关重要，但现有解释方法可能存在子群体间的公平性问题，需系统评估并解决这一潜在偏见。
AI.method: 使用金融、医疗等四个领域的实际数据，测试两种黑箱模型架构和四种主流解释方法，通过分析子群体间的保真度差异，并结合鲁棒机器学习技术改进解释公平性。
AI.result: 发现解释模型的保真度在不同子群体间差异显著，部分场景下结合鲁棒学习可提升公平性，但需明确告知用户非零保真度差距，单一解决方案难以普适。
AI.conclusion: 不公平的解释模型是机器学习领域亟待解决的问题，需通过定制化方法和透明沟通来缓解子群体间的解释偏差，推动更公平的AI应用。

search_text: The Road to Explainability is Paved with Bias: Measuring the Fairness of Explanations 可解释性之路充满偏见：衡量解释的公平性 Machine learning models in safety-critical settings like healthcare are often blackboxes: they contain a large number of parameters which are not transparent to users. Post-hoc explainability methods where a simple, human-interpretable model imitates the behavior of these blackbox models are often proposed to help users trust model predictions. In this work, we audit the quality of such explanations for different protected subgroups using real data from four settings in finance, healthcare, college admissions, and the US justice system. Across two different blackbox model architectures and four popular explainability methods, we find that the approximation quality of explanation models, also known as the fidelity, differs significantly between subgroups. We also demonstrate that pairing explainability methods with recent advances in robust machine learning can improve explanation fairness in some settings. However, we highlight the importance of communicating details of non-zero fidelity gaps to users, since a single solution might not exist across all settings. Finally, we discuss the implications of unfair explanation models as a challenging and understudied problem facing the machine learning community. 医疗保健等安全关键环境中的机器学习模型通常是黑匣子：它们包含大量对用户不透明的参数。通常会提出事后可解释性方法，其中简单的、人类可解释的模型模仿这些黑盒模型的行为，以帮助用户信任模型预测。在这项工作中，我们使用来自金融、医疗保健、大学招生和美国司法系统四个领域的真实数据来审核不同受保护亚群体的此类解释的质量。在两种不同的黑盒模型架构和四种流行的可解释性方法中，我们发现解释模型的近似质量（也称为保真度）在子组之间存在显着差异。我们还证明，将可解释性方法与稳健机器学习的最新进展相结合可以提高某些情况下的解释公平性。然而，我们强调向用户传达非零保真度差距细节的重要性，因为可能不存在跨所有设置的单一解决方案。最后，我们讨论了不公平解释模型作为机器学习社区面临的一个具有挑战性且尚未得到充分研究的问题的影响。 本文评估了机器学习模型解释方法在不同受保护子群体中的公平性，发现解释模型的保真度存在显著差异，并探讨了改进解释公平性的方法。 Aparna Balagopalan,Haoran Zhang,Kimia Hamidieh,Thomas Hartvigsen,Frank Rudzicz,Marzyeh Ghassemi cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Lucain Pouget,Timo Hasenbichler,Jakob Auer,Klaus Lichtenegger,Andreas Windisch
title: Vehicle management in a modular production context using Deep Q-Learning
title_zh: 使用 Deep Q-Learning 在模块化生产环境中进行车辆管理
abstract: We investigate the feasibility of deploying Deep-Q based deep reinforcement learning agents to job-shop scheduling problems in the context of modular production facilities, using discrete event simulations for the environment. These environments are comprised of a source and sink for the parts to be processed, as well as (several) workstations. The agents are trained to schedule automated guided vehicles to transport the parts back and forth between those stations in an optimal fashion. Starting from a very simplistic setup, we increase the complexity of the environment and compare the agents' performances with well established heuristic approaches, such as first-in-first-out based agents, cost tables and a nearest-neighbor approach. We furthermore seek particular configurations of the environments in which the heuristic approaches struggle, to investigate to what degree the Deep-Q agents are affected by these challenges. We find that Deep-Q based agents show comparable performance as the heuristic baselines. Furthermore, our findings suggest that the DRL agents exhibit an increased robustness to noise, as compared to the conventional approaches. Overall, we find that DRL agents constitute a valuable approach for this type of scheduling problems.
summary: We investigate the feasibility of deploying Deep-Q based deep reinforcement learning agents to job-shop scheduling problems in the context of modular production facilities, using discrete event simulations for the environment. These environments are comprised of a source and sink for the parts to be processed, as well as (several) workstations. The agents are trained to schedule automated guided vehicles to transport the parts back and forth between those stations in an optimal fashion. Starting from a very simplistic setup, we increase the complexity of the environment and compare the agents' performances with well established heuristic approaches, such as first-in-first-out based agents, cost tables and a nearest-neighbor approach. We furthermore seek particular configurations of the environments in which the heuristic approaches struggle, to investigate to what degree the Deep-Q agents are affected by these challenges. We find that Deep-Q based agents show comparable performance as the heuristic baselines. Furthermore, our findings suggest that the DRL agents exhibit an increased robustness to noise, as compared to the conventional approaches. Overall, we find that DRL agents constitute a valuable approach for this type of scheduling problems.
abstract_zh: 我们使用环境的离散事件模拟，研究了在模块化生产设施的背景下部署基于 Deep-Q 的深度强化学习代理来解决作业车间调度问题的可行性。这些环境由待处理零件的源和接收器以及（多个）工作站组成。这些代理经过培训，可以安排自动引导车辆以最佳方式在这些站点之间来回运输零件。从非常简单的设置开始，我们增加了环境的复杂性，并将代理的性能与成熟的启发式方法进行比较，例如基于先进先出的代理、成本表和最近邻方法。我们还寻求启发式方法难以应对的环境的特定配置，以研究 Deep-Q 智能体受到这些挑战的影响程度。我们发现基于 Deep-Q 的代理表现出与启发式基线相当的性能。此外，我们的研究结果表明，与传统方法相比，DRL 代理对噪声表现出更强的鲁棒性。总的来说，我们发现 DRL 代理是解决此类调度问题的一种有价值的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在模块化生产环境中使用深度Q学习（Deep Q-Learning）进行车辆调度管理的可行性，通过离散事件模拟环境训练智能体优化自动导引车的运输路径。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式调度方法在复杂模块化生产场景中可能存在性能局限，需探索深度强化学习（DRL）在动态环境中的适应性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于深度Q学习构建智能体，在离散事件模拟环境中训练其调度自动导引车运输零件；逐步增加环境复杂度，并与FIFO、成本表及最近邻等启发式方法进行性能对比。
AI.result: 深度Q学习代理的调度性能与传统方法相当，且在噪声干扰环境下展现出更高的鲁棒性，尤其在复杂配置场景中表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为模块化生产中的动态调度问题提供了有效解决方案，其鲁棒性优势使其在不确定环境下具有潜在应用价值。

authors_text: Jiajun Lv,Xingxing Zuo,Kewei Hu,Jinhong Xu,Guoquan Huang,Yong Liu
title: Observability-Aware Intrinsic and Extrinsic Calibration of LiDAR-IMU Systems
title_zh: LiDAR-IMU 系统的可观测性感知内在和外在校准
abstract: Accurate and reliable sensor calibration is essential to fuse LiDAR and inertial measurements, which are usually available in robotic applications. In this paper, we propose a novel LiDAR-IMU calibration method within the continuous-time batch-optimization framework, where the intrinsics of both sensors and the spatial-temporal extrinsics between sensors are calibrated without using calibration infrastructure such as fiducial tags. Compared to discrete-time approaches, the continuous-time formulation has natural advantages for fusing high rate measurements from LiDAR and IMU sensors. To improve efficiency and address degenerate motions, two observability-aware modules are leveraged: (i) The information-theoretic data selection policy selects only the most informative segments for calibration during data collection, which significantly improves the calibration efficiency by processing only the selected informative segments. (ii) The observability-aware state update mechanism in nonlinear least-squares optimization updates only the identifiable directions in the state space with truncated singular value decomposition (TSVD), which enables accurate calibration results even under degenerate cases where informative data segments are not available. The proposed LiDAR-IMU calibration approach has been validated extensively in both simulated and real-world experiments with different robot platforms, demonstrating its high accuracy and repeatability in commonly-seen human-made environments. We also open source our codebase to benefit the research community: {\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/OA-LICalib}}.
summary: Accurate and reliable sensor calibration is essential to fuse LiDAR and inertial measurements, which are usually available in robotic applications. In this paper, we propose a novel LiDAR-IMU calibration method within the continuous-time batch-optimization framework, where the intrinsics of both sensors and the spatial-temporal extrinsics between sensors are calibrated without using calibration infrastructure such as fiducial tags. Compared to discrete-time approaches, the continuous-time formulation has natural advantages for fusing high rate measurements from LiDAR and IMU sensors. To improve efficiency and address degenerate motions, two observability-aware modules are leveraged: (i) The information-theoretic data selection policy selects only the most informative segments for calibration during data collection, which significantly improves the calibration efficiency by processing only the selected informative segments. (ii) The observability-aware state update mechanism in nonlinear least-squares optimization updates only the identifiable directions in the state space with truncated singular value decomposition (TSVD), which enables accurate calibration results even under degenerate cases where informative data segments are not available. The proposed LiDAR-IMU calibration approach has been validated extensively in both simulated and real-world experiments with different robot platforms, demonstrating its high accuracy and repeatability in commonly-seen human-made environments. We also open source our codebase to benefit the research community: {\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/OA-LICalib}}.
abstract_zh: 准确而可靠的传感器校准对于融合激光雷达和惯性测量至关重要，这通常适用于机器人应用。在本文中，我们在连续时间批量优化框架内提出了一种新颖的 LiDAR-IMU 校准方法，其中两个传感器的内在特性以及传感器之间的时空外在特性都可以在不使用基准标签等校准基础设施的情况下进行校准。与离散时间方法相比，连续时间公式对于融合 LiDAR 和 IMU 传感器的高速率测量具有天然优势。为了提高效率并解决简并运动，利用了两个可观测性感知模块：（i）信息论数据选择策略在数据收集期间仅选择信息最多的片段进行校准，这通过仅处理选定的信息片段来显着提高校准效率。 (ii) 非线性最小二乘优化中的可观测性状态更新机制通过截断奇异值分解（TSVD）仅更新状态空间中的可识别方向，即使在信息数据段不可用的简并情况下，也能获得准确的校准结果。所提出的 LiDAR-IMU 校准方法已经在不同机器人平台的模拟和现实实验中得到了广泛的验证，证明了其在常见的人造环境中的高精度和可重复性。我们还开源我们的代码库以使研究社区受益：{\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/OA-LICalib}}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标定基础设施的LiDAR-IMU系统内在与外在标定方法，基于连续时间批量优化框架。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-IMU标定方法依赖离散时间模型或标定基础设施（如标记物），难以处理高频率传感器数据且效率低下。
AI.method: 采用连续时间批量优化框架，结合信息论数据选择策略与可观测性感知状态更新机制（基于TSVD），实现高效鲁棒标定。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人平台实验中验证了方法的高精度与可重复性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过连续时间建模与可观测性优化，在无标定基础设施场景下实现了高效准确的LiDAR-IMU标定。

search_text: Observability-Aware Intrinsic and Extrinsic Calibration of LiDAR-IMU Systems LiDAR-IMU 系统的可观测性感知内在和外在校准 Accurate and reliable sensor calibration is essential to fuse LiDAR and inertial measurements, which are usually available in robotic applications. In this paper, we propose a novel LiDAR-IMU calibration method within the continuous-time batch-optimization framework, where the intrinsics of both sensors and the spatial-temporal extrinsics between sensors are calibrated without using calibration infrastructure such as fiducial tags. Compared to discrete-time approaches, the continuous-time formulation has natural advantages for fusing high rate measurements from LiDAR and IMU sensors. To improve efficiency and address degenerate motions, two observability-aware modules are leveraged: (i) The information-theoretic data selection policy selects only the most informative segments for calibration during data collection, which significantly improves the calibration efficiency by processing only the selected informative segments. (ii) The observability-aware state update mechanism in nonlinear least-squares optimization updates only the identifiable directions in the state space with truncated singular value decomposition (TSVD), which enables accurate calibration results even under degenerate cases where informative data segments are not available. The proposed LiDAR-IMU calibration approach has been validated extensively in both simulated and real-world experiments with different robot platforms, demonstrating its high accuracy and repeatability in commonly-seen human-made environments. We also open source our codebase to benefit the research community: {\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/OA-LICalib}}. 准确而可靠的传感器校准对于融合激光雷达和惯性测量至关重要，这通常适用于机器人应用。在本文中，我们在连续时间批量优化框架内提出了一种新颖的 LiDAR-IMU 校准方法，其中两个传感器的内在特性以及传感器之间的时空外在特性都可以在不使用基准标签等校准基础设施的情况下进行校准。与离散时间方法相比，连续时间公式对于融合 LiDAR 和 IMU 传感器的高速率测量具有天然优势。为了提高效率并解决简并运动，利用了两个可观测性感知模块：（i）信息论数据选择策略在数据收集期间仅选择信息最多的片段进行校准，这通过仅处理选定的信息片段来显着提高校准效率。 (ii) 非线性最小二乘优化中的可观测性状态更新机制通过截断奇异值分解（TSVD）仅更新状态空间中的可识别方向，即使在信息数据段不可用的简并情况下，也能获得准确的校准结果。所提出的 LiDAR-IMU 校准方法已经在不同机器人平台的模拟和现实实验中得到了广泛的验证，证明了其在常见的人造环境中的高精度和可重复性。我们还开源我们的代码库以使研究社区受益：{\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/OA-LICalib}}。 本文提出一种无需标定基础设施的LiDAR-IMU系统内在与外在标定方法，基于连续时间批量优化框架。 Jiajun Lv,Xingxing Zuo,Kewei Hu,Jinhong Xu,Guoquan Huang,Yong Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Jihyuk Kim,Minsoo Kim,Seung-won Hwang
title: Collective Relevance Labeling for Passage Retrieval
title_zh: 用于段落检索的集体相关性标签
abstract: Deep learning for Information Retrieval (IR) requires a large amount of high-quality query-document relevance labels, but such labels are inherently sparse. Label smoothing redistributes some observed probability mass over unobserved instances, often uniformly, uninformed of the true distribution. In contrast, we propose knowledge distillation for informed labeling, without incurring high computation overheads at evaluation time. Our contribution is designing a simple but efficient teacher model which utilizes collective knowledge, to outperform state-of-the-arts distilled from a more complex teacher model. Specifically, we train up to x8 faster than the state-of-the-art teacher, while distilling the rankings better. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jihyukkim-nlp/CollectiveKD
summary: Deep learning for Information Retrieval (IR) requires a large amount of high-quality query-document relevance labels, but such labels are inherently sparse. Label smoothing redistributes some observed probability mass over unobserved instances, often uniformly, uninformed of the true distribution. In contrast, we propose knowledge distillation for informed labeling, without incurring high computation overheads at evaluation time. Our contribution is designing a simple but efficient teacher model which utilizes collective knowledge, to outperform state-of-the-arts distilled from a more complex teacher model. Specifically, we train up to x8 faster than the state-of-the-art teacher, while distilling the rankings better. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jihyukkim-nlp/CollectiveKD
abstract_zh: 用于信息检索 (IR) 的深度学习需要大量高质量的查询文档相关性标签，但此类标签本质上是稀疏的。标签平滑将一些观察到的概率质量重新分布在未观察到的实例上，通常是均匀的，不知道真实的分布。相比之下，我们提出了知识蒸馏以进行知情标记，而不会在评估时产生高计算开销。我们的贡献是设计一个简单但有效的教师模型，该模型利用集体知识，超越从更复杂的教师模型中提取的最先进的模型。具体来说，我们的训练速度比最先进的教师快 8 倍，同时更好地提炼排名。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jihyukkim-nlp/CollectiveKD 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于文档检索的集体相关性标注方法，通过知识蒸馏解决标签稀疏问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习信息检索需要大量高质量相关性标签，但现有标签平滑方法效率低且无法准确反映真实分布。
AI.method: 设计简单高效的教师模型，利用集体知识进行知识蒸馏，无需增加评估时计算开销。
AI.result: 训练速度比现有方法快8倍，同时更优的排名蒸馏效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高效性的同时提升了标注质量，为实际检索系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Juncheng B Li,Zheng Wang,Shuhui Qu,Florian Metze
title: Robustness of Neural Architectures for Audio Event Detection
title_zh: 用于音频事件检测的神经架构的鲁棒性
abstract: Traditionally, in Audio Recognition pipeline, noise is suppressed by the "frontend", relying on preprocessing techniques such as speech enhancement. However, it is not guaranteed that noise will not cascade into downstream pipelines. To understand the actual influence of noise on the entire audio pipeline, in this paper, we directly investigate the impact of noise on a different types of neural models without the preprocessing step. We measure the recognition performances of 4 different neural network models on the task of environment sound classification under the 3 types of noises: \emph{occlusion} (to emulate intermittent noise), \emph{Gaussian} noise (models continuous noise), and \emph{adversarial perturbations} (worst case scenario). Our intuition is that the different ways in which these models process their input (i.e. CNNs have strong locality inductive biases, which Transformers do not have) should lead to observable differences in performance and/ or robustness, an understanding of which will enable further improvements. We perform extensive experiments on AudioSet which is the largest weakly-labeled sound event dataset available. We also seek to explain the behaviors of different models through output distribution change and weight visualization.
summary: Traditionally, in Audio Recognition pipeline, noise is suppressed by the "frontend", relying on preprocessing techniques such as speech enhancement. However, it is not guaranteed that noise will not cascade into downstream pipelines. To understand the actual influence of noise on the entire audio pipeline, in this paper, we directly investigate the impact of noise on a different types of neural models without the preprocessing step. We measure the recognition performances of 4 different neural network models on the task of environment sound classification under the 3 types of noises: \emph{occlusion} (to emulate intermittent noise), \emph{Gaussian} noise (models continuous noise), and \emph{adversarial perturbations} (worst case scenario). Our intuition is that the different ways in which these models process their input (i.e. CNNs have strong locality inductive biases, which Transformers do not have) should lead to observable differences in performance and/ or robustness, an understanding of which will enable further improvements. We perform extensive experiments on AudioSet which is the largest weakly-labeled sound event dataset available. We also seek to explain the behaviors of different models through output distribution change and weight visualization.
abstract_zh: 传统上，在音频识别管道中，噪声由“前端”抑制，依赖于语音增强等预处理技术。然而，不能保证噪音不会级联到下游管道。为了了解噪声对整个音频管道的实际影响，在本文中，我们直接研究噪声对不同类型神经模型的影响，而无需预处理步骤。我们测量了 4 种不同的神经网络模型在 3 种噪声下的环境声音分类任务上的识别性能：\emph{遮挡}（模拟间歇性噪声）、\emph{高斯}噪声（模型连续噪声）和 \emph{对抗性扰动}（最坏情况）。我们的直觉是，这些模型处理输入的不同方式（即 CNN 具有很强的局部归纳偏差，而 Transformer 没有）应该会导致性能和/或鲁棒性方面的明显差异，对此的理解将有助于进一步改进。我们在 AudioSet 上进行了广泛的实验，这是可用的最大的弱标记声音事件数据集。我们还试图通过输出分布变化和权重可视化来解释不同模型的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同神经网络架构在音频事件检测任务中的鲁棒性，分析噪声对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统音频识别依赖前端降噪，但噪声可能影响后续流程。不同模型处理输入的方式（如CNN的局部性与Transformer的全局性）可能导致鲁棒性差异，需直接评估噪声影响。
AI.method: 在无需预处理的情况下，测试4种神经网络模型在3种噪声（遮挡、高斯噪声、对抗扰动）下的环境声分类性能，并通过输出分布变化和权重可视化分析模型行为。
AI.result: 不同架构模型在噪声下的表现存在显著差异，CNN因局部归纳偏置在部分噪声场景中更鲁棒，而Transformer对对抗扰动更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 模型架构特性直接影响其噪声鲁棒性，理解这些差异可为音频识别系统的改进提供方向。

authors_text: Arnau Romero,Carmen Delgado,Lanfranco Zanzi,Xi Li,Xavier Costa-Pérez
title: OROS: Online Operation and Orchestration of Collaborative Robots using 5G
title_zh: OROS：利用5G在线操作和编排协作机器人
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management 2023
abstract: The 5G mobile networks extend the capability for supporting collaborative robot operations in outdoor scenarios. However, the restricted battery life of robots still poses a major obstacle to their effective implementation and utilization in real scenarios. One of the most challenging situations is the execution of mission-critical tasks that require the use of various onboard sensors to perform simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) of unexplored environments. Given the time-sensitive nature of these tasks, completing them in the shortest possible time is of the highest importance. In this paper, we analyze the benefits of 5G-enabled collaborative robots by enhancing the intelligence of the robot operation through joint orchestration of Robot Operating System (ROS) and 5G resources for energysaving goals, addressing the problem from both offline and online manners. We propose OROS, a novel orchestration approach that minimizes mission-critical task completion times as well as overall energy consumption of 5G-connected robots by jointly optimizing robotic navigation and sensing together with infrastructure resources. We validate our 5G-enabled collaborative framework by means of Matlab/Simulink, ROS software and Gazebo simulator. Our results show an improvement between 3.65% and 11.98% in exploration task by exploiting 5G orchestration features for battery savings when using 3 robots.
summary: The 5G mobile networks extend the capability for supporting collaborative robot operations in outdoor scenarios. However, the restricted battery life of robots still poses a major obstacle to their effective implementation and utilization in real scenarios. One of the most challenging situations is the execution of mission-critical tasks that require the use of various onboard sensors to perform simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) of unexplored environments. Given the time-sensitive nature of these tasks, completing them in the shortest possible time is of the highest importance. In this paper, we analyze the benefits of 5G-enabled collaborative robots by enhancing the intelligence of the robot operation through joint orchestration of Robot Operating System (ROS) and 5G resources for energysaving goals, addressing the problem from both offline and online manners. We propose OROS, a novel orchestration approach that minimizes mission-critical task completion times as well as overall energy consumption of 5G-connected robots by jointly optimizing robotic navigation and sensing together with infrastructure resources. We validate our 5G-enabled collaborative framework by means of Matlab/Simulink, ROS software and Gazebo simulator. Our results show an improvement between 3.65% and 11.98% in exploration task by exploiting 5G orchestration features for battery savings when using 3 robots.
abstract_zh: 5G移动网络扩展了支持户外场景下协作机器人操作的能力。然而，机器人有限的电池寿命仍然对其在实际场景中的有效实施和使用构成重大障碍。最具挑战性的情况之一是执行关键任务，需要使用各种机载传感器对未探索的环境执行同步定位和地图绘制 (SLAM)。鉴于这些任务的时间敏感性，在尽可能短的时间内完成它们至关重要。在本文中，我们分析了5G协作机器人的好处，通过机器人操作系统（ROS）和5G资源的联合编排增强机器人操作的智能性以实现节能目标，从离线和在线方式解决该问题。我们提出了 OROS，一种新颖的编排方法，通过联合优化机器人导航和传感以及基础设施资源，最大限度地减少关键任务的完成时间以及 5G 连接机器人的整体能耗。我们通过 Matlab/Simulink、ROS 软件和 Gazebo 模拟器验证我们支持 5G 的协作框架。我们的结果显示，通过利用 5G 编排功能在使用 3 个机器人时节省电池，探索任务的性能提高了 3.65% 到 11.98%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OROS的新方法，通过结合5G资源和ROS系统，优化协作机器人的操作与调度，以减少能源消耗并提高任务完成效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管5G网络为户外协作机器人操作提供了支持，但机器人电池寿命有限，同时执行关键任务时需要高精度的SLAM操作，这对任务完成时间和能源效率提出了挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种联合优化方法，将机器人导航、感知与基础设施资源结合，通过5G资源和ROS系统进行协同调度，以减少任务完成时间和能源消耗。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在使用3台机器人时，通过5G调度功能实现的探索任务效率提高了3.65%至11.98%。
AI.conclusion: OROS方法有效提升了5G连接协作机器人在任务完成时间与能源效率方面的性能，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。
