search_text: OROS: Online Operation and Orchestration of Collaborative Robots using 5G OROS：利用5G在线操作和编排协作机器人 The 5G mobile networks extend the capability for supporting collaborative robot operations in outdoor scenarios. However, the restricted battery life of robots still poses a major obstacle to their effective implementation and utilization in real scenarios. One of the most challenging situations is the execution of mission-critical tasks that require the use of various onboard sensors to perform simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) of unexplored environments. Given the time-sensitive nature of these tasks, completing them in the shortest possible time is of the highest importance. In this paper, we analyze the benefits of 5G-enabled collaborative robots by enhancing the intelligence of the robot operation through joint orchestration of Robot Operating System (ROS) and 5G resources for energysaving goals, addressing the problem from both offline and online manners. We propose OROS, a novel orchestration approach that minimizes mission-critical task completion times as well as overall energy consumption of 5G-connected robots by jointly optimizing robotic navigation and sensing together with infrastructure resources. We validate our 5G-enabled collaborative framework by means of Matlab/Simulink, ROS software and Gazebo simulator. Our results show an improvement between 3.65% and 11.98% in exploration task by exploiting 5G orchestration features for battery savings when using 3 robots. 5G移动网络扩展了支持户外场景下协作机器人操作的能力。然而，机器人有限的电池寿命仍然对其在实际场景中的有效实施和使用构成重大障碍。最具挑战性的情况之一是执行关键任务，需要使用各种机载传感器对未探索的环境执行同步定位和地图绘制 (SLAM)。鉴于这些任务的时间敏感性，在尽可能短的时间内完成它们至关重要。在本文中，我们分析了5G协作机器人的好处，通过机器人操作系统（ROS）和5G资源的联合编排增强机器人操作的智能性以实现节能目标，从离线和在线方式解决该问题。我们提出了 OROS，一种新颖的编排方法，通过联合优化机器人导航和传感以及基础设施资源，最大限度地减少关键任务的完成时间以及 5G 连接机器人的整体能耗。我们通过 Matlab/Simulink、ROS 软件和 Gazebo 模拟器验证我们支持 5G 的协作框架。我们的结果显示，通过利用 5G 编排功能在使用 3 个机器人时节省电池，探索任务的性能提高了 3.65% 到 11.98%。 本文提出了一种名为OROS的新方法，通过结合5G资源和ROS系统，优化协作机器人的操作与调度，以减少能源消耗并提高任务完成效率。 Arnau Romero,Carmen Delgado,Lanfranco Zanzi,Xi Li,Xavier Costa-Pérez cs.NI,cs.RO

authors_text: W. B. Langdon
title: A Trillion Genetic Programming Instructions per Second
title_zh: 每秒一万亿条遗传编程指令
abstract: We summarise how a 3.0 GHz 16 core AVX512 computer can interpret the equivalent of up to on average 1103370000000 GPop/s. Citations to existing publications are given. Implementation stress is placed on both parallel computing, bandwidth limits and avoiding repeated calculation. Information theory suggests in digital computing, failed disruption propagation gives huge speed ups as FDP and incremental evaluation can be used to reduce fitness evaluation time in phenotypically converged populations. Conversely FDP may be responsible for evolution stagnation. So the wider Evolutionary Computing, Artificial Life, Unconventional Computing and Software Engineering community may need to avoid deep nesting.
summary: We summarise how a 3.0 GHz 16 core AVX512 computer can interpret the equivalent of up to on average 1103370000000 GPop/s. Citations to existing publications are given. Implementation stress is placed on both parallel computing, bandwidth limits and avoiding repeated calculation. Information theory suggests in digital computing, failed disruption propagation gives huge speed ups as FDP and incremental evaluation can be used to reduce fitness evaluation time in phenotypically converged populations. Conversely FDP may be responsible for evolution stagnation. So the wider Evolutionary Computing, Artificial Life, Unconventional Computing and Software Engineering community may need to avoid deep nesting.
abstract_zh: 我们总结了 3.0 GHz 16 核 AVX512 计算机如何解释平均高达 1103370000000 GPop/s 的等效值。给出了对现有出版物的引用。实现的重点在于并行计算、带宽限制和避免重复计算。信息理论表明，在数字计算中，失败的破坏传播会带来巨大的加速，因为 FDP 和增量评估可用于减少表型收敛群体的适应度评估时间。相反，FDP 可能是进化停滞的原因。因此，更广泛的进化计算、人工生命、非常规计算和软件工程社区可能需要避免深度嵌套。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何利用高性能计算硬件提升遗传编程的执行效率
AI.motivation: 解决遗传编程中的计算瓶颈，提升效率并避免进化停滞
AI.method: 利用多核AVX512架构，优化并行计算和带宽，结合信息论方法减少重复计算
AI.result: 实现每秒最高约1.1万亿次的遗传编程操作
AI.conclusion: 建议在进化计算等领域避免深度嵌套结构，以防止效率下降

authors_text: Lin Hao Lee
title: Musical Score Following and Audio Alignment
title_zh: 乐谱跟踪和音频对齐
comment: Imperial College London MEng Final Year Project Report
comments: Imperial College London MEng Final Year Project Report
abstract: Real-time tracking of the position of a musical performance on a musical score, i.e. score following, can be useful in music practice, performance and production. Example applications of such technology include computer-aided accompaniment and automatic page turning. Score following is a challenging task, especially when considering deviations in performance data from the score stemming from mistakes or expressive choices. In this project, the extensive research present in the field is first explored before two open-source evaluation testbenches for score following--one quantitative and the other qualitative--are introduced. A new way of obtaining quantitative testbench data is proposed, and the QualScofo dataset for qualitative benchmarking is introduced. Subsequently, three different score followers, each of a different class, are implemented. First, a beat-based follower for an interactive conductor application--the TuneApp Conductor--is created to demonstrate an entertaining application of score following. Then, an Approximate String Matching (ASM) non-real-time follower is implemented to complement the quantitative testbench and provide more technical background details of score following. Finally, a Constant Q-Transform (CQT) Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) score follower robust against major challenges in score following (such as polyphonic music and performance deviations) is outlined and implemented; it is shown that this CQT-based approach consistently and significantly outperforms a commonly used FFT-based approach in extracting audio features for score following.
summary: Real-time tracking of the position of a musical performance on a musical score, i.e. score following, can be useful in music practice, performance and production. Example applications of such technology include computer-aided accompaniment and automatic page turning. Score following is a challenging task, especially when considering deviations in performance data from the score stemming from mistakes or expressive choices. In this project, the extensive research present in the field is first explored before two open-source evaluation testbenches for score following--one quantitative and the other qualitative--are introduced. A new way of obtaining quantitative testbench data is proposed, and the QualScofo dataset for qualitative benchmarking is introduced. Subsequently, three different score followers, each of a different class, are implemented. First, a beat-based follower for an interactive conductor application--the TuneApp Conductor--is created to demonstrate an entertaining application of score following. Then, an Approximate String Matching (ASM) non-real-time follower is implemented to complement the quantitative testbench and provide more technical background details of score following. Finally, a Constant Q-Transform (CQT) Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) score follower robust against major challenges in score following (such as polyphonic music and performance deviations) is outlined and implemented; it is shown that this CQT-based approach consistently and significantly outperforms a commonly used FFT-based approach in extracting audio features for score following.
abstract_zh: 实时跟踪音乐表演在乐谱上的位置，即乐谱跟踪，在音乐练习、表演和制作中非常有用。这种技术的示例应用包括计算机辅助伴奏和自动翻页。分数跟踪是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在考虑由于错误或表达选择而导致表现数据与分数的偏差时。在该项目中，首先探索了该领域存在的广泛研究，然后引入了两个用于分数跟踪的开源评估测试平台（一个是定量的，另一个是定性的）。提出了一种获取定量测试平台数据的新方法，并引入了用于定性基准测试的 QualScofo 数据集。随后，实施三个不同的分数追随者，每个追随者属于不同的类别。首先，为交互式指挥应用程序（TuneApp Conductor）创建一个基于节拍的跟随器，以演示乐谱跟随的娱乐应用程序。然后，实现近似字符串匹配（ASM）非实时跟随器以补充定量测试平台并提供分数跟随的更多技术背景细节。最后，概述并实现了恒定 Q 变换 (CQT) 动态时间规整 (DTW) 乐谱跟随器，能够应对乐谱跟踪中的主要挑战（例如复调音乐和演奏偏差）；结果表明，这种基于 CQT 的方法在提取音频特征以进行乐谱跟踪方面始终显着优于常用的基于 FFT 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发和评估实时音乐乐谱跟踪技术，并通过新数据集和算法提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 乐谱跟踪技术在音乐练习、表演和制作中具有广泛应用，但需解决演奏偏差等问题，现有评估工具不足。
AI.method: 探索领域研究，构建定量与定性测试平台，提出新定量数据获取方法并引入QualScofo数据集，实现三种不同类型的乐谱跟踪器（基于节拍、ASM非实时、CQT-DTW实时）。
AI.result: CQT-DTW方法在处理多声部音乐和演奏偏差时显著优于传统FFT方法，且在定量测试中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过新数据集和算法推动了乐谱跟踪技术的发展，验证了CQT-DTW方法的有效性，为实际应用提供支持。

First, a beat-based follower for an interactive conductor application--the TuneApp Conductor--is created to demonstrate an entertaining application of score following. Finally, a Constant Q-Transform (CQT) Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) score follower robust against major challenges in score following (such as polyphonic music and performance deviations) is outlined and implemented; it is shown that this CQT-based approach consistently and significantly outperforms a commonly used FFT-based approach in extracting audio features for score following. 实时跟踪音乐表演在乐谱上的位置，即乐谱跟踪，在音乐练习、表演和制作中非常有用。这种技术的示例应用包括计算机辅助伴奏和自动翻页。分数跟踪是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在考虑由于错误或表达选择而导致表现数据与分数的偏差时。在该项目中，首先探索了该领域存在的广泛研究，然后引入了两个用于分数跟踪的开源评估测试平台（一个是定量的，另一个是定性的）。提出了一种获取定量测试平台数据的新方法，并引入了用于定性基准测试的 QualScofo 数据集。随后，实施三个不同的分数追随者，每个追随者属于不同的类别。首先，为交互式指挥应用程序（TuneApp Conductor）创建一个基于节拍的跟随器，以演示乐谱跟随的娱乐应用程序。然后，实现近似字符串匹配（ASM）非实时跟随器以补充定量测试平台并提供分数跟随的更多技术背景细节。最后，概述并实现了恒定 Q 变换 (CQT) 动态时间规整 (DTW) 乐谱跟随器，能够应对乐谱跟踪中的主要挑战（例如复调音乐和演奏偏差）；结果表明，这种基于 CQT 的方法在提取音频特征以进行乐谱跟踪方面始终显着优于常用的基于 FFT 的方法。 本文旨在开发和评估实时音乐乐谱跟踪技术，并通过新数据集和算法提升其性能。 Lin Hao Lee cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yeshwanth Cherapanamjeri,Constantinos Daskalakis,Andrew Ilyas,Manolis Zampetakis
title: What Makes A Good Fisherman? Linear Regression under Self-Selection Bias
title_zh: 是什么造就了一个好渔夫？自选择偏差下的线性回归
abstract: In the classical setting of self-selection, the goal is to learn $k$ models, simultaneously from observations $(x^{(i)}, y^{(i)})$ where $y^{(i)}$ is the output of one of $k$ underlying models on input $x^{(i)}$. In contrast to mixture models, where we observe the output of a randomly selected model, here the observed model depends on the outputs themselves, and is determined by some known selection criterion. For example, we might observe the highest output, the smallest output, or the median output of the $k$ models. In known-index self-selection, the identity of the observed model output is observable; in unknown-index self-selection, it is not. Self-selection has a long history in Econometrics and applications in various theoretical and applied fields, including treatment effect estimation, imitation learning, learning from strategically reported data, and learning from markets at disequilibrium. In this work, we present the first computationally and statistically efficient estimation algorithms for the most standard setting of this problem where the models are linear. In the known-index case, we require poly$(1/\varepsilon, k, d)$ sample and time complexity to estimate all model parameters to accuracy $\varepsilon$ in $d$ dimensions, and can accommodate quite general selection criteria. In the more challenging unknown-index case, even the identifiability of the linear models (from infinitely many samples) was not known. We show three results in this case for the commonly studied $\max$ self-selection criterion: (1) we show that the linear models are indeed identifiable, (2) for general $k$ we provide an algorithm with poly$(d) \exp(\text{poly}(k))$ sample and time complexity to estimate the regression parameters up to error $1/\text{poly}(k)$, and (3) for $k = 2$ we provide an algorithm for any error $\varepsilon$ and poly$(d, 1/\varepsilon)$ sample and time complexity.
summary: In the classical setting of self-selection, the goal is to learn $k$ models, simultaneously from observations $(x^{(i)}, y^{(i)})$ where $y^{(i)}$ is the output of one of $k$ underlying models on input $x^{(i)}$. In contrast to mixture models, where we observe the output of a randomly selected model, here the observed model depends on the outputs themselves, and is determined by some known selection criterion. For example, we might observe the highest output, the smallest output, or the median output of the $k$ models. In known-index self-selection, the identity of the observed model output is observable; in unknown-index self-selection, it is not. Self-selection has a long history in Econometrics and applications in various theoretical and applied fields, including treatment effect estimation, imitation learning, learning from strategically reported data, and learning from markets at disequilibrium. In this work, we present the first computationally and statistically efficient estimation algorithms for the most standard setting of this problem where the models are linear. In the known-index case, we require poly$(1/\varepsilon, k, d)$ sample and time complexity to estimate all model parameters to accuracy $\varepsilon$ in $d$ dimensions, and can accommodate quite general selection criteria. In the more challenging unknown-index case, even the identifiability of the linear models (from infinitely many samples) was not known. We show three results in this case for the commonly studied $\max$ self-selection criterion: (1) we show that the linear models are indeed identifiable, (2) for general $k$ we provide an algorithm with poly$(d) \exp(\text{poly}(k))$ sample and time complexity to estimate the regression parameters up to error $1/\text{poly}(k)$, and (3) for $k = 2$ we provide an algorithm for any error $\varepsilon$ and poly$(d, 1/\varepsilon)$ sample and time complexity.
abstract_zh: 在自选择的经典设置中，目标是同时从观察 $(x^{(i)}, y^{(i)})$ 学习 $k$ 模型，其中 $y^{(i)}$ 是输入 $x^{(i)}$ 上 $k$ 基础模型之一的输出。与混合模型相反，我们观察随机选择模型的输出，这里观察到的模型取决于输出本身，并由一些已知的选择标准确定。例如，我们可能会观察 $k$ 模型的最高输出、最小输出或中值输出。在已知指标自选择中，观察到的模型输出的同一性是可观察的；在未知索引自选择中，则不是。自选择在计量经济学和各个理论和应用领域的应用中有着悠久的历史，包括治疗效果估计、模仿学习、从战略报告数据中学习以及从不均衡的市场中学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个计算和统计上有效的估计算法，用于该问题的最标准设置，其中模型是线性的。在已知索引的情况下，我们需要 poly$(1/\varepsilon, k, d)$ 样本和时间复杂度来估计所有模型参数，以在 $d$ 维度中准确估计 $\varepsilon$，并且可以适应相当一般的选择标准。在更具挑战性的未知指标情况下，甚至线性模型（来自无限多个样本）的可识别性也是未知的。在这种情况下，我们针对常用的 $\max$ 自选择标准展示了三个结果：(1) 我们证明线性模型确实是可识别的，(2) 对于一般的 $k$，我们提供了一种具有 poly$(d) \exp(\text{poly}(k))$ 样本和时间复杂度的算法，以估计高达误差 $1/\text{poly}(k)$ 的回归参数，以及 (3) 对于 $k = 2$，我们为任何误差 $\varepsilon$ 提供了一种算法和 poly$(d, 1/\varepsilon)$ 样本和时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在自选择偏差下如何高效估计多个线性回归模型的参数，针对已知和未知索引情况提出算法。
AI.motivation: 自选择问题在经济学和机器学习中普遍存在，但传统方法在处理未知索引情况时存在可识别性和计算效率的挑战，亟需高效算法。
AI.method: 针对已知索引和未知索引情况，分别设计基于多项式样本复杂度的算法，其中未知索引情况通过分析最大值选择标准的可识别性并提出指数时间算法。
AI.result: 实现了已知索引下的高精度参数估计，证明未知索引下模型的可识别性，并提出多项式时间算法，其中k=2时复杂度进一步降低。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在计算和统计效率上解决了线性自选择问题，特别是在未知索引情况下证明了模型的可识别性，并提出了有效的算法，为相关领域提供了新工具。

authors_text: Ernst Moritz Hahn,Mateo Perez,Sven Schewe,Fabio Somenzi,Ashutosh Trivedi,Dominik Wojtczak
title: Alternating Good-for-MDP Automata
title_zh: 交替 Good-for-MDP 自动机
abstract: When omega-regular objectives were first proposed in model-free reinforcement learning (RL) for controlling MDPs, deterministic Rabin automata were used in an attempt to provide a direct translation from their transitions to scalar values. While these translations failed, it has turned out that it is possible to repair them by using good-for-MDPs (GFM) Büchi automata instead. These are nondeterministic Büchi automata with a restricted type of nondeterminism, albeit not as restricted as in good-for-games automata. Indeed, deterministic Rabin automata have a pretty straightforward translation to such GFM automata, which is bi-linear in the number of states and pairs. Interestingly, the same cannot be said for deterministic Streett automata: a translation to nondeterministic Rabin or Büchi automata comes at an exponential cost, even without requiring the target automaton to be good-for-MDPs. Do we have to pay more than that to obtain a good-for-MDP automaton? The surprising answer is that we have to pay significantly less when we instead expand the good-for-MDP property to alternating automata: like the nondeterministic GFM automata obtained from deterministic Rabin automata, the alternating good-for-MDP automata we produce from deterministic Streett automata are bi-linear in the the size of the deterministic automaton and its index, and can therefore be exponentially more succinct than minimal nondeterministic Büchi automata.
summary: When omega-regular objectives were first proposed in model-free reinforcement learning (RL) for controlling MDPs, deterministic Rabin automata were used in an attempt to provide a direct translation from their transitions to scalar values. While these translations failed, it has turned out that it is possible to repair them by using good-for-MDPs (GFM) Büchi automata instead. These are nondeterministic Büchi automata with a restricted type of nondeterminism, albeit not as restricted as in good-for-games automata. Indeed, deterministic Rabin automata have a pretty straightforward translation to such GFM automata, which is bi-linear in the number of states and pairs. Interestingly, the same cannot be said for deterministic Streett automata: a translation to nondeterministic Rabin or Büchi automata comes at an exponential cost, even without requiring the target automaton to be good-for-MDPs. Do we have to pay more than that to obtain a good-for-MDP automaton? The surprising answer is that we have to pay significantly less when we instead expand the good-for-MDP property to alternating automata: like the nondeterministic GFM automata obtained from deterministic Rabin automata, the alternating good-for-MDP automata we produce from deterministic Streett automata are bi-linear in the the size of the deterministic automaton and its index, and can therefore be exponentially more succinct than minimal nondeterministic Büchi automata.
abstract_zh: 当欧米伽正则目标首次在无模型强化学习 (RL) 中提出用于控制 MDP 时，确定性拉宾自动机被用来尝试提供从它们的转换到标量值的直接转换。虽然这些翻译失败了，但事实证明，可以通过使用 good-for-MDP (GFM) Büchi 自动机来修复它们。这些是非确定性 Büchi 自动机，具有受限类型的非确定性，尽管不像适合游戏的自动机那样受到限制。事实上，确定性 Rabin 自动机可以非常简单地转换为 GFM 自动机，它在状态和对的数量上是双线性的。有趣的是，对于确定性 Streett 自动机来说，情况并非如此：即使不要求目标自动机适合 MDP，转换为非确定性 Rabin 或 Büchi 自动机也会带来指数成本。我们是否需要付出更多才能获得适合 MDP 自动机？令人惊讶的答案是，当我们将有利于 MDP 的属性扩展到交替自动机时，我们必须付出的代价要少得多：就像从确定性 Rabin 自动机获得的非确定性 GFM 自动机一样，我们从确定性 Streett 自动机生成的交替有利于 MDP 自动机在确定性自动机及其索引的大小上是双线性的，因此可以比最小非确定性 Büchi 自动机更加简洁。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将确定性Streett自动机转换为交替型Good-for-MDP（GFM）自动机的方法，以解决传统翻译中的指数级成本问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将确定性Rabin自动机转换为GFM Büchi自动机时存在失败，而确定性Streett自动机转换为非确定性自动机需付出指数级代价，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过扩展GFM属性至交替自动机，提出将确定性Streett自动机转换为交替GFM自动机的双线性方法。
AI.result: 生成的交替GFM自动机规模与原始自动机状态数和索引呈双线性关系，比最小非确定性Büchi自动机简洁指数级。
AI.conclusion: 交替GFM自动机在保持GFM属性的同时，显著降低了从确定性Streett自动机转换的复杂度，避免了指数级代价。

method: 通过扩展GFM属性至交替自动机，提出将确定性Streett自动机转换为交替GFM自动机的双线性方法。
result: 生成的交替GFM自动机规模与原始自动机状态数和索引呈双线性关系，比最小非确定性Büchi自动机简洁指数级。
conclusion: 交替GFM自动机在保持GFM属性的同时，显著降低了从确定性Streett自动机转换的复杂度，避免了指数级代价。
search_text: Alternating Good-for-MDP Automata 交替 Good-for-MDP 自动机 When omega-regular objectives were first proposed in model-free reinforcement learning (RL) for controlling MDPs, deterministic Rabin automata were used in an attempt to provide a direct translation from their transitions to scalar values. While these translations failed, it has turned out that it is possible to repair them by using good-for-MDPs (GFM) Büchi automata instead. These are nondeterministic Büchi automata with a restricted type of nondeterminism, albeit not as restricted as in good-for-games automata. Indeed, deterministic Rabin automata have a pretty straightforward translation to such GFM automata, which is bi-linear in the number of states and pairs. Interestingly, the same cannot be said for deterministic Streett automata: a translation to nondeterministic Rabin or Büchi automata comes at an exponential cost, even without requiring the target automaton to be good-for-MDPs. Do we have to pay more than that to obtain a good-for-MDP automaton? The surprising answer is that we have to pay significantly less when we instead expand the good-for-MDP property to alternating automata: like the nondeterministic GFM automata obtained from deterministic Rabin automata, the alternating good-for-MDP automata we produce from deterministic Streett automata are bi-linear in the the size of the deterministic automaton and its index, and can therefore be exponentially more succinct than minimal nondeterministic Büchi automata. 当欧米伽正则目标首次在无模型强化学习 (RL) 中提出用于控制 MDP 时，确定性拉宾自动机被用来尝试提供从它们的转换到标量值的直接转换。虽然这些翻译失败了，但事实证明，可以通过使用 good-for-MDP (GFM) Büchi 自动机来修复它们。这些是非确定性 Büchi 自动机，具有受限类型的非确定性，尽管不像适合游戏的自动机那样受到限制。事实上，确定性 Rabin 自动机可以非常简单地转换为 GFM 自动机，它在状态和对的数量上是双线性的。有趣的是，对于确定性 Streett 自动机来说，情况并非如此：即使不要求目标自动机适合 MDP，转换为非确定性 Rabin 或 Büchi 自动机也会带来指数成本。我们是否需要付出更多才能获得适合 MDP 自动机？令人惊讶的答案是，当我们将有利于 MDP 的属性扩展到交替自动机时，我们必须付出的代价要少得多：就像从确定性 Rabin 自动机获得的非确定性 GFM 自动机一样，我们从确定性 Streett 自动机生成的交替有利于 MDP 自动机在确定性自动机及其索引的大小上是双线性的，因此可以比最小非确定性 Büchi 自动机更加简洁。 本文研究将确定性Streett自动机转换为交替型Good-for-MDP（GFM）自动机的方法，以解决传统翻译中的指数级成本问题。 Ernst Moritz Hahn,Mateo Perez,Sven Schewe,Fabio Somenzi,Ashutosh Trivedi,Dominik Wojtczak cs.FL,cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: David Ouyang,John Theurer,Nathan R. Stein,J. Weston Hughes,Pierre Elias,Bryan He,Neal Yuan,Grant Duffy,Roopinder K. Sandhu,Joseph Ebinger,Patrick Botting,Melvin Jujjavarapu,Brian Claggett,James E. Tooley,Tim Poterucha,Jonathan H. Chen,Michael Nurok,Marco Perez,Adler Perotte,James Y. Zou,Nancy R. Cook,Sumeet S. Chugh,Susan Cheng,Christine M. Albert
title: Electrocardiographic Deep Learning for Predicting Post-Procedural Mortality
title_zh: 用于预测术后死亡率的心电图深度学习
abstract: Background. Pre-operative risk assessments used in clinical practice are limited in their ability to identify risk for post-operative mortality. We hypothesize that electrocardiograms contain hidden risk markers that can help prognosticate post-operative mortality. Methods. In a derivation cohort of 45,969 pre-operative patients (age 59+- 19 years, 55 percent women), a deep learning algorithm was developed to leverage waveform signals from pre-operative ECGs to discriminate post-operative mortality. Model performance was assessed in a holdout internal test dataset and in two external hospital cohorts and compared with the Revised Cardiac Risk Index (RCRI) score. Results. In the derivation cohort, there were 1,452 deaths. The algorithm discriminates mortality with an AUC of 0.83 (95% CI 0.79-0.87) surpassing the discrimination of the RCRI score with an AUC of 0.67 (CI 0.61-0.72) in the held out test cohort. Patients determined to be high risk by the deep learning model's risk prediction had an unadjusted odds ratio (OR) of 8.83 (5.57-13.20) for post-operative mortality as compared to an unadjusted OR of 2.08 (CI 0.77-3.50) for post-operative mortality for RCRI greater than 2. The deep learning algorithm performed similarly for patients undergoing cardiac surgery with an AUC of 0.85 (CI 0.77-0.92), non-cardiac surgery with an AUC of 0.83 (0.79-0.88), and catherization or endoscopy suite procedures with an AUC of 0.76 (0.72-0.81). The algorithm similarly discriminated risk for mortality in two separate external validation cohorts from independent healthcare systems with AUCs of 0.79 (0.75-0.83) and 0.75 (0.74-0.76) respectively. Conclusion. The findings demonstrate how a novel deep learning algorithm, applied to pre-operative ECGs, can improve discrimination of post-operative mortality.

abstract_zh: 背景。临床实践中使用的术前风险评估在识别术后死亡风险方面的能力有限。我们假设心电图包含隐藏的风险标记，可以帮助预测术后死亡率。方法。在由 45,969 名术前患者（年龄 59+- 19 岁，55% 为女性）组成的衍生队列中，开发了一种深度学习算法，以利用术前心电图的波形信号来区分术后死亡率。在坚持的内部测试数据集和两个外部医院队列中评估模型性能，并与修订后的心脏风险指数 (RCRI) 评分进行比较。结果。在衍生队列中，有 1,452 人死亡。该算法在测试队列中以 AUC 0.83 (95% CI 0.79-0.87) 区分死亡率，超过了 RCRI 评分的 AUC 0.67 (CI 0.61-0.72)。通过深度学习模型的风险预测确定为高风险的患者，其术后死亡率的未调整比值比 (OR) 为 8.83 (5.57-13.20)，而 RCRI 大于 2 的术后死亡率的未调整比值比 (OR) 为 2.08 (CI 0.77-3.50)。对于接受心脏手术的患者，深度学习算法的表现类似，AUC 为 0.85 (CI) 0.77-0.92），非心脏手术，AUC 为 0.83（0.79-0.88），导管插入术或内窥镜套件手术，AUC 为 0.76（0.72-0.81）。该算法同样区分了来自独立医疗保健系统的两个独立外部验证队列的死亡风险，其 AUC 分别为 0.79 (0.75-0.83) 和 0.75 (0.74-0.76)。结论。研究结果证明了一种应用于术前心电图的新型深度学习算法如何能够改善对术后死亡率的辨别。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于术前心电图的深度学习算法，用于预测术后死亡风险。
AI.motivation: 传统临床预后评估工具（如RCRI评分）在预测术后死亡风险方面存在局限性，而心电图可能包含未被利用的风险标志物。
AI.method: 利用45,969例术前患者的ECG波形数据训练深度学习模型，并在内部测试集及两个外部医院队列中验证，与RCRI评分进行对比。
AI.result: 模型在测试队列中AUC达0.83（优于RCRI的0.67），高风险患者术后死亡OR为8.83，且在心脏手术、非心脏手术及导管检查等场景中均表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 基于ECG的深度学习算法能显著提升术后死亡风险的预测能力，优于传统评分系统。

authors_text: Ghazaleh Kia,Laura Ruotsalainen,Jukka Talvitie
title: A CNN Approach for 5G mmWave Positioning Using Beamformed CSI Measurements
title_zh: 使用波束成形 CSI 测量进行 5G 毫米波定位的 CNN 方法
comment: To appear in 2022 International Conference on Localization and GNSS (ICL-GNSS), 7-9 June 2022, Tampere, Finland
comments: To appear in 2022 International Conference on Localization and GNSS (ICL-GNSS), 7-9 June 2022, Tampere, Finland
abstract: The advent of Artificial Intelligence (AI) has impacted all aspects of human life. One of the concrete examples of AI impact is visible in radio positioning. In this article, for the first time we utilize the power of AI by training a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) using 5G New Radio (NR) fingerprints consisting of beamformed Channel State Information (CSI). By observing CSI, it is possible to characterize the multipath channel between the transmitter and the receiver, and thus provide a good source of spatiotemporal data to find the position of a User Equipment (UE). We collect ray-tracing-based 5G NR CSI from an urban area. The CSI data of the signals from one Base Station (BS) is collected at the reference points with known positions to train a CNN. We evaluate our work by testing: a) the robustness of the trained network for estimating the positions for the new measurements on the same reference points and b) the accuracy of the CNN-based position estimation while the UE is on points other than the reference points. The results prove that our trained network for a specific urban environment can estimate the UE position with a minimum mean error of 0.98 m.
summary: The advent of Artificial Intelligence (AI) has impacted all aspects of human life. One of the concrete examples of AI impact is visible in radio positioning. In this article, for the first time we utilize the power of AI by training a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) using 5G New Radio (NR) fingerprints consisting of beamformed Channel State Information (CSI). By observing CSI, it is possible to characterize the multipath channel between the transmitter and the receiver, and thus provide a good source of spatiotemporal data to find the position of a User Equipment (UE). We collect ray-tracing-based 5G NR CSI from an urban area. The CSI data of the signals from one Base Station (BS) is collected at the reference points with known positions to train a CNN. We evaluate our work by testing: a) the robustness of the trained network for estimating the positions for the new measurements on the same reference points and b) the accuracy of the CNN-based position estimation while the UE is on points other than the reference points. The results prove that our trained network for a specific urban environment can estimate the UE position with a minimum mean error of 0.98 m.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的出现影响了人类生活的各个方面。人工智能影响的具体例子之一是无线电定位。在本文中，我们首次使用由波束成形信道状态信息 (CSI) 组成的 5G 新无线电 (NR) 指纹来训练卷积神经网络 (CNN)，从而利用人工智能的力量。通过观察CSI，可以表征发射机和接收机之间的多径信道，从而提供良好的时空数据源来查找用户设备（UE）的位置。我们从市区收集基于光线追踪的 5G NR CSI。在已知位置的参考点收集来自一个基站 (BS) 的信号的 CSI 数据来训练 CNN。我们通过测试来评估我们的工作：a）经过训练的网络用于估计相同参考点上新测量位置的鲁棒性，b）当 UE 位于参考点以外的点时基于 CNN 的位置估计的准确性。结果证明，我们针对特定城市环境训练的网络可以估计 UE 位置，最小平均误差为 0.98 m。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的5G毫米波定位方法，利用波束成形的信道状态信息（CSI）进行用户设备（UE）定位。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术的发展，传统定位方法在复杂5G毫米波环境中的精度不足，需探索更高效的定位方案。
AI.method: 通过采集城市区域的5G NR波束成形CSI数据，利用卷积神经网络训练模型，并在参考点和非参考点测试定位鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在特定城市环境下的定位均方误差最低为0.98米。
AI.conclusion: 基于CNN的CSI定位方法在5G毫米波场景中能实现高精度定位，为复杂环境下的UE定位提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 基于CNN的CSI定位方法在5G毫米波场景中能实现高精度定位，为复杂环境下的UE定位提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的5G毫米波定位方法，利用波束成形的信道状态信息（CSI）进行用户设备（UE）定位。
motivation: 随着AI技术的发展，传统定位方法在复杂5G毫米波环境中的精度不足，需探索更高效的定位方案。
method: 通过采集城市区域的5G NR波束成形CSI数据，利用卷积神经网络训练模型，并在参考点和非参考点测试定位鲁棒性与准确性。
result: 实验表明，该模型在特定城市环境下的定位均方误差最低为0.98米。
conclusion: 基于CNN的CSI定位方法在5G毫米波场景中能实现高精度定位，为复杂环境下的UE定位提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: A CNN Approach for 5G mmWave Positioning Using Beamformed CSI Measurements 使用波束成形 CSI 测量进行 5G 毫米波定位的 CNN 方法 The advent of Artificial Intelligence (AI) has impacted all aspects of human life. One of the concrete examples of AI impact is visible in radio positioning. In this article, for the first time we utilize the power of AI by training a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) using 5G New Radio (NR) fingerprints consisting of beamformed Channel State Information (CSI). By observing CSI, it is possible to characterize the multipath channel between the transmitter and the receiver, and thus provide a good source of spatiotemporal data to find the position of a User Equipment (UE). We collect ray-tracing-based 5G NR CSI from an urban area. The CSI data of the signals from one Base Station (BS) is collected at the reference points with known positions to train a CNN. We evaluate our work by testing: a) the robustness of the trained network for estimating the positions for the new measurements on the same reference points and b) the accuracy of the CNN-based position estimation while the UE is on points other than the reference points. The results prove that our trained network for a specific urban environment can estimate the UE position with a minimum mean error of 0.98 m. 人工智能（AI）的出现影响了人类生活的各个方面。人工智能影响的具体例子之一是无线电定位。在本文中，我们首次使用由波束成形信道状态信息 (CSI) 组成的 5G 新无线电 (NR) 指纹来训练卷积神经网络 (CNN)，从而利用人工智能的力量。通过观察CSI，可以表征发射机和接收机之间的多径信道，从而提供良好的时空数据源来查找用户设备（UE）的位置。我们从市区收集基于光线追踪的 5G NR CSI。在已知位置的参考点收集来自一个基站 (BS) 的信号的 CSI 数据来训练 CNN。我们通过测试来评估我们的工作：a）经过训练的网络用于估计相同参考点上新测量位置的鲁棒性，b）当 UE 位于参考点以外的点时基于 CNN 的位置估计的准确性。结果证明，我们针对特定城市环境训练的网络可以估计 UE 位置，最小平均误差为 0.98 m。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的5G毫米波定位方法，利用波束成形的信道状态信息（CSI）进行用户设备（UE）定位。 Ghazaleh Kia,Laura Ruotsalainen,Jukka Talvitie eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yi-An Chen,Jien-De Sui,Tian-Sheuan Chang
title: Real Time On Sensor Gait Phase Detection with 0.5KB Deep Learning Model
title_zh: 使用 0.5KB 深度学习模型进行实时传感器步态相位检测
abstract: Gait phase detection with convolution neural network provides accurate classification but demands high computational cost, which inhibits real time low power on-sensor processing. This paper presents a segmentation based gait phase detection with a width and depth downscaled U-Net like model that only needs 0.5KB model size and 67K operations per second with 95.9% accuracy to be easily fitted into resource limited on sensor microcontroller.
summary: Gait phase detection with convolution neural network provides accurate classification but demands high computational cost, which inhibits real time low power on-sensor processing. This paper presents a segmentation based gait phase detection with a width and depth downscaled U-Net like model that only needs 0.5KB model size and 67K operations per second with 95.9% accuracy to be easily fitted into resource limited on sensor microcontroller.
abstract_zh: 使用卷积神经网络的步态相位检测提供了准确的分类，但需要较高的计算成本，这抑制了传感器上的实时低功耗处理。本文提出了一种基于分段的步态相位检测，具有宽度和深度缩小的类似 U-Net 的模型，该模型仅需要 0.5KB 模型大小和每秒 67K 次操作，准确度为 95.9%，可以轻松适应传感器微控制器上资源有限的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分割的步态阶段检测方法，使用轻量级深度学习模型在传感器上实现实时处理。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于卷积神经网络的步态阶段检测方法计算成本高，难以在资源受限的传感器上实现实时低功耗处理。
AI.method: 本文采用一种宽度和深度都缩减的类似U-Net的模型，通过分割方法进行步态阶段检测。
AI.result: 该模型仅有0.5KB大小，每秒仅需67K次运算，准确率达到95.9%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在资源受限的传感器微控制器上轻松部署，实现了高效准确的步态阶段检测。

authors_text: Prerna Agarwal,Avani Gupta,Renuka Sindhgatta,Sampath Dechu
title: Goal-Oriented Next Best Activity Recommendation using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习的面向目标的下一个最佳活动推荐
abstract: Recommending a sequence of activities for an ongoing case requires that the recommendations conform to the underlying business process and meet the performance goal of either completion time or process outcome. Existing work on next activity prediction can predict the future activity but cannot provide guarantees of the prediction being conformant or meeting the goal. Hence, we propose a goal-oriented next best activity recommendation. Our proposed framework uses a deep learning model to predict the next best activity and an estimated value of a goal given the activity. A reinforcement learning method explores the sequence of activities based on the estimates likely to meet one or more goals. We further address a real-world problem of multiple goals by introducing an additional reward function to balance the outcome of a recommended activity and satisfy the goal. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on four real-world datasets with different characteristics. The results show that the recommendations from our proposed approach outperform in goal satisfaction and conformance compared to the existing state-of-the-art next best activity recommendation techniques.
summary: Recommending a sequence of activities for an ongoing case requires that the recommendations conform to the underlying business process and meet the performance goal of either completion time or process outcome. Existing work on next activity prediction can predict the future activity but cannot provide guarantees of the prediction being conformant or meeting the goal. Hence, we propose a goal-oriented next best activity recommendation. Our proposed framework uses a deep learning model to predict the next best activity and an estimated value of a goal given the activity. A reinforcement learning method explores the sequence of activities based on the estimates likely to meet one or more goals. We further address a real-world problem of multiple goals by introducing an additional reward function to balance the outcome of a recommended activity and satisfy the goal. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on four real-world datasets with different characteristics. The results show that the recommendations from our proposed approach outperform in goal satisfaction and conformance compared to the existing state-of-the-art next best activity recommendation techniques.
abstract_zh: 为正在进行的案例推荐一系列活动要求建议符合基础业务流程并满足完成时间或流程结果的性能目标。现有的下一活动预测工作可以预测未来的活动，但不能保证预测符合或达到目标。因此，我们提出了一个以目标为导向的下一个最佳活动建议。我们提出的框架使用深度学习模型来预测下一个最佳活动以及给定活动的目标估计值。强化学习方法根据可能实现一个或多个目标的估计来探索活动的顺序。我们通过引入额外的奖励函数来平衡推荐活动的结果并满足目标，进一步解决多目标的现实问题。我们在四个具有不同特征的现实世界数据集上证明了所提出方法的有效性。结果表明，与现有最先进的次佳活动推荐技术相比，我们提出的方法的推荐在目标满意度和一致性方面优于现有的次佳活动推荐技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的目标导向活动推荐框架，解决现有方法无法保证活动符合业务流程和满足性能目标的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有活动推荐方法仅能预测未来活动，无法确保推荐结果符合业务流程或达成目标（如完成时间或流程结果）。
AI.method: 结合深度学习预测下一活动及目标估计值，利用强化学习探索符合目标的活动序列，并引入多目标奖励函数平衡不同目标需求。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上验证，所提方法在目标达成率和流程符合性指标上均优于现有最先进的活动推荐技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度学习与强化学习的结合，本文方法有效解决了多目标约束下的活动推荐问题，提升了推荐质量与业务目标达成能力。

authors_text: Khushdeep Singh Mann,Abhishek Tomy,Anshul Paigwar,Alessandro Renzaglia,Christian Laugier
title: Predicting Future Occupancy Grids in Dynamic Environment with Spatio-Temporal Learning
title_zh: 通过时空学习预测动态环境中的未来占用网格
comment: Accepted as an conference paper at 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium, 7 pages, 6 figures
comments: Accepted as an conference paper at 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium, 7 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Reliably predicting future occupancy of highly dynamic urban environments is an important precursor for safe autonomous navigation. Common challenges in the prediction include forecasting the relative position of other vehicles, modelling the dynamics of vehicles subjected to different traffic conditions, and vanishing surrounding objects. To tackle these challenges, we propose a spatio-temporal prediction network pipeline that takes the past information from the environment and semantic labels separately for generating future occupancy predictions. Compared to the current SOTA, our approach predicts occupancy for a longer horizon of 3 seconds and in a relatively complex environment from the nuScenes dataset. Our experimental results demonstrate the ability of spatio-temporal networks to understand scene dynamics without the need for HD-Maps and explicit modeling dynamic objects. We publicly release our occupancy grid dataset based on nuScenes to support further research.
summary: Reliably predicting future occupancy of highly dynamic urban environments is an important precursor for safe autonomous navigation. Common challenges in the prediction include forecasting the relative position of other vehicles, modelling the dynamics of vehicles subjected to different traffic conditions, and vanishing surrounding objects. To tackle these challenges, we propose a spatio-temporal prediction network pipeline that takes the past information from the environment and semantic labels separately for generating future occupancy predictions. Compared to the current SOTA, our approach predicts occupancy for a longer horizon of 3 seconds and in a relatively complex environment from the nuScenes dataset. Our experimental results demonstrate the ability of spatio-temporal networks to understand scene dynamics without the need for HD-Maps and explicit modeling dynamic objects. We publicly release our occupancy grid dataset based on nuScenes to support further research.
abstract_zh: 可靠地预测未来高度动态的城市环境的占用情况是安全自主导航的重要前提。预测中的常见挑战包括预测其他车辆的相对位置、对不同交通条件下车辆的动态进行建模以及周围物体的消失。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种时空预测网络管道，该管道分别从环境和语义标签中获取过去的信息，以生成未来的占用预测。与当前的 SOTA 相比，我们的方法可以根据 nuScenes 数据集在相对复杂的环境中预测 3 秒的较长时间范围内的占用情况。我们的实验结果证明了时空网络能够理解场景动态，而无需高清地图和显式建模动态对象。我们公开发布基于 nuScenes 的占用网格数据集以支持进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空学习的网络方法，用于预测动态环境中未来占用网格，以支持自动驾驶的安全导航。
AI.motivation: 动态城市环境中未来占用预测对自动驾驶安全至关重要，但现有方法在长时预测、复杂场景建模及消失物体处理上存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计时空预测网络，分别利用环境历史信息和语义标签生成未来占用预测，无需高精度地图或显式动态物体建模。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上实现了3秒长时预测，验证了时空网络对场景动态的理解能力，并公开了基于nuScenes的占用网格数据集。
AI.conclusion: 时空学习方法可有效预测复杂动态环境的未来占用状态，为自动驾驶研究提供了新思路和数据支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空学习的网络方法，用于预测动态环境中未来占用网格，以支持自动驾驶的安全导航。
ai_content.motivation: 动态城市环境中未来占用预测对自动驾驶安全至关重要，但现有方法在长时预测、复杂场景建模及消失物体处理上存在挑战。
ai_content.method: 设计时空预测网络，分别利用环境历史信息和语义标签生成未来占用预测，无需高精度地图或显式动态物体建模。
ai_content.result: 在nuScenes数据集上实现了3秒长时预测，验证了时空网络对场景动态的理解能力，并公开了基于nuScenes的占用网格数据集。
ai_content.conclusion: 时空学习方法可有效预测复杂动态环境的未来占用状态，为自动驾驶研究提供了新思路和数据支持。

search_text: Predicting Future Occupancy Grids in Dynamic Environment with Spatio-Temporal Learning 通过时空学习预测动态环境中的未来占用网格 Reliably predicting future occupancy of highly dynamic urban environments is an important precursor for safe autonomous navigation. Common challenges in the prediction include forecasting the relative position of other vehicles, modelling the dynamics of vehicles subjected to different traffic conditions, and vanishing surrounding objects. To tackle these challenges, we propose a spatio-temporal prediction network pipeline that takes the past information from the environment and semantic labels separately for generating future occupancy predictions. Compared to the current SOTA, our approach predicts occupancy for a longer horizon of 3 seconds and in a relatively complex environment from the nuScenes dataset. Our experimental results demonstrate the ability of spatio-temporal networks to understand scene dynamics without the need for HD-Maps and explicit modeling dynamic objects. We publicly release our occupancy grid dataset based on nuScenes to support further research. 可靠地预测未来高度动态的城市环境的占用情况是安全自主导航的重要前提。预测中的常见挑战包括预测其他车辆的相对位置、对不同交通条件下车辆的动态进行建模以及周围物体的消失。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种时空预测网络管道，该管道分别从环境和语义标签中获取过去的信息，以生成未来的占用预测。与当前的 SOTA 相比，我们的方法可以根据 nuScenes 数据集在相对复杂的环境中预测 3 秒的较长时间范围内的占用情况。我们的实验结果证明了时空网络能够理解场景动态，而无需高清地图和显式建模动态对象。我们公开发布基于 nuScenes 的占用网格数据集以支持进一步的研究。 本文提出了一种基于时空学习的网络方法，用于预测动态环境中未来占用网格，以支持自动驾驶的安全导航。 Khushdeep Singh Mann,Abhishek Tomy,Anshul Paigwar,Alessandro Renzaglia,Christian Laugier cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Davood Karimi,Ali Gholipour
title: Atlas-powered deep learning (ADL) -- application to diffusion weighted MRI
title_zh: Atlas 驱动的深度学习 (ADL)——在扩散加权 MRI 中的应用
abstract: Deep learning has a great potential for estimating biomarkers in diffusion weighted magnetic resonance imaging (dMRI). Atlases, on the other hand, are a unique tool for modeling the spatio-temporal variability of biomarkers. In this paper, we propose the first framework to exploit both deep learning and atlases for biomarker estimation in dMRI. Our framework relies on non-linear diffusion tensor registration to compute biomarker atlases and to estimate atlas reliability maps. We also use nonlinear tensor registration to align the atlas to a subject and to estimate the error of this alignment. We use the biomarker atlas, atlas reliability map, and alignment error map, in addition to the dMRI signal, as inputs to a deep learning model for biomarker estimation. We use our framework to estimate fractional anisotropy and neurite orientation dispersion from down-sampled dMRI data on a test cohort of 70 newborn subjects. Results show that our method significantly outperforms standard estimation methods as well as recent deep learning techniques. Our method is also more robust to stronger measurement down-sampling factors. Our study shows that the advantages of deep learning and atlases can be synergistically combined to achieve unprecedented accuracy in biomarker estimation from dMRI data.
summary: Deep learning has a great potential for estimating biomarkers in diffusion weighted magnetic resonance imaging (dMRI). Atlases, on the other hand, are a unique tool for modeling the spatio-temporal variability of biomarkers. In this paper, we propose the first framework to exploit both deep learning and atlases for biomarker estimation in dMRI. Our framework relies on non-linear diffusion tensor registration to compute biomarker atlases and to estimate atlas reliability maps. We also use nonlinear tensor registration to align the atlas to a subject and to estimate the error of this alignment. We use the biomarker atlas, atlas reliability map, and alignment error map, in addition to the dMRI signal, as inputs to a deep learning model for biomarker estimation. We use our framework to estimate fractional anisotropy and neurite orientation dispersion from down-sampled dMRI data on a test cohort of 70 newborn subjects. Results show that our method significantly outperforms standard estimation methods as well as recent deep learning techniques. Our method is also more robust to stronger measurement down-sampling factors. Our study shows that the advantages of deep learning and atlases can be synergistically combined to achieve unprecedented accuracy in biomarker estimation from dMRI data.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在估计扩散加权磁共振成像 (dMRI) 中的生物标志物方面具有巨大潜力。另一方面，图谱是模拟生物标志物时空变异性的独特工具。在本文中，我们提出了第一个利用深度学习和图集进行 dMRI 生物标志物估计的框架。我们的框架依赖于非线性扩散张量配准来计算生物标记图谱并估计图谱可靠性图。我们还使用非线性张量配准将图集与对象对齐并估计这种对齐的误差。除了 dMRI 信号之外，我们还使用生物标记图谱、图谱可靠性图和对齐误差图作为用于生物标记估计的深度学习模型的输入。我们使用我们的框架根据 70 名新生儿受试者的测试队列的下采样 dMRI 数据来估计分数各向异性和神经突方向离散度。结果表明，我们的方法明显优于标准估计方法以及最近的深度学习技术。我们的方法对于更强的测量下采样因子也更加鲁棒。我们的研究表明，深度学习和图谱的优势可以协同结合，以在 dMRI 数据的生物标志物估计中实现前所未有的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与图谱技术的框架，用于从扩散加权磁共振成像（dMRI）数据中更精确地估计生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在dMRI生物标志物估计中潜力巨大，而图谱技术能建模生物标志物的时空变异性。现有方法在数据降采样和鲁棒性方面存在不足，需探索两者协同优势。
AI.method: 通过非线性扩散张量配准生成生物标志物图谱及可靠性图，结合图谱与受试者对齐误差图，与dMRI信号共同输入深度学习模型进行生物标志物估计。
AI.result: 在70名新生儿测试队列中，该方法在降采样数据下的估计精度显著优于传统方法及最新深度学习技术，且对强降采样更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习与图谱技术的协同结合可实现dMRI生物标志物估计的前所未有的准确性，为低质量数据下的生物标志物分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Roee Shraga
title: HumanAL: Calibrating Human Matching Beyond a Single Task
title_zh: HumanAL：校准超越单一任务的人类匹配
comment: To appear in HILDA (https://hilda.io/2022/), Co-located with SIGMOD 2022 (https://2022.sigmod.org/)
comments: To appear in HILDA (https://hilda.io/2022/), Co-located with SIGMOD 2022 (https://2022.sigmod.org/)
abstract: This work offers a novel view on the use of human input as labels, acknowledging that humans may err. We build a behavioral profile for human annotators which is used as a feature representation of the provided input. We show that by utilizing black-box machine learning, we can take into account human behavior and calibrate their input to improve the labeling quality. To support our claims and provide a proof-of-concept, we experiment with three different matching tasks, namely, schema matching, entity matching and text matching. Our empirical evaluation suggests that the method can improve the quality of gathered labels in multiple settings including cross-domain (across different matching tasks).
summary: This work offers a novel view on the use of human input as labels, acknowledging that humans may err. We build a behavioral profile for human annotators which is used as a feature representation of the provided input. We show that by utilizing black-box machine learning, we can take into account human behavior and calibrate their input to improve the labeling quality. To support our claims and provide a proof-of-concept, we experiment with three different matching tasks, namely, schema matching, entity matching and text matching. Our empirical evaluation suggests that the method can improve the quality of gathered labels in multiple settings including cross-domain (across different matching tasks).
abstract_zh: 这项工作提供了一种关于使用人类输入作为标签的新颖观点，承认人类可能会犯错。我们为人类注释者构建了一个行为档案，用作所提供输入的特征表示。我们表明，通过利用黑盒机器学习，我们可以考虑人类行为并校准他们的输入以提高标签质量。为了支持我们的主张并提供概念验证，我们尝试了三种不同的匹配任务，即模式匹配、实体匹配和文本匹配。我们的实证评估表明，该方法可以提高多种设置中收集标签的质量，包括跨域（跨不同的匹配任务）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新方法，通过建立人类标注者的行为档案并利用黑盒机器学习校准其输入，以提升多任务场景下的标签质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分考虑人类标注者可能存在的错误及行为差异，导致标签质量不稳定，需通过行为校准提升标注可靠性。
AI.method: 构建人类标注者的行为特征表示，结合黑盒机器学习模型，利用行为数据校准其标签输出。
AI.result: 在三个匹配任务（模式匹配、实体匹配、文本匹配）中验证，方法有效提升跨领域场景下的标签质量。
AI.conclusion: 行为校准方法能显著提升多任务场景的标签质量，为人类与机器协作提供新思路。

authors_text: Achkan Salehi,Stephane Doncieux
title: Towards QD-suite: developing a set of benchmarks for Quality-Diversity algorithms
title_zh: 迈向 QD-suite：为质量多样性算法开发一套基准
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, Written for and presented at the GECCO 22 QD-benchmarking workshop (https://quality-diversity.github.io/workshop)
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, Written for and presented at the GECCO 22 QD-benchmarking workshop (https://quality-diversity.github.io/workshop)
abstract: While the field of Quality-Diversity (QD) has grown into a distinct branch of stochastic optimization, a few problems, in particular locomotion and navigation tasks, have become de facto standards. Are such benchmarks sufficient? Are they representative of the key challenges faced by QD algorithms? Do they provide the ability to focus on one particular challenge by properly disentangling it from others? Do they have much predictive power in terms of scalability and generalization? Existing benchmarks are not standardized, and there is currently no MNIST equivalent for QD. Inspired by recent works on Reinforcement Learning benchmarks, we argue that the identification of challenges faced by QD methods and the development of targeted, challenging, scalable but affordable benchmarks is an important step. As an initial effort, we identify three problems that are challenging in sparse reward settings, and propose associated benchmarks: (1) Behavior metric bias, which can result from the use of metrics that do not match the structure of the behavior space. (2) Behavioral Plateaus, with varying characteristics, such that escaping them would require adaptive QD algorithms and (3) Evolvability Traps, where small variations in genotype result in large behavioral changes. The environments that we propose satisfy the properties listed above.

Inspired by recent works on Reinforcement Learning benchmarks, we argue that the identification of challenges faced by QD methods and the development of targeted, challenging, scalable but affordable benchmarks is an important step. (2) Behavioral Plateaus, with varying characteristics, such that escaping them would require adaptive QD algorithms and (3) Evolvability Traps, where small variations in genotype result in large behavioral changes. The environments that we propose satisfy the properties listed above.
abstract_zh: 虽然质量多样性（QD）领域已发展成为随机优化的一个独特分支，但一些问题，特别是运动和导航任务，已成为事实上的标准。这样的基准足够吗？它们是否代表了 QD 算法面临的关键挑战？它们是否提供了通过适当地将某一特定挑战与其他挑战分开来专注于该挑战的能力？它们在可扩展性和泛化性方面是否具有很强的预测能力？现有基准尚未标准化，并且目前没有 QD 的等效 MNIST 基准。受最近强化学习基准研究工作的启发，我们认为识别 QD 方法面临的挑战以及开发有针对性的、具有挑战性的、可扩展的但负担得起的基准是重要的一步。作为初步努力，我们确定了稀疏奖励设置中具有挑战性的三个问题，并提出了相关基准：（1）行为度量偏差，这可能是由于使用与行为空间结构不匹配的度量而导致的。 (2) 行为高原，具有不同的特征，因此需要自适应 QD 算法来逃避它们；(3) 进化陷阱，其中基因型的微小变化会导致大的行为变化。我们建议的环境满足上面列出的属性。

AI.tldr: 开发一套针对质量多样性（QD）算法的基准测试，以解决现有基准不足的问题
AI.motivation: 现有QD基准缺乏标准化，无法有效评估算法在稀疏奖励场景下的挑战，需开发更具针对性的基准
AI.method: 识别稀疏奖励场景下的三个关键挑战（行为度量偏差、行为高原、演化陷阱），并设计相应的测试环境
AI.result: 提出三个符合挑战属性的基准环境：行为度量偏差、行为高原和演化陷阱
AI.conclusion: 为QD算法研究提供标准化基准，推动算法在可扩展性和泛化能力方面的改进

authors_text: Paolo Baldi,Hykel Hosni
title: A Logic-based Tractable Approximation of Probability
title_zh: 基于逻辑的易于处理的概率近似
abstract: We provide a logical framework in which a resource-bounded agent can be seen to perform approximations of probabilistic reasoning. Our main results read as follows. First we identify the conditions under which propositional probability functions can be approximated by a hierarchy of depth-bounded Belief functions. Second we show that under rather palatable restrictions, our approximations of probability lead to uncertain reasoning which, under the usual assumptions in the field, qualifies as tractable.
summary: We provide a logical framework in which a resource-bounded agent can be seen to perform approximations of probabilistic reasoning. Our main results read as follows. First we identify the conditions under which propositional probability functions can be approximated by a hierarchy of depth-bounded Belief functions. Second we show that under rather palatable restrictions, our approximations of probability lead to uncertain reasoning which, under the usual assumptions in the field, qualifies as tractable.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一个逻辑框架，在该框架中可以看到资源有限的代理执行概率推理的近似。我们的主要结果如下。首先，我们确定命题概率函数可以通过深度有界置信函数的层次结构来近似的条件。其次，我们表明，在相当令人满意的限制下，我们对概率的近似会导致不确定的推理，而在该领域的通常假设下，这种推理是可以处理的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个逻辑框架，使资源受限的代理能够通过深度受限的信念函数层次结构对概率推理进行可处理的近似。
AI.motivation: 传统概率推理计算复杂度高，资源受限的代理难以处理，需寻找高效近似方法以实现可处理的不确定推理。
AI.method: 构建逻辑框架，利用深度受限信念函数层次结构近似命题概率函数，并在合理限制下验证推理的可处理性。
AI.result: 确定命题概率函数被深度受限信念函数近似的条件，并证明在合理限制下近似推理符合可处理性标准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为资源受限代理提供了在合理限制下实现高效概率推理的可行逻辑框架。

authors_text: Maximilian Igl,Daewoo Kim,Alex Kuefler,Paul Mougin,Punit Shah,Kyriacos Shiarlis,Dragomir Anguelov,Mark Palatucci,Brandyn White,Shimon Whiteson
title: Symphony: Learning Realistic and Diverse Agents for Autonomous Driving Simulation
title_zh: Symphony：学习真实且多样化的自动驾驶模拟代理
abstract: Simulation is a crucial tool for accelerating the development of autonomous vehicles. Making simulation realistic requires models of the human road users who interact with such cars. Such models can be obtained by applying learning from demonstration (LfD) to trajectories observed by cars already on the road. However, existing LfD methods are typically insufficient, yielding policies that frequently collide or drive off the road. To address this problem, we propose Symphony, which greatly improves realism by combining conventional policies with a parallel beam search. The beam search refines these policies on the fly by pruning branches that are unfavourably evaluated by a discriminator. However, it can also harm diversity, i.e., how well the agents cover the entire distribution of realistic behaviour, as pruning can encourage mode collapse. Symphony addresses this issue with a hierarchical approach, factoring agent behaviour into goal generation and goal conditioning. The use of such goals ensures that agent diversity neither disappears during adversarial training nor is pruned away by the beam search. Experiments on both proprietary and open Waymo datasets confirm that Symphony agents learn more realistic and diverse behaviour than several baselines.
summary: Simulation is a crucial tool for accelerating the development of autonomous vehicles. Making simulation realistic requires models of the human road users who interact with such cars. Such models can be obtained by applying learning from demonstration (LfD) to trajectories observed by cars already on the road. However, existing LfD methods are typically insufficient, yielding policies that frequently collide or drive off the road. To address this problem, we propose Symphony, which greatly improves realism by combining conventional policies with a parallel beam search. The beam search refines these policies on the fly by pruning branches that are unfavourably evaluated by a discriminator. However, it can also harm diversity, i.e., how well the agents cover the entire distribution of realistic behaviour, as pruning can encourage mode collapse. Symphony addresses this issue with a hierarchical approach, factoring agent behaviour into goal generation and goal conditioning. The use of such goals ensures that agent diversity neither disappears during adversarial training nor is pruned away by the beam search. Experiments on both proprietary and open Waymo datasets confirm that Symphony agents learn more realistic and diverse behaviour than several baselines.
abstract_zh: 仿真是加速自动驾驶汽车开发的重要工具。要使模拟变得真实，需要与此类汽车互动的人类道路使用者的模型。这种模型可以通过将演示学习（LfD）应用于已经在路上的汽车观察到的轨迹来获得。然而，现有的 LfD 方法通常是不够的，产生的政策经常发生碰撞或驶离道路。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Symphony，它通过将传统策略与并行波束搜索相结合，极大地提高了真实性。集束搜索通过修剪那些被判别器评估不利的分支来动态完善这些策略。然而，它也会损害多样性，即代理覆盖现实行为的整个分布的程度，因为修剪可能会鼓励模式崩溃。 Symphony 通过分层方法解决了这个问题，将代理行为纳入目标生成和目标调节中。这些目标的使用确保代理多样性既不会在对抗训练期间消失，也不会被波束搜索修剪掉。在专有和开放的 Waymo 数据集上进行的实验证实，Symphony 代理比几个基线学习更现实和多样化的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Symphony方法，通过结合传统策略与并行束搜索，提升自动驾驶模拟中行人行为模型的真实性和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于演示学习的方法生成的策略常出现碰撞或偏离道路的问题，且难以保持行为多样性，需改进模拟的真实性与覆盖范围。
AI.method: Symphony通过分层架构将代理行为分解为目标生成与条件控制，利用束搜索结合判别器优化策略，同时通过目标引导避免模式崩溃导致的多样性下降。
AI.result: 在专有数据集和Waymo开放数据集上的实验表明，Symphony生成的代理行为比多个基线方法更真实且覆盖更多行为模式。
AI.conclusion: Symphony通过分层目标引导机制有效平衡了策略优化与多样性保持，为自动驾驶仿真提供了更可靠的交互模型。

search_text: Symphony: Learning Realistic and Diverse Agents for Autonomous Driving Simulation Symphony：学习真实且多样化的自动驾驶模拟代理 Simulation is a crucial tool for accelerating the development of autonomous vehicles. Making simulation realistic requires models of the human road users who interact with such cars. Such models can be obtained by applying learning from demonstration (LfD) to trajectories observed by cars already on the road. However, existing LfD methods are typically insufficient, yielding policies that frequently collide or drive off the road. To address this problem, we propose Symphony, which greatly improves realism by combining conventional policies with a parallel beam search. The beam search refines these policies on the fly by pruning branches that are unfavourably evaluated by a discriminator. However, it can also harm diversity, i.e., how well the agents cover the entire distribution of realistic behaviour, as pruning can encourage mode collapse. Symphony addresses this issue with a hierarchical approach, factoring agent behaviour into goal generation and goal conditioning. The use of such goals ensures that agent diversity neither disappears during adversarial training nor is pruned away by the beam search. Experiments on both proprietary and open Waymo datasets confirm that Symphony agents learn more realistic and diverse behaviour than several baselines. 仿真是加速自动驾驶汽车开发的重要工具。要使模拟变得真实，需要与此类汽车互动的人类道路使用者的模型。这种模型可以通过将演示学习（LfD）应用于已经在路上的汽车观察到的轨迹来获得。然而，现有的 LfD 方法通常是不够的，产生的政策经常发生碰撞或驶离道路。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Symphony，它通过将传统策略与并行波束搜索相结合，极大地提高了真实性。集束搜索通过修剪那些被判别器评估不利的分支来动态完善这些策略。然而，它也会损害多样性，即代理覆盖现实行为的整个分布的程度，因为修剪可能会鼓励模式崩溃。 Symphony 通过分层方法解决了这个问题，将代理行为纳入目标生成和目标调节中。这些目标的使用确保代理多样性既不会在对抗训练期间消失，也不会被波束搜索修剪掉。在专有和开放的 Waymo 数据集上进行的实验证实，Symphony 代理比几个基线学习更现实和多样化的行为。 本文提出Symphony方法，通过结合传统策略与并行束搜索，提升自动驾驶模拟中行人行为模型的真实性和多样性。 Maximilian Igl,Daewoo Kim,Alex Kuefler,Paul Mougin,Punit Shah,Kyriacos Shiarlis,Dragomir Anguelov,Mark Palatucci,Brandyn White,Shimon Whiteson cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Antoine Sion,Andreagiovanni Reina,Mauro Birattari,Elio Tuci
title: Controlling Robot Swarm Aggregation through a Minority of Informed Robots
title_zh: 通过少数知情机器人控制机器人群体聚集
abstract: Self-organized aggregation is a well studied behavior in swarm robotics as it is the pre-condition for the development of more advanced group-level responses. In this paper, we investigate the design of decentralized algorithms for a swarm of heterogeneous robots that self-aggregate over distinct target sites. A previous study has shown that including as part of the swarm a number of informed robots can steer the dynamic of the aggregation process to a desirable distribution of the swarm between the available aggregation sites. We have replicated the results of the previous study using a simplified approach: we removed constraints related to the communication protocol of the robots and simplified the control mechanisms regulating the transitions between states of the probabilistic controller. The results show that the performances obtained with the previous, more complex, controller can be replicated with our simplified approach which offers clear advantages in terms of portability to the physical robots and in terms of flexibility. That is, our simplified approach can generate self-organized aggregation responses in a larger set of operating conditions than what can be achieved with the complex controller.
summary: Self-organized aggregation is a well studied behavior in swarm robotics as it is the pre-condition for the development of more advanced group-level responses. In this paper, we investigate the design of decentralized algorithms for a swarm of heterogeneous robots that self-aggregate over distinct target sites. A previous study has shown that including as part of the swarm a number of informed robots can steer the dynamic of the aggregation process to a desirable distribution of the swarm between the available aggregation sites. We have replicated the results of the previous study using a simplified approach: we removed constraints related to the communication protocol of the robots and simplified the control mechanisms regulating the transitions between states of the probabilistic controller. The results show that the performances obtained with the previous, more complex, controller can be replicated with our simplified approach which offers clear advantages in terms of portability to the physical robots and in terms of flexibility. That is, our simplified approach can generate self-organized aggregation responses in a larger set of operating conditions than what can be achieved with the complex controller.
abstract_zh: 自组织聚合是群体机器人中经过充分研究的行为，因为它是开发更高级的群体级响应的先决条件。在本文中，我们研究了一群异构机器人的去中心化算法的设计，这些机器人在不同的目标站点上进行自我聚合。之前的一项研究表明，作为群体的一部分，包括一些知情的机器人可以引导聚合过程的动态，使群体在可用聚合站点之间实现理想的分布。我们使用简化的方法复制了先前研究的结果：我们消除了与机器人通信协议相关的约束，并简化了调节概率控制器状态之间转换的控制机制。结果表明，通过我们的简化方法可以复制以前更复杂的控制器所获得的性能，该方法在物理机器人的可移植性和灵活性方面提供了明显的优势。也就是说，我们的简化方法可以在比复杂控制器更大的一组操作条件下生成自组织聚合响应。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种去中心化算法，通过少数知情机器人控制异构机器人集群在不同目标点的自组织聚合。
AI.motivation: 现有复杂控制器因通信协议约束和状态转换机制限制，难以在实际物理机器人中灵活应用，需简化方法以提高可移植性。
AI.method: 移除通信协议约束，简化概率控制器的状态转换机制，复现前人复杂控制器的聚合效果。
AI.result: 简化方法成功复制了复杂控制器的性能，且在更多操作条件下表现出更高的灵活性和可移植性。
AI.conclusion: 简化控制器在保持性能的同时，显著提升了适应不同操作条件的能力，适用于更广泛的物理机器人场景。

authors_text: Shuo Gu,Suling Yao,Jian Yang,Hui Kong
title: Semantics-Guided Moving Object Segmentation with 3D LiDAR
title_zh: 使用 3D LiDAR 进行语义引导的移动对象分割
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Moving object segmentation (MOS) is a task to distinguish moving objects, e.g., moving vehicles and pedestrians, from the surrounding static environment. The segmentation accuracy of MOS can have an influence on odometry, map construction, and planning tasks. In this paper, we propose a semantics-guided convolutional neural network for moving object segmentation. The network takes sequential LiDAR range images as inputs. Instead of segmenting the moving objects directly, the network conducts single-scan-based semantic segmentation and multiple-scan-based moving object segmentation in turn. The semantic segmentation module provides semantic priors for the MOS module, where we propose an adjacent scan association (ASA) module to convert the semantic features of adjacent scans into the same coordinate system to fully exploit the cross-scan semantic features. Finally, by analyzing the difference between the transformed features, reliable MOS result can be obtained quickly. Experimental results on the SemanticKITTI MOS dataset proves the effectiveness of our work.
summary: Moving object segmentation (MOS) is a task to distinguish moving objects, e.g., moving vehicles and pedestrians, from the surrounding static environment. The segmentation accuracy of MOS can have an influence on odometry, map construction, and planning tasks. In this paper, we propose a semantics-guided convolutional neural network for moving object segmentation. The network takes sequential LiDAR range images as inputs. Instead of segmenting the moving objects directly, the network conducts single-scan-based semantic segmentation and multiple-scan-based moving object segmentation in turn. The semantic segmentation module provides semantic priors for the MOS module, where we propose an adjacent scan association (ASA) module to convert the semantic features of adjacent scans into the same coordinate system to fully exploit the cross-scan semantic features. Finally, by analyzing the difference between the transformed features, reliable MOS result can be obtained quickly. Experimental results on the SemanticKITTI MOS dataset proves the effectiveness of our work.
abstract_zh: 移动对象分割（MOS）是一项从周围静态环境中区分移动对象（例如移动车辆和行人）的任务。 MOS 的分割精度会对里程计、地图构建和规划任务产生影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于运动对象分割的语义引导卷积神经网络。该网络将连续的 LiDAR 距离图像作为输入。该网络不是直接对运动对象进行分割，而是依次进行基于单扫描的语义分割和基于多扫描的运动对象分割。语义分割模块为MOS模块提供语义先验，其中我们提出了相邻扫描关联（ASA）模块，将相邻扫描的语义特征转换为相同的坐标系，以充分利用跨扫描语义特征。最后，通过分析变换后的特征之间的差异，可以快速得到可靠的MOS结果。 SemanticKITTI MOS 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们工作的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义引导的3D激光雷达移动物体分割方法，通过结合单次扫描语义分割与多扫描特征关联提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 移动物体分割精度直接影响自动驾驶中的定位、建图与路径规划，传统方法难以有效利用语义信息与跨帧特征关联。
AI.method: 设计语义引导卷积神经网络，先进行单帧语义分割获取先验信息，再通过相邻扫描关联模块（ASA）对齐多帧语义特征，基于特征差异实现快速可靠分割。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI MOS数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，分割性能优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 融合语义先验与跨帧特征关联的分割框架能显著提升3D激光雷达移动物体分割的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Leixian Shen,Enya Shen,Zhiwei Tai,Yihao Xu,Jianmin Wang
title: Visual Data Analysis with Task-based Recommendations
title_zh: 具有基于任务的建议的可视化数据分析
abstract: General visualization recommendation systems typically make design decisions for the dataset automatically. However, most of them can only prune meaningless visualizations but fail to recommend targeted results. This paper contributes TaskVis, a task-oriented visualization recommendation system that allows users to select their tasks precisely on the interface. We first summarize a task base with 18 classical analytic tasks by a survey both in academia and industry. On this basis, we maintain a rule base, which extends empirical wisdom with our targeted modeling of the analytic tasks. Then, our rule-based approach enumerates all the candidate visualizations through answer set programming. After that, the generated charts can be ranked by four ranking schemes. Furthermore, we introduce a task-based combination recommendation strategy, leveraging a set of visualizations to give a brief view of the dataset collaboratively. Finally, we evaluate TaskVis through a series of use cases and a user study.
summary: General visualization recommendation systems typically make design decisions for the dataset automatically. However, most of them can only prune meaningless visualizations but fail to recommend targeted results. This paper contributes TaskVis, a task-oriented visualization recommendation system that allows users to select their tasks precisely on the interface. We first summarize a task base with 18 classical analytic tasks by a survey both in academia and industry. On this basis, we maintain a rule base, which extends empirical wisdom with our targeted modeling of the analytic tasks. Then, our rule-based approach enumerates all the candidate visualizations through answer set programming. After that, the generated charts can be ranked by four ranking schemes. Furthermore, we introduce a task-based combination recommendation strategy, leveraging a set of visualizations to give a brief view of the dataset collaboratively. Finally, we evaluate TaskVis through a series of use cases and a user study.
abstract_zh: 通用可视化推荐系统通常自动为数据集做出设计决策。然而，他们中的大多数只能修剪无意义的可视化，而无法推荐有针对性的结果。本文贡献了TaskVis，一个面向任务的可视化推荐系统，允许用户在界面上精确地选择他们的任务。我们首先通过学术界和工业界的调查总结出包含 18 项经典分析任务的任务库。在此基础上，我们维护一个规则库，通过我们对分析任务的有针对性的建模来扩展经验智慧。然后，我们基于规则的方法通过答案集编程枚举所有候选可视化。之后，生成的图表可以通过四种排名方案进行排名。此外，我们引入了基于任务的组合推荐策略，利用一组可视化来协作提供数据集的简要视图。最后，我们通过一系列用例和用户研究来评估 TaskVis。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TaskVis，一种基于任务的可视化推荐系统，通过用户精确选择分析任务来生成和推荐针对性的可视化结果。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化推荐系统无法有效推荐目标化结果，仅能剔除无意义可视化，需通过任务导向方法提升推荐精准度。
AI.method: 构建包含18个经典分析任务的任务库与规则库，利用答案集编程生成候选可视化，结合四种排序方案及任务组合推荐策略进行优化。
AI.result: 通过使用案例与用户研究验证，TaskVis能有效生成符合用户任务需求的可视化方案并提升分析效率。
AI.conclusion: TaskVis通过任务驱动的规则建模与组合推荐策略，显著优于传统自动化设计方法，为可视化推荐提供了新思路。

search_text: Visual Data Analysis with Task-based Recommendations 具有基于任务的建议的可视化数据分析 General visualization recommendation systems typically make design decisions for the dataset automatically. However, most of them can only prune meaningless visualizations but fail to recommend targeted results. This paper contributes TaskVis, a task-oriented visualization recommendation system that allows users to select their tasks precisely on the interface. We first summarize a task base with 18 classical analytic tasks by a survey both in academia and industry. On this basis, we maintain a rule base, which extends empirical wisdom with our targeted modeling of the analytic tasks. Then, our rule-based approach enumerates all the candidate visualizations through answer set programming. After that, the generated charts can be ranked by four ranking schemes. Furthermore, we introduce a task-based combination recommendation strategy, leveraging a set of visualizations to give a brief view of the dataset collaboratively. Finally, we evaluate TaskVis through a series of use cases and a user study. 通用可视化推荐系统通常自动为数据集做出设计决策。然而，他们中的大多数只能修剪无意义的可视化，而无法推荐有针对性的结果。本文贡献了TaskVis，一个面向任务的可视化推荐系统，允许用户在界面上精确地选择他们的任务。我们首先通过学术界和工业界的调查总结出包含 18 项经典分析任务的任务库。在此基础上，我们维护一个规则库，通过我们对分析任务的有针对性的建模来扩展经验智慧。然后，我们基于规则的方法通过答案集编程枚举所有候选可视化。之后，生成的图表可以通过四种排名方案进行排名。此外，我们引入了基于任务的组合推荐策略，利用一组可视化来协作提供数据集的简要视图。最后，我们通过一系列用例和用户研究来评估 TaskVis。 本文提出TaskVis，一种基于任务的可视化推荐系统，通过用户精确选择分析任务来生成和推荐针对性的可视化结果。 Leixian Shen,Enya Shen,Zhiwei Tai,Yihao Xu,Jianmin Wang cs.HC

authors_text: Achkan Salehi,Alexandre Coninx,Stephane Doncieux
title: Geodesics, Non-linearities and the Archive of Novelty Search
title_zh: 测地线、非线性和新颖性搜索档案
abstract: The Novelty Search (NS) algorithm was proposed more than a decade ago. However, the mechanisms behind its empirical success are still not well formalized/understood. This short note focuses on the effects of the archive on exploration. Experimental evidence from a few application domains suggests that archive-based NS performs in general better than when Novelty is solely computed with respect to the population. An argument that is often encountered in the literature is that the archive prevents exploration from backtracking or cycling, i.e. from revisiting previously encountered areas in the behavior space. We argue that this is not a complete or accurate explanation as backtracking - beside often being desirable - can actually be enabled by the archive. Through low-dimensional/analytical examples, we show that a key effect of the archive is that it counterbalances the exploration biases that result, among other factors, from the use of inadequate behavior metrics and the non-linearities of the behavior mapping. Our observations seem to hint that attributing a more active role to the archive in sampling can be beneficial.
summary: The Novelty Search (NS) algorithm was proposed more than a decade ago. However, the mechanisms behind its empirical success are still not well formalized/understood. This short note focuses on the effects of the archive on exploration. Experimental evidence from a few application domains suggests that archive-based NS performs in general better than when Novelty is solely computed with respect to the population. An argument that is often encountered in the literature is that the archive prevents exploration from backtracking or cycling, i.e. from revisiting previously encountered areas in the behavior space. We argue that this is not a complete or accurate explanation as backtracking - beside often being desirable - can actually be enabled by the archive. Through low-dimensional/analytical examples, we show that a key effect of the archive is that it counterbalances the exploration biases that result, among other factors, from the use of inadequate behavior metrics and the non-linearities of the behavior mapping. Our observations seem to hint that attributing a more active role to the archive in sampling can be beneficial.
abstract_zh: 新颖性搜索（NS）算法是十多年前提出的。然而，其实证成功背后的机制仍然没有得到很好的形式化/理解。这篇简短的说明重点关注档案对探索的影响。来自一些应用领域的实验证据表明，基于存档的 NS 通常比仅根据总体计算新颖性时表现更好。文献中经常遇到的一个论点是，档案阻止了探索回溯或循环，即阻止重新访问行为空间中以前遇到的区域。我们认为这不是一个完整或准确的解释，因为回溯——除了通常是可取的——实际上可以由档案启用。通过低维/分析示例，我们表明档案的一个关键作用是它抵消了由于使用不充分的行为指标和行为映射的非线性等因素而导致的探索偏差。我们的观察似乎暗示，让档案馆在抽样中发挥更积极的作用可能是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了新颖性搜索（NS）算法中存档（archive）对探索行为的影响，挑战了传统观点并提出新的解释。
AI.motivation: 尽管NS算法已应用十余年，但其成功机制尤其是存档的作用尚未被充分理解，传统观点认为存档防止回溯，但作者认为此解释不完整。
AI.method: 通过低维/解析示例及多个应用领域的实验，分析存档如何抵消行为度量不足和非线性映射带来的探索偏差。
AI.result: 存档不仅不限制回溯，还能平衡探索偏差，实验表明主动利用存档可提升NS性能。
AI.conclusion: 存档的作用需超越防止循环的简单解释，其核心价值在于协调探索偏差，未来应更积极地设计存档采样策略。

authors_text: Zhiyu Lin,Yifei Gao,Jitao Sang
title: Investigating and Explaining the Frequency Bias in Image Classification
title_zh: 调查和解释图像分类中的频率偏差
abstract: CNNs exhibit many behaviors different from humans, one of which is the capability of employing high-frequency components. This paper discusses the frequency bias phenomenon in image classification tasks: the high-frequency components are actually much less exploited than the low- and mid-frequency components. We first investigate the frequency bias phenomenon by presenting two observations on feature discrimination and learning priority. Furthermore, we hypothesize that (i) the spectral density, (ii) class consistency directly affect the frequency bias. Specifically, our investigations verify that the spectral density of datasets mainly affects the learning priority, while the class consistency mainly affects the feature discrimination.
summary: CNNs exhibit many behaviors different from humans, one of which is the capability of employing high-frequency components. This paper discusses the frequency bias phenomenon in image classification tasks: the high-frequency components are actually much less exploited than the low- and mid-frequency components. We first investigate the frequency bias phenomenon by presenting two observations on feature discrimination and learning priority. Furthermore, we hypothesize that (i) the spectral density, (ii) class consistency directly affect the frequency bias. Specifically, our investigations verify that the spectral density of datasets mainly affects the learning priority, while the class consistency mainly affects the feature discrimination.
abstract_zh: CNN 表现出许多与人类不同的行为，其中之一是使用高频组件的能力。本文讨论了图像分类任务中的频率偏差现象：高频成分实际上比低频和中频成分被利用得少得多。我们首先通过提出关于特征歧视和学习优先级的两个观察来研究频率偏差现象。此外，我们假设（i）谱密度，（ii）类别一致性直接影响频率偏差。具体来说，我们的研究证实数据集的谱密度主要影响学习优先级，而类一致性主要影响特征辨别。

AI.tldr: 研究图像分类任务中卷积神经网络（CNN）对高频成分利用不足的频率偏差现象，并探讨其成因。
AI.motivation: CNN在图像分类中表现出与人类不同的行为，尤其在高频成分利用方面存在偏差，但现有研究缺乏对其成因的系统性解释。
AI.method: 通过分析特征判别能力与学习优先级的观察结果，结合频谱密度和类别一致性两个假设进行实验验证。
AI.result: 验证了数据集的频谱密度主要影响模型学习优先级，而类别一致性主要影响特征判别能力。
AI.conclusion: 频率偏差现象由频谱密度与类别一致性共同作用导致，为理解CNN的频率敏感性提供了理论依据。

Specifically, our investigations verify that the spectral density of datasets mainly affects the learning priority, while the class consistency mainly affects the feature discrimination. authors_text: Wolfgang Dvořák,Matthias König,Markus Ulbricht,Stefan Woltran
title: Rediscovering Argumentation Principles Utilizing Collective Attacks
title_zh: 利用集体攻击重新发现论证原则
abstract: Argumentation Frameworks (AFs) are a key formalism in AI research. Their semantics have been investigated in terms of principles, which define characteristic properties in order to deliver guidance for analysing established and developing new semantics. Because of the simple structure of AFs, many desired properties hold almost trivially, at the same time hiding interesting concepts behind syntactic notions. We extend the principle-based approach to Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks (SETAFs) and provide a comprehensive overview of common principles for their semantics. Our analysis shows that investigating principles based on decomposing the given SETAF (e.g. directionality or SCC-recursiveness) poses additional challenges in comparison to usual AFs. We introduce the notion of the reduct as well as the modularization principle for SETAFs which will prove beneficial for this kind of investigation. We then demonstrate how our findings can be utilized for incremental computation of extensions and give a novel parameterized tractability result for verifying preferred extensions.
summary: Argumentation Frameworks (AFs) are a key formalism in AI research. Their semantics have been investigated in terms of principles, which define characteristic properties in order to deliver guidance for analysing established and developing new semantics. Because of the simple structure of AFs, many desired properties hold almost trivially, at the same time hiding interesting concepts behind syntactic notions. We extend the principle-based approach to Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks (SETAFs) and provide a comprehensive overview of common principles for their semantics. Our analysis shows that investigating principles based on decomposing the given SETAF (e.g. directionality or SCC-recursiveness) poses additional challenges in comparison to usual AFs. We introduce the notion of the reduct as well as the modularization principle for SETAFs which will prove beneficial for this kind of investigation. We then demonstrate how our findings can be utilized for incremental computation of extensions and give a novel parameterized tractability result for verifying preferred extensions.
abstract_zh: 论证框架（AF）是人工智能研究中的关键形式主义。它们的语义已经根据原则进行了研究，这些原则定义了特征属性，以便为分析已建立的和开发新的语义提供指导。由于 AF 的结构简单，许多所需的属性几乎都是微不足道的，同时在句法概念后面隐藏了有趣的概念。我们将基于原则的方法扩展到带有集体攻击的论证框架（SETAF），并对其语义的通用原则进行了全面的概述。我们的分析表明，与通常的 AF 相比，基于分解给定 SETAF（例如方向性或 SCC 递归性）的研究原则提出了额外的挑战。我们引入了约简的概念以及 SETAF 的模块化原理，这将有助于此类研究。然后，我们演示如何利用我们的发现进行扩展的增量计算，并给出新颖的参数化易处理结果来验证首选扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文将基于原则的论证框架（AFs）分析方法扩展到具有集体攻击的SETAFs，提出分解原则的挑战并引入reduct与模块化原则以支持增量计算。
AI.motivation: 传统AFs的简单结构使许多属性显而易见，掩盖了深层概念，需通过SETAFs的复杂性探索更精细的语义原则。
AI.method: 通过分解SETAFs（如方向性、SCC递归性）分析原则，引入reduct概念和模块化原则，并应用于扩展计算与参数化可处理性验证。
AI.result: 揭示了SETAFs分解原则的额外挑战，提出reduct与模块化原则，获得验证优选扩展的参数化可处理性结果。
AI.conclusion: 新方法为SETAFs语义分析提供理论工具，支持增量计算，为未来研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Zhenghang Yuan,Lichao Mou,Qi Wang,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: From Easy to Hard: Learning Language-guided Curriculum for Visual Question Answering on Remote Sensing Data
title_zh: 由易到难：遥感数据视觉问答学习语言引导课程
abstract: Visual question answering (VQA) for remote sensing scene has great potential in intelligent human-computer interaction system. Although VQA in computer vision has been widely researched, VQA for remote sensing data (RSVQA) is still in its infancy. There are two characteristics that need to be specially considered for the RSVQA task. 1) No object annotations are available in RSVQA datasets, which makes it difficult for models to exploit informative region representation; 2) There are questions with clearly different difficulty levels for each image in the RSVQA task. Directly training a model with questions in a random order may confuse the model and limit the performance. To address these two problems, in this paper, a multi-level visual feature learning method is proposed to jointly extract language-guided holistic and regional image features. Besides, a self-paced curriculum learning (SPCL)-based VQA model is developed to train networks with samples in an easy-to-hard way. To be more specific, a language-guided SPCL method with a soft weighting strategy is explored in this work. The proposed model is evaluated on three public datasets, and extensive experimental results show that the proposed RSVQA framework can achieve promising performance.
summary: Visual question answering (VQA) for remote sensing scene has great potential in intelligent human-computer interaction system. Although VQA in computer vision has been widely researched, VQA for remote sensing data (RSVQA) is still in its infancy. There are two characteristics that need to be specially considered for the RSVQA task. 1) No object annotations are available in RSVQA datasets, which makes it difficult for models to exploit informative region representation; 2) There are questions with clearly different difficulty levels for each image in the RSVQA task. Directly training a model with questions in a random order may confuse the model and limit the performance. To address these two problems, in this paper, a multi-level visual feature learning method is proposed to jointly extract language-guided holistic and regional image features. Besides, a self-paced curriculum learning (SPCL)-based VQA model is developed to train networks with samples in an easy-to-hard way. To be more specific, a language-guided SPCL method with a soft weighting strategy is explored in this work. The proposed model is evaluated on three public datasets, and extensive experimental results show that the proposed RSVQA framework can achieve promising performance.
abstract_zh: 遥感场景视觉问答（VQA）在智能人机交互系统中具有巨大潜力。尽管计算机视觉中的 VQA 已得到广泛研究，但遥感数据 VQA (RSVQA) 仍处于起步阶段。 RSVQA 任务有两个特征需要特别考虑。 1）RSVQA数据集中没有可用的对象注释，这使得模型很难利用信息丰富的区域表示； 2）RSVQA任务中每张图像都有明显不同难度级别的问题。用随机顺序的问题直接训练模型可能会混淆模型并限制性能。为了解决这两个问题，本文提出了一种多级视觉特征学习方法，联合提取语言引导的整体和区域图像特征。此外，还开发了基于自定进度课程学习（SPCL）的 VQA 模型，以从易到难的方式用样本训练网络。更具体地说，本工作探索了一种具有软加权策略的语言引导 SPCL 方法。所提出的模型在三个公共数据集上进行了评估，广泛的实验结果表明所提出的 RSVQA 框架可以实现有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文针对遥感图像视觉问答（RSVQA）任务中缺乏目标标注和问题难度差异大的挑战，提出多级视觉特征学习方法与自适应课程学习模型。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像问答数据集缺乏目标标注导致区域特征提取困难，且问题难度差异大易使模型训练混乱，限制性能提升。
AI.method: 提出多级语言引导视觉特征学习方法联合提取全局与区域特征，并设计基于软加权策略的自适应课程学习（SPCL）模型，按难易程度逐步训练网络。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，所提RSVQA框架在性能上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 结合语言引导特征学习与自适应课程学习策略，能有效解决遥感图像问答任务中的关键挑战。
